title: Companies powering India’s Aatmanirbhar Bharat vision
description: Samarth Elder-care Asheesh Gupta , FounderSamarth Elder Care: Making India’s Elders AatmanirbharSamarth is India’s most trusted, professionally managed elder care organisation serving 40,000 members in 350+ cities. Founded in 2016 by alumni of IIT, IIM, Cambridge, Yale, and McKinsey, it is a Social Alpha investee.For families in India and across 33+ different countries, Samarth bridges the distance, delivering accountable care to ageing parents back home. It is also the preferred parent-care partner for employees and customers, in many progressive organisations, including leading banks, insurers and multinationals.Beyond Samarth’s Eldercare Plans, they also activate older adults as mentors, advisors, and neighbourhood anchors, through their Community Leaders Programme and Multi-Activity Centres.“Sixty or seventy years of judgment, patience, and relationships. Every senior is like a library that has not yet been discovered,” says founder Asheesh Gupta. Samarth’s alignment with Aatmanirbhar Bharat runs deep, and they are reframing India’s elder population as a national asset.AGNOSHIN Gomathi Perumal ( VP) & Team AgnoShinAgnoShin: Future-Ready CXM Solutions Rooted in Innovation, Responsibility, and Recognition.In an era of rapid digital change, AgnoShin stands out as a technology-agnostic leader in Customer Experience Management (CXM). Its platform, protocol, and device-independent solutions help organizations navigate shifting landscapes with confidence—safeguarding tech investments while enabling seamless adoption of new innovations.Customer-centricity drives everything AgnoShin does. The company’s professional services team designs solutions that enhance engagement, improve efficiency, and strengthen relationships across the customer journey turning routine interactions into memorable experiences that build trust, loyalty, and sustainable growth.AgnoShin serves clients across North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and the Middle East and Africa. Its flagship products include AI-driven CX analytics, omnichannel engagement platforms, and protocol-agnostic integration tools that unify legacy and modern systems.Through CSR initiatives focused on digital literacy, community development, and environmental sustainability, AgnoShin proves that great customer experiences start with a responsible purpose. This commitment has earned multiple industry awards for innovation and operational excellence in CXM.Gomathi Perumal, Head of Business Operations, plays a pivotal role in driving operational excellence and the successful delivery of innovative CXM solutions across industries.Nextel Meta Private Limited Mikkilineni Srikanth, CEONextel Meta CEO to Publish CBN @ 361-Degrees (The Polymath) Free in Multiple Languages.Mikkilineni Srikanth, CEO of Nextel Meta Private Limited and Managing Director of Repati Kosam, has announced that CBN @ 361-Degrees (The Polymath) will be published and distributed free of cost in multiple languages. The English edition was launched and distributed free in Singapore on 16 June, while Telugu and other language editions are planned for free global distribution.Ahead of the 2024 General Elections, Srikanth released Chandrababu X.O.: The Infinite Ideologue in Telugu, English, Hindi, German and French, also free of cost. The book set three world records and received national and international attention.Founded in 2016, Hyderabad-based Nextel Meta Private Limited Developed E-Sign Meta Education, India’s first e-learning platform for hearing-impaired students, and operates educational platforms including Pathashala.com and Kalashala.com, alongside digital-commerce ventures such as ShriMall.com, Abharanam.com and vastram.com.D2S Technologies Devrishi Arora, Founder & CEOD2S Technologies: Fusing Technology, Creativity & Innovation for Digital Solutions!At D2S Technlogies, we help businesses connect with their target groups and build a strong online presence by putting emphasis on new ideas and measurable growth. Our skilled professionals create personalized solutions that help businesses become more visible, work more efficiently, and connect with their customers.With over a decade of experience serving organizations ranging from emerging SMEs to Fortune-listed enterprises, we have gained deep insights into the evolving digital landscape and the challenges businesses face at every stage of growth.We enable businesses to scale faster through digital solutions & AI Driven strategies that drive efficiency, innovation, and sustainable growth. D2S is fortunate to work with companies that are helping India become a globally competitive and self-sufficient economy.Driven by a vision to empower Indian enterprises, Devrishi Arora Founder of D2S, has successfully partnered with startups, SMEs, and large corporations, enabling them to build strong digital foundation in an increasingly competitive marketplace.SBOOCH  Kajall Manek (COO) & Nirraj Manek (CEO)Inside the Indian Startup Rewriting the Global Beverage PlaybookThe Indian brand that won two world awards before most people have heard of it: The SBOOCH Story.In less than a year, a new force is disrupting and reshaping India's beverage landscape. SBOOCH is emerging as the nation’s fastest-growing kombucha. category leader. Brewing a new culture of clean, functional beverages, the brand stands apart with its unique flavor profiles crafted from 100% real ingredients, infusing Indian culture in every bottle with *ZERO adulteration* (NO BS of nature-based colors or flavors).This commitment to purity recently propelled the brand onto the global stage, clinching two prestigious World Awards and putting Indian innovation on the international map.Behind this meteoric rise are co-founders Nirraj Satish Manek and Kajall N. Manek. Fusing their expertise in F&B and hospitality with a powerhouse 30+ year combined corporate and professional pedigree, the duo has successfully turned a shared lifestyle vision into a potential leader in a budding and fast-growing category, growing at upwards of 17% CAGR.Sboochers are pouncing on the premium, non-alcoholic, gut-friendly brew, as the market has taken notice, and SBOOCH is flying off the shelves across all major E/Qcom platforms and modern trade stores.The brand’s growth is fueled by an elite roster of partners and advisors, including top-tier CXOs from *Aditya Birla, Morgan Stanley, and KPMG, alongside legendary actor and investor **Mr. Suniel Shetty*. Together, they aren't just selling a drink—they are pioneering a clean beverage revolution.Nilkanth Engineering works Hardik H Solanki , Director- Sales & MarketingEstablished in 1982, Nilkanth Engineering Works is one of India's leading manufacturers of Concrete Batching Plants and AluminiumFormworkSystems, backed by over 43 years of engineering excellence, innovation, and customer trust. With a strong presence across India and international markets, Nilkanth has earned a reputation for delivering reliable, high-performance, and technologically advanced concrete batching solutions for infrastructure, industrial, commercial, and renewable energy projects.Our range of Concrete Batching Plants is designed to provide superior productivity, accuracy, durability, and consistent concrete quality, ensuring maximum efficiency at every project site. From compact/mobile plants to high-capacity stationary Concrete Batching Plant installations, Nilkanth solutions are trusted by contractors, developers, and infrastructure companies worldwide.Today, Nilkanth is widely recognized as a preferred and leading partner for wind farm and solar power projects, having supplied equipment for numerous renewable energy developments across the region. Driven by a commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, Nilkanth Engineering Works continues to build the foundation for tomorrow's infrastructure while strengthening its legacy of excellence since 1982.MarsDevs Vishvajit Pathak , Founder & CEOFounded in 2019 by Vishvajit Pathak, MarsDevs is a global product engineering company that partners with startups, scale-ups, and enterprises to build, modernize, and scale digital products. Headquartered in Pune, India, we serve clients across 10+ countries and 12 industry verticals, delivering AI solutions, web and mobile applications, cloud platforms, enterprise software, and digital transformation initiatives.Our cross-functional engineering pods combine product strategy, design, software engineering, QA, DevOps, and AI expertise to accelerate delivery while maintaining enterprise-grade quality, security, and scalability. Whether acting as a technical co-founder for an early-stage startup or an engineering partner for an established enterprise, we focus on solving complex business challenges through practical technology.At MarsDevs, we believe innovation is driven by execution. By combining deep technical expertise with a partnership-first approach, we help organizations reduce time-to-market, adopt AI with confidence, modernize legacy systems, and build software that creates measurable business value.Gogreen Warehouses Pvt. Ltd Santosh Kumar Sahu , Cofounder & CEOGogreen Warehouses Pvt. Ltd. is one of India's fastest-growing agri-warehousing and collateral management companies, contributing significantly to the vision of Aatmanirbhar Bharat by strengthening post-harvest infrastructure and improving farmers' access to finance. Operating across 700+ locations in 25 states, Gogreen manages agricultural commodities valued at over ₹10,000 crore, working with 42+ banks, 4,000+ clients, 500+ Farmer Producer Organizations (FPOs), and supporting more than 5 lakh farmers across the country.The company's remarkable growth has been led by Mr. Maulik Shah and Mr. Santosh Kumar Sahu, whose combined expertise in agriculture, warehousing, logistics, and commodity value chains has helped build a trusted national platform. Under their leadership, Gogreen has developed a network handling 200+ commodities and created employment opportunities for 1,600+ professionals. Through scientific warehousing, collateral management, NABL-accredited testing services, and technology-driven operations, Gogreen is enhancing agricultural efficiency, reducing post-harvest losses, and empowering India's farming community while advancing the nation's food security and self-reliance objectives.Billabong High International School Priti Agarwal, Founder & CEOPriti Agarwal is an education entrepreneur and transformational school leader with over two decades of experience in shaping innovative learning environments. As Founder and CEO of Billabong High International School and Kangaroo Kids Kanpur, she has championed a child-first approach that combines academic excellence with creativity, character development, and future readiness.A graduate of Lady Shri Ram College for Women with a degree in Political Science (Hons.) and a qualified solicitor, Priti brings a distinctive blend of legal expertise, strategic leadership, and educational vision. Since 2001, she has led pioneering initiatives in experiential learning, inquiry-based education, social-emotional development, and global curricula.Under her leadership, Billabong High International School has gained recognition for academic excellence, Cambridge learner achievements, innovation, and global university destinations. Passionate about redefining education, Priti continues to advocate for learning experiences that empower young people to become confident, compassionate, and globally minded citizens.The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.

title: The next-generation leaders reshaping business
description: New Delhi [India], June 22: A new wave of entrepreneurs, founders, and executives is transforming industries through innovation, strategic vision, and bold leadership. These next-generation leaders are not only driving business growth but also creating meaningful impact by challenging conventions and embracing change. In this special feature, we spotlight emerging changemakers whose ideas, resilience, and forward-thinking approach are shaping the future of business and inspiring the next era of leadership.Richa Gangani, Founder, Richa’s Fitness LabRicha Gangani, Founder of Richa’s Fitness Lab, is dedicated to helping individuals build healthier lives through practical, personalized wellness solutions. Her approach is rooted in the belief that sustainable health comes from understanding each person’s unique lifestyle, habits, and nutritional needs rather than following one-size-fits-all trends. Through her work, she empowers clients to adopt realistic routines that fit seamlessly into their daily lives, making long-term consistency achievable. Richa advocates a balanced approach to fitness and nutrition, focusing on lasting well-being over quick fixes. By simplifying health and encouraging mindful lifestyle choices, she continues to inspire individuals to achieve meaningful and sustainable transformations.Mr. Chakravarthi Mittapalli, Vice Chairman, Narasaraopeta Engineering CollegeFor over two decades, Narasaraopeta Engineering College (NEC) has shaped technical education in Andhra Pradesh through academic excellence, industry collaboration, innovation and career-focused learning. With a 48-acre campus, autonomous status, NAAC A+ accreditation and NIRF 201-300 ranking band, NEC is advancing AI-led engineering education under Vice Chairman Chakravarthi Mittapalli, a technologist, entrepreneur and education visionary. The institution’s AI & Robotics Centres of Innovation, industry skilling programmes, incubation initiatives, Intel-backed AI Lab, certified training, internships, research exposure, next-generation tools and Microsoft AI Odyssey recognition reflect its focus on building a future-ready youth.Mr. Tejas Chavan, Director, Green SpacesMr. Tejas Chavan is the Director of Green Spaces and a purpose-driven entrepreneur committed to advancing sustainable living and eco-conscious hospitality. Under his leadership, Grape County Eco Resort & Spa has emerged as one of Maharashtra’s leading eco-tourism destinations, guided by the philosophy of “Co-Exist with Nature.” He has spearheaded transformative initiatives including the plantation of over 60,000 native trees, creation of five rainwater-harvested lakes, 100% water recycling systems, and biodiversity restoration projects. A passionate advocate for sustainable development, regenerative farming, rural empowerment, and responsible tourism, Mr. Chavan continues to demonstrate how environmental conservation and economic growth can work together to create lasting value for communities and future generations.Rituu Jai Mehhta is Director – Marketing (South) & Centre Director, Phoenix Mall of AsiaRituu Jai Mehhta is Director – Marketing (South) & Centre Director, Phoenix Mall of Asia , where she leads marketing and destination strategy across more than five million square feet of premium retail developments in Bengaluru, Chennai, and Pune. With over two decades of experience in retail, marketing, and consumer engagement, she has been instrumental in advancing experiential retail by integrating fashion, entertainment, beauty, gastronomy, and community-led experiences into destination ecosystems. Recognized for combining strategic business leadership with innovative marketing, Rituu has received multiple industry honours, including The Times of India's Woman Power Award as well as Karnataka Woman Entrepreneurship Award among others for her contributions to retail and destination marketing.Mr. Karteesh Reddy Madgula, Mr. Lakshmi Narayana G., and Mr. Sharat Ventrapragada, Designated Partners of GHR Lakshmi Urbanblocks Infra LLPDeveloped by Mr. Karteesh Reddy Madgula, Mr. Lakshmi Narayana G., and Mr. Sharat Ventrapragada (Partners of GHR Lakshmi Urbanblocks Infra LLP), The Cascades Neopolis is a landmark ultra-luxury residential project in Kokapet, Hyderabad. Spanning 7.34 acres, the development features five 63-storey towers housing 1,189 residences and 10 triplex penthouses.As India’s first and the world’s largest WELL pre-certified residential project, this international collaboration prioritizes wellness-led, future-ready living. The joint venture solidified its regional realty leadership by securing Neopolis Plot 15, a premium 4.03-acre corner land parcel boasting dual 150-foot road frontages, with a record-setting highest bid of ₹151.25 crore per acre, ensuring immense long-term value.Mr. Rishi Bharadwaj, CEO and Mr. Krishna Pradyumna, CTO of CultNerdsIT SolutionsCultNerds, Co-founded by Mr. Rishi Bharadwaj, CEO and Mr. Krishna Pradyumna, CTO in 2021 and headquartered in Hyderabad, CultNerds IT Solutions is an award-winning digital transformation agency serving 50+ clients across real estate, hospitality, luxury clubs, retail and education. With 65+ professionals, the company blends technology, marketing, data and AI to improve customer acquisition, engagement and business performance. Its in-house products support data analytics, enrichment, customer nurturing, automation and intelligent workflows. Rishi drives a framework-led culture focused on creativity, accountability and outcomes, while Krishna leads technical innovation and scalable product development for thousands of users.Jimmy Mistry, Founder & Chairman, Della TownshipsDesign Futurist, Jimmy Mistry founded Della Townships, one of India’s fastest-growing asset-light real estate integrated township platforms, to redefine how India lives, works, and dreams through design-led, future-ready, theme-based lifestyle cities. From a 30-key glamping resort in Lonavala to a ₹46,480 crore township pipeline spanning 4,288 acres across India, Jimmy Mistry believes "We become the new Uber or the new Airbnb of the real estate industry. We are an asset-light real estate model." Removing the two biggest barriers to real estate expansion, Della's asset-light model eliminates the need for land ownership and direct regulatory approvals. Instead, the company partners with landowners and developers, focusing on what it does best—conceptualisation, design, development, marketing, and operations through its proprietary CDDMO model.Piyush Jhunjhunwala, Founder & CEO, StockifyPiyush Jhunjhunwala is a seasoned finance professional, Chartered Accountant (India), and Certified Public Accountant (USA) with over 20 years of experience across global markets. Before founding Stockify, he held senior leadership roles at PepsiCo, Reckitt, and Coty, building expertise in finance, strategy, governance, and business operations across India and international markets. As Founder and CEO, Piyush has led Stockify’s mission to democratize access to India’s pre-IPO and unlisted shares market. Under his leadership, the company has expanded into alternative investments with the launch of its Alternative Investment Fund (AIF), evolving into a comprehensive WealthTech platform. He is now focused on broadening investor access to global private market opportunities, including U.S. private equity investments, helping drive long-term wealth creation and portfolio diversification.Dr. Eadhu Krishna K, Managing Director & Chief Consultant, SKCCR Care, Ernakulam, Kerala.Dr. Eadhu Krishna K is a healthcare entrepreneur and the Managing Director & Chief Consultant of SKCCR Care – Ernakulam, Kerala. Building on the institution’s 46-year legacy, he began training under his father at 18 and has since accumulated over 14 years of clinical research and experience in integrative cancer care. He has treated thousands of patients through evidence-based homoeopathic protocols and was honored with the Leading Innovator in Homoeopathic Cancer Care award by the Health Minister of Kerala. At 25, he founded Dr.BOZ Pharma, a company developing plant-based nutraceuticals and homoeopathic formulations for chronic lifestyle diseases, combining clinical expertise with pharmaceutical innovation.Jesicaa Siingh, Founder & CEO, Stanley CommunicationsJesicaa Siingh is the Founder & CEO of Stanley Communications, a global PR agency specializing in luxury, fashion, beauty, hospitality, and culture. As an entrepreneur, she has built a 135+ member women-led team while expanding the agency’s presence to Dubai. Driven by a passion for storytelling and brand building, she has helped shape the India narratives of global brands including Valentino, Bvlgari, Messika, Amiri, Dyson, Versace, SK-II, and Galeries Lafayette.A champion of women in leadership, Jesicaa has built a culture of creativity and accountability, earning recognitions including Times 40 Under 40 and TV9 Network SHE Star Honours.Together, these next-generation leaders represent the evolving face of business—bold, innovative, and impact-driven. Through their vision, adaptability, and determination, they are not only transforming their respective industries but also setting the benchmark for the future of leadership and enterprise.The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.

title: Mallika Sagar straddles the worlds of art and sports auctions with equal ease
description: The first time Mallika Sagar conducted an auction was for Christie’s in New York, selling baseball memorabilia. She was just 25, and her trainer had warned her: “This is a room full of American men used to seeing American men [as auctioneers]. When they see you, a young Indian woman, just be ready, because I don’t think they are going to be ready,” recalls Sagar.The art history graduate knew little about baseball, but says the auction went off pretty well. In hindsight, it was prophetic, because Sagar, who specialises in Indian art and is an auctioneer with Pundole’s art gallery in Mumbai, has since broken ground as the first female sports auctioneer in India.She debuted in an Indian sports auction in 2021, as a reserve to Briton Hugh Edmeades, who had been conducting Indian Premier League (IPL) auctions since 2019. “It was the year of Covid, he needed a back-up in case he tested positive after landing in India, and reached out to me. Luckily, I didn’t need to step in as he was fine, but that year I was asked to do the Pro Kabaddi League (PKL),” says Sagar, recalling her route into sports auctioneering.In February 2023, she was called upon to conduct the auction for the inaugural season of the Women’s Premier League (WPL) and, end of that year, she took up her first IPL assignment—the mini-auction in Dubai. Last year, she conducted the Rugby Premier League auction on the request of actor Rahul Bose, the president of Rugby India and “an old friend”. This April, she hosted the auction for Season 2, where the women’s tournament was launched. “I am now down four auctions for WPL, three for IPL, five for kabaddi and two for rugby,” she says.Given her relatively recent, high-profile exposure as a sports auctioneer, it might be easy to overlook her training and experience with art. Her stint at Christie’s during her college years in the US gave her the chance to go through different departments within the company and gain an in-depth understanding of how an auction house works.Also Read: Ishita Moitra: Bringing contemporary female gaze into mainstream narrativesAfter her graduation, Christie’s called her back, but this time to work for them in New York, when they were moving offices from Park Avenue to the Rockefeller Center. “It was fantastic, I understood exactly what is needed at the back-end of an auction house,” she recalls.What also followed was formal training in the art and science of conducting live auctions. “There was an auctioneer training programme, which I attended every Friday. There was a trainer and a theatre coach, because you have to learn how to breathe and how to speak. And it’s all a bit of theatre and drama, because you’re up there for a few hours. It’s about not being nervous, the math, the numbers, how to balance different things,” she says.Back in India by end-2000, Sagar was doing between three and six charity art auctions a year, which were popular at the time as a way to raise donations for NGOs. It was in 2011 that she came back full-time to art, under Pundole’s umbrella, starting with two auctions a year and now conducting close to 10.As an auctioneer, Sagar explains, you should be able to sell any kind of art. “If you are in one of the larger auction houses internationally, you could be selling furniture one day, silver one day, art one day. I am lucky I’m a specialist today in the area that I also sell in—modern Indian contemporary paintings.”Auctioneers have the insights to know which paintings are going to do well, which are the rare ones. But although Sagar makes it sound like a cakewalk—”It’s a system: You have an estimate from the auctioneer’s book, you have a list of lot numbers, we go in the order of our catalogues, and you have the artist’s name, the title of the artwork, the estimate, the result”—reality can often throw curveballs. An auctioneer has to constantly read the room, keep the audience engaged and enthused, while encouraging the in-house team of experts handling bids coming through phone calls, the app and website, all while keeping an eye on the clock. W-Power List 2026 | Meet India's Top Self-Made Women of 2026But how different is it to auction artworks and sportspeople? “Anything to do with art or memorabilia, anything that’s not a human being essentially, is driven by passion,” says Sagar. “So, people spend maybe more than what the object may be worth on paper, sometimes a lot more and you have to run with that.”Art auctions can also be casual, given the familiarity she has with the audience and dealers. But sports auctions are a different ballgame. “I’m a lot more measured at a sports auction because the teams are serious and so, I’m not laughing and joking. It’s live on TV and with 10 million viewers, all of whom have an opinion. When you put yourself out in a public space with cricket, you’re really asking for trouble,” she now laughs. “I don’t have a thick skin. And when it first happened [social media trolling], I was in tears.” Sagar does clarify, though, that the criticism is perhaps not gendered, and maybe a male auctioneer would also face the same nitpicking.“Mallika is very professional and knows the business. She has a cool temperament and everything that an auctioneer needs. And she does prepare hard,” says Charu Sharma, TV presenter and founder of PKL, who is an auctioneer himself. “She has made a big difference in this field in India… you’ve got people here who are just as professional, just as good. I hope she is able to attract other women to also become auctioneers or become involved in sport with her calm, poise, professionalism, and not just the fact that there’s a lady there.”

title: Ishita Moitra: Bringing contemporary female gaze into mainstream narratives
description: There is a scene in almost every Ishita Moitra story where people take time to reveal who they really are. A woman says something honest over drinks. A family argument suddenly turns tender. A joke hides a heartbreak. A glamorous world exposes its hidden fragments.Across television, OTT and cinema, Moitra’s writing stands on these human contradictions. Her women are not perfect, rarely symbolic, and almost never written to fit stereotypes. They are ambitious and nurturing, insecure and self-aware, funny and vulnerable, often within the same scene.That sense of storyteller has made Moitra one of the most distinctive writing voices in the film industry. From Four More Shots Please! and The Test Case to Rocky Aur Rani Kii Prem Kahaani, her storytelling has consistently brought a contemporary female gaze into mainstream narratives without losing its spark.“The idea is to put forth real women and not the Madonna-whore complex,” Moitra says. “Women can be everything. One day you can actually be sacrificial, and the other day you can be ambitious, because that’s what real women are.”W-Power List 2026 | Meet India's Top Self-Made Women of 2026For filmmaker Karan Johar, who collaborated with Moitra on Rocky Aur Rani Kii Prem Kahaani (2023), her creative energy is unmistakable. “Ishita for me is a bona fide force of nature. She has an incredible sense of humour. She can bring pathos and humour to perfection… she creates a certain kind of magic in her writing, which I find very rare,” he tells Forbes India.Long before awards, film premieres and streaming success, Moitra discovered her writing skills through an essay competition in school. “During an essay competition in my 8th or 9th standard, the teacher was thrilled with what I wrote,” she recalls. “She read it out in front of the class. I realised that I love it [writing] and somehow it resonates with other people too.”That moment stayed with her. At a time when most career choices revolved around engineering or medicine, Moitra studied journalism at Delhi University before pursuing her master’s in mass communication at Jamia Millia Islamia. It was during those years that she realised fiction—and specifically screenwriting—was where she truly belonged.“That’s when I realised that what I wanted to do was write fiction… not novels, but writing for the big screen,” she says. “It was a journey that started at 13 and crystallised around 21.”Today, Moitra belongs to a generation of writers changing how women are written in Indian entertainment. Instead of presenting them through ideas of idealism, her characters exist in shades of grey, ambitious, insecure, loving, selfish, emotional and funny at once.That perspective has made her work resonate with the audiences, especially women who see themselves reflected in her characters. Moitra says much of her writing comes from observing people around her—friends, mothers, family conversations and everyday emotions. “I love going to family gatherings and hearing people talk,” she says. “Family gatherings are like gold mines for writers.”Along with her husband, filmmaker Neeraj Udhwani, Moitra co-created and co-produced Single Papa, a show exploring parenting and masculinity through a single father’s journey. This also marked a shift for her from being just a writer to co-creation and production. “When you are a writer otherwise, it’s like you’re just a teacher correcting papers,” she says with her characteristic humour. “Now [as a producer] I am the mother who is also the teacher.”Johar believes that emotional intelligence and shared cultural memory are central to Moitra’s voice as a writer. “I felt like we immediately connected as people, as friends and as collaborators,” he says. “Both of us have the same references from Hindi cinema. Both of us know the words of every single song that exists in the musicscape of Indian cinema.”Also Read: From small parts to centre stage, the rise of Chhaya KadamThat love for Hindi cinema runs deep for Moitra. “I’ve grown up watching masala Hindi films, and I love them. That is the film nutrition that I have been fed.”However, Moitra rejects the idea of writing differently for “mass” audiences. “I try to be authentic to the world of that story,” she says. “Sometimes when we start writing thinking what people expect from us, you can get a little muddled.”Motherhood has become one of the strongest anchors to shape Moitra’s perspective, changing the way she thinks about her work and legacy. “Whenever I do anything now, I think: Will my daughter like this? Is this something I want her to see and say, ‘My mama wrote this?’” she says. That grounding, she believes, becomes especially important in an industry dependent on constant validation. Family gives her perspective during both success and uncertainty.“Through my writing, I want to leave people with a smile on their faces and gratitude for relationships,” she says.

title: Video | Is the Skoda Enyaq vRS the ultimate one-car garage?
description:
Looking for the perfect blend of weekday skills and weekend thrills? This electric family SUV could be the answer

The perfect two-car garage. It’s a fantasy motoring enthusiasts have debated for decades.
Not familiar with the concept? It’s simple: if you had to choose two cars – one for everyday duties like commuting, the school run and shopping trips, and another purely for weekend B-road blasts – which would you choose? If you’re ever stuck for conversation with a fellow enthusiast, pose this question and watch the sparks fly.
But, alas, in today’s economic climate, the dream of running two cars – particularly when one is reserved almost entirely for Sundays – is becoming harder and harder to justify. And that means more and more drivers are starting to search for one car that’s capable of covering all bases: sensible when it needs to be, fun when it doesn’t.
Watch the video below as we explore whether the 335bhp all-electric Skoda Enyaq vRS really can deliver the best of both worlds.


Skoda Enyaq vRS: the electric family SUV that can do it all
There’s a particular genius to the vRS badge. Since the first Octavia vRS arrived in 2001, those three letters have stood for meaningful performance, real-world practicality and strong value. It’s the everyman performance car formula, refined over decades and now applied to Skoda’s electric family SUV flagship.
The Enyaq vRS continues that tradition with 335bhp, 697Nm and dual-motor all-wheel drive, delivering 0-62mph in 5.4 seconds. But it’s not just about straight-line pace. Dynamic Chassis Control, lowered suspension and revised steering calibration give it a level of composure and adjustability that no electric SUV this size has any right to, allowing it to switch between relaxed motorway cruiser and pulse-raising B-road blaster at the touch of a button.
Crucially, it remains an easy car to live with day to day. The 84kWh battery delivers up to 344 miles of range (WLTP), while 185kW DC charging enables a 10–80% top-up in around 26 minutes.
Inside, that signature vRS DNA injects sporty flair into an otherwise plush, minimalist cabin. There are vRS-specific sports seats, a bespoke sports steering wheel and contrast detailing. As you’d expect from a Škoda, equipment is generous, with a large 13in infotainment screen, augmented reality head-up display, heated seats and a 12-speaker CANTON sound system all included as standard. 
Practicality remains a core strength. A 585-litre boot, generous rear space and Skoda’s trademark ‘Smart, Spacious and Stylish’ touches – including an ice scraper in the tailgate and an umbrella in the door – ensure it can still deal with everything hectic family life throws at it without breaking a sweat. Maybe it’s time you try it for yourself.
Learn more about the Skoda Enyaq vRS

title: From small parts to centre stage, the rise of Chhaya Kadam
description: Chhaya Kadam finds it hard to erase 2001 from her memory. It was a year when she lost both her brother and father. “I felt as though my world had collapsed. I was confined to my home. I knew I should step out and carry on with life, but I was unable to get myself to do that,” says the actor who also underwent two knee surgeries after damaging a ligament the same year.Kadam, who had acted in a few plays in school, was not interested in taking to the stage in college. She had taken to kabaddi until her damaged knees meant she had to stop pursuing the sport. The tragedy in her family during the same period left her disillusioned and morose.It was around this time that she saw a newspaper advertisement about an acting workshop by theatre veteran Waman Kendre in Mumbai. Kadam believed it was a good opportunity to meet new people instead of spending time with relatives or friends, who, in all probability, would discuss the turmoil in her life. The course turned out to be a blessing for her.“I enjoyed the process… I got to learn a lot, and not just acting. It taught me to be independent and shaped me as a human. It made me understand that one does not become an actor merely by attending workshops or doing photo shoots. It erased all such assumptions. I realised I had to get better at many things—for instance, I didn’t read the newspapers, and I had language and diction issues because I hailed from Konkan. The workshop developed me in more ways than I could have imagined,” says Kadam, who has starred in acclaimed Marathi films like Sairat and Fandry, as well as recent noteworthy ones like the Hindi comedy-drama Laapataa Ladies, Sister Midnight and the Grand Prix (Cannes)-winning Malayalam film All We Imagine as Light.W-Power List 2026 | Meet India's Top Self-Made Women of 2026Kendre, who saw her from close quarters, describes her as a hardworking and passionate artiste. “It was evident that Chhaya would stand out. She had a lot of potential and was serious about her work. She is an honest actor,” the former director of the National School of Drama tells Forbes India. He adds that she trained for two-and-a-half months for his directorial venture and her first play, Zulwa, and ended up doing around 250 shows. That laid the foundation for her as an actor.As Kadam fell in love with acting during the workshop, she decided to pursue it as a profession. It was not easy, though, to make inroads for someone who did not come from a film family. Kadam’s father was a mill worker from Kalina, Mumbai, and her mother was a housewife. She was the youngest among five siblings—two brothers and three sisters.When the acting breaks did not come through, she took up smaller assignments such as working as an assistant for a Hindi serial. The hunt for proper parts continued. In fact, when she got to know that Doordarshan was making a short film, she approached the makers for a role. The director told her that casting was done and that they needed an assistant instead. She agreed, thinking it would help her make connections. The film was being shot in Baramati, Maharashtra, and as luck would have it, the role Kadam was vying for fell into her lap. The lady who was supposed to play the part did not turn up the day before her scene was scheduled to be filmed. The team asked Kadam to fill in, and she faced the camera for the first time—for Phatacha Pani (Marathi).“I struggled a lot in those five years after the workshop… in fact, I got my first play [Zulwa] in 2006. My family did not support me… they knew nothing about this industry or my battles. But all the obstacles that came my way during that phase made me stronger,” says Kadam. “I did everything with utmost sincerity and dedication. Even if I got one scene in a film, I accepted that and did justice to the part. But the industry is such that when you get work, it does not mean you have arrived. You have to keep looking for newer opportunities. And it is difficult to get those… it can take many years.”It indeed took a while for Kadam to stamp her authority with her performances. Today, the Madgaon Express actor is known for bringing authenticity to the characters she essays and for her nuanced approach to her craft. “With acting, you literally give birth to a person—their walk, mannerisms, body language, backstory, even if it’s a fictional character,” she explains. “I am an observant person. I study people. After I read what has been offered to me, I work on the small details and decorate the character.”Also Read: W-Power 2026: Why Huma Qureshi Chooses Reinvention Over ComfortTo play Suman Akka in Sairat, Kadam learnt Telugu from the camera crew on set, while in the case of Fandry, she took lessons in Kaikadi. “It is not enough to learn the lines. You need to know the language to understand the emotion,” she insists.According to Kendre, Kadam had an inferiority complex because of her economic status and language shortcomings. But she overcame those mental blocks and discovered herself as an actor and a human being. “Such a journey is rare. She has marched ahead confidently and has not looked back. I expect her to do a lot more,” he says.Achievements like going to Cannes for All We Imagine as Light are the icing on the cake for Kadam. She does not read too much into it though, saying it is in the past. “I like to live in the moment. I don’t think too far ahead. I just have to do good work,” says the actor, who likes to try various delicacies, travel to her native place in Konkan and spend time with the people closest to her.Conscious of the fact that she has to keep opening new doors for herself, Kadam appears unperturbed even if all this ends one day. “I came here with an empty bag. I have no fear about the bag being empty again,” she says.

title: Ketan Agarwal | కేతన్ అగర్వాల్ విగ్గు వాడేవాడు.. అతడి బట్టతల నాకు నచ్చలేదు.. విచారణలో సియా వెల్లడి
description: Ketan Agarwal : మహారాష్ట్రలోని పూనేకు చెందిన కేతన్ అగర్వాల్ హత్య కేసు విచారణలో అనేక ఆసక్తికర విషయాలు బయటపడుతున్నాయి. కేతన్ హత్యకు దారితీసిన పరిస్థితులపై ప్రధాన నిందితురాలు సియా గోయల్ భిన్నమైన సమాధానాలు ఇస్తోంది.
content:
Ketan Agarwal : మహారాష్ట్రలోని పూనేకు చెందిన కేతన్ అగర్వాల్ హత్య కేసు విచారణలో అనేక ఆసక్తికర విషయాలు బయటపడుతున్నాయి. కేతన్ హత్యకు దారితీసిన పరిస్థితులపై ప్రధాన నిందితురాలు సియా గోయల్ భిన్నమైన సమాధానాలు ఇస్తోంది. తాజాగా పోలీసుల విచారణలో కొన్ని ఆసక్తికర విషయాల్ని తెలిపింది. కేతన్‌ అగర్వాల్‌ను పెళ్లి చేసుకోవడం తనకు ఇష్టం లేదని, ఇందుకు అతడు విగ్గు ధరించడమే కారణమని సియా తెలిపింది. కేతన్ చూడటానికి అంతగా బాగుండేవాడు కాదని, బట్టతల ఉందని, పైగా తను విగ్గు వాడటం తనకు నచ్చలేదని చెప్పింది.
అతడికి జుట్టు బాగా ఊడిపోవడం వల్ల విగ్గు పెట్టుకున్నాడని, తనకు కాబోయే వాడు ఇలా విగ్గు ధరించడం తనకు అస్సలు ఇష్టం లేదని పోలీసులకు చెప్పింది. ఇదే సమయంలో పెళ్లిని ఆపేందుకు తాను ప్రయత్నిస్తుంటే ఇప్పుడు అంత సమయం లేదని, ఇప్పటికే పెళ్లిని ఆపే విషయంలో సమయం మించిపోయిందని కేతన్ తనతో అన్నట్లు సియా తెలిపింది. పెళ్లికి సంబంధించిన ఏర్పాట్లు చాలా దూరం వెళ్లిపోయాయని, దీంతో పెళ్లి ఆపడం సాధ్యం కాదనేలా అతడు చెప్పినట్లు సియా వివరించింది. మరోవైపు కేతన్ విగ్గు అంశంపై కేతన్ తండ్రి మీడియాతో మాట్లాడాడు. తన కొడుకు విగ్గు వాడటం గురించి వారి కుటుంబానికి ముందే చెప్పామన్నాడు. అంతేకాదు.. సియాకు ఏమాత్రం అసంతృప్తి, ఇబ్బంది ఉన్నా ఈ పెళ్లి ఆపాలని తాము కూడా భావించినట్లు చెప్పారు. ఇక, ప్రస్తుతానికి సియాకు ఆమె కుటుంబ సభ్యుల నుంచి పెద్దగా సహకారం లభించడం లేదు.
ఆమె అరెస్ట్ అయిన తర్వాత నుంచి సియా కుటుంబ సభ్యులు ఎవరూ ఆమెను కలవలేదు. అయితే, సియా గోయల్ ప్రియుడు చేతన్ చౌదరి కుటుంబ సభ్యులు మాత్రం అతడిని తరచూ కలుస్తున్నారని విచారణ అధికారులు తెలిపారు. సియా తప్పు చేసి ఉంటే ఆమెను ఉరితీసినా తమకు ఏ అభ్యంతరం లేదని ఆమె తండ్రి మీడియాతో చెప్పారు. కేతన్ తండ్రి మాట్లాడుతూ.. సియా చేసిన నేరం రుజువైతే ఆమెను కూడా అలాగే, కొండపైనుంచి తోసి చంపేయాలని కోరాడు. కేతన్ హత్యపై మహారాష్ట్ర సీఎం దేవేంద్ర ఫడ్నవీస్ మాట్లాడారు. ఈ ఘటనపై విచారం వ్యక్తం చేశారు. పిల్లల్లో ఇలాంటి నేర ప్రవృత్తి సంబంధమైన ఆలోచనలకు దూరంగా పెంచాలని ఆయన సూచించారు.

title: മാരുതി സുസുക്കി വിക്ടോറിസ് വിലയിൽ അപ്രതീക്ഷിത സർപ്രൈസ്! കുറച്ചത് ഇത്രയും രൂപ
description: മാരുതി സുസുക്കി തങ്ങളുടെ പ്രീമിയം എസ്‌യുവിയായ വിക്ടോറിസിന്റെ വില 38,900 രൂപ വരെ കുറച്ചു. പുതിയ ഡിസൈൻ, 10.25 ഇഞ്ച് ടച്ച്‌സ്‌ക്രീൻ, ADAS ലെവൽ 2 സുരക്ഷ തുടങ്ങിയ ഫീച്ചറുകളോടെയാണ് ഈ കാർ വരുന്നത്. മൈൽഡ് ഹൈബ്രിഡ്, സ്ട്രോങ് ഹൈബ്രിഡ്, സിഎൻജി എന്നിങ്ങനെ മൂന്ന് എഞ്ചിൻ ഓപ്ഷനുകളിലും വിക്ടോറിസ് ലഭ്യമാണ്.
content: <p><strong>മാ</strong>രുതി സുസുക്കി ഇന്ത്യ വിക്ടോറിസ് എസ്‌യുവിയുടെ വില കുറച്ചുകൊണ്ട് ഉപഭോക്താക്കൾക്ക് വലിയൊരു സർപ്രൈസ് നൽകിയിരിക്കുകയാണ്. അരീന ഷോറൂമുകളിൽ വിൽക്കുന്ന വിക്ടോറിസ് കമ്പനിയുടെ ഏറ്റവും പ്രീമിയം കാറാണ്. ജൂണിൽ തങ്ങളുടെ കാറുകളുടെ വില വർധിപ്പിക്കുമെന്ന് കമ്പനി പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചിരുന്നു. എന്നാൽ ഇപ്പോൾ വിക്ടോറിസിന്റെ വില കുറച്ചുകൊണ്ട് എല്ലാവരെയും അത്ഭുതപ്പെടുത്തി. അതിന്റെ ചില വകഭേദങ്ങളുടെ വില 38,900 രൂപ വരെ കുറച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്. അതേസമയം വിക്ടോറിസിന്‍റെ പ്രാരംഭ എക്സ്-ഷോറൂം വില മുമ്പത്തെപ്പോലെ തന്നെ തുടരും. 10,49,900 രൂപയാണ് ബേസ് വേരിയന്‍റിന്‍റെ എക്സ് ഷോറൂം വില.</p><h2>മാരുതി വിക്ടോറിസ് എക്സ്റ്റീരിയർ, ഇന്റീരിയർ, എഞ്ചിൻ</h2><p>മാരുതി സുസുക്കി ഇ-വിറ്റാര ഇലക്ട്രിക് എസ്‌യുവിയിൽ നിന്ന് പ്രചോദനം ഉൾക്കൊണ്ട് പുതിയ ഡിസൈൻ ഭാഷയാണ് വിക്ടോറിസിൽ ഉൾപ്പെടുത്തിയിരിക്കുന്നത്. മുൻവശത്ത്, ക്രോം സ്ട്രിപ്പുള്ള സ്ലിം ഗ്രിൽ കവർ, കട്ടിയുള്ള പ്ലാസ്റ്റിക് ക്ലാഡിംഗ്, സിൽവർ സ്‍കിഡ് പ്ലേറ്റ് എന്നിവയാൽ ബന്ധിപ്പിച്ചിരിക്കുന്ന വലിയ എൽഇഡി ഹെഡ്‌ലൈറ്റുകൾ വിക്ടോറിസിൽ ഉണ്ട്. വശങ്ങളിൽ, എസ്‌യുവിയിൽ 18 ഇഞ്ച് അലോയ് വീലുകൾ, കറുത്ത പില്ലറുകൾ, സിൽവർ റൂഫ് റെയിലുകൾ, കൂടുതൽ ചതുരാകൃതിയിലുള്ള ബോഡി ക്ലാഡിംഗ് എന്നിവയുണ്ട്. പിന്നിൽ, ഒരു സെഗ്‌മെന്റഡ് എൽഇഡി ലൈറ്റ് ബാറും 'വിക്ടോറിസ്' അക്ഷരങ്ങളും ദൃശ്യമാണ്.</p><p>ഗ്രാൻഡ് വിറ്റാരയുടേതിൽ നിന്ന് വിക്ടോറിസിന്‍റെ ഇന്റീരിയർ കാര്യമായി വ്യത്യസ്‍തമാണ്. കൂടുതൽ സാങ്കേതികവിദ്യയിൽ ശ്രദ്ധ കേന്ദ്രീകരിച്ചാണ് ഡാഷ്‌ബോർഡ് രൂപകൽപ്പന. ഡാഷ്‌ബോർഡിന് മുകളിൽ ഒരു വലിയ 10.25 ഇഞ്ച് ഇൻഫോടെയ്ൻമെന്റ് ടച്ച്‌സ്‌ക്രീൻ, വലതുവശത്ത് ഒരു ഡിജിറ്റൽ ഡ്രൈവർ ഡിസ്‌പ്ലേ, മൂന്ന് സ്‌പോക്ക് സ്റ്റിയറിംഗ് വീൽ എന്നിവയുണ്ട്. മാരുതിയുടെ വിക്ടറി എസ്‌യുവിയിൽ അഞ്ച് യാത്രക്കാരെ സുഖമായി ഇരുത്താൻ കഴിയുമെന്നത് ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ടതാണ്.</p><p>ഇനി അതിന്റെ സവിശേഷതകളെക്കുറിച്ച് പറയുകയാണെങ്കിൽ, വിക്ടോറിസിൽ വയർലെസ് ആപ്പിൾ കാർപ്ലേ, ആൻഡ്രോയിഡ് ഓട്ടോ, ഡോൾബി അറ്റ്‌മോസുള്ള 8-സ്പീക്കർ സൗണ്ട് സിസ്റ്റം, വെന്റിലേറ്റഡ് ഫ്രണ്ട് സീറ്റുകൾ, ആംബിയന്റ് ലൈറ്റിംഗ്, കണക്റ്റഡ് കാർ ടെക്‌നോളജി, ലെതറെറ്റ് അപ്ഹോൾസ്റ്ററി, ഓട്ടോമാറ്റിക് ക്ലൈമറ്റ് കൺട്രോൾ, പനോരമിക് സൺറൂഫ്, വയർലെസ് ചാർജർ, 8-വേ ഇലക്ട്രിക്കലി അഡ്ജസ്റ്റ് ചെയ്യാവുന്ന ഡ്രൈവർ സീറ്റ്, ഹെഡ്‌സ്-അപ്പ് ഡിസ്‌പ്ലേ, ക്യാബിൻ എയർ ഫിൽട്ടർ, പവർഡ് ടെയിൽഗേറ്റ് തുടങ്ങിയവ ഉൾപ്പെടുന്നു.</p><p>മൂന്ന് എഞ്ചിൻ ഓപ്ഷനുകളോടെയാണ് വികോടറിസ് വാഗ്ദാനം ചെയ്യുന്നത്: 103 bhp ഉത്പാദിപ്പിക്കുന്ന 1.5 ലിറ്റർ, 4-സിലിണ്ടർ മൈൽഡ് ഹൈബ്രിഡ് പെട്രോൾ എഞ്ചിൻ, 116 bhp ഉത്പാദിപ്പിക്കുന്ന 1.5 ലിറ്റർ, 3-സിലിണ്ടർ സ്ട്രോങ് ഹൈബ്രിഡ് സജ്ജീകരണം, 89 bhp ഉത്പാദിപ്പിക്കുന്ന 1.5 ലിറ്റർ പെട്രോൾ-സിഎൻജി ഓപ്ഷൻ. പെട്രോൾ എഞ്ചിന് 5-സ്പീഡ് മാനുവലും 6-സ്പീഡ് ടോർക്ക് കൺവെർട്ടർ ഓട്ടോയും, സ്ട്രോങ് ഹൈബ്രിഡിന് e-CVTയും, സിഎൻജി വേരിയന്റിന് 5-സ്പീഡ് മാനുവലും ഗിയർബോക്സ് ഓപ്ഷനുകളിൽ ഉൾപ്പെടുന്നു. വിക്ടോറിസിന് ഓൾ-വീൽ ഡ്രൈവും വാഗ്ദാനം ചെയ്യും.</p><p>ആറ് എയർബാഗുകൾ, എബിഎസ് വിത്ത് ഇബിഡി, ട്രാക്ഷൻ കൺട്രോൾ, ബ്രേക്ക് അസിസ്റ്റ്, ഹിൽ ഹോൾഡ് കൺട്രോൾ, ഐസോഫിക്സ് ചൈൽഡ് സീറ്റ് ആങ്കറേജുകൾ, മറ്റ് സവിശേഷതകൾ എന്നിവയാണ് വിക്ടോറിസിന്റെ സുരക്ഷാ സവിശേഷതകളിൽ ഉൾപ്പെടുന്നത്. ഉയർന്ന വേരിയന്റുകളിൽ 360-ഡിഗ്രി ക്യാമറ, ടയർ പ്രഷർ മോണിറ്ററിംഗ് സിസ്റ്റം എന്നിവയും ഉൾപ്പെടുന്നു. സുരക്ഷ കൂടുതൽ മെച്ചപ്പെടുത്തുന്നതിനായി ഈ എസ്‌യുവിയിൽ ADAS ലെവൽ 2 സാങ്കേതികവിദ്യ സജ്ജീകരിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നു. ഓട്ടോമാറ്റിക് എമർജൻസി ബ്രേക്കിംഗ്, അഡാപ്റ്റീവ് ക്രൂയിസ് കൺട്രോൾ (കർവ് സ്പീഡ് റിഡക്ഷനോടെ), ലെയ്ൻ കീപ്പ് അസിസ്റ്റ്, ഹൈ ബീം അസിസ്റ്റ്, റിയർ ക്രോസ്-ട്രാഫിക് അലേർട്ട്, ബ്ലൈൻഡ് സ്പോട്ട് മോണിറ്റർ, ലെയ്ൻ ചേഞ്ച് അലേർട്ട് എന്നിവയുൾപ്പെടെ നിരവധി സ്മാർട്ട് സവിശേഷതകൾ ഇതിൽ ഉൾപ്പെടുന്നു. മുതിർന്നവരുടെ സുരക്ഷയ്ക്കായി 32 ൽ 31.66 ഉം കുട്ടികളുടെ സുരക്ഷയ്ക്കായി 49 ൽ 43 ഉം നേടിയ 5-സ്റ്റാർ ഭാരത് എൻ‌സി‌എപി ക്രാഷ് സേഫ്റ്റി റേറ്റിംഗും വിക്ടോറിസിന് ലഭിച്ചു.</p>

title: Lieutenant Governor joins Youm-e-Ashura’s Zuljinah procession at Zadibal in Srinagar
description:
Srinagar, June 26: On the solemn occasion of Youm-e-Ashura, the 10th day of Muharram, Lieutenant Governor Shri Manoj Sinha today joined the Zuljinah procession at Zadibal in Srinagar.
"I pay humble tributes to Hazrat Imam Hussain (AS) and his companions. Their supreme sacrifice for peace, love, and compassion remains an eternal guide to building a society rooted in equality and harmony.
Hazrat Imam Hussain (AS) gave the timeless message of selfless service and compassion for the underprivileged. The society must draw inspiration from his noble life and virtues, walking the righteous path of truth, justice, and humanity,” the Lieutenant Governor said.
The Lieutenant Governor also served refreshments among the mourners.

title: Murder | దారుణం.. అల్లుడితో వివాహేతర సంబంధానికి అడ్డుగా ఉన్నాడని భర్తను హత్య చేసిన భార్య
description: Murder | తిమ్మాజీపేట మండలం ఆవంచ గ్రామంలో దారుణం చోటు చేసుకుంది. అల్లుడి తో కొనసాగిస్తున్న వివాహేతర సంబంధానికి అడ్డువస్తున్నాడనే కారణంతో తాళీ కట్టిన భర్తను భార్య హత్య చేసిన ఘటన వెలుగులోకి వచ్చింది,
content:
నాగర్‌కర్నూల్ : తిమ్మాజీపేట మండలం ఆవంచ గ్రామంలో దారుణం చోటు చేసుకుంది. అల్లుడి ( Son-in-law ) తో కొనసాగిస్తున్న వివాహేతర సంబంధానికి ( Extra-marital relationship) అడ్డువస్తున్నాడనే కారణంతో తాళీ కట్టిన భర్తను భార్య ( Wife ) హత్య చేసిన ఘటన వెలుగులోకి వచ్చింది, గ్రామంలో అమ్మపల్లి యాదయ్య, అలివేలు దంపతులు.
అలివేలుకు సొంత అల్లుడు ఆంజనేయులతో వివాహేతర సంబంధాని తెలుసుకున్న భర్త యాదయ్య భార్యతో గొడవ పెట్టుకున్నాడు. ఈ నెల 23న యాదయ్య ఇంట్లో మృతిచెందాడు. అనారోగ్యంతో మృతి చెందాడని భార్య కుటుంబ సభ్యులను , గ్రామస్తులను నమ్మించింది. అంత్యక్రియలకు ముందు శవానికి స్నానం చేయించి దుస్తులు మారుస్తుండగా శరీరంపై గాయాలు కనిపించడంతో అనుమానం వ్యక్తం చేస్తూ మృతుడి సోదరుడి కుమారుడు పరశురాములు పోలీసులకు ఫిర్యాదు చేశాడు.
పోలీసులు విచారణ చేపట్టి ప్రశ్నించగా.. వివాహేతర సంబంధానికి భర్త అడ్డుగా ఉన్నాడనే కారణంతో అతని మర్మాంగాలపై దాడి చేసి హత్య చేసినట్లు నిందితురాలు , భార్య అలివేలు అంగీకరించింది. అదే రోజు కూతురు, అల్లుడు కూడా ఇంటికి వచ్చి వెళ్లిన నేపథ్యంలో వారి పాత్రపై కూడా అనుమానాలు ఉన్నాయని ఆరోపించారు. ఈ మేరకు పోలీసులు కేసు నమోదు చేసి దర్యాప్తు చేస్తున్నారు.

title: Next-generation Hyundai Elantra brings striking new look
description:
New Elantra has been sculpted according to 'Art of Steel' design language; brings choice of petrol or hybrid

Hyundai has revealed the next iteration of its Elantra saloon, bringing a dramatic new look.
Named the Avante in its home market of Korea, it is the most extreme example of the brand’s new Art of Steel design language yet, with a number of hard lines and aggressive angles across its bodywork.
It is slightly larger than the rival Skoda Octavia, owing to a 30mm increase in its wheelbase compared with the previous-generation Elantra. Hyundai said it has prioritised improving interior space, with the saloon also growing 30mm wider.
Inside, it has been designed to be “cozy and comfortable”, according to Hyundai. The dashboard and doorcards’ designs cocoon around the seats, with customisable LED backlighting. 
As in the recently-revealed Ioniq 3 hatchback, the driver’s display is set high on the dashboard. This is intended to keep important information in the driver’s line of sight, so they do not have to divert their attention away from the road to check their speed or remaining range. 
A large infotainment touchscreen (measuring either 12.9in or 14.6in) takes centre stage. It runs on Hyundai’s new Pleos operating system, which will allow new functionality such as installing navigation and music apps in the screen, rather than having to use smartphone mirroring. An array of switches and dials for the climate control system sits just below the main screen.

In Korea, it will be available with two powertrains: a 2.0-litre petrol four-cylinder with 147bhp and a 1.6-litre hybrid with 155bhp. 
The hybrid also brings a new predictive regenerative braking system that reads the road ahead and automatically adjusts the strength of the regenerative effect, helping to keep the battery topped up.
In addition, it gets a ‘stay mode’ that allows the small traction battery’s reserves to power the climate controls and infotainment system while parked, in similar fashion to an EV with a larger battery.
Korean deliveries of the new Elantra will begin in the coming weeks, although Hyundai has yet to confirm whether it will be sold in Europe or the UK. The previous-generation car was not sold in those regions, despite having been tested here. However, Autocar understands that the latest iteration has yet to be ruled out, suggesting Hyundai may have had a change of heart.
It also remains to be seen whether the high-performance Elantra N will return – and whether it too could make it to Europe.

title: Job: ବିଶ୍ଵ ଦକ୍ଷତା କେନ୍ଦ୍ରର ରେକର୍ଡ ପ୍ଲେସମେଣ୍ଟ ସଫଳତା; ୩,୫୬୫ ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀଙ୍କୁ ଦେଶ-ବିଦେଶରେ ନିଯୁକ୍ତି
ഫ്രീയായി യാത്ര ചെയ്യണമെന്ന് പൊലീസുകാരൻ, സമ്മതിക്കാതെ ഓട്ടോ ഡ്രൈവർ, അസഭ്യവർഷം; ​ഗുരു​ഗ്രാമിൽ നിന്നുള്ള ദൃശ്യങ്ങൾ
description: സൗജന്യമായി യാത്ര ചെയ്യാനാകില്ലെന്ന് ഓട്ടോ ഡ്രൈവര്‍. അസഭ്യ വര്‍ഷം ചൊരിഞ്ഞ് പൊലീസുകാരന്‍. ഗുരുഗ്രാമില്‍ നിന്നുള്ള വീഡിയോ സോഷ്യല്‍ മീഡിയയില്‍ വന്‍ വിമര്‍ശനമേറ്റുവാങ്ങുന്നു.
content: <p>ഓട്ടോറിക്ഷയിൽ സൗജന്യ യാത്ര അനുവദിക്കാതിരുന്ന ഡ്രൈവറെ പൊലീസുകാരൻ പരസ്യമായി അസഭ്യം പറയുന്ന ദൃശ്യങ്ങൾ സാമൂഹിക മാധ്യമങ്ങളിൽ വ്യാപക പ്രതിഷേധത്തിന് വഴിവെക്കുന്നു. ഗുരുഗ്രാമിൽ നിന്നുള്ളതാണ് ഈ ദൃശ്യങ്ങൾ. മറ്റൊരു യാത്രക്കാരന്റെ ബുക്കിംഗ് ഉള്ളതിനാൽ സൗജന്യമായി വരാൻ കഴിയില്ലെന്ന് വ്യക്തമാക്കിയ ഓട്ടോ ഡ്രൈവർക്ക് നേരെയാണ് പോലീസുകാരൻ തട്ടിക്കയറിയത്.</p><p>സംഭവത്തെക്കുറിച്ച് ലഭ്യമായ വിവരങ്ങൾ ഇങ്ങനെയാണ്, മറ്റൊരു ഓൺലൈൻ ബുക്കിംഗ് ഉള്ളതിനാൽ തനിക്ക് വരാൻ കഴിയില്ലെന്ന് ഓട്ടോ ഡ്രൈവർ പോലീസുകാരനോട് വ്യക്തമാക്കുകയായിരുന്നു. എന്നാൽ, ഇത് കേൾക്കാൻ തയ്യാറാകാതിരുന്ന പോലീസുകാരൻ ഡ്രൈവർക്ക് നേരെ അസഭ്യവർഷം ചൊരിയുന്നു. തന്റെ ജോലി കൃത്യമായി ചെയ്തതിന് എന്തിനാണ് തന്നോട് ഈ രീതിയിൽ പെരുമാറുന്നതെന്ന് ഡ്രൈവർ ചോദിക്കുന്നതും വീഡിയോയിൽ കാണാം. താൻ സാധാരണ രീതിയിൽ ബുക്കിംഗ് അനുസരിച്ച് ഓട്ടോ ഓടിക്കാൻ വന്നതാണെന്നും, പോലീസുകാരൻ ബലമായി വണ്ടിയിൽ കയറി സൗജന്യ യാത്ര ആവശ്യപ്പെടുകയും അത് വിസമ്മതിച്ചപ്പോൾ മോശമായി പെരുമാറുകയും ചെയ്തതായി ഡ്രൈവർ പിന്നീട് ക്യാമറയ്ക്ക് മുന്നിൽ വ്യക്തമാക്കി.</p><p>പോലീസുകാരുടെ ഭാഗത്തുനിന്നുണ്ടാകുന്ന ഇത്തരം നിയമലംഘനങ്ങൾക്കെതിരെയും പെരുമാറ്റങ്ങൾക്കെതിരെയും സാമൂഹിക മാധ്യമങ്ങളിൽ കടുത്ത ജനരോഷമാണ് ഉയരുന്നത്. എന്നാൽ, ഈ സംഭവത്തെക്കുറിച്ച് ഗുരുഗ്രാം പോലീസ് ഇതുവരെ ഔദ്യോഗിക പ്രതികരണങ്ങളൊന്നും നടത്തിയിട്ടില്ല.</p><p>&nbsp;</p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;View this post on Instagram&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<p>A post shared by The Haryana Daily (@theharyanadaily)</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p></p><p>കഴിഞ്ഞ നവംബറിൽ ഉത്തർപ്രദേശിലെ ഗൊരഖ്പൂരിലും സമാനമായ സംഭവം റിപ്പോർട്ട് ചെയ്യപ്പെട്ടിരുന്നു. റാപ്പിഡോ ബുക്കിംഗ് ഉള്ളതിനാൽ പോലീസുകാരന് സൗജന്യ യാത്ര നൽകാൻ ഇ-റിക്ഷ ഡ്രൈവർ വിസമ്മതിച്ചു. ഇതിൽ പ്രകോപിതനായ പോലീസ് സബ് ഇൻസ്പെക്ടർ, ഡ്രൈവറുടെ വാഹനത്തിന്റെ ചിത്രം മൊബൈലിൽ പകർത്തുകയും നിയമലംഘനം ആരോപിച്ചുകൊണ്ട് മനഃപൂർവ്വം വലിയ തുക പിഴ ചുമത്തുകയും ചെയ്തു. പോലീസുകാരൻ പദവി ദുരുപയോഗം ചെയ്തതിനെതിരെ വലിയ തോതിലുള്ള പ്രതിഷേധമാണ് അന്ന് സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിൽ ഉയർന്നത്.</p><p>&nbsp;</p>

title: Shah Rukh Khan | నా భర్త కంటే మీరే ఎక్కువ ఇష్టం.. అభిమాని మాటలకు షారుఖ్ అదిరిపోయే రిప్లై!
description: KingKhan | వెండితెరపైనే కాదు.. నిజ జీవితంలోనూ తనదైన చమత్కారంతో, త‌న‌దైన మాటాల‌తో కోట్లాది మంది హృదయాలను గెలుచుకోవడం బాలీవుడ్ బాద్‌షా షారుఖ్ ఖాన్‌కే చెల్లింది.
content:
Shah Rukh Khan | వెండితెరపైనే కాదు.. నిజ జీవితంలోనూ తనదైన చమత్కారంతో, త‌న‌దైన మాటాల‌తో కోట్లాది మంది హృదయాలను గెలుచుకోవడం బాలీవుడ్ బాద్‌షా షారుఖ్ ఖాన్‌కే చెల్లింది. తాజాగా కర్ణాటకలోని మంగళూరులో జరిగిన ఒక ప్రైవేట్ కార్యక్రమంలో పాల్గొన్న ఆయన, అక్కడ ఓ మహిళా అభిమాని అడిగిన ప్రశ్నకు ఇచ్చిన సమాధానం ప్రస్తుతం సోషల్ మీడియాలో విపరీతంగా ట్రెండ్ అవుతోంది. జూన్ 25న మంగళూరులో నిర్వహించిన ఒక ప్రత్యేక కార్యక్రమానికి షారుఖ్ ఖాన్ ముఖ్య అతిథిగా విచ్చేశారు. షారుఖ్ స్టేజ్ పైకి రాగానే ఆయన స్థానిక కన్నడ భాషలో “నమస్కారం” అంటూ మాట్లాడటం అక్కడి ప్రేక్షకులను ఎంతగానో ఆకట్టుకుంది. విమానాశ్రయం నుండి వేదిక వరకు తనకు లభించిన అపూర్వ స్వాగతంపై షారుఖ్ హర్షం వ్యక్తం చేస్తూ మంగళూరు ప్రజల ప్రేమాభిమానాలకు కృతజ్ఞతలు తెలిపారు.
అయితే ఈ వేడుకలో భాగంగా జరిగిన అభిమానుల ముఖాముఖి సెషన్‌లో ఒక ఆసక్తికరమైన ఘటన చోటుచేసుకుంది. సదరు మహిళా అభిమాని మైక్ తీసుకుని, నా భర్త కంటే నేను మిమ్మల్నే ఎక్కువగా ప్రేమిస్తున్నాను అంటూ షారుఖ్‌పై తనకున్న అభిమానాన్ని బహిరంగంగా చాటుకుంది. ఇక ఈ ఊహించని వ్యాఖ్యల‌కు బాలీవుడ్ కింగ్ ఖాన్ ఏమాత్రం తడబడకుండా, తనదైన స్టైల్లో స్పందించారు. “ఇలాంటి రహస్యాలు అందరి ముందు కాకుండా ఒంటరిగా చెప్పాలి కదా!” అంటూ చమత్కరించడంతో హాలంతా నవ్వులు విరిశాయి. అక్కడితో ఆగకుండా ఆ అభిమాని భర్తకు ఇబ్బంది కలగకుండా షారుఖ్ పరిస్థితిని ఎంతో హుందాగా మార్చేశారు. “మీ భావాలను నేను గౌరవిస్తాను. మీ భర్త కూడా దీనిని సరదాగానే తీసుకుంటారని భావిస్తున్నాను. మీతో పాటు మీ భర్తకు, మీ కుటుంబ సభ్యులందరికీ నా తరపున ప్రత్యేక ప్రేమలు” అంటూ షారుక్ చెప్పుకోచ్చాడు. దీనికి సంబంధించిన వీడియో ప్రస్తుతం ఇంటర్నెట్‌ను షేక్ చేస్తుంది. షారుఖ్ ఖాన్ కేవలం తెరపైనే కాదు, నిజ జీవితంలోనూ ఎంతటి సమయస్ఫూర్తి, హాస్యచతురత కలిగిన వ్యక్తి అనడానికి ఈ ఘటనే నిదర్శనమని నెటిజన్లు ప్రశంసల వర్షం కురిపిస్తున్నారు. ఎన్ని రికార్డులు సృష్టించినా, అభిమానుల పట్ల ఆయన చూపించే గౌరవమే ఆయన్ను ఎప్పటికీ ‘బాద్‌షా’గా నిలబెడుతుందని మరోసారి నిరూపితమైంది.

title: 42 दिन, 70 चोरी और 8 गिरफ्तार…राम मंदिर चढ़ावा केस में SIT रिपोर्ट में कई बड़े खुलासे!
description: Ram Mandir Donation Theft: राम मंदिर चढ़ावा चोरी मामले में SIT जांच में 42 दिनों में 70 बार चोरी के सबूत मिलने का दावा किया गया। FIR के बाद 8 आरोपी गिरफ्तार हुए।
content:
Ayodhya Ram Mandir Donation Theft: राम मंदिर के चढ़ावे में कथित चोरी और गबन के मामले में गठित विशेष जांच दल (SIT) की प्रारंभिक जांच में कई चौंकाने वाले तथ्य सामने आए हैं। जांच के दौरान पता चला कि 27 अप्रैल से 5 जून के बीच महज 42 दिनों में 70 बार चोरी की घटनाएं हुईं। मीडिया रिपोर्ट्स के अनुसार, एसआईटी को चोरी और वित्तीय अनियमितताओं से जुड़े अहम साक्ष्य मिले, जिसके आधार पर कार्रवाई करते हुए 8 लोगों को गिरफ्तार किया गया।
एसआईटी ने 27 अप्रैल से 5 जून तक की सीसीटीवी रिकॉर्डिंग का विस्तृत विश्लेषण किया। जांच में भेंट एवं चढ़ावे की गणना प्रक्रिया, नकदी के संचालन और रिकॉर्ड प्रबंधन में कई गंभीर खामियां सामने आईं। रिपोर्ट के मुताबिक, काउंटिंग रिकॉर्ड का रखरखाव बेहद कमजोर था और चढ़ावे के वितरण की व्यवस्था में भी कई अनियमितताएं मिलीं।
आंतरिक नियंत्रण व्यवस्था पर उठे सवाल
जांच में यह भी सामने आया कि मंदिर की आंतरिक नियंत्रण प्रणाली पर्याप्त मजबूत नहीं थी। निगरानी और जवाबदेही को लेकर स्पष्ट व्यवस्था का अभाव पाया गया। एसआईटी की रिपोर्ट मिलने के बाद मामले में एफआईआर दर्ज हुई और ट्रस्ट से जुड़े कुछ वरिष्ठ पदाधिकारियों के इस्तीफे की खबर भी सामने आई।
चोरी की पुष्टि के बाद हुई कार्रवाई
खबरों के मुताबिक, दान राशि में चोरी की पुष्टि होने के बाद ही गिरफ्तारी और अन्य कानूनी कार्रवाई शुरू की गई। हालांकि, सोशल मीडिया और कुछ मीडिया रिपोर्टों में प्रसारित कई दावों की जांच में पुष्टि नहीं हुई और एसआईटी ने उन्हें तथ्यहीन बताया है।
तीन वर्षों की ऑडिट रिपोर्ट भी खंगाली
एसआईटी ने वित्तीय वर्ष 2022-23, 2023-24 और 2024-25 की आंतरिक ऑडिट रिपोर्टों का भी परीक्षण किया। जांच में हुंडियों की संख्या और उपलब्ध रिकॉर्ड के बीच अंतर, सीमित सीसीटीवी कवरेज तथा केवल कागजों तक सीमित सुरक्षा प्रोटोकॉल जैसी कमियां सामने आईं।
चांदी की ईंटों को लेकर वायरल दावे गलत
जांच के दौरान सोशल मीडिया पर वायरल चांदी की ईंटों से जुड़े दावों की भी पड़ताल की गई। एसआईटी के अनुसार, अनुराग रस्तोगी द्वारा दान की गई चांदी की ईंटों के गायब होने संबंधी दावे सही नहीं पाए गए। ट्रस्ट के रिकॉर्ड में दोनों दानों का पूरा विवरण मौजूद है। पहली बार 21 जुलाई 2020 और दूसरी बार 28 जुलाई 2020 को चांदी दान की गई थी। अभिलेखों के अनुसार कुल 38 किलोग्राम चांदी प्राप्त हुई थी। इनमें 29 जुलाई 2020 को 25.576 किलोग्राम चांदी की ईंटें दर्ज हैं, जिन्हें गलाकर बैंक के लॉकर में सुरक्षित रखा गया है।
चंपत राय और अनिल मिश्रा का इस्तीफा
मामले की जांच जारी रहने के बीच श्रीराम जन्मभूमि तीर्थ क्षेत्र ट्रस्ट के महासचिव चंपत राय और ट्रस्ट सदस्य अनिल मिश्रा ने नैतिक आधार पर अपने पदों से इस्तीफा दे दिया। इसी दौरान पुलिस ने इस मामले में आठ लोगों के खिलाफ नामजद एफआईआर दर्ज की, जिन्हें बाद में गिरफ्तार कर लिया गया।
यह भी पढ़ें-  भरोसे से खिलवाड़ बर्दाश्त नहीं… देवरिया में गरजे सीएम योगी, अखिलेश की सपा पर किया अब तक का सबसे बड़ा हमला 
आठ आरोपियों के खिलाफ दर्ज हुई एफआईआर
एफआईआर में रामशंकर यादव उर्फ टिन्नू यादव, अनुकल्प मिश्र, अविनाश शुक्ला, करुणेश पांडेय, लवकुश मिश्र, रमाशंकर मिश्र, सुभाष श्रीवास्तव और मनीष यादव को आरोपी बनाया गया है। सभी के खिलाफ भारतीय न्याय संहिता (BNS) के तहत चोरी, आपराधिक विश्वासघात, आपराधिक षड्यंत्र सहित विभिन्न धाराओं में मामला दर्ज किया गया है।

title: ସାବଧାନ! ୧ ଜୁଲାଇରୁ ବଦଳିଯିବ ଏହି ସବୁ ନିୟମ; ମହଙ୍ଗା ପଡ଼ିବ ନା ଆଶ୍ୱସ୍ତି ମିଳିବ? ଜାଣନ୍ତୁ…
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ,୨୬।୬: ପ୍ରତି ମାସର ପହିଲା ତାରିଖ ନିଜ ସହିତ କିଛି ନୂଆ ନିୟମ ନେଇ ଆସିଥାଏ। ଜୁନ ମାସ ଏବେ ଶେଷ ହେବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି ଏବଂ ଜୁଲାଇ ମାସ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବା ସୀମାରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଛି। ଭାରତରେ ୧ ଜୁଲାଇ ୨୦୨୬ରୁ ଅନେକ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଆର୍ଥିକ ନିୟମ ବଦଳିବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି, ଯାହାର ସିଧାସଳଖ ପ୍ରଭାବ ଗ୍ରାହକ ଏବଂ କରଦାତାଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ପଡ଼ିବ। ଏହି ନୂଆ ନିୟମଗୁଡ଼ିକ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ୟୁପିଆଇ (UPI) ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ପିଏଫ (PF) ପ୍ରତ୍ୟାହାର ଠାରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ […]
The post ସାବଧାନ! ୧ ଜୁଲାଇରୁ ବଦଳିଯିବ ଏହି ସବୁ ନିୟମ; ମହଙ୍ଗା ପଡ଼ିବ ନା ଆଶ୍ୱସ୍ତି ମିଳିବ? ଜାଣନ୍ତୁ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ,୨୬।୬: ପ୍ରତି ମାସର ପହିଲା ତାରିଖ ନିଜ ସହିତ କିଛି ନୂଆ ନିୟମ ନେଇ ଆସିଥାଏ। ଜୁନ ମାସ ଏବେ ଶେଷ ହେବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି ଏବଂ ଜୁଲାଇ ମାସ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବା ସୀମାରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଛି। ଭାରତରେ ୧ ଜୁଲାଇ ୨୦୨୬ରୁ ଅନେକ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଆର୍ଥିକ ନିୟମ ବଦଳିବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି, ଯାହାର ସିଧାସଳଖ ପ୍ରଭାବ ଗ୍ରାହକ ଏବଂ କରଦାତାଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ପଡ଼ିବ। ଏହି ନୂଆ ନିୟମଗୁଡ଼ିକ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ୟୁପିଆଇ (UPI) ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ପିଏଫ (PF) ପ୍ରତ୍ୟାହାର ଠାରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରି ମହଙ୍ଗା ଭତ୍ତା (DA) ବୃଦ୍ଧି ଏବଂ ଏଲ୍ପିଜି (LPG) ସିଲିଣ୍ଡରର ମୂଲ୍ୟରେ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ଭଳି ଅନେକ ଜିନିଷ ସାମିଲ ହେବାର ଆଶା ରହିଛି। ଆସନ୍ତୁ ଜାଣିବା ୧ ଜୁଲାଇ ୨୦୨୬ରୁ କେଉଁ କେଉଁ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ହେବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି।

Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

title: बारिश की कमी से बाजार से गायब हुईं जंगली सब्जियां, बढ़ी औषधीय सब्जियों की मांग
description: Gondia Wild Vegetables: गोंदिया में बारिश में देरी के कारण जंगली और औषधीय सब्जियां बाजार में नहीं पहुंच सकीं। इससे आदिवासी और ग्रामीणों का रोजगार प्रभावित हुआ है।
content:
Gondia Medicinal Vegetables: ग्रामीण व आदिवासी क्षेत्र के नागरिक बारिश के मौसम में जंगली सब्जियों का स्वाद लेते हैं। लेकिन इस वर्ष बारिश को विलंब होने से जंगल में सब्जियां नहीं उग पाई हैं। जिससे जंगली सब्जियां बाजार में उपलब्ध नहीं हो सकी है। फिलहाल जंगली सब्जियों के शौकीन इन औषधि गुणों से भरपूर सब्जियों के इंतजार में हैं। मानसून जैसे ही शुरू होता है ग्रामीण परिसर में खापरखूटी, शेरडीरे, आंबाली सब्जी, शेरफरे, बांस के वास्टे, लेंगला सब्जी, कानफुटी, भुईआवला, करटोली व अन्य जंगली सब्जियां उग जाती है।
यह जंगली सब्जियां बहुत ही स्वादिष्ट होती है। इसके अलावा स्वास्थ्य के लिए पोषक और औषधियों के गुण होने से इन सब्जियों को विशेष महत्व है। मानसून की शुरुआत में जंगल या पहाड़ी पर जंगली सब्जियां मिलती हैं। ग्रामीण परिसर के नागरिक और आदिवासी युवा सुबह जंगल में जाकर जंगली सब्जियां इकट्ठी करते हैं।
मानसून में देरी का असर
जिससे ग्रामीण या आदिवासियों को रोजगार मिलता है। इन सब्जियों को बाजार में बेचकर वे मिलने वाले पैसों से परिवार का जीवनयापन करते हैं। इन सब्जियों की बाजार में बड़ी मांग है। बारिश के अभाव से आदिवासियों का रोजगार छीन गया है। जंगली सब्जियां पहाड़ व जंगल में उगने से दिनबदिन सब्जियां दुर्लभ होती जा रही है।
ग्रामीण इलाकों के लोगों का रोजगार छिनामान
सून की शुरुआत में ही आने वाली जंगली सब्जियों का स्वाद लेने के लिए शौकीनों का झुकाव जंगली सब्जियां खरीदी की ओर है। बारिश के दिनों में मिलने वाली सब्जियां बिना खाद की होने से शहर में बड़े पैमाने पर जंगली सब्जियां बेची जाती हैं।
ये भी पढ़े:  नागपुर विश्वविद्यालय में 579 पद रिक्त, बसपा ने कुलपति को सौंपा ज्ञापन; छात्रों के भविष्य पर जताई चिंता 
आदिवासियों का रोजगार प्रभावित
लेकिन इस वर्ष बारिश के अभाव के कारण आदिवासी व ग्रामीण इलाकों के लोगों का रोजगार छिन सा गया है। स्वाद के अलावा स्वास्थ्य के लिए पौष्टिक और औषधि गुणों से भरपूर होती हैं। ये सब्जियां औषधीय और लाभकारी जैविक पत्तेदार सब्जियां जंगल में नहीं उग पाई हैं। इसलिए शौकीन जंगली सब्जियों के इंतजार में है।

title: Venezuela Earthquake | ভেনিজুয়েলায় ভয়াবহ ভূমিকম্প, ত্রাণ ও চিকিৎসা সহায়তা পাঠাল ভারত
description:
উত্তরবঙ্গ সংবাদ অনলাইন ডেস্ক: বিধ্বংসী ভূমিকম্পে কেঁপে ওঠা ভেনিজুয়েলার (Venezuela) পাশে দাঁড়াল ভারত (India)। দক্ষিণ আমেরিকার এই দেশে প্রাকৃতিক বিপর্যয়ের জেরে সৃষ্ট মানবিক সংকট মোকাবিলায় ভারত সরকার এক বড়সড় ত্রাণ অভিযান শুরু করেছে। ভেনিজুয়েলার দুর্গত মানুষের জন্য জরুরি চিকিৎসা সামগ্রী এবং প্রয়োজনীয় ত্রাণ বোঝাই করে দুটি ভারতীয় বায়ুসেনার (IAF) বিমান ইতিমধ্যেই রওনা হয়েছে। ভারত সরকারের […]
The post Venezuela Earthquake | ভেনিজুয়েলায় ভয়াবহ ভূমিকম্প, ত্রাণ ও চিকিৎসা সহায়তা পাঠাল ভারত appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.
content:
উত্তরবঙ্গ সংবাদ অনলাইন ডেস্ক: বিধ্বংসী ভূমিকম্পে কেঁপে ওঠা ভেনিজুয়েলার (Venezuela) পাশে দাঁড়াল ভারত (India)। দক্ষিণ আমেরিকার এই দেশে প্রাকৃতিক বিপর্যয়ের জেরে সৃষ্ট মানবিক সংকট মোকাবিলায় ভারত সরকার এক বড়সড় ত্রাণ অভিযান শুরু করেছে। ভেনিজুয়েলার দুর্গত মানুষের জন্য জরুরি চিকিৎসা সামগ্রী এবং প্রয়োজনীয় ত্রাণ বোঝাই করে দুটি ভারতীয় বায়ুসেনার (IAF) বিমান ইতিমধ্যেই রওনা হয়েছে।
ভারত সরকারের এই পদক্ষেপকে আন্তর্জাতিক মহলে ব্যাপক প্রশংসা করা হচ্ছে। জানা গেছে, ভূমিকম্পে বিধ্বস্ত এলাকাগুলোতে দ্রুত সহায়তা পৌঁছে দিতে ভারত সরকার কয়েক টন জীবনদায়ী ওষুধ, চিকিৎসা সরঞ্জাম এবং অন্যান্য প্রয়োজনীয় সামগ্রী পাঠাচ্ছে। ভেনিজুয়েলার বর্তমান পরিস্থিতিতে এই সহায়তা অত্যন্ত গুরুত্বপূর্ণ বলে মনে করা হচ্ছে। নয়াদিল্লি এবং কারাকাসের মধ্যে এই মানবিক সাহায্যের সম্পর্ক দুই দেশের কূটনৈতিক সম্পর্কের আরও এক নতুন অধ্যায় তৈরি করল।
ভারতের বিদেশ মন্ত্রকের পক্ষ থেকে জানানো হয়েছে, দুর্যোগের খবর পাওয়ার পরপরই প্রধানমন্ত্রী নরেন্দ্র মোদির (PM Narendra Modi) নির্দেশে ত্রাণ পাঠানোর প্রক্রিয়া শুরু হয়। বিশ্বের যে কোনো প্রান্তে বিপদের সময়ে ভারত যে ‘ফার্স্ট রেসপন্ডার’ হিসেবে কাজ করে, ভেনিজুয়েলার এই ত্রাণ অভিযান ফের তা প্রমাণ করল।
উল্লেখ্য, কয়েকদিন আগেই ভেনিজুয়েলায় আঘাত হানা শক্তিশালী ভূমিকম্পে ব্যাপক ক্ষয়ক্ষতি হয়েছে। হাজার হাজার মানুষ ঘরছাড়া হয়েছেন এবং অসংখ্য মানুষ আহত হয়েছেন। পরিকাঠামো ভেঙে পড়ায় দেশটিতে তীব্র সংকট দেখা দিয়েছে। এই পরিস্থিতিতে ভারতের পাঠানো এই ত্রাণ সামগ্রী স্থানীয়দের জন্য কিছুটা স্বস্তি নিয়ে আসবে বলে আশা করা হচ্ছে। বায়ুসেনার এই দুই বিমান সফলভাবে ত্রাণ পৌঁছে দিলে ভেনিজুয়েলার ক্ষতিগ্রস্ত অঞ্চলগুলোতে পরিস্থিতি স্বাভাবিক করার কাজ আরও দ্রুতগতিতে এগিয়ে যাবে। ভারত সরকারের এই মানবিক উদ্যোগের ফলে ভেনিজুয়েলার সাধারণ মানুষের কাছে জরুরি চিকিৎসাসেবা নিশ্চিত করা সম্ভব হবে।
The post Venezuela Earthquake | ভেনিজুয়েলায় ভয়াবহ ভূমিকম্প, ত্রাণ ও চিকিৎসা সহায়তা পাঠাল ভারত appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.

title: Karbala an eternal lesson in truth, justice and sacrifice: Mirwaiz Umar
description:
Srinagar, June 26: Mirwaiz-e-Kashmir Dr. Molvi Mohammad Umar Farooq, while speaking at the Friday congregation at Jama Masjid Srinagar on Youm-e-Ashoora, said that the tragedy of Karbala is not merely a chapter of history, but an eternal lesson in truth, patience, justice and sacrifice.
In a statement issued, Mirwaiz said Imam Hussain (RA) was not in search of war or confrontation. He stood for the principle that differences must be addressed through truth, adherence to the principles of Islam and sincerity through conversation. But when those before him chose the path of oppression and violence instead, history recorded their failure forever. Imam Hussain (RA) and his devoted companions, on the other hand, became everlasting symbols of courage, sacrifice and steadfastness upon truth. Karbala reminds us that power may appear strong for a time, but in the end it is truth, justice and moral courage that prevail.
Mirwaiz said this lesson is not confined to one time or one place. It speaks to every age, every society and every conflict. When arrogance takes the place of reason, when force is preferred over understanding, and when communication is rejected in favour of confrontation, the result is always suffering and loss. But when truth, patience and discourse are upheld, even in the most difficult circumstances, they leave behind a legacy that history honours.
Referring to recent global developments, Mirwaiz said the recent United States-Israel confrontation with Iran again reminds us that military force, however overwhelming, has its limits. Wars can alter circumstances and inflict immense suffering, but durable peace and lasting solutions ultimately require dialogue, negotiation and statesmanship.
He said even after months of confrontation, enormous expenditure of resources and immense human suffering, adversaries eventually returned to the negotiating table. It is not a sign of weakness on either side; it reflects the reality that disputes cannot be resolved through force alone. Efforts by regional and international actors, including Pakistan and Qatar, to facilitate an environment conducive to dialogue are also worthy of appreciation.
Mirwaiz said this lesson is especially relevant for South Asia, particularly India and Pakistan. Our region is home to nearly one-fourth of humanity. It possesses immense civilizational wealth, extraordinary human resources and enormous economic potential. Yet for decades, political tensions, mistrust and unresolved issues have prevented the peoples of this region from fully realizing these possibilities. Societies suffer not only economically, but also emotionally and psychologically.
Referring to his own commitment to this principle, Mirwaiz said that following the tragic assassination of his father, Shaheed Mirwaiz Molvi Farooq, in 1990, he inherited not only the position and responsibility of the Mirwaiz, but also the obligation to uphold the principles for which he laid down his life. He said Shaheed Mirwaiz was a strong advocate of justice and dialogue over violence and confrontation. He consistently advocated engagement between India and Pakistan and believed that the interests of the people of Jammu and Kashmir and the region would be best served in an atmosphere of peace, mutual respect and meaningful dialogue.
Mirwaiz said whether through the Awami Action Committee that he inherited from him, or later through the All Parties Hurriyat Conference, he has consistently, for more than 36 years, upheld this principle despite facing odds and pushback.

तलाक के दो साल बाद ईशा देओल ने बयां किया दिल का हाल, बोलीं- मुझे रोमांटिक होना पसंद है, प्यार की कमी जरूर है
description: Esha Deol Divorce: भरत तख्तानी से तलाक के दो साल बाद ईशा देओल ने अपनी निजी जिंदगी पर बात की। उन्होंने कहा कि उन्हें रोमांस और प्यार की कमी महसूस होती है, लेकिन उनका सच्चे प्यार पर भरोसा अब भी कायम है।
content:
Esha Deol On Love: बॉलीवुड अभिनेत्री ईशा देओल ने पति भरत तख्तानी से अलग होने के बाद पहली बार अपनी निजी जिंदगी को लेकर खुलकर बात की है। साल 2024 में दोनों ने आपसी सहमति से तलाक लिया था। अब अलगाव के दो साल बाद ईशा ने बताया कि यह दौर उनके और उनके परिवार के लिए काफी इमोशनल रूप से चुनौतीपूर्ण रहा। हालांकि, तमाम मुश्किलों के बावजूद उनका प्यार और रिश्तों पर विश्वास आज भी कायम है।
एक हालिया पॉडकास्ट में ईशा देओल ने सोशल मीडिया पर अपने कमेंट सेक्शन बंद रखने की वजह भी बताई। उन्होंने कहा कि यह फैसला उन्होंने नहीं, बल्कि उनकी टीम ने लिया था। ईशा के मुताबिक, तलाक के समय हालात बेहद संवेदनशील थे और परिवार को अनावश्यक प्रतिक्रियाओं से बचाने के लिए यह कदम उठाया गया। उन्होंने कहा कि वह सोशल मीडिया पर बहुत सक्रिय नहीं रहतीं और निजी जिंदगी को लेकर बेवजह की चर्चा से दूरी बनाए रखना चाहती हैं।
जिंदगी में रोमांस की कमी महसूस होती है
बातचीत के दौरान ईशा ने स्वीकार किया कि फिलहाल उनकी जिंदगी में रोमांस की कमी है। उन्होंने कहा कि मुझे रोमांटिक होना पसंद है। मैं रोमांटिक-कॉमेडी फिल्मों, प्यार भरे गानों और खूबसूरत प्रेम कहानियों की दीवानी हूं। मुझे लगता है कि प्यार और रोमांस हर इंसान की जिंदगी की सबसे अहम चीजों में से एक हैं और फिलहाल मुझे उनकी कमी महसूस होती है। हालांकि, उन्होंने साफ किया कि इसका मतलब यह नहीं है कि उन्होंने प्यार से उम्मीद छोड़ दी है।
ये भी पढ़ें- बंदूक के साथ दिखे जितेंद्र कुमार, इंटेंस अवतार में नजर आए रवि किशन, ‘मिर्जापुर द मूवी’ का दमदार पोस्टर जारी
हेमा मालिनी और धर्मेंद्र जैसा प्यार अब कम देखने को मिलता है
जब ईशा देओल से पूछा गया कि क्या तलाक और दिल टूटने के अनुभव ने प्यार को लेकर उनकी सोच बदल दी है, तो उन्होंने साफ कहा कि ऐसा बिल्कुल नहीं है। उनके मुताबिक, ब्रेकअप और रिश्तों का खत्म होना जिंदगी का हिस्सा है, लेकिन इससे प्यार की खूबसूरती कम नहीं होती। उन्होंने कहा कि उन्होंने अपने माता-पिता हेमा मालिनी और धर्मेंद्र के रिश्ते में सम्मान, गरिमा और बिना शर्त प्यार को बहुत करीब से देखा है। ईशा का मानना है कि आज के दौर में ऐसे रिश्ते कम देखने को मिलते हैं, लेकिन वह अब भी सच्चे और सम्मानपूर्ण प्रेम पर विश्वास रखती हैं।

title: Sitanshu Kotak | వైభవ్ కోసం మరొకరికి అన్యాయం చేయాలా?.. బ్యాటింగ్ కోచ్ సంచలన వ్యాఖ్యలు..!
description: Sitanshu Kotak : జూనియర్ స్థాయిలో తానేంటో నిరూపించుకున్న వైభవ్ సూర్యవంశీ (Vaibhav Sooryavanshi) అంతర్జాతీయ అరంగేట్రంపై ఉత్కంఠ కొనసాగుతోంది. బ్యాటింగ్ కోచ్ సితాన్షు కొటాక్ (Sitanshu Kotak) మాత్రం వైభవ్‌ బెంచ్‌మీదే ఉండే అవకాశముందని అంటున్నాడు.
content:
Sitanshu Kotak : జూనియర్ స్థాయిలో తానేంటో నిరూపించుకున్న వైభవ్ సూర్యవంశీ(Vaibhav Sooryavanshi) అంతర్జాతీయ అరంగేట్రంపై ఉత్కంఠ కొనసాగుతోంది. 15 ఏళ్లకే రికార్డుల హోరుతో ప్రపంచం దృష్టిని ఆకర్షించిన ఈ కుర్రాడు.. ఐర్లాండ్ పర్యటనలో ఆడడంపై స్పష్టత రావడం లేదు. స్క్వాడ్‌లో ఉన్నప్పటికీ తుది జట్టులో వైభవ్‌ ఉంటాడా? లేదా? అనేది ఎవరూ ధ్రువీకరించకపోవడమే అందుకు కారణం. శుక్రవారం సాయంత్రం 6 గంటలకు తొలి టీ20 ఉన్నందున.. నెట్స్‌లో ఈ చిచ్చరపిడుగు భారీ షాట్లు ఆడాడు. అయినా సరే బ్యాటింగ్ కోచ్ సితాన్షు కొటాక్ (Sitanshu Kotak) మాత్రం వైభవ్‌ బెంచ్‌మీదే ఉండే అవకాశముందని సంచలన వ్యాఖ్యలు చేశాడు.
గత సీజన్ ఐపీఎల్ నుంచి పొట్టి క్రికెట్‌లో సంచలనంగా మారిన వైభవ్ సూర్యవంశీ ఐర్లాండ్ పర్యటనకు ఎంపికవ్వడంతో అరంగేట్రానికి వేళైందని మురిసిపోయారంతా. ఓపెనర్‌గా ఆడిస్తే అంతర్జాతీయ క్రికెట్‌లోనూ రికార్డులు బద్ధలు కొట్టేస్తాడని అందరూ అనుకుంటున్న వేళ.. వైభవ్‌ కాస్త ఆగాల్సిందేననే మాటలు వినిపిస్తున్నాయి. ఎందుకంటే టీ20ల్లో ఓపెనర్లుగా అభిషేక్ శర్మ, సంజూ శాంసన్ అదరగొడుతున్నారు. ఇషాన్ కిషన్ సైతం పొట్టి వరల్డ్‌కప్‌లో దంచేశాడు. వైభవ్ తుది జట్టులో ఉండాలంటే.. ఈ ముగ్గురిలో ఒకరు బెంచ్ మీదే ఉండాలి. కాబట్టి.. వైభవ్‌ను ఆడించడం కోసం ఎవరో ఒకరిని తప్పించడం సరికాదని భారత బ్యాటింగ్ కోచ్ సితాన్షు కొటాక్ అంటున్నాడు.

“Vaibhav Suryavanshi will get his opportunity, but I don’t think just to give him the opportunity we should drop someone who has been scoring runs, that will be unfair to them” pic.twitter.com/oD2HTqIEpq
— Ajay Jadeja (@AjayJadeja171) June 26, 2026

‘వైభవ్‌కు దేశం తరఫున ఆడే అవకాశం కచ్చితంగా లభిస్తుంది. అలాఅనీ, అతడిని ఆడించడం కోసం పరుగులు సాధిస్తున్న ఆటగాడిని పక్కన పెట్టేయాలని నేను అనుకోను. అయితే.. ఈ విషయం జట్టు మేనేజ్‌మెంట్‌ నిర్ణయంపై ఆధారపడి ఉంటుంది. వైభవ్ ప్రతిభావంతుడే. నా దృష్టిలో ఒకరికి అవకాశం ఇవ్వడం కోసం మరొకరికి అన్యాయం చేయడం సరికాదు. ఎందుకంటే.. పరిణతితో ఉండడం, నిర్ణయాలు తీసుకోవడం, జట్టును గెలిపించాలనే తపన.. వంటివి ఉండడం చాలా ముఖ్యం.

“Nothing is bothering him” 
India batting coach Sitanshu Kotak has said Vaibhav Sooryavanshi can make his mark if selected for Friday’s T20 against Ireland.
The 15-year-old could break the world record as the youngest international, held by Sachin Tenulkar.#BBCCricket pic.twitter.com/tNOvYZMNMN
— BBC SPORT NI (@BBCSPORTNI) June 25, 2026

అందుకని వైభవ్‌ను జట్టులో ఒకడిగానే చూస్తున్నాం. ఐపీఎల్‌లో, అండర్‌-19 క్రికెట్‌లో మెలిగినట్టే భారత జట్టులోనూ వ్యవహరించాలని వైభవ్‌కు చెప్పాం. కోచ్ గౌతం గంభీర్ సైతం అతడికి ఇదే మాట చెప్పాడు’ అని సితాన్షు మీడియా సమావేశంలో వెల్లడించాడు. భారత్, ఐర్లాండ్ మధ్య సాయంత్రం 6 గంటలకు తొలి టీ20 మొదలవ్వనుంది.

title: Subedhari | యువత మాదక ద్రవాల జోలికి పోవద్దు : సీపీ సన్ ప్రీత్ సింగ్
description: డ్రగ్స్ రహిత సమాజం నిర్మాణంలో యువత భాగస్వాములు కావాలని వరంగల్ పోలీస్ కమిషనర్ సన్ ప్రీత్ సింగ్ పిలుపు నిచ్చారు.
content:
సుబేదారి (వరంగల్), జూన్ 26 : డ్రగ్స్ రహిత సమాజం నిర్మాణంలో యువత భాగస్వాములు కావాలని వరంగల్ పోలీస్ కమిషనర్ సన్ ప్రీత్ సింగ్ పిలుపు నిచ్చారు. ప్రపంచ మాదక ద్రవ్యాల నిరోధక దినోత్సవాన్ని పురస్కరించుకోని వరంగల్ పోలీసు కమినరేట్ అధ్వర్యంలో వరంగల్ నగరం లో 2కె రన్ నిర్వహించారు. వరంగల్ పోలీస్ కమిషనరేట్ కార్యాలయము నుండి సుబేదారిలోని ఆర్ట్స్ అండ్ సైన్స్ కళాశాల మైదానం వరకు 2కె రన్ కోనసాగింది. ఈ పరుగులో ప్రతిభ కబరిచిన యువతకు ముఖ్య అతిధిల చేతుల మీదుగా పతకాలు, సర్టిఫికేట్లను అందజేశారు.
ఈ సందర్బంగా సన్ ప్రీత్ సింగ్ మాట్లాడారు మాదకద్రవ్యాల సంబంధించి ప్రస్తుత సమాజంలో పెద్ద సమస్యగా మారిందని, యువత, విద్యార్థులు మాదకద్రవ్యాల జోలికి పోవద్దని, ఒక్కసారి వాటిని వినియోగించడం ద్వారా యువత జీవితాలు అంధకారం మారుతాయని అన్నారు. ముఖ్యంగా మత్తు పదార్థాలను విక్రయాలు, వినియోగించడంలాంటి చర్యలకు పాల్పడి చిక్కుల్లో పడొద్దని, విద్యార్థులు కేవలం చదువులపైనే దృష్టి పెట్టాలని, అదే విధంగా యువత తమ ఉన్నంత లక్ష్య సాధనకై కృషి చేయాలని పోలీస్ కమిషనర్ తెలిపారు. ఈ కార్యక్రమములో ఎమ్మెల్యే నాయిని రాజేందర్ రెడ్డి, కే.ఆర్ నాగరాజు, టీజీ ఎన్‌పిడిసిఎల్ ఎండీ వరుణ్ రెడ్డి, వరంగల్, హన్మకొండ కలెక్టర్లు డా.సత్యశారద, చాహత్ బాజ్‌పాయి, కుడా చైర్మన్ ఇనగాల వెంట్రామిరెడ్డి, డీసీపీలు దార కవిత, అంకిత్‌కుమార్, అడిషినల్ కలెక్టర్ సంధ్య తదితరులు పాల్గొన్నారు.

title: అందమైన గోళ్లు – ఆరోగ్యకరమైన జీవితం
description: Nail hygiene : మన శరీరంలో గోళ్లు చాలా చిన్న భాగమే అయినప్పటికీ, మన మొత్తం ఆరోగ్య రక్షణలో ఇవి కీలక పాత్ర పోషిస్తాయి. “గోళ్ల శుభ్రతే...
content:
Nail hygiene : మన శరీరంలో గోళ్లు చాలా చిన్న భాగమే అయినప్పటికీ, మన మొత్తం ఆరోగ్య రక్షణలో ఇవి కీలక పాత్ర పోషిస్తాయి. “గోళ్ల శుభ్రతే ఆరోగ్యం” అనేది కేవలం ఒక నినాదం కాదు, అది నిత్య జీవితంలో ప్రతి ఒక్కరూ పాటించాల్సిన ముఖ్యమైన సూత్రం. ఆరోగ్యంపట్ల ఎంత జాగ్రత్తగా ఉన్నా.. చిన్న చిన్న తప్పులు పెను ముప్పులకు దారితీస్తాయి. ముఖ్యంగా చాలామంది గోళ్ల విషయంలో అశ్రద్ధ వహిస్తుంటారు. ఈ కారణంగా రకరకాల రుగ్మతలు పలకరిస్తాయి. మనదేశంలో అందరం చేత్తో భోజనం చేస్తాం కాబట్టి గోళ్లు శుభ్రం చేసుకోవడం అత్యంత అవసరం. లేదంటే రకరకాల బ్యాక్టీరియా పెరిగేందుకు గోళ్లే స్థావరంగా మారిపోతాయి. భోజనం తినే ముందు, తిన్న తర్వాత చేతులతో పాటు గోళ్ల సందులను కూడా శుభ్రంగా కడుక్కోవాలి.



Read Also :  Fennel Seeds: భోజనం తర్వాత చిటికెడు సోంపు.. ఆరోగ్యానికి ఎన్నో ప్రయోజనాలు



Nail hygiene 



Nail hygiene :  ఆరోగ్య సమస్యలకు దూరం



అంతేకాదు, వివిధ రసాయనాలతో తయారు చేసిన డిష్‌వాషర్లతో అంట్లు తోమినప్పుడు కూడా జాగ్రత్తగా ఉండాలి. అవి గోళ్లలోకి వెళ్లి తద్వారా భోజన సమయంలో నోట్లోకి చేరే అవకాశం ఉంటుంది. ఇంకా ఆరోగ్య సమస్యలకు దూరంగా ఉండేందుకు, గోళ్లను పొడవుగా పెంచుకోకుండా ఎప్పటికప్పుడు కత్తిరించుకోవాలి. గోళ్లను సరిగ్గా కత్తిరించుకోకపోతే వాటి కింద ఫంగల్ ఇన్ఫెక్షన్లు ఏర్పడి, గోళ్లు రంగు మారి విరిగిపోయే ప్రమాదం ఉంది. చాలా మందికి ఒత్తిడిలోనో, ఖాళీగా ఉన్నప్పుడో గోళ్లు కొరికే అలవాటు ఉంటుంది. ఇది చాలా ప్రమాదకరం. గోళ్లలోని క్రిములు నేరుగా నోట్లోకి వెళ్లడమే కాకుండా, వేళ్ల చుట్టూ ఉండే చర్మం పాడై ఇన్ఫెక్షన్లు వస్తాయి. ఒకరు ఉపయోగించిన నెయిల్ కట్టర్‌ను మరొకరు వాడేటప్పుడు శుభ్రం చేయాలి. దీనివల్ల ఒకరి నుంచి ఒకరికి ఫంగస్ వ్యాపించకుండా ఉంటుంది. పిల్లలు మట్టిలో ఆడుకుంటూ ఉంటారు కాబట్టి వారి గోళ్లలో మురికి త్వరగా చేరుతుంది. తల్లిదండ్రులు పిల్లల గోళ్లను ఎప్పటికప్పుడు గమనిస్తూ శుభ్రం చేయాలి.
