"Karbala reminds us that power fades, but faith, sacrifice & moral courage endure": Mirwaiz Pays Tribute to Imam Hussain (AS), Martyrs of Karbala
description:
Srinagar, June 26: Mirwaiz-e-Kashmir Dr. Moulvi Umar Farooq paid tributes to Hazrat Imam Hussain (RA) and the martyrs of Karbala on the occasion of Youm-e-Ashoora, describing their sacrifice as an enduring lesson in truth, principles, patience and steadfastness.
In a post on X, Mirwaiz Umar Farooq wrote, On Youm-e-Ashoora, We remember Hazrat Imam Hussain (RA) and the martyrs of Karbala, whose sacrifice remains an eternal lesson in truth, principles patience and steadfastness. Karbala reminds us that power fades, but faith, sacrifice and moral courage endure."

title: ‘Guitar Hero’ spiritual sequel adds Paramore and more to soundtrack
description:
‘Stage Tour’ is out later this year
The post ‘Guitar Hero’ spiritual sequel adds Paramore and more to soundtrack appeared first on NME.
content:
Stage Tour, the spiritual successor to Guitar Hero, will feature tracks from Paramore, Avril Lavigne and more.

READ MORE: AI, vinyl and indie supremacy: what’s shaping video game music in 2026?

Created by members of the team behind Guitar Hero, Stage Tour is a “love letter” to rhythm gaming. “Stage Tour won’t be Guitar Hero, DJ Hero, Guitar Freaks or Rock Band. This is something new,” the team behind the revived RedOctane studio wrote in their ‘A Genre Worth Fighting For – Our Return To Music Rhythm Games’ blog. 
Earlier this month, they confirmed the first ten names for the Stage Tour soundtrack, which included Babymetal, Weezer and Red Hot Chili Peppers. Now RedOctance have announced that you’ll be able to play along to Paramore’s pop-punk classic ‘For A Pessimist I’m Pretty Optimistic’, Avril Lavigne’s iconic ‘Bite Me’ and Honey Revenge’s ‘Airhead’ as part of the game.
All the songs confirmed for the ‘Stage Tour’ soundtrack:

Babymetal & Electric Callboy – ‘RATATATA’
Extreme – ‘Get The Funk Out’
Ghost – ‘Square Hammer’
Good Kid – ‘Mimi’s Delivery Service’
Red Hot Chili Peppers – ‘Dani California’
Static-X – ‘Terminator Oscillator’
Weezer – ‘Island In The Sun’
Paramore – ‘For A Pessimist, I’m Pretty Optimistic’
Avril Lavigne – ‘Bite Me’
Honey Revenge – ‘Airhead’

“Y’all already know that Guitar Hero is the reason I started playing guitar, I cannot verbalise how fucking cool this is,” wrote Honey Revenge’s Donny Lloyd on X. 

TWITTER I FORGOT TO TELL YOU, AIRHEAD IS GONNE BE PLAYABLE IN THE NEW STAGE TOUR GAME! ^_^/ y'all already know that guitar hero is the reason i started playing guitar, i cannot verbalize how FUCKING COOL THIS IS! https://t.co/4gliek3wjm
— dawni (@musical_afro) June 25, 2026

“Nothing brings people together like a killer soundtrack, and Stage Tour is turning the volume all the way up. Built to celebrate generations of music fans, the game’s officially licensed setlist blends iconic rock anthems with modern global hits spanning rock, metal, alt-rock, pop-punk, and beyond,” explained the team at RedOctane in a blog post.
Stage Tour is due to launch later this year. The game will work with a variety of different controllers including a PC keyboard, and will feature guitar, bass, drum and vocal inputs. It will also be released alongside a line-up of “purpose-built” hardware.
In other news, Microsoft has announced another major price hike for Xbox consoles, blaming the “current components crisis” for the rise.
The post ‘Guitar Hero’ spiritual sequel adds Paramore and more to soundtrack appeared first on NME.

title: These aesthetic board games double as décor in the chicest homes
അയര്‍ലന്‍ഡില്‍ ആഞ്ഞടിച്ച് വൈഭവ് തരംഗം, ഇന്ത്യ-അയർലൻഡ് ടി20 ടിക്കറ്റുകൾ വിറ്റുതീർന്നത് റെക്കോര്‍ഡ് വേഗത്തില്‍
description: കഴിഞ്ഞ മാർച്ചിൽ ഇന്ത്യക്കെതിരെയുള്ള ഹോം സീരീസ് പ്രഖ്യാപിക്കുമ്പോൾ, ഒരു 15 വയസ്സുകാരൻ ഇന്ത്യൻ ടീമിലെത്തി ഇത്രയും വലിയ തരംഗം സൃഷ്ടിക്കുമെന്ന് ക്രിക്കറ്റ് അയർലൻഡ് ഒട്ടും പ്രതീക്ഷിച്ചിരുന്നില്ല.
content: <p><strong>ബെൽഫാസ്റ്റ്: </strong>ഇന്ത്യൻ ക്രിക്കറ്റിലെ പുതിയ വിസ്മയം 15-കാരൻ വൈഭവ് സൂര്യവംശിയുടെ അന്താരാഷ്ട്ര അരങ്ങേറ്റം കാണാൻ കാത്തിരിക്കുകയാണ് കായികലോകം. അയർലൻഡിനെതിരെയുള്ള ടി20 പരമ്പരയോടെ വൈഭവ് ഇന്ത്യൻ ജേഴ്സിയിൽ അരങ്ങേറുമെന്നാണ് റിപ്പോർട്ടുകൾ. വൈഭവ് തരംഗം ആഞ്ഞടിച്ചതോടെ ടി20 പരമ്പരക്കുള്ള ടിക്കറ്റുകള്‍ റെക്കോര്‍ഡ് വേഗത്തിലാണ് വിറ്റുപോയത്. ഇന്ന് ബെൽഫാസ്റ്റിൽ നടക്കുന്ന ആദ്യ ടി20 മത്സരത്തിന്‍റെ ടിക്കറ്റുകൾ വില്‍പനക്കെത്തി മിനിറ്റുകൾക്കം വിറ്റുതീർന്നു.</p><p>കഴിഞ്ഞ മാർച്ചിൽ ഇന്ത്യക്കെതിരെയുള്ള ഹോം സീരീസ് പ്രഖ്യാപിക്കുമ്പോൾ, ഒരു 15 വയസ്സുകാരൻ ഇന്ത്യൻ ടീമിലെത്തി ഇത്രയും വലിയ തരംഗം സൃഷ്ടിക്കുമെന്ന് ക്രിക്കറ്റ് അയർലൻഡ് ഒട്ടും പ്രതീക്ഷിച്ചിരുന്നില്ല. ഡബ്ലിനിലെ 12,000 പേരെ ഉൾക്കൊള്ളാൻ കഴിയുന്ന മലാഹൈഡ് ഗ്രൗണ്ടിന് പകരം ബെൽഫാസ്റ്റിലെ സിവിൽ സർവീസ് ക്രിക്കറ്റ് ക്ലബ്ബിലാണ് ഇത്തവണ മത്സരങ്ങൾ ക്രമീകരിച്ചത്. ഇതാണ് ഇപ്പോൾ അയർലൻഡ് ക്രിക്കറ്റ് ബോർഡിന് തിരിച്ചടിയായത്. കുറഞ്ഞ സീറ്റിംഗ് കപ്പാസിറ്റിയുള്ള സ്റ്റേഡിയം തിരഞ്ഞെടുത്തതിൽ ആരാധകർ കടുത്ത അമർഷത്തിലാണ്. ടിക്കറ്റ് കിട്ടാത്തതിനെ തുടർന്ന് ബോർഡിനെതിരെ വലിയ പ്രതിഷേധമാണ് ഉയരുന്നത്.</p><p>ടിക്കറ്റിനായി എന്‍റെ ഫോൺ സദാസമയവും ബെല്ലടിച്ചുകൊണ്ടിരിക്കുകയാണ്. നിർഭാഗ്യവശാൽ ഞങ്ങൾക്ക് 4,500 മുതൽ 5,000 വരെ ആരാധകരെ മാത്രമേ ഇവിടെ ഉൾക്കൊള്ളാൻ കഴിയൂ. കൂടുതൽ സ്ഥലമുണ്ടായിരുന്നെങ്കിൽ ഇതിന്‍റെ മൂന്നിരട്ടി ടിക്കറ്റുകൾ ഞങ്ങൾക്ക് സുഖമായി വിൽക്കാമായിരുന്നു. മിനിറ്റുകൾക്കുള്ളിലാണ് ടിക്കറ്റുകൾ തീർന്നത്. ഇപ്പോഴും ആളുകൾ ടിക്കറ്റിനായി അന്വേഷിച്ചുകൊണ്ടിരിക്കുകയാണെന്ന് ക്രിക്കറ്റ് അയർലൻഡ് ചെയർമാൻ ബ്രയാൻ മക്നീസ് 'ദി ഇന്ത്യൻ എക്സ്പ്രസിനോട്' പറഞ്ഞു. ഞാനും അവിടെയുണ്ടായിരുന്നു' എന്ന് പറയാൻ ആരാധകർ വൈഭവ് സൂര്യവംശിയുടെ സാന്നിധ്യം പരമ്പരയുടെ ആവേശം ഇരട്ടിയാക്കിയിട്ടുണ്ടെന്ന് മക്നീസ് കൂട്ടിച്ചേർത്തു.</p><p>ഇത് വളരെ വലിയ കാര്യമാണ്. എല്ലാവരും ഇതിനെക്കുറിച്ചാണ് സംസാരിക്കുന്നത്. അവൻ തികച്ചും ആകർഷകമായ ഒരു പ്രതിഭയാണ്. നാളെ അവൻ അരങ്ങേറ്റം കുറിക്കുകയാണെങ്കിൽ, ചരിത്രപരമായ ആ നിമിഷത്തിന് സാക്ഷിയാകാൻ എല്ലാവരും ആഗ്രഹിക്കുന്നു. അവൻ എല്ലാവരുടെയും ശ്രദ്ധ പൂർണ്ണമായി പിടിച്ചുപറ്റിയിരിക്കുകയാണ് വൈഭവെന്നും മക്നീസ് വ്യക്തമാക്കി.ഐപിഎൽ 2026-ൽ രാജസ്ഥാൻ റോയൽസിനായി നടത്തിയ തകർപ്പൻ പ്രകടനമാണ് വൈഭവിനെ ഇന്ത്യൻ ടീമിലെത്തിച്ചത്. സീസണിലെ റൺവേട്ടക്കാരിൽ ഒന്നാമനായിരുന്നു ഈ യുവ ഇടംകയ്യൻ ബാറ്റർ. അടുത്തിടെ നടന്ന ത്രിരാഷ്ട്ര പരമ്പരയുടെ ഫൈനലിൽ ശ്രീലങ്ക എ ടീമിനെതിരെ വെറും 29 പന്തിൽ നിന്ന് 94 റൺസ് അടിച്ചുകൂട്ടി വൈഭവ് ക്രിക്കറ്റ് ലോകത്തെ ഞെട്ടിച്ചിരുന്നു. അയർലൻഡ് പരമ്പരയ്ക്ക് ശേഷം നടക്കാനിരിക്കുന്ന ഇംഗ്ലണ്ടിനെതിരായ ടി20 പരമ്പരയ്ക്കുള്ള ഇന്ത്യൻ ടീമിലും വൈഭവ് ഇടംപിടിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്.</p><p><span><strong>ഏഷ്യാനെറ്റ് ന്യൂസ് ലൈവ് കാണാന്‍ ഇവിടെ ക്ലിക് ചെയ്യുക</strong></span></p>

title: Santos clear the treatment room, and Cuca gets three boosts 🙌
description: Coach Cuca received good news at Santos ahead of the second half of the season.The club has practically CLEARED OUT its medical department, strengthening the squad.João Schmidt, Gabriel Menino, and T...
content: Santos clear the treatment room, and Cuca gets three boosts 🙌Coach Cuca received good news at Santos ahead of the second half of the season.The club has practically CLEARED OUT its medical department, strengthening the squad.João Schmidt, Gabriel Menino, and Thaciano have recovered and are available to the coach.As a result, left-back Vinícius Lira is the only absentee. He is still recovering from a serious injury to his left knee.The expectation is that Vinícius Lira will only return to action in 2027. The information comes from GE.With these reinforcements, Santos will look to mount a comeback in the Brazilian Championship.The club is in 15th place with 21 points — Vasco sits at the top of the relegation zone with 20 points.This article was translated into English by Artificial Intelligence. You can read the original version in 🇧🇷 here.

রায়গঞ্জ: মহিলা থানার লকআপ থেকে এক মহিলা আসামী ও ৩ বছরের শিশু পালিয়ে যাওয়ার ঘটনায় ব্যাপক চাঞ্চল্য ছড়াল রায়গঞ্জ (Raiganj) শহরে। জানা গিয়েছে, এদিন সকাল ৭.১৪ মিনিটে থানা থেকে পালিয়ে যায় মাদক (Drug) মামলায় অভিযুক্ত ওই মহিলা। প্রায় দেড় ঘন্টা পর পুলিশ (Police) আধিকারিকেরা ঘটনাটি জানতে পেরেই তৎপর হয়ে ওঠে। খবর যায় রায়গঞ্জ পুলিশ জেলার […]
The post Raiganj | থানার লকআপ যেন ‘খোলা দরজা’! রায়গঞ্জ মহিলা থানা থেকে শিশু সহ পলাতক মাদক পাচারকারী appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.
content:
রায়গঞ্জ: মহিলা থানার লকআপ থেকে এক মহিলা আসামী ও ৩ বছরের শিশু পালিয়ে যাওয়ার ঘটনায় ব্যাপক চাঞ্চল্য ছড়াল রায়গঞ্জ (Raiganj) শহরে। জানা গিয়েছে, এদিন সকাল ৭.১৪ মিনিটে থানা থেকে পালিয়ে যায় মাদক (Drug) মামলায় অভিযুক্ত ওই মহিলা। প্রায় দেড় ঘন্টা পর পুলিশ (Police) আধিকারিকেরা ঘটনাটি জানতে পেরেই তৎপর হয়ে ওঠে। খবর যায় রায়গঞ্জ পুলিশ জেলার পুলিশ সুপারের কাছে। তৎক্ষণাৎ অতিরিক্ত পুলিশ সুপার ডিএসপি সদর, ডিএসপি ট্রাফিক রায়গঞ্জ থানায় হাজির হয়ে সিসি ক্যামেরার ফুটেজ খতিয়ে দেখেন।
পুলিশ সূত্রে জানা গিয়েছে, পলাতক ওই মহিলা আসামীর নাম নাফিসা বিবি ওরফে খাতুন (২২), বাড়ি মালদা জেলার দক্ষিণ লক্ষীপুর সংলগ্ন হরিচক গ্রামে। এদিন বিকেল ৩ টা নাগাদ পলাতক ওই আসামির বিরুদ্ধে এফআইআর রুজু করেন রায়গঞ্জ থানার আইসি। পাশাপাশি রায়গঞ্জ জেলা আদালতের আইনজীবী অফিসে লিখিতভাবে বিষয়টি জানানো হয়। এই ঘটনায় মহিলা থানায় কর্তব্যরত পুলিশের কনস্টেবল সহ মহিলা পুলিশ আধিকারিকদের বিরুদ্ধে ডিপার্টমেন্টাল এনকোয়ারির নির্দেশ দেওয়া হয়েছে। এর পাশাপাশি ৬ পুলিশ অফিসারকে শোকজ করা হয়েছে বলেও পুলিশ সূত্রে জানা গিয়েছে।
এই প্রসঙ্গে রায়গঞ্জ পুলিশ জেলার পুলিশ সুপার ডাঃ সোনাওয়ানে কুলদীপ সুরেশ বলেন, “মহিলা থানার হাজত থেকে এক মহিলা সহ তিন বছরের শিশু পালিয়ে গিয়েছে। ঘটনার তদন্ত চলছে। রায়গঞ্জ শহরের সমস্ত সিসি ক্যামেরার ফুটেজ খতিয়ে দেখা হচ্ছে। পুলিশ অফিসারদের শোকজ করার পাশাপাশি ডিপার্টমেন্টাল এনকোয়ারি চলছে। কীভাবে ওই আসামি পালিয়ে গেল তা খতিয়ে দেখা হচ্ছে।”
রায়গঞ্জ মহিলা থানার পুলিশ সূত্রে জানা গিয়েছে, এদিন ওই মহিলা ও তার ৩ বছরের সন্তানকে শ্বাসকষ্টজনিত কষ্টের কারণে লকআপ থেকে বাইরে বের করার ব্যবস্থা করে পুলিশ। ডিউটি অফিসারের তখন ঘরের ভেতরেই বসেছিল। নিরাপত্তার দায়িত্বে ছিলেন পুলিশের কনস্টেবল সহ সিভিকরা। সেখান থেকে আচমকাই উধাও হয়ে যায় ওই মহিলা।
উল্লেখ্য, চলতি মাসের ২৪ তারিখে সরকারি বাসে করে ব্রাউন সুগার পাচার করতে গিয়ে তিন বছরের বাচ্চা সমেত ওই মহিলাকে গ্রেপ্তার করেছিল পুলিশ। ধৃত ওই মহিলার কাছ থেকে ৩০০ গ্রাম ব্রাউন সুগার উদ্ধার করে রায়গঞ্জ থানার পুলিশ। পুলিশ সূত্রে জানা গিয়েছে, কিশনগঞ্জ-এর এক দালালকে ব্রাউন সুগারের তিনটি প্যাকেট তুলে দেওয়ার কথা ছিল ওই মহিলার। ফারাক্কা থেকে শিলিগুড়িমুখী সরকারি বাস রায়গঞ্জ শহরের সরকারি বাসস্ট্যান্ডে পৌঁছতেই তল্লাশি চালায় পুলিশ। সেই সময় ওই মহিলা পাচারকারীর কাছ থেকে সাবানের কেসে ৩০০ গ্রাম ব্রাউন সুগার বাজেয়াপ্ত হয়। এরপরেই অভিযুক্তকে গ্রেপ্তার করে রায়গঞ্জ থানায় নিয়ে যাওয়া হয়। গতকাল ধৃতের বিরুদ্ধে ভারতীয় ন্যায় সংহিতার মাদক আইনে মামলা রুজু করে উত্তর দিনাজপুর জেলা আদালতের অ্যাডিশনাল ডিস্ট্রিক সেশন র্জাজ কোর্টে তোলা হলে বিচারক তদন্তের স্বার্থে ধৃতের ৪ দিনের পুলিশি হেপাজতের নির্দেশ দেন। তারপরেই এদিন পুলিশি হেপাজত থেকে সেই বন্দি পালিয়ে যাওয়ার ঘটনাকে কেন্দ্র করে তীব্র চাঞ্চল্য ছড়িয়েছে রায়গঞ্জ শহরে।

title: ఢిల్లీ డేటా సెంటర్‌లో భారీ అగ్నిప్రమాదం.. ఆగిపోయిన గూగుల్ క్లౌడ్ సేవలు!
description: Google cloud disruption: న్యూఢిల్లీలోని ప్రముఖ ఎస్టీటీ గ్లోబల్ డేటా సెంటర్‌లో జరిగిన ఘోర అగ్నిప్రమాదం టెక్ రంగంలో కలకలం రేపింది. ఈ డేటా సెంటర్‌లో ఘోర...
content:
Google cloud disruption: న్యూఢిల్లీలోని ప్రముఖ ఎస్టీటీ గ్లోబల్ డేటా సెంటర్‌లో జరిగిన ఘోర అగ్నిప్రమాదం టెక్ రంగంలో కలకలం రేపింది. ఈ డేటా సెంటర్‌లో ఘోర అగ్నిప్రమాదం సంభవించడం వల్ల గూగుల్ క్లౌడ్ సేవలకు తీవ్ర అంతరాయం ఏర్పడింది. తెల్లవారుజామున లిథియం బ్యాటరీల వల్ల మంటలు మొదలై, డేటా హాల్ మొత్తం పూర్తిగా కాలిపోయింది. సర్వర్లు, విద్యుత్ వ్యవస్థలు ధ్వంసమవ్వడంతో కీలక సమాచారం ఆగిపోయింది. ఈ ప్రమాదం కారణంగా గూగుల్ వినియోగదారులు సేవల్లో జాప్యాన్ని ఎదుర్కొంటున్నారు. మూడవ పక్షం డేటా సెంటర్ కావడంతో విద్యుత్ సరఫరాను ఆపేయడం తప్పనిసరి అయ్యింది. పునరుద్ధరణ పనులు జరుగుతున్నా, సేవలు సాధారణ స్థితికి రావడానికి సమయం పడుతోంది. టెలివిజన్ దృశ్యాల్లో కనిపించిన విధ్వంసం ప్రమాద తీవ్రతకు అద్దం పడుతోంది.



Read also: Ketan Agarwal Murder Case: కేతన్ అగర్వాల్ హత్య.. ప్రియుడి బ్లాక్‌మెయిల్ వల్లేనా?



Major fire at data center



వినియోగదారుల సమాచారంపై తీవ్ర ప్రభావం



ఈ ఘటన కారణంగా ప్రముఖ సంస్థలు తమ దశాబ్దాల డేటాను కోల్పోయే ప్రమాదంలో పడ్డాయి. మ్యాట్రిక్స్ సెల్యులార్ సంస్థ తన 20 ఏళ్ల కస్టమర్ రికార్డులు, బిల్లింగ్ సమాచారాన్ని యాక్సెస్ చేయలేకపోతోంది. బ్యాకప్ పునరుద్ధరణపై స్పష్టత లేకపోవడంతో ఆ డేటా శాశ్వతంగా కోల్పోతామనే భయం పట్టుకుంది. మరోవైపు ఆర్2 నెట్ అనే ఐఎస్‌పీ సంస్థ 2 మిలియన్ డాలర్ల నష్టంతో పాటు కీలక ట్రాకింగ్ సమాచారాన్ని కోల్పోయింది. చట్ట అమలు సంస్థలకు అవసరమైన ముఖ్యమైన డేటా కూడా ధ్వంసమైందని సమాచారం. టాటా కమ్యూనికేషన్స్, నోవామేష్ సంస్థలు రికవరీ కోసం ప్రయత్నాలు చేస్తున్నాయి. అయితే, రికవరీ ప్లాన్ లేని క్లయింట్లు తీవ్ర ఆందోళనలో ఉన్నారు. క్లౌడ్ సేవలు నిలిచిపోవడం వల్ల వ్యాపార కార్యకలాపాలు ఎక్కడికక్కడే ఆగిపోయాయి.



Google cloud disruption: విచారణ, భవిష్యత్ సవాళ్లు



ప్రస్తుతం నిపుణులు ఈ ప్రమాదానికి గల కారణాలపై స్వతంత్ర విశ్లేషణ చేస్తున్నారు. పూర్తిస్థాయి నివేదిక రావడానికి కనీసం ఐదు నుంచి ఏడు వారాల సమయం పడుతుంది. టాటా గ్రూప్ ఇప్పటికే సైబర్ సెక్యూరిటీ సమస్యలతో ఇబ్బందులు పడుతుండగా, ఈ అగ్నిప్రమాదం అదనపు సవాలుగా మారింది. అత్యుత్తమ భద్రతా ప్రమాణాలు ఉన్నాయని చెప్పుకునే డేటా సెంటర్లలోనే ఇలా జరగడంపై ప్రశ్నలు తలెత్తుతున్నాయి. బ్యాకప్ సేవలు సబ్స్క్రైబ్ చేసుకున్న వారికి మాత్రమే కొంతవరకు ఊరట లభించింది. భవిష్యత్తులో ఇలాంటి సంఘటనలు జరగకుండా మౌలిక సదుపాయాలను మెరుగుపరచడం అవసరం. డేటా భద్రత, రికవరీ అంశాలపై కంపెనీలు ప్రత్యేక శ్రద్ధ పెట్టాలని ఈ ఘటన హెచ్చరిస్తోంది. ఈ సమస్య పరిష్కారానికి సాంకేతిక బృందాలు నిరంతరం శ్రమిస్తున్నాయి.

title: Some Congress leaders signal possible rethink on Bidadi Township Project if farmers are unwilling to part with lands
description: The cautious position adopted by Karnataka Pradesh Congress Committee (KPCC) president B.K. Hariprasad and Home Minister Priyank Kharge on the proposed acquisition of agricultural land for the Bidadi Township Project, coupled with suggestions that the project may be shelved if farmers refuse to part with their holdings, is expected to strengthen the resolve of protesting farmers and provide fresh ammunition to the BJP-JD(S) alliance

title: Listen to The Rolling Stones’ rollicking new song ‘Divine Intervention’ – featuring The Cure’s Robert Smith – and soulful single ‘Jealous Lover’
description:
"There was this bloke standing there with his back to me with his long gown on, and when he turned around he was covered in lipstick," Mick Jagger recalled of crossing paths with Smith in the studio 
The post Listen to The Rolling Stones’ rollicking new song ‘Divine Intervention’ – featuring The Cure’s Robert Smith – and soulful single ‘Jealous Lover’ appeared first on NME.
content:
The Rolling Stones have shared a new track featuring Robert Smith, ‘Divine Intervention’, along with another single, ‘Jealous Lover’. Listen below.

Read More: The Rolling Stones – ‘Hackney Diamonds’ review: they’ve still got it

The songs are the latest previews of the legendary band’s upcoming 25th studio album, ‘Foreign Tongues‘, which is out on July 10 via Polydor/Universal Music.
Upon announcing the follow-up to 2023’s Grammy-winning ‘Hackney Diamonds’, Mick Jagger and co. revealed that the record would boast contributions from the Cure frontman, and the likes of Paul McCartney and Red Hot Chili Peppers‘ Chad Smith.
‘Divine Intervention’ is a rollicking, high-tempo rock tune, with Smith on electric guitar, and Steve Winwood on piano and organ. The cut is one of two songs to feature Smith on ‘Foreign Tongues’.
Speaking to Vulture about how he enlisted the Cure singer, Jagger recalled how “there was this bloke standing there with his back to me with his long gown on” in the studio, “and when he turned around he was covered in lipstick”.
“He said, ‘Yeah, we’ve never met’,” he continued. “And then I said, ‘Well, while you’re here then you’d better go and do something’. That’s how collaborations work sometimes.”

The soulful ‘Jealous Lover’, meanwhile, finds frontman Jagger delivering a falsetto lead vocal over a slick yet soulful R&B groove.
“You said you’d let me live my life, no fetters and no chains / I believed your every word, now your tune has changed,” he sings in the first verse. “One day after coffee, you fixed me with a stare / And said, ‘Where were you on Friday night? Tell me who was there’.”
Jagger then returns to his distinctive lower register as he demands: “Hands off, jealous lover / Please let me be / You pray like a Mantis, you’re emerald green…”
Winwood is also credited on the track, playing Rhodes piano and organ.
‘Jealous Lover’ is accompanied by an official music video starring Anya Taylor-Joy (The Queen’s Gambit, Peaky Blinders) and Charles Melton (Riverdale, Beef). The clip was directed by Chris Barrett & Luke Taylor (Radiohead, Jack White), and is currently streaming exclusively on Amazon Music – watch here. Alternatively, you can watch an animated lyric video below.

The Stones’ forthcoming album will include the previously released singles ‘Rough And Twisted’ and ‘In The Stars’, as well as a cover of the Amy Winehouse classic ‘You Know I’m No Good’. It’ll also feature the group’s late drummer, Charlie Watts.
Check out the full tracklist for ‘Foreign Tongues’ here.
In other news, The Rolling Stones have announced a new podcast series, Speaking In Tongues, giving fans a behind-the-scenes insight into the making of ‘Foreign Tongues’ across six episodes.
Producer Andrew Watt will appear alongside Robert Smith and Steve Winwood, and the record’s cover artist, Nathaniel Mary Quinn.
Last month, NME attended the ‘Foreign Tongues’ launch event in New York City, the Stones discussed the diversity of sound on their new album and a country track called ‘Ringing Hollow’.

“Keith and I, when we were really young, we both liked country music a lot,” Jagger explained. “We would play it, we’d always liked Hank Williams. You can’t really imitate those people, but we absorbed that style. ‘Ringing Hollow’, which is a love song to America, I didn’t want to express it in a rock way. I thought it was better that we did it in a country way.”
The frontman also spoke about the inspiration for the LP, saying: “The thing about this record that I find interesting. And you say, ‘You’ve got nothing to prove,’ but the Stones is a rock band, but the Stones also has the ability to do ballads and country music and dance music, they run in the gamut of all these styles. We’re not stuck in one particular style; over the years, we’ve loved all kinds of music. So, we express that in the way we record and what songs we write.”
Elsewhere, Jagger recently teased the possibility of a new Rolling Stones tour coming up, saying that he hoped to do some “shows next year”. He’d previously said he “can’t wait” to get back out on the road with the group, and Keith Richards hinted that they could confirm some dates for 2027.
Rolling Stones ‘Foreign Tongues’ album artwork
In late 2025, the band scrapped plans for a UK and European stadium tour in 2026 because Richards was unable to “commit” to it.
The guitarist has since said that Jagger “won’t bloody stop” making new music. “And the momentum from ‘Hackney Diamonds’ was such that this is basically carrying on in the same breath,” he explained.
“I was just letting it roll – we had enough stuff if we wanted to keep pushing, and so Mick and I gave each other the usual wry look and said: ‘Yeah, let’s keep pushing’.”
The post Listen to The Rolling Stones’ rollicking new song ‘Divine Intervention’ – featuring The Cure’s Robert Smith – and soulful single ‘Jealous Lover’ appeared first on NME.

title: Everything Wisconsin fans need to know about four-star Baboucarr Ann
description: Wisconsin kept its strong 2027 basketball recruiting run going Thursday, landing a commitment from four-star wing Baboucarr Ann.
content: Wisconsin kept its strong 2027 basketball recruiting run going Thursday, landing a commitment from four-star wing Baboucarr Ann. Ann, a 6-foot-5 small forward from Maple Grove High School in Osseo, Minnesota, gives Greg Gard and the Badgers another high-end piece in what is quickly becoming one of the more interesting Wisconsin recruiting classes in recent memory. Ann is rated as the No. 1 player in Minnesota by 247Sports and is listed as a top-100 national prospect. His commitment gives Wisconsin a long, athletic wing with two-way upside and another player who fits the direction of the program.The addition also continues a strong month for the Badgers on the recruiting trail. Wisconsin already had commitments from four-star guard Jalen Brown and 7-foot-1 center Jack Thelen in the 2027 class. Ann now joins that group and gives the Badgers a strong mix of guard play, size and wing athleticism. For Wisconsin, this is the type of recruiting win that stands out. The Badgers have often built through development, evaluation and fit. Ann checks those boxes, but he also brings a national recruiting profile that adds another layer to the class.Belief. Trust. Development. Family.That’s why I’m a Badger. 🦡❤️#OnWisconsin#Alhamdulia#Committedpic.twitter.com/5gtLLiq8lj— Baboucarr Ann (@Babouann) June 25, 2026Ann had been a major target for Wisconsin, and the Badgers were able to close after building a strong relationship and getting him back to Madison. Assistant coach Brad Davison and Gard were both heavily involved in the recruitment. Ann’s game should give Wisconsin flexibility. He has the size to play on the wing, the athletic ability to defend multiple spots and the skill set to keep growing as a scorer. The commitment is another sign that Wisconsin’s staff is gaining real traction with the 2027 class. With Brown, Thelen and Ann now in the fold, the Badgers have a group that gives fans a clear reason to be excited about the future.Contact/Follow @TheBadgersWire on X (formerly Twitter) and like our page on Facebook to follow ongoing coverage of Wisconsin Badgers news, notes and opinion.This article originally appeared on Badgers Wire: Everything Wisconsin fans need to know about four-star Baboucarr Ann

title: France Heatwave Crisis: ପ୍ରଚଣ୍ଡ ଗ୍ରୀଷ୍ମ ପ୍ରବାହ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ୟାରିସ୍‌ରେ ଗଲାଣି ୪୦ରୁ ଅଧିକ ଜୀବନ
description:
ପ୍ୟାରିସ୍: ସମଗ୍ର ୟୁରୋପ ମହାଦେଶକୁ ଏବେ ପ୍ରଚଣ୍ଡ ଗ୍ରୀଷ୍ମ ପ୍ରବାହ କବଳିତ କରି ରଖିଥିବା ବେଳେ ଏଥିରେ ସବୁଠାରୁ ଅଧିକ ସଂକଟଜନକ ସ୍ଥିତି ଉପୁଜିଛି ଫ୍ରାନ୍ସରେ। ଦେଶରେ ଜାରି ରହିଥିବା ଏହି ଅଭୂତପୂର୍ବ ପାଣିପାଗ ବିପର୍ଯ୍ୟୟ ଯୋଗୁଁ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ସୁଦ୍ଧା ୪୦ରୁ ଅଧିକ ଲୋକଙ୍କର ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ହୋଇସାରିଛି। ଗରମରୁ ରକ୍ଷା ପାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଅଣ-ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ନଦୀ, ହ୍ରଦ ଓ କେନାଲକୁ ଗାଧୋଇବାକୁ ଯାଇ ପାଣିରେ ବୁଡ଼ି ପ୍ରାଣ ହରାଇଥିବା ନେଇ ମଧ୍ୟ ଡଜନରୁ ଅଧିକ ମାମଲା ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଛି। ଏହି ପ୍ରାଣଘାତୀ ସ୍ଥିତିକୁ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିରେ ରଖି ଜାତୀୟ ପାଣିପାଗ ସଂସ୍ଥା ''ମେଟିଓ-ଫ୍ରାନ୍ସ'' ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଦେଶର ଅର୍ଦ୍ଧେକରୁ ଅଧିକ ଭାଗରେ ସର୍ବୋଚ୍ଚ ସ୍ତରର ''ରେଡ୍ ଆଲର୍ଟ'' ଜାରି କରାଯାଇଛି ଏବଂ ବିଶେଷ କରି ଶିଶୁ, ବୃଦ୍ଧ ଓ ଅସୁସ୍ଥ ଲୋକମାନଙ୍କୁ ସତର୍କ ରହିବାକୁ ଅନୁରୋଧ କରାଯାଇଛି।
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ: ସରପଞ୍ଚଙ୍କ ସ୍ୱାମୀଙ୍କ ଉପରକୁ ଗୁଳିମାଡ
ରାଜଧାନୀ ପ୍ୟାରିସ୍ ସମେତ ସମଗ୍ର ଫ୍ରାନ୍ସରେ ତାପମାତ୍ରା ସମସ୍ତ ପୂର୍ବ ରେକର୍ଡକୁ ଭାଙ୍ଗିଦେଇଛି। ଚଳିତ ସପ୍ତାହରେ ପ୍ୟାରିସରେ ଯେତିକି ଦିନ ପାରଦ ୪୦ ଡିଗ୍ରୀ ସେଲସିୟସରୁ ଉପରେ ରହିଛି, ତାହା ଗତ ୧୪୭ ବର୍ଷର ଇତିହାସରେ କେବେ ଦେଖାଯାଇନଥିଲା। ଦେଶର ଜାତୀୟ ହାରାହାରି ତାପମାତ୍ରା ୨୯.୮ ଡିଗ୍ରୀ ସେଲସିୟସରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ନୂଆ ରେକର୍ଡ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଥିବା ବେଳେ ଦକ୍ଷିଣ-ପଶ୍ଚିମାଞ୍ଚଳର ପିସୋସ୍ ଠାରେ ଚଳିତ ଋତୁର ସର୍ବାଧିକ ତାପମାତ୍ରା ୪୪.୩ ଡିଗ୍ରୀ ସେଲସିୟସ୍ ରେକର୍ଡ କରାଯାଇଛି। ପାରମ୍ପରିକ ଭାବେ ୟୁରୋପରେ ଶୀତଳ ପାଣିପାଗ ରହୁଥିବାରୁ ଏଠାକାର ଅଧିକାଂଶ ଘରଗୁଡ଼ିକରେ ଏୟାର କଣ୍ଡିସନର (ଏସି) ର ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା ନାହିଁ, ଯାହାଫଳରେ ଗ୍ରୀଷ୍ମର ପ୍ରକୋପ ଜନଜୀବନକୁ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଅସ୍ତବ୍ୟସ୍ତ କରିଦେଇଛି।
କେବଳ ଫ୍ରାନ୍ସ ନୁହେଁ, ବ୍ରିଟେନରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଇତିହାସର ସବୁଠାରୁ ଗରମ ଜୁନ୍ ମାସ ଅନୁଭୂତ ହୋଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ସ୍ପେନ୍ ଓ ଇଟାଲୀରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ସରକାର ସତର୍କ ସୂଚନା ଜାରି କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ପ୍ରଚଣ୍ଡ ଗ୍ରୀଷ୍ମ ପ୍ରବାହ ୨୦୦୩ ମସିହାରେ ହୋଇଥିବା ସେହି ଭୟଙ୍କର ପ୍ରାକୃତିକ ବିପର୍ଯ୍ୟୟର ସ୍ମୃତିକୁ ତାଜା କରିଦେଇଛି, ଯେଉଁଥିରେ ହଜାର ହଜାର ଲୋକ ପ୍ରାଣ ହରାଇଥିଲେ। ଜୁନ୍ ମାସ ଅର୍ଥାତ୍ ଗ୍ରୀଷ୍ମ ଋତୁର ଆରମ୍ଭରୁ ହିଁ ଏଭଳି ଚରମ ପାଣିପାଗ ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହେବା ମାନବ-କୃତ ଜଳବାୟୁ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନର ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ସଙ୍କେତ ଏବଂ ଆଗାମୀ ଦିନରେ ଏହି ସମସ୍ୟା ଆହୁରି ଦୀର୍ଘସ୍ଥାୟୀ ଓ ଭୟଙ୍କର ରୂପ ଧାରଣ କରିବ ବୋଲି ବୈଜ୍ଞାନିକମାନେ ଚେତାବନୀ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି।
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ: ସୋମବାର ପଶ୍ଚିମବଙ୍ଗ ବିଧାନସଭାରେ ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ ହୋଇପାରେ ସମାନ ନାଗରିକ ସଂହିତା ବିଲ୍

title: 10 Books To Read When You Feel Zoned Out In Life
description: Feeling disconnected from your surroundings or stuck on autopilot? These novels are designed to pull you back into the present. With unforgettable storytelling, fresh perspectives, and immersive worlds, they spark curiosity, sharpen your attention, and remind you how rewarding it can be to slow down and truly engage with a story.
content: Feeling disconnected from your surroundings or stuck on autopilot? These novels are designed to pull you back into the present. With unforgettable storytelling, fresh perspectives, and immersive worlds, they spark curiosity, sharpen your attention, and remind you how rewarding it can be to slow down and truly engage with a story.10 Books To Read When You Feel Zoned Out In LifeWhen life starts feeling repetitive, it's easy to drift through the days without really noticing them. These books do the opposite. They challenge the way you think, encourage you to observe more closely, and draw you into stories that demand your full attention. Whether through beautiful prose, unusual ideas, or unforgettable characters, each novel offers a welcome break from mental fog and a chance to reconnect with curiosity, imagination, and the joy of reading.The Mezzanine by Nicholson BakerWhat begins as a man's ordinary lunch break unfolds into an astonishing meditation on escalators, shoelaces, milk cartons, office life, and the tiny details we normally ignore. Baker transforms everyday observations into something endlessly fascinating, proving that life isn't dull, we simply stop paying attention. If you've been moving through your days on autopilot, this witty, quietly brilliant novel will retrain you to notice the extraordinary hidden inside the ordinary.The Wallcreeper by Nell ZinkTiffany's seemingly stable life begins unraveling through unexpected relationships, environmental activism, and impulsive decisions that refuse to follow convention. Fast-paced, wildly intelligent, and delightfully unpredictable, the novel constantly changes direction without losing emotional depth. It's impossible to settle into expectations because Zink keeps surprising you. Perfect for readers who feel mentally stuck and need a book that jolts them back into curiosity.The Door by Magda SzabóAn accomplished writer hires a mysterious housekeeper whose guarded life slowly becomes an obsession. What begins as a simple domestic relationship transforms into a profound exploration of trust, pride, and human complexity. Szabó reveals character through subtle emotional shifts rather than dramatic twists. It's the kind of novel that demands complete attention, pulling readers back into deep, thoughtful engagement with every page.Flights by Olga TokarczukRather than telling one linear story, Flights drifts through airports, museums, anatomy collections, and journeys across continents, weaving together reflections on movement and what it means to be alive. Every section introduces a new perspective, making the book feel endlessly fresh. If you've been feeling emotionally or creatively stagnant, Tokarczuk's boundless curiosity is remarkably contagious and often leaves readers seeing the world differently.Housekeeping by Marilynne RobinsonTwo sisters grow up in a remote town under the care of an unconventional aunt whose relationship with the world challenges everything they've been taught about home and belonging. Robinson's luminous prose encourages readers to slow down and absorb every sentence. It's a deeply reflective novel that gently disrupts routine thinking, making it ideal for anyone craving a renewed sense of awareness.Speedboat by Renata AdlerWritten as a series of sharp observations, conversations, and fleeting moments, Speedboat mirrors the fragmented way modern life often feels. Yet instead of becoming overwhelming, the novel turns scattered experiences into something unexpectedly exhilarating. Adler's wit and intelligence reward careful reading, making it an excellent choice for anyone whose attention has been dulled by repetitive routines or endless scrolling.The Invention of Morel by Adolfo Bioy CasaresA fugitive arrives on an isolated island where mysterious strangers appear to ignore his existence entirely. As impossible events begin unfolding, reality itself becomes uncertain. Elegant, inventive, and surprisingly philosophical, this Argentine classic remains one of literature's most original mysteries. It's a short novel with enormous imaginative power, exactly the kind of story that immediately snaps readers out of mental autopilot.Memoirs of Hadrian by Marguerite YourcenarPresented as a letter from the Roman emperor Hadrian reflecting on his life, this remarkable novel combines philosophy, history, politics, and personal memory into an intimate portrait of a brilliant mind. Rather than relying on action, it captivates through ideas. Reading it feels like spending hours with someone profoundly wise, making it especially rewarding for readers longing to reconnect with deeper thinking.Drive Your Plow Over the Bones of the Dead by Olga TokarczukJanina Duszejko is an eccentric astrologer living in rural Poland who becomes convinced that nature itself is taking revenge after a series of mysterious deaths. Part literary mystery, part philosophical novel, and part ecological fable, it's impossible to categorise. Strange, funny, and wonderfully original, it constantly challenges assumptions, making it an ideal read for anyone whose imagination feels dormant.The Waves by Virginia WoolfSix voices flow together across childhood, adulthood, ambition, friendship, and loss in one of Woolf's most innovative works. The novel doesn't simply tell a story, it immerses readers in the rhythm of consciousness itself. Demanding but deeply rewarding, it slows the mind and heightens awareness. If you've been drifting through life without feeling fully present, few books encourage mindful attention quite like this one.

title: The strange Mauricio Pochettino outburst that is cause for concern for USA ahead of World Cup knockouts
description: Usually a cool customer, Pochettino expressed frustration that his team were not getting more credit for topping Group
content: In this case, it's best to start at the end of 15 strange and slightly disorienting minutes in the Los Angeles Stadium underbelly. Clearly perplexed and irritated by the tone of some questions in his customary post-match press conference, after the USA’s last-gasp but ultimately inconsequential defeat against Turkey, head coach Mauricio Pochettino had to get something off his chest. Again.A matter of moments after voicing his bemusement that nobody had offered his team a token gesture of recognition for finishing top of a group involving Paraguay, Australia and Turkey, the overstimulated Argentinean went into overdrive once more.Mauricio Pochettino uncharacteristically lost his cool after the USA were beaten by Turkey (Reuters)"It cannot be possible that Turkey celebrate three points, and Australia and Paraguay celebrate qualification, and for you not to say 'congratulations' that we won the group," Pochettino said to around 25 journalists in the press room. Often such a cool customer, here he was not. "That is very sad. I need to remember that we won the group. Sorry, guys." It was, to use his own response to one question, just “a bit weird." Nobody is in any doubt about how sparkling a two-week opening this has been for the World Cup co-hosts. Brilliant and clinical against Paraguay, ruthless and intense over Australia, Pochettino's much-changed XI ultimately lost a match they shouldn't have in Inglewood on Thursday night. Yet the caveat? With the United States already top and Turkey already out, it did not matter a jot. But here's the thing: nobody in the press room was overly negative in their line of questioning.  The USA were beaten by Turkey in Los Angeles (Reuters)No doubt a bit miffed after a series of TV interviews, Pochettino seemed baffled from the get-go. Asked what he made of the way his team "fought back" from a goal deficit in the second-half, Pochettino looked at the US media manager to his right with bewilderment. Was this a language barrier issue? After a bit of back-and-forth, Pochettino's riposte was sharp: "They fight over 97 minutes, no? We compete over 97 minutes, not only the second-half." Then, when a somewhat logical query about whether the squad have lost a bit of momentum after Turkey's late sucker-punch was put in front of him, Pochettino – a man who knows all about momentum after Tottenham's improbable run to the Champions League final in 2019 – again seemed confused. Turkey came from behind to beat the co-hosts at SoFi Stadium (Reuters)"I don't understand... what is momentum?" he began. "Is it not to receive a yellow card or risk a player who has problems. Did Germany [who lost to Ecuador earlier on Thursday] lose the momentum too? "There are too many topics in football I don't understand. The option was to finish first and we finished first. It's all positive. I'm so happy, maybe not showing it because your question is a bit weird."I'm confused, the mood and the vibes here... maybe we go home tonight and Turkey stay." Mauricio Pochettino (right) was able to utilise star forward Christian Pulisic off the bench (Reuters)He then, unprompted, added: "No one congratulated us for finishing first in a very difficult group!" It was all rather strange. We've known that the United States will finish top of the group since last weekend; Pochettino spoke about that achievement in his pre-match press conference on Wednesday. His odd request for validation and his sense of under-appreciation here have created a peculiar tone for the US team, ahead of their last-32 clash against Bosnia and Herzegovina in Santa Clara next Wednesday.In fact, despite the defeat, there were numerous positives from Thursday's outing. Eight players started a World Cup match for the first time. No players received second yellow cards, ruling them out of the next match. Their best player, Christian Pulisic, returned and looked bright in a 30-minute second-half cameo. But their world-class manager, for all his tactical astuteness and eye for detail, did not deal with this in a world-class fashion. You could even argue he seemed, completely unnecessarily, a bit rattled.Mauricio Pochettino has led the USA into the knockout phase (Getty)A leader in America desperately seeking acclaim and validation while responding abruptly to simple questions put to him? That sounds... familiar.

title: దేశంలో మరో 7 కొత్త బుల్లెట్ రైలు కారిడార్లకు కేంద్రం గ్రీన్ సిగ్నల్!
description: New Bullet Train Corridors: భారతదేశ వ్యాప్తంగా ప్రధాన నగరాలను అనుసంధానించే లక్ష్యంతో కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం ఒక కీలక ముందడుగు వేసింది. రైల్వే మౌలిక సదుపాయాల రంగాన్ని...
content:
New Bullet Train Corridors: భారతదేశ వ్యాప్తంగా ప్రధాన నగరాలను అనుసంధానించే లక్ష్యంతో కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం ఒక కీలక ముందడుగు వేసింది. రైల్వే మౌలిక సదుపాయాల రంగాన్ని పూర్తిగా ఆధునీకరిస్తూ ఏడు కొత్త హై-స్పీడ్ రైలు (బుల్లెట్ రైలు) కారిడార్లకు ఆమోదం తెలిపింది. దేశంలోని పశ్చిమ, దక్షిణ, ఉత్తర, తూర్పు ప్రాంతాలలోని ముఖ్యమైన ఆర్థిక, పారిశ్రామిక, సాంకేతిక, పర్యాటక కేంద్రాలను కలుపుతూ ఈ విస్తృతమైన హై-స్పీడ్ నెట్‌వర్క్‌ను రూపొందించనున్నారు. జపాన్ సాంకేతిక, ఆర్థిక సహాయంతో షింకన్సెన్ టెక్నాలజీని ఉపయోగించి నిర్మిస్తున్న 508 కిలోమీటర్ల ముంబై-అహ్మదాబాద్ మొట్టమొదటి బుల్లెట్ రైలు ప్రాజెక్ట్ పనులు ప్రస్తుతం పురోగతిలో ఉండగానే, కేంద్రం ఈ ప్రతిష్టాత్మక విస్తరణ ప్రణాళికను ప్రకటించింది. 



Read Also: Food Safety Rules: ఆహార భద్రత నిబంధనల్లో మార్పులు.. రిటైలర్లకు భారీ ఉపశమనం



Centre gives the green signal for 7 more new bullet train corridors in the country!



New Bullet Train Corridors: కేంద్రం గుర్తించిన ఏడు కొత్త కారిడార్లు ఇవే:



కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం కొత్తగా ప్రతిపాదించిన ఏడు కారిడార్లలో ఈ క్రింది మార్గాలు ఉన్నాయి. ఈ ప్రతిపాదిత నెట్‌వర్క్ వల్ల ఆయా నగరాల మధ్య ప్రయాణ వేగం అద్భుతంగా పెరగనుంది.




ముంబై – పుణె



పుణె – హైదరాబాద్



హైదరాబాద్ – బెంగళూరు



హైదరాబాద్ – చెన్నై



చెన్నై – బెంగళూరు



ఢిల్లీ – వారణాసి



వారణాసి – సిలిగురి




కొత్త బుల్లెట్ రైలు మార్గాల అంచనా ప్రకారం, వివిధ ప్రధాన నగరాల మధ్య ప్రయాణ సమయాలు భారీగా తగ్గనున్నాయి. ఈ హై-స్పీడ్ రైళ్లు అందుబాటులోకి వస్తే.. ముంబై-అహ్మదాబాద్ మార్గానికి 1 గంట 57 నిమిషాలు, ముంబై-పూణేకు 48 నిమిషాలు, బెంగళూరు-చెన్నైకి 73 నిమిషాలు పడుతుంది. అలాగే పూణే-హైదరాబాద్‌కు 2 గంటల 08 నిమిషాలు, బెంగళూరు-హైదరాబాద్‌కు 2 గంటల 10 నిమిషాలు, ఢిల్లీ-లక్నోకు 2 గంటలు, ఢిల్లీ-వారణాసికి 3 గంటల 15 నిమిషాలు, పాట్నా-ఢిల్లీకి 4 గంటల 41 నిమిషాలు, మరియు ఢిల్లీ-సిలిగురి మధ్య ప్రయాణానికి సుమారు 6 గంటల సమయం మాత్రమే పడుతుందని అంచనా వేస్తున్నారు.



బీహార్, తూర్పు భారతదేశానికి భారీ లబ్ధి



ఈ మెగా ప్రాజెక్ట్ విస్తరణ ద్వారా బీహార్, తూర్పు భారతదేశం కూడా భారీగా లబ్ధి పొందనున్నాయి. ఢిల్లీ-వారణాసి-పాట్నా బుల్లెట్ రైలు కారిడార్‌కు ఆమోదం లభించిందని రైల్వే మంత్రి అశ్విని వైష్ణవ్ వెల్లడించారు. ఈ మార్గం పూర్తయిన తర్వాత పాట్నా నుండి ఢిల్లీకి ప్రయాణ సమయం కేవలం 4 గంటల 41 నిమిషాలకు తగ్గిపోతుంది. అంతేకాకుండా ఈ కారిడార్‌ను తూర్పున ఉన్న సిలిగురి వరకు మరింత విస్తరించాలని ప్రభుత్వం యోచిస్తోంది. ప్రస్తుతం బీహార్ రాష్ట్రంలో రూ. 1.15 లక్షల కోట్లకు పైగా విలువైన రైల్వే అభివృద్ధి పనులు వేగంగా జరుగుతున్నాయని, రాబోయే ఏడు నుంచి ఎనిమిదేళ్లలో రాష్ట్రానికి 200కు పైగా కొత్త రైళ్లు వచ్చే అవకాశం ఉందని రైల్వే మంత్రి స్పష్టం చేశారు. ఇందులో భాగంగానే ఛప్రా జంక్షన్ – ఆనంద్ విహార్ టెర్మినల్ మధ్య కొత్త వారపు రైలుతో పాటు మౌల్-ఢిల్లీ, జహీర్‌ఘాట్-వారణాసి మధ్య మరో రెండు రైలు సర్వీసులను కూడా వర్చువల్‌గా ప్రారంభించారు.



భూసేకరణ, అనుమతుల తర్వాతే పనులు



పాలనాపరంగా ఈ ఏడు కొత్త కారిడార్ల ఆమోదం ఒక పెద్ద ముందడుగు అయినప్పటికీ.. వీటి నిర్మాణానికి సంబంధించిన ఖచ్చితమైన కాలపరిమితులను ప్రభుత్వం ఇంకా అధికారికంగా ప్రకటించలేదు. క్షేత్రస్థాయిలో పనులు ప్రారంభించడానికి ముందు ప్రతి మార్గానికి సంబంధించిన సాధ్యాసాధ్యాల అధ్యయనాలు (Feasibility Studies), చట్టబద్ధమైన అనుమతులు, నిధుల సమీకరణ మరియు భూసేకరణ వంటి సుదీర్ఘ ప్రక్రియలు పూర్తి కావాల్సి ఉంటుంది. ఏదేమైనప్పటికీ, ముంబై-అహ్మదాబాద్ లైన్ విజయవంతంగా పూర్తి కావడం భవిష్యత్ ప్రాజెక్టులకు దిక్సూచిగా మారనుందని, ఈ కొత్త కారిడార్లు గనుక ప్రణాళికాబద్ధంగా పూర్తయితే దేశీయ రవాణా రంగ స్వరూపమే మారిపోయి ప్రయాణికులకు అత్యంత వేగవంతమైన, సురక్షితమైన ఆధునిక ప్రయాణ అనుభూతి లభిస్తుందని ప్రభుత్వం ధీమా వ్యక్తం చేస్తోంది.

Epaper : epaper.vaartha.com

title: How to follow Wimbledon on the BBC
description: Wimbledon begins on Monday, 29 June - and you can follow every minute live across the BBC.
content: Jannik Sinner won his fourth Grand Slam singles title at Wimbledon last year [Getty Images]Wimbledon begins on Monday - and you can follow every minute live across the BBC.World number one Jannik Sinner will be defending his men's singles crown, with rival and two-time winner Carlos Alcaraz missing with a wrist injury.Poland's Iga Swiatek is the defending women's champion, having beat Amanda Anisimova 6-0 6-0 in last year's showpiece.The tournament takes place from Monday, 29 June to Sunday, 11 July, with coverage across all BBC platforms.Here is all you need to know.BBC signs new Wimbledon deal until 2033How to follow on the BBCEvery match from all 18 courts is available live on BBC iPlayer and the BBC Sport website and app, and there will also be daily television coverage on BBC One and BBC Two.There is a dedicated Wimbledon Extra channel on BBC iPlayer, with match highlights available on demand throughout the tournament across platforms.The BBC Sport website and app will have daily live text commentaries and in-play clips alongside match reports, analysis and features. There will be radio coverage across 5 Live, 5 Sports Extra and BBC Sounds, starting from 13:00 BST on weekdays and 12:00 on weekends, as well as a daily podcast via the 'All About Wimbledon' feed on BBC Sounds.John McEnroe and Tim Henman will also return for to Radio 5 Live's iconic 6-Love-6 show.On site, a new analysis suite will help provide more tactical insight, alongside bespoke video breakdowns of key matches, players and talking points.BBC iPlayer will have a new inclusive feed for Centre Court matches for fans who are blind or visually impaired. It has been co-designed by members of the blind and partially-sighted community and can be found on the Audio Described category page on iPlayer.Iga Swiatek won her sixth Grand Slam trophy at Wimbledon last year [Getty Images]Who are the key players to watch?Sinner is the favourite to win the men's title, particularly with Alcaraz absent.All-time great Novak Djokovic continues his quest for a standalone record 25th Grand Slam title - and an eighth at SW19, which would equal Roger Federer's men's record.French Open champion Alexander Zverev, last year's semi-finalist Flavio Cobolli and  big-serving American Ben Shelton will be among the other contenders.Wimbledon is the only Grand Slam final that world number one Aryna Sabalenka has not reached, having lost in the semi-finals three times.World number four Jessica Pegula, last year's runner-up Anisimova and eighth-ranked Elina Svitolina are all bidding for a first major singles title.World number two Elena Rybakina has some pedigree at Wimbledon, having won the title in 2022, while recent French Open winner Mirra Andreeva reached the quarter-finals last year.'Where champions are born' - the making of Jannik SinnerBattling egos and stereotypes - the rise of female tennis coachesWhich British players have qualified?Six British players are ranked high enough to receive direct entry into the singles draws.Cameron Norrie and Emma Raducanu are the British men's and women's number ones respectively. They are joined in the main draw by Katie Boulter, Jack Draper, Jan Choinski and Francesca Jones.Men's singles wildcards were given to six British players - Jacob Fearnley, Arthur Fery, Jack Pinnington Jones, Toby Samuel, Harry Wendelken and Felix Gill.Six British women also received main-draw singles wildcards. They were Harriet Dart, Alicia Dudeney, Hannah Klugman, Mika Stojsavljevic, Katie Swan and Mimi Xu.Emma Raducanu lost to Donna Vekic in the Queen's final in the build-up to Wimbledon [Getty Images]When is the Wimbledon draw?The Wimbledon men's and women's singles draws took place on Friday, 26 June.Full men's draw (external link)Full women's draw (external link)Williams to begin Wimbledon comeback against JointWhat is the prize money this year?The total prize fund at this year's Wimbledon will be £64.2m, following the largest annual increase in the event's history.The singles' champions will each take home £3.6m with first-round losers paid £80,000.More than £6m has been set aside for the qualifying competition - an increase of 25%.Overall prize money has increased by £10.7m, with leading players welcoming the 20% increase in prize money as a "genuine and significant step forward".However they will still expand their protests about prize money - limiting the time they offer at the media weekend and restricting post-match appearances to 15 minutes throughout the first week.The 15-minute limit is meant to symbolise the 15% of revenue which - broadly speaking - the Grand Slams allocate to prize money.Players to expand prize money protest at WimbledonPlayers welcome 'genuine step forward' on Wimbledon payWho are the pundits and presenters?TV and iPlayerIsa Guha and Clare Balding will guide the day's action from the BBC studio, with Andy Stevenson presenting coverage of the wheelchair finals.They will be joined by a host of Grand Slam champions including John McEnroe, Martina Navratilova, Billie Jean King, Pat Cash, and Tracy Austin.Tim Henman and Annabel Croft will provide inside analysis, while Jamie Murray, Eugenie Bouchard and Kyle Edmund will join the team this year.Former British number one Laura Robson will be courtside throughout the fortnight to deliver immediate reaction and analysis, bringing tennis fans to the heart of the action throughout The Championships.The iconic Andre Agassi will also return to the BBC team for the final few days of the championships.Radio and BBC SoundsGigi Salmon and Clare McDonnell present live coverage on BBC Radio 5 Live, BBC 5 Sports Extra and BBC Sounds, with BBC tennis correspondent Russell Fuller leading  the commentary team.Joining the team are former Wimbledon champions Cash and Marion Bartoli, offering expert insights throughout the tournament. 5 Live's Wimbledon team will bring audiences all the major matches live, with regular updates from the outside courts.Delyth Lloyd and Lee James will commentate and present live, extensive coverage of Wimbledon on the BBC World Service, while there will also be coverage across the 39 BBC Local Radio stations.BBC TV and live streaming scheduleAll times BST. Matches and coverage times are subject to late changes. The BBC is not responsible for any changes that may be made. Full radio coverage times to follow when available.Monday, 29 JuneMen's and women's singles first round10:30-19:00 - Live coverage - BBC Two, BBC iPlayer, BBC Sport website and app14:00-18:00 - Live coverage - title: 2 Texas A&M newcomers make ESPN's baseball transfer rankings
description: Two Texas A&M transfer additions, including Clemson transfer catcher Nate Savoie were ranked in ESPN's college baseball transfer rankings.
content: Texas A&M's 2026 offseason began just hours after the Aggies' back-to-back losses to USC in the College Station Regional, placing pressure on second-year coach Michael Earley to make changes to his staff, starting with firing pitching coach Jason Kelley, which came to fruition just days after the program's postseason exit.After a host of interviews, Earley hired MLB pitching coach/coordinator Barry Enright, whose background as a developer, despite lacking college coaching/recruiting experence, led to his hire over several notable names, and just weeks after Enright made his way to College Station, Earley shocked the college baseball landscape after bringing back ace recruiter and associate head coach Nolan Cain, who spent the last two seasons with Texas.Cain is expected to coach catchers and made an immediate impact in the transfer portal, as South Carolina transfer pitcher Logan Prisco committed just hours after the news of Cain's return dropped. So far, the Aggies have landed eight players from the transfer portal, led by former Clemson catcher Nate Savoie, who ESPN ranked No. 2 in its portal rankings on Thursday."Savoie was a standout freshman at Loyola Marymount who moved to Clemson in the portal at this time last year due in large part to a 20-home run season and plus raw power. His exit velos were even a notch better in 2026, going deep 16 times for Clemson, but the Tigers failed to make the NCAA tournament. Savoie has some chase concerns at the plate and he split time mostly between catcher and left field so his defensive eval behind the plate is incomplete."With veteran catcher Bear Harrison expected to depart for the MLB, combined with the Aggies' top hitters, Caden Sorrell, Gavin Grahovac, and Chris Hacopian, landing Savoie was critical to avoiding a significant drop off at the plate, knowing that incoming sophomores Nico Partida, Jorian Wilson, and Boston Kellner were still developing.Coming in at No. 39, Texas State transfer RHP Wade Cooper, who will be draft-eligible in 2028, is one of the most intriguing offseason additions. He ended his impressive freshman season with a 4.72 ERA, five saves in 66.2 innings pitched, and 73 strikeouts, and will immediately contend for a starting role this fall. Contact/Follow us @AggiesWire on X (formerly Twitter) and like our page on Facebook to follow ongoing coverage of Texas A&M news, notes and opinions. Follow Cameron on X: @CameronOhnysty.This article originally appeared on Aggies Wire: 2 Texas A&M newcomers make ESPN's baseball transfer rankings

title: Celtic FC Women announce new home ahead of 26/27 SWPL season
description: Celtic FC Women can confirm that Kirkintilloch Community Sports Complex will serve as our new home ground, with the move taking effect from the start of the 2026/27 SWPL season.Designed to the highest...
content: Celtic FC Women announce new home ahead of 26/27 SWPL seasonCeltic FC Women can confirm that Kirkintilloch Community Sports Complex will serve as our new home ground, with the move taking effect from the start of the 2026/27 SWPL season.Designed to the highest standards for players and staff, the stadium brings together everything needed for a modern matchday experience, including a floodlit full-size high quality 3G pitch, a Main Stand, and a VIP Stand with spectator seating and modern supporter facilities.Celtic FC Women Head Coach, Grant Scott: "The new stadium is really modern, the pitch is top quality and is perfect for the style of football we want to play.'After weighing up all factors we felt that this was the best place for us to come to get results on the pitch and create an atmosphere which visiting teams will not enjoy coming to face.'"We're all looking forward to next season, building on our recent cup win and continuing the special bond between the team and our supporters in our new home."Celtic FC Women Operations Manager, Stewart McGuire, said: "We cannot wait to begin this journey at Kirkintilloch and make it a special home for everyone connected to the club."This new venue plays host to Scottish underage international fixtures, which will see an improved matchday experience for our fans and will be the perfect home for the future development of our women's team.'We would like to place on record our sincere thanks to everyone at Hamilton Community Stadium for their support over the past two seasons and wish them all the best moving forward.'Neil Anderson, Director of Kirkintilloch Community Sports Club, said:"We are delighted to welcome Celtic FC Women to play their home games in our venue next season."This is a truly exciting partnership for our club, we look forward to their presence making a positive impact in our local community. We look forward to the new SWPL season getting underway in August and seeing Celtic fans bring their colours and noise."

title: नागपुर में इतवारी के अनाज कारोबारी से 9.97 लाख की साइबर ठगी, बैंक अधिकारी बनकर भेजा था फर्जी APK लिंक
description: Nagpur Cyber Fraud: नागपुर के इतवारी में एक अनाज कारोबारी से इंडसइंड बैंक का प्रतिनिधि बनकर ₹9.97 लाख की ठगी की गई। शातिर ठग ने व्हाट्सएप पर APK लिंक भेजकर बैंकिंग डेटा चुरा लिया।
content:
Nagpur Cyber Fraud APK Link Scam: नागपुर के इतवारी क्षेत्र में रहने वाले एक अनाज कारोबारी साइबर ठगी का शिकार हो गए। ठग ने खुद को इंडसइंड बैंक का प्रतिनिधि बताकर बैंकिंग एप्लिकेशन अपडेट करने का झांसा दिया और कारोबारी के खाते से 9.97 लाख रुपये निकाल लिए। मामले में नागपुर शहर साइबर पुलिस ने अज्ञात आरोपी के खिलाफ मामला दर्ज कर जांच शुरू कर दी है।
APK लिंक भेजकर हासिल की गोपनीय जानकारी
पुलिस के अनुसार इतवारी निवासी कैलाश ब्रिजप्रसाद अग्रवाल (64) का इंडसइंड बैंक की छापरूनगर शाखा में खाता है। 9 मई की शाम वह अपनी दुकान पर मौजूद थे, तभी उनके मोबाइल पर एक अज्ञात व्यक्ति का फोन आया। आरोपी ने खुद को बैंक का प्रतिनिधि बताते हुए नया मोबाइल बैंकिंग एप डाउनलोड करने की सलाह दी। कुछ देर बाद उसने व्हाट्सएप पर एक APK लिंक भेजा, जिसे खोलकर कारोबारी ने एप डाउनलोड कर लिया।
इसके बाद एप में बैंक खाता संख्या, आईएफएससी कोड, डेबिट कार्ड नंबर, सीवीवी, पिन सहित अन्य गोपनीय जानकारी दर्ज कर दी, जिससे ठग को बैंक खाते तक पहुंच मिल गई।
आईएमपीएस के जरिए चार बार में उड़ाए रुपये
जानकारी दर्ज होने के कुछ ही समय बाद कारोबारी के मोबाइल पर लगातार ओटीपी और ट्रांजेक्शन के संदेश आने लगे। जांच में पता चला कि साइबर ठग ने आईएमपीएस (IMPS) के माध्यम से चार अलग-अलग ट्रांजेक्शन कर कुल 9.97 लाख रुपये खाते से निकाल लिए।
यह भी पढ़ें:- नागपुर में नासुप्र का बुलडोजर एक्शन, 9 एकड़ सरकारी जमीन से हटाया अतिक्रमण 
साइबर पोर्टल पर शिकायत, पुलिस जांच में जुटी
ठगी का पता चलते ही पीड़ित ने राष्ट्रीय साइबर अपराध रिपोर्टिंग पोर्टल पर शिकायत दर्ज कराई। इसके आधार पर नागपुर शहर साइबर पुलिस थाने में अज्ञात आरोपी के खिलाफ धोखाधड़ी और सूचना प्रौद्योगिकी (आईटी) अधिनियम की विभिन्न धाराओं के तहत मामला दर्ज किया गया है। पुलिस डिजिटल साक्ष्यों के आधार पर आरोपियों की पहचान और रकम की ट्रेल खंगाल रही है।
साइबर पुलिस की अपील
पुलिस ने नागरिकों से अपील की है कि किसी भी अनजान व्यक्ति द्वारा भेजे गए APK लिंक या अन्य संदिग्ध फाइल डाउनलोड न करें। बैंक कभी भी फोन, व्हाट्सएप या लिंक के माध्यम से ग्राहकों से डेबिट कार्ड नंबर, सीवीवी, पिन, ओटीपी या अन्य गोपनीय बैंकिंग जानकारी साझा करने के लिए नहीं कहता। ऐसे किसी भी कॉल या संदेश की तुरंत संबंधित बैंक या साइबर हेल्पलाइन पर सूचना दें।

title: ରାଶନ ଚାଉଳ ଆଣିବାକୁ ଯିବାବେଳେ ହେଲା ବଜ୍ରାଘାତ: ବଡ଼ଭାଇ ମୃତ, ସାନ ଭାଇ ଗୁରୁତର
description:
ମୋହନା, ୨୬।୬( ମନ୍ମଥ ମିଶ୍ର ): ଗଜପତି ଜିଲା ଆର ଉଦୟଗିରି ଥାନା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ଅନୁଗୁର ପଞ୍ଚାୟତର କଟାମା ଗାଁରେ ଅଭାବନୀୟ ଘଟଣା ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳିଛି । ପଞ୍ଚାୟତକୁ ରାଶନ ଚାଉଳ ଆଣିବା ହେଲା କାଳ। ଦୁଇ ଭାଇ ପଞ୍ଚାୟତକୁ ରାଶନ ଚାଉଳ ଆଣିବାକୁ ଯିବାବେଳେ ରାସ୍ତାରେ ବଜ୍ରାଘାତରେ ଦୁଇ ଭାଇ ଗୁରୁତର ହୋଇଥିଲେ । ଦୁଇ ଗୁରୁତରଙ୍କୁ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ରା ଉଦୟଗିରି ମେଡିକାଲରେ ଭର୍ତ୍ତି କରାଯାଇଛି। ଦୁଇ ଭାଇଙ୍କ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ଚାଲିଥିବା ବେଳେ […]
The post ରାଶନ ଚାଉଳ ଆଣିବାକୁ ଯିବାବେଳେ ହେଲା ବଜ୍ରାଘାତ: ବଡ଼ଭାଇ ମୃତ, ସାନ ଭାଇ ଗୁରୁତର appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ମୋହନା, ୨୬।୬( ମନ୍ମଥ ମିଶ୍ର ): ଗଜପତି ଜିଲା ଆର ଉଦୟଗିରି ଥାନା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ଅନୁଗୁର ପଞ୍ଚାୟତର କଟାମା ଗାଁରେ ଅଭାବନୀୟ ଘଟଣା ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳିଛି । ପଞ୍ଚାୟତକୁ ରାଶନ ଚାଉଳ ଆଣିବା ହେଲା କାଳ। ଦୁଇ ଭାଇ ପଞ୍ଚାୟତକୁ ରାଶନ ଚାଉଳ ଆଣିବାକୁ ଯିବାବେଳେ ରାସ୍ତାରେ ବଜ୍ରାଘାତରେ ଦୁଇ ଭାଇ ଗୁରୁତର ହୋଇଥିଲେ । ଦୁଇ ଗୁରୁତରଙ୍କୁ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ରା ଉଦୟଗିରି ମେଡିକାଲରେ ଭର୍ତ୍ତି କରାଯାଇଛି। ଦୁଇ ଭାଇଙ୍କ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ଚାଲିଥିବା ବେଳେ ବଡ଼ ଭାଇ ଜିରାଜ ରଇତଙ୍କୁ ଡାକ୍ତର ମୃତ ଘୋଷଣା କରିଛନ୍ତି। ସେପଟେ ସାନ ଭାଇ ମୋଜେସ ରଇତଙ୍କ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ଚାଲୁ ରହିଛି ।

Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ରାଶନ ଚାଉଳ ଆଣିବାକୁ ଯିବାବେଳେ ହେଲା ବଜ୍ରାଘାତ: ବଡ଼ଭାଇ ମୃତ, ସାନ ଭାଇ ଗୁରୁତର appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: పెనగడప చెరువు షట్టర్ల మరమ్మతులపై ఇరిగేషన్ అధికారుల అల‌స‌త్వం
description: వర్షాకాలం ప్రారంభమైన వేళ చెరువుల్లో నీటిని నిల్వ చేసి రైతులకు సాగునీరు అందించాల్సిన సమయంలో చెరువుల తూముల షట్టర్లు పాడైపోయినా ఇరిగేషన్ అధికారులు నిమ్మకు నీరెత్తినట్లు వ్యవహరిస్తున్నారని రైతులు తీవ్ర ఆవేదన వ్యక్తం చేస్తున్నారు. పెనగడపలోని కృష్ణారాయుడు చెరువు, ఎర్ర చెరువు, పెద్ద చెరువు కింద..
content:
చుంచుపల్లి, జూన్ 26 : వర్షాకాలం ప్రారంభమైన వేళ చెరువుల్లో నీటిని నిల్వ చేసి రైతులకు సాగునీరు అందించాల్సిన సమయంలో చెరువుల తూముల షట్టర్లు పాడైపోయినా ఇరిగేషన్ అధికారులు నిమ్మకు నీరెత్తినట్లు వ్యవహరిస్తున్నారని రైతులు తీవ్ర ఆవేదన వ్యక్తం చేస్తున్నారు. పెనగడపలోని కృష్ణారాయుడు చెరువు, ఎర్ర చెరువు, పెద్ద చెరువు కింద సుమారు 900 ఎకరాలకు పైగా ఆయకట్టు ఉంది. ఈ మూడు చెరువుల నుండే ప్రతి ఏడాది రెండు పంటలకు సాగునీరు అందుతుండడంతో పాటు భూగర్భ జలాలు కూడా సమృద్ధిగా నిల్వ ఉండి బోర్లు, మోటార్లకు నీరు లభిస్తుందని రైతులు చెబుతున్నారు. అయితే కొన్ని నెలలుగా ఈ మూడు చెరువుల తూముల షట్టర్లు పూర్తిగా దెబ్బతినడంతో చెరువుల్లో నీటిని నిల్వ చేయడం కష్టంగా మారిందని, వర్షపు నీరు వృథాగా పోతుందనే ఆందోళన వ్యక్తం చేస్తున్నారు. ఈ సమస్యను పలుమార్లు అధికారుల దృష్టికి తీసుకెళ్లినా ఇప్పటివరకు శాశ్వత చర్యలు చేపట్టలేదని రైతులు విమర్శిస్తున్నారు.
ఈ విషయాన్ని ఇరిగేషన్ అధికారులు కూడా ధృవీకరించారు. షట్టర్ల మరమ్మతుల కోసం రూ.1.10 లక్షల అంచనా వ్యయంతో టెండర్లు పిలిచినా ఎవరూ ముందుకు రాలేదని అధికారులు పేర్కొంటున్నారు. దీంతో పనులు నిలిచిపోయాయని చెబుతున్నారు. అదే విధంగా ఇది సింగరేణి ప్రభావిత ప్రాంతం కావడంతో జీకేఓసీ (GK OC) నుండి విడుదల చేసే నీటిని కూడా ఈ చెరువుల్లోకి మళ్లిస్తుంటారు. షట్టర్ల సమస్యపై సింగరేణి అధికారులు కూడా పలుమార్లు ప్రస్తావించినట్లు ఇరిగేషన్ ఏఈ ప్రసాద్‌రావు తెలిపారు. అయితే అధికారులు టెండర్ల పేరుతో కాలయాపన చేయకుండా ప్రత్యేక చర్యలు తీసుకుని తక్షణమే షట్టర్ల మరమ్మతులు పూర్తి చేయాలని రైతులు డిమాండ్ చేస్తున్నారు. ఇప్పటికైనా ఇరిగేషన్ శాఖ స్పందించి చెరువుల్లో నీరు నిల్వ ఉండేలా చర్యలు చేపట్టకపోతే రాబోయే సాగు సీజన్‌లో రైతులు తీవ్రంగా నష్టపోయే ప్రమాదం ఉందని ఆందోళన వ్యక్తం చేస్తున్నారు.
పెనగడప చెరువు షట్టర్ల మరమ్మతులపై ఇరిగేషన్ అధికారుల అల‌స‌త్వం

title: AI Is Splitting Tech Stocks Into Winners and Losers
description: This week’s stock moves show that the AI rally has stopped being a single trade.
content: The Korea Composite Stock Price Index (KOSPI) displayed at the Korea Exchange (KRX) in Seoul, South Korea, on Wednesday, March 4, 2026. Panic swept across trading desks in South Korea as local stocks, by far the hottest in the world over the past year, extended their freefall into Wednesday. Photographer: SeongJoon Cho/Bloomberg

title: '7 ലക്ഷം ശമ്പളം മോഹിപ്പിക്കുന്നോ? വാടക കേട്ടാൽ ബോധം പോവും'; സ്വിറ്റ്സർലൻഡിലെ ജീവിതച്ചെലവിനെ കുറിച്ച് ദമ്പതികൾ
description: ഇന്ത്യയിലെ 40,000 രൂപ കിട്ടുന്നതും സ്വിറ്റ്സര്‍ലാന്‍ഡില്‍ 7 ലക്ഷം ശമ്പളം കിട്ടുന്നതും തമ്മില്‍ വലിയ വ്യത്യാസമുണ്ടല്ലേ? എന്നാല്‍, ജീവിതച്ചെലവ് എങ്ങനെയാണ്? ശ്രദ്ധേയമായി പോസ്റ്റ്.
content: <p>വിദേശത്തെ ലക്ഷങ്ങളുടെ ശമ്പളം കണ്ട് കണ്ണുമഞ്ഞളിക്കുന്നവരുടെ കണ്ണ് തുറപ്പിക്കുന്ന താരതമ്യവുമായി ഇൻസ്റ്റഗ്രാമിൽ ശ്രദ്ധേയരാവുകയാണ് ഈ ഡച്ച്-ഇന്ത്യൻ ദമ്പതികൾ. ഇന്ത്യയിലെ 40,000 രൂപ ശമ്പളവും സ്വിറ്റ്സർലൻഡിലെ 7,00,000 (ഏഴ് ലക്ഷം) രൂപ ശമ്പളവും തമ്മിൽ ജീവിതച്ചെലവുകളുടെ കാര്യത്തിൽ വലിയ വ്യത്യാസമില്ലെന്നാണ് ഭർത്താവ് ചന്തൽ പറയുന്നത്. ഭാര്യ ഗുരുവും ഇതേ അഭിപ്രായത്തോട് യോജിക്കുന്നു. കേൾക്കുമ്പോൾ സ്വിറ്റ്സർലൻഡിലെ തുക വലിയതാണെന്ന് തോന്നുമെങ്കിലും അവിടുത്തെ ഭീമമായ ജീവിതച്ചെലവുകൾ കാര്യങ്ങൾ അത്ര എളുപ്പമാക്കുന്നില്ലെന്ന് ഇവർ പറയുന്നു.</p><p>'7 ലക്ഷം രൂപ ശമ്പളം കേൾക്കാൻ നല്ല രസമാണ്... പക്ഷേ അവിടുത്തെ വീട്ടുവാടക കാണുന്നതുവരെ മാത്രം' എന്നാണ് ദമ്പതികൾ തങ്ങളുടെ വീഡിയോയിൽ കുറിച്ചത്. ഇന്ത്യയിൽ 20,000 രൂപയ്ക്ക് ലഭിക്കുന്നതിന് സമാനമായ ഒരു താമസസൗകര്യത്തിന് സ്വിറ്റ്സർലൻഡിൽ പ്രതിമാസം രണ്ട് ലക്ഷം രൂപയോളം വാടക നൽകേണ്ടി വരും.</p><p>കുട്ടികളുടെ സംരക്ഷണമാണ് മറ്റൊരു പ്രധാന ചിലവ്. ഇന്ത്യയിൽ പ്രതിമാസം 5,000 രൂപ കൊണ്ട് സാധ്യമാകുന്ന കാര്യത്തിന് സ്വിറ്റ്സർലൻഡിൽ ഒന്നര ലക്ഷം (1,500,000) രൂപയോളം ചെലവാകും. ഇതിന് പുറമെ നിത്യോപയോഗ സാധനങ്ങളുടെ വില, ഹെൽത്ത് ഇൻഷുറൻസ്, യാത്രാക്കൂലി എന്നിവയും സ്വിറ്റ്സർലൻഡിൽ വളരെ കൂടുതലാണെന്ന് ദമ്പതികൾ കണക്കുകൾ സഹിതം ചൂണ്ടിക്കാണിക്കുന്നു.</p><p>'Clogsandcurries' എന്ന തങ്ങളുടെ ഇൻസ്റ്റാഗ്രാം അക്കൗണ്ടിലൂടെ ദമ്പതികൾ പങ്കുവെച്ച ഈ വീഡിയോ ഇതിനോടകം വലിയ ചർച്ചകൾക്കാണ് സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിൽ വഴിവെച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത്. സാമ്പത്തികവശം മാത്രം നോക്കിയുള്ള ഈ താരതമ്യത്തോട് വലിയൊരു വിഭാഗം ആളുകൾ വിയോജിക്കുന്നുമുണ്ട്. പണത്തിനപ്പുറം സ്വിറ്റ്സർലൻഡിലെ മികച്ച റോഡുകൾ, വായു മലിനീകരണമില്ലാത്ത അന്തരീക്ഷം, സുരക്ഷിതത്വം, ഉയർന്ന ജീവിതനിലവാരം എന്നിവ ഇന്ത്യയുമായി താരതമ്യം ചെയ്യാൻ കഴിയില്ലെന്നാണ് പലരും കമന്റുകളിൽ കുറിക്കുന്നത്.</p><p>&nbsp;</p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;View this post on Instagram&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<p>A post shared by Chantal &amp; Guru (@clogsandcurries)</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p></p><p>എന്നാൽ, തങ്ങൾ കേവലം സാമ്പത്തിക വശം മാത്രമാണ് ഈ വീഡിയോയിൽ ഉൾപ്പെടുത്തിയതെന്നും, ജീവിതനിലവാരത്തെ കുറിച്ചുള്ള മറ്റ് കാര്യങ്ങൾ വരും ദിവസങ്ങളിൽ വീഡിയോ ചെയ്യാമെന്നും ദമ്പതികൾ മറുപടിയായി വ്യക്തമാക്കി. വ്യത്യസ്ത സംസ്കാരങ്ങളെയും യാത്രകളെയും കുറിച്ചുള്ള ഉള്ളടക്കങ്ങളാണ് ഈ ദമ്പതികൾ സാധാരണയായി പങ്കുവെക്കാറുള്ളത്.</p>

title: The dancer who gave Transwomen a word in Tamil but refused to let it define her
Anupam Kher | ফের বাংলা সিনেমা প্রযোজনায় অনুপম খের, মুখ্যমন্ত্রীর সঙ্গে বৈঠকে অভিনব স্কুল তৈরির আর্জি
description:
উত্তরবঙ্গ সংবাদ অনলাইন ডেস্ক: টলিউড (Tollywood)-এ দীর্ঘ বিরতি কাটিয়ে ফের বাংলায় ফিরলেন বলিউডের প্রবীণ অভিনেতা ও প্রযোজক অনুপম খের (Anupam Kher)। আর এই প্রত্যাবর্তনের মুহূর্তটি স্মরণীয় করে রাখতে শুক্রবার সকালে তিনি রাজ্যের মুখ্যমন্ত্রী শুভেন্দু অধিকারীর (CM Suvendu Adhikari) সঙ্গে এক সৌজন্যমূলক সাক্ষাৎ করেন। রাজনৈতিক পালাবদলের পর রাজ্যে প্রথমবার সফরে আসা অনুপম খেরের কণ্ঠে এদিন স্পষ্ট […]
The post Anupam Kher | ফের বাংলা সিনেমা প্রযোজনায় অনুপম খের, মুখ্যমন্ত্রীর সঙ্গে বৈঠকে অভিনব স্কুল তৈরির আর্জি appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.
content:
উত্তরবঙ্গ সংবাদ অনলাইন ডেস্ক: টলিউড (Tollywood)-এ দীর্ঘ বিরতি কাটিয়ে ফের বাংলায় ফিরলেন বলিউডের প্রবীণ অভিনেতা ও প্রযোজক অনুপম খের (Anupam Kher)। আর এই প্রত্যাবর্তনের মুহূর্তটি স্মরণীয় করে রাখতে শুক্রবার সকালে তিনি রাজ্যের মুখ্যমন্ত্রী শুভেন্দু অধিকারীর (CM Suvendu Adhikari) সঙ্গে এক সৌজন্যমূলক সাক্ষাৎ করেন। রাজনৈতিক পালাবদলের পর রাজ্যে প্রথমবার সফরে আসা অনুপম খেরের কণ্ঠে এদিন স্পষ্ট শোনা গেল নতুন বাংলার আশার সুর।
এদিন মুখ্যমন্ত্রী শুভেন্দু অধিকারীর সঙ্গে বৈঠকের পর সাংবাদিকদের মুখোমুখি হয়ে অনুপম খের উচ্ছ্বসিত কণ্ঠে বলেন, “শুভেন্দুবাবু যে পরিবর্তন আনার চেষ্টা করছেন, তা বাংলার মঙ্গলসাধন করবে। ওনার দৃষ্টিভঙ্গি অত্যন্ত প্রগতিশীল, যা বাংলাকে নতুন উচ্চতায় নিয়ে যাবে।” উল্লেখ্য, রাজনৈতিকভাবে বিজেপির সমর্থক হিসেবে পরিচিত অনুপম খের এদিন রাজ্যের উন্নয়নের রূপরেখা নিয়ে মুখ্যমন্ত্রীর প্রশংসা করেন।
টলিউডে ফিরে আসার কারণ হিসেবে তিনি জানান, ফিরদৌসুল হাসানের ‘ফ্রেন্ডস কমিউনিকেশন’-এর সঙ্গে যৌথ উদ্যোগে ‘অনুপম খের স্টুডিও’ একটি নতুন ছবি প্রযোজনা করতে চলেছে। উল্লেখ্য, ২০০২ সালে ঋতুপর্ণ ঘোষ পরিচালিত ‘বাড়িওয়ালি’ সিনেমার প্রযোজক হিসেবে কাজ করেছিলেন অনুপম। সেই ছবির সাফল্যের পর দীর্ঘ সময় কেটে গেলেও, এবার ফের বাংলার সিনেমা জগতের প্রতি বিনিয়োগ করলেন তিনি।
সাক্ষাৎকারে অনুপম খের শুধুমাত্র নতুন সিনেমা নয়, বরং বাংলা সংস্কৃতি ও অভিনয়ের মানোন্নয়ন নিয়ে নিজের স্বপ্নের কথা তুলে ধরেন। তিনি বলেন, “আমি বাংলায় একটি ‘অ্যাক্টিং স্কুল’ বা অভিনয় প্রশিক্ষণের কেন্দ্র গড়তে চাই। মুখ্যমন্ত্রী আমার এই ভাবনার কথা শুনে অত্যন্ত উৎসাহিত হয়েছেন এবং আমাকে সবরকম শুভকামনা জানিয়েছেন।” বঙ্কিমচন্দ্র চট্টোপাধ্যায় থেকে সত্যজিৎ রায় কিংবা মৃণাল সেন—বাংলার এই সংস্কৃতি ও শিল্পচর্চার পীঠস্থান থেকেই তিনি যে অভিনয়ের তালিম নিয়েছেন, সে কথা সশ্রদ্ধভাবে স্মরণ করেন প্রবীণ এই অভিনেতা।
অনুপম খেরের এই সফর ও নতুন প্রজেক্টের ঘোষণা টলিউড ইন্ডাস্ট্রিকে নতুন উৎসাহ জুগিয়েছে। একদিকে বলিউডের প্রবীণ অভিনেতার হাত ধরে নতুন সিনেমার আগমন, অন্যদিকে অভিনয় শিক্ষার পাঠশালা গড়ার স্বপ্ন—সব মিলিয়ে বাংলা সিনেমার দুনিয়ায় এক নতুন জোয়ার আসার সম্ভাবনা তৈরি হয়েছে। মুখ্যমন্ত্রী শুভেন্দু অধিকারীর সঙ্গে এই বৈঠকের পর প্রবীণ এই শিল্পী এখন বাংলা সিনেমার নতুন শুরুর অপেক্ষায়।
The post Anupam Kher | ফের বাংলা সিনেমা প্রযোজনায় অনুপম খের, মুখ্যমন্ত্রীর সঙ্গে বৈঠকে অভিনব স্কুল তৈরির আর্জি appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.

title: Are There Really 'Universal' Erogenous Zones? Science Has An Unexpected Answer
description: Forget the myths. Studies show erogenous zones differ from person to person, making open communication far more important than memorising a universal checklist.
content: If you have ever wondered whether there is a secret, universal "map" of spots guaranteed to drive any partner wild, you are not alone - it is one of the most-Googled questions in the relationship space. The truth, according to science, is a little more complicated than any listicle would have you believe, and honestly, it is better news for couples than a one-size-fits-all answer would have been.What Science Says About 'Universal' HotspotsThe most cited research on this comes from a 2014 study published in the journal Cortex, which surveyed 800 people about touch across their bodies. The study found that while some zones are nearly universal, individual variation is enormous. Meaning, what feels intensely pleasurable to one person may feel neutral, or even ticklish, to another. In other words, that "neck kiss always works" advice your friend swears by might do absolutely nothing for your partner. Researchers concluded erogenous zones are not fixed by biology alone - they are shaped by personal experience, hormonal state, and psychological context.Also Read: The Kitchen as the New Social Hub: How Gen Z Is Redefining the Heart of the HomeA bigger, more detailed study followed in 2016. It was led by Finnish neuroscientist Lauri Nummenmaa. His team surveyed 704 participants from Finland and the UK, asking them to rate the arousal produced by touch at 41 different body areas, across different relationship contexts - self-touch, partner touch, and touch from a stranger. The results, published in Archives of Sexual Behavior, showed that the whole body responded to sexual touch in some way, with the strongest "hotspots" being the genitals, breasts, and anus - and that sensitivity actually expanded further during partnered sex compared to masturbation. That last bit matters the most as it suggests that connection itself amplifies sensation, not just the touch alone.So is there a real universal list? Sort of. Across the data, genitals ranked highest for every gender, while the neck, inner thighs, and ears scored consistently high across all groups. And contrary to popular belief, gender differences in erogenous mapping were smaller than commonly assumed.Why Your Map Is Different From Your Partner's?Here is where it gets genuinely useful: Researchers found that the most reliable "map" is not a universal one at all - it is personal, and it can change. There is no single universal erogenous map for "men" or "women" - only individual maps shaped by anatomy, experience, attention and context. Even more compelling for couples: The areas a person pays attention to tend to become more sensitive over time. Meaning, curiosity and communication with a partner can literally expand what feels good, not just reveal what already does.Also Read: What Carl Jung's Philosophy Can Teach Us About 'Romantic' ObsessionA separate study backed this up in a simple, visual way. Participants were asked to shade in body areas they, or a partner, would enjoy having touched, and researchers concluded the entire body could function as an erogenous zone. This was because every person picked different spots. It was then concluded that there is no "wrong" place to explore with a partner, only places neither of you has talked about yet.

title: CBSE 10th Result 2026 Live Updates: When Will CBSE Announce Class 10 Second Board Exam Results on cbse.gov.in, DigiLocker?
description: CBSE 10th Result 2026 Live Updates: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) will announce the Class 10 second board exam results soon. Once released, students who appeared for the high school exams will be able to check and download their mark sheets from the official website: cbse.gov.in, using their login credentials.Along with the CBSE Class 10 second board exam result 2026, the board will release key statistics, including the number of students who appeared and passed, along with the overall pass rate.How to Check CBSE 10th Result 2026Follow the steps below to download the mark sheet:Visit the official website: cbse.gov.in.On the homepage, look for the CBSE Class 10 second board result 2026 link and click on it.Enter the roll number, school number, admit card ID and DOB.Click on the Submit button.The CBSE 10th second board result 2026 will be displayed on the screen.Download and save it for future reference.Apart from the official websites, students can access their scorecards via IVRS, SMS, Digi Locker, and the UMANG app.Scroll down for the latest updates on the CBSE Class 10 Result 2026 announcement!

title: Top 7 DU Colleges for Political Science (Hons) 2026: Check Expected CUET Scores and What Makes Them Popular
description: Delhi University remains a top destination for Political Science (Hons) aspirants. This photo story lists the top 7 colleges for 2026, along with their campuses and expected CUET scores, to help students make the right choice.
content: Delhi University remains a top destination for Political Science (Hons) aspirants. This photo story lists the top 7 colleges for 2026, along with their campuses and expected CUET scores, to help students make the right choice.1. Hindu College (North Campus)Hindu College remains one of the most sought after institutions for Political Science (Hons) at Delhi University. Known for its strong academic culture and vibrant student life, the college consistently attracts top scorers.Approx CUET Score 2026: 785–800+2. Miranda House (North Campus)Miranda House, one of India’s top-ranked women’s colleges, offers a highly competitive Political Science (Hons) programme. The college is known for academic excellence, research exposure, and a strong feminist and political discourse environment. Approx CUET Score 2026: 780–800+3. Lady Shri Ram College (South Campus)Lady Shri Ram College (LSR) is among the most prestigious South Campus colleges for Political Science.The college has a reputation for producing influential alumni across politics, media, and civil services. Approx CUET Score 2026: 775–795+4. Ramjas College (North Campus)Ramjas College is a strong choice for Political Science aspirants looking for quality education within North Campus. It offers a balanced mix of academics, student politics, and co-curricular engagement. The department is active in discussions, seminars, and policy oriented events, giving students real exposure.Approx CUET Score 2026: 760–780+5. Kirori Mal College (North Campus)Kirori Mal College (KMC) has built a solid reputation for Political Science over the years. Known for its active student societies and cultural environment, the college offers both academic depth and personality development. Many students from KMC move on to civil services and higher studies in political science.Approx CUET Score 2026: 755–775+6. Hansraj College (North Campus)Hansraj College is widely known for its academic discipline and infrastructure. While often associated with science streams, its Political Science (Hons) programme is also well-regarded. The college offers a structured academic environment, experienced faculty, and strong placement support.Approx CUET Score 2026: 760–780+7. Daulat Ram College (North Campus)Daulat Ram College is another top women’s college in North Campus offering a solid Political Science programme. It provides a supportive academic environment with a focus on conceptual clarity and participation in discussions. Approx CUET Score 2026: 740–760+Top 7 DU Colleges for Political Science (Hons) 2026 Choosing the right college at Delhi University is not just about cut-offs, it’s about finding the environment that shapes your academic and personal growth. While scores play a decisive role, factors like faculty, exposure, peer group, and campus culture matter just as much. As CUET 2026 approaches, aspirants should aim for clarity in both preparation and preference, because the right decision now can define the direction of their future.

Vastu Tips For Evil Eye : क्या घर की खुशहाली पर लग गई है बुरी नजर? अपनाएं ये 4 आसान वास्तु उपाय
description: Vastu Tips For Evil Eye For Home: अगर आपको लगता है कि घर की खुशहाली पर बुरी नजर का प्रभाव पड़ रहा है, तो वास्तु शास्त्र में बताए गए कुछ आसान उपाय अपनाए जा सकते हैं। जानिए ऐसे 4 सरल वास्तु उपाय
content:
Buri Nazar Ke Upay: कई बार ऐसा होता है कि सब कुछ ठीक चल रहा होता है, लेकिन अचानक घर में परेशानियां बढ़ने लगती हैं। आमदनी होने के बावजूद पैसा नहीं टिकता, काम बनते-बनते रुक जाते हैं, तरक्की की रफ्तार धीमी पड़ जाती है और परिवार में छोटी-छोटी बातों पर तनाव या झगड़े होने लगते हैं।  वास्तु शास्त्र में ऐसी परिस्थितियों को कई बार नकारात्मक ऊर्जा या नजर दोष से भी जोड़ा जाता है।
मान्यता है कि कुछ सरल और पारंपरिक उपाय अपनाकर घर के वातावरण को सकारात्मक बनाया जा सकता है। आइए जानते हैं ऐसे ही कुछ आसान वास्तु उपाय।
मुख्य प्रवेश द्वार को रखें सकारात्मक ऊर्जा से भरपूर
वास्तु मान्यताओं के अनुसार घर में सकारात्मक और नकारात्मक ऊर्जा का प्रवेश सबसे पहले मुख्य द्वार से ही होता है। इसलिए प्रवेश द्वार की नियमित सफाई करना बेहद जरूरी माना जाता है। सप्ताह में कम से कम दो बार, विशेष रूप से मंगलवार और शनिवार को, पोंछा लगाते समय पानी में थोड़ा सा सेंधा नमक या समुद्री नमक मिलाकर सफाई करने की परंपरा है। मान्यता है कि इससे घर का वातावरण अधिक शांत और सकारात्मक महसूस होता है।
सेंधा नमक और फिटकरी से करें नकारात्मकता कम करने का उपाय
वास्तु और पारंपरिक मान्यताओं में सेंधा नमक तथा फिटकरी को वातावरण की नकारात्मकता कम करने वाला माना गया है। घर की सफाई के दौरान नमक मिले पानी का उपयोग करने के अलावा, बाथरूम के किसी कोने में कांच की कटोरी में फिटकरी रखने की भी मान्यता है।
ऐसा करने से घर का वातावरण संतुलित बना रहता है और नजर दोष का प्रभाव कम होने की बात कही जाती है।
काला धागा और मोर पंख को माना जाता है शुभ
लोक मान्यताओं के अनुसार मुख्य दरवाजे की चौखट या हैंडल पर काला धागा बांधना नजर दोष से बचाव का एक आसान उपाय माना जाता है।
इसके साथ ही, घर के ड्राइंग रूम या प्रवेश द्वार के आसपास तीन मोर पंख लगाने की भी परंपरा है। माना जाता है कि इससे घर में सकारात्मक ऊर्जा का संचार बढ़ता है और मानसिक शांति बनी रहती है।
यह भी पढ़ें-Ashadha Maas: 30 जून से शुरू होगा आषाढ़ मास, भूलकर भी न करें ये गलतियां, वरना हो सकता है भारी नुकसान
नींबू और हरी मिर्च का पारंपरिक नजर दोष उपाय
शनिवार या मंगलवार को मुख्य द्वार पर एक नींबू और सात हरी मिर्च लटकाने की परंपरा वर्षों से चली आ रही है। धार्मिक मान्यता है कि यह उपाय नकारात्मक ऊर्जा को अपने भीतर समाहित कर लेता है। इसलिए इसे हर सप्ताह बदलने की सलाह दी जाती है ताकि इसकी प्रभावशीलता बनी रहे।
इन छोटी-छोटी बातों का भी रखें ध्यान
वास्तु शास्त्र के अनुसार घर में टूटे-फूटे सामान, बेकार कबाड़ या बंद पड़ी घड़ियां लंबे समय तक नहीं रखनी चाहिए, क्योंकि इन्हें नकारात्मकता का कारण माना जाता है।
इसके अलावा घर की नियमित साफ-सफाई करें और शाम के समय पूरे घर को अंधेरे में रखने के बजाय कम से कम एक दीपक या हल्की रोशनी अवश्य जलाएं। मान्यता है कि इससे घर में सकारात्मक ऊर्जा बनी रहती है और सुख-समृद्धि का वातावरण कायम रहता है।

description:
ଟିଟିଲାଗଡ଼,୨୬।୬: ୨୬ ନମ୍ବର ଜାତୀୟ ରାଜପଥ ବରଗାଁ ଛକରୁ ଏକ ଅଭାବନୀୟ ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଛି। ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଚାଲାଣ ବେଳେ ଧରାପଡ଼ିଛନ୍ତି ୨ଜଣ ସରକାରୀ ଶିକ୍ଷକ। ଏହି ଘଟଣା ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଚାଞ୍ଚଲ୍ୟ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଛି। ମିଳିଥିବା ସୂଚନା ମୁତାବକ, ଏକ କାର୍‌ରେ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଚାଲାଣ ହେଉଥିବା ନେଇ ଟିଟିଲାଗଡ଼ ଏବଂ ତୁଷୁରା ଅବକାରୀ ଟିମ୍‌କୁ ଖବର ମିଳିଥିଲା। ଏନେଇ ଏକ ଅବକାରୀ ଟିମ୍‌ ୨୬ ନମ୍ବର ଜାତୀୟ ରାଜପଥ ବରଗାଁ ଛକରେ ଚଢାଉ କରି ଏକ କାର୍‌କୁ […]
The post କାର୍‌ରେ ହେଉଥିଲା ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଚାଲାଣ: ଧରାପଡ଼ିଲେ ୨ ସରକାରୀ ଶିକ୍ଷକ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଟିଟିଲାଗଡ଼,୨୬।୬: ୨୬ ନମ୍ବର ଜାତୀୟ ରାଜପଥ ବରଗାଁ ଛକରୁ ଏକ ଅଭାବନୀୟ ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଛି। ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଚାଲାଣ ବେଳେ ଧରାପଡ଼ିଛନ୍ତି ୨ଜଣ ସରକାରୀ ଶିକ୍ଷକ। ଏହି ଘଟଣା ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଚାଞ୍ଚଲ୍ୟ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଛି।
ମିଳିଥିବା ସୂଚନା ମୁତାବକ, ଏକ କାର୍‌ରେ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଚାଲାଣ ହେଉଥିବା ନେଇ ଟିଟିଲାଗଡ଼ ଏବଂ ତୁଷୁରା ଅବକାରୀ ଟିମ୍‌କୁ ଖବର ମିଳିଥିଲା। ଏନେଇ ଏକ ଅବକାରୀ ଟିମ୍‌ ୨୬ ନମ୍ବର ଜାତୀୟ ରାଜପଥ ବରଗାଁ ଛକରେ ଚଢାଉ କରି ଏକ କାର୍‌କୁ ଅଟକାଇ ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରିଥିଲା।
ଯାଞ୍ଚ ବେଳେ ଅତ୍ଧକାରୀମାନେ କାରରୁ ୩୩ କେଜି ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଜବତ କରିବା ସହ ୩ଙ୍କୁ ଧରିବାରେ ସଫଳ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଅଟକ ୩ ଜଣଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ୨ଜଣ ସରକାରୀ ଶିକ୍ଷକ ବୋଲି ସୂଚନା ମିଳିଛି। ସେମାନେ କଳାହାଣ୍ଡି ଏମ୍‌.ରାମପୁର ଥାନା ଅଞ୍ଚଳର ପ୍ରାଥମିକ ବିଦ୍ୟାଳୟର ଶିକ୍ଷକ। ପୋଲିସ ତଦନ୍ତ ବେଳେ କଳାହାଣ୍ଡିରୁ ବଲାଙ୍ଗୀର ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଚାଲାଣ ହେଉଥିବା ଜାଣିବାକୁ ପାଇଛି।
The post କାର୍‌ରେ ହେଉଥିଲା ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଚାଲାଣ: ଧରାପଡ଼ିଲେ ୨ ସରକାରୀ ଶିକ୍ଷକ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: बंदूक के साथ दिखे जितेंद्र कुमार, इंटेंस अवतार में नजर आए रवि किशन, ‘मिर्जापुर द मूवी’ का दमदार पोस्टर जारी
description: Mirzapur The Movie Poster: 'मिर्जापुर: द मूवी' के मेकर्स ने जितेंद्र कुमार, अभिषेक बनर्जी और रवि किशन के नए कैरेक्टर पोस्टर्स जारी किए हैं। दमदार लुक्स ने फैंस की एक्साइटमेंट बढ़ा दी है।
content:
Mirzapur The Movie Character Posters Release: &#8216;मिर्जापुर: द मूवी&#8217; का इंतजार कर रहे फैंस की एक्साइटमेंट अब और बढ़ गई है। हाल ही में फिल्म का धमाकेदार टीजर रिलीज कर मेकर्स ने कालीन भैया, गुड्डू पंडित और मुन्ना भैया की आइकॉनिक तिकड़ी की वापसी का ऐलान किया था। अब इसके बाद मेकर्स ने फिल्म के तीन और अहम किरदारों के कैरेक्टर पोस्टर्स रिलीज किए हैं, जिन्होंने सोशल मीडिया पर आते ही चर्चा बटोर ली है।
&#8216;मिर्जापुर: द मूवी&#8217; के नए पोस्टर्स में जितेंद्र कुमार बबलू पंडित, अभिषेक बनर्जी कंपाउंडर और रवि किशन बब्बन बबुआ के दमदार अंदाज में नजर आ रहे हैं। रिलीज किए गए पोस्टर्स में हर किरदार अपनी अलग पहचान और स्टाइल के साथ दिखाई दे रहा है। बबलू पंडित के रूप में जितेंद्र कुमार हाथ में बंदूक लिए एक्शन के लिए तैयार नजर आ रहे हैं।
अभिषेक बनर्जी और रवि किशन का लुक
अभिषेक बनर्जी का कंपाउंडर अपने पुराने और सिग्नेचर लुक में दिखाई देता है, जिसे देखकर फैंस एक बार फिर उस किरदार से जुड़ाव महसूस कर रहे हैं। दूसरी ओर रवि किशन का बब्बन बबुआ अपने रौबदार और इंटेंस अंदाज से पोस्टर में अलग ही प्रभाव छोड़ रहा है। इन पोस्टर्स ने साफ कर दिया है कि फिल्म में हर किरदार पहले से ज्यादा दमदार अवतार में नजर आने वाला है।
टीज़र के बाद हर अपडेट बना रहा है चर्चा का विषय
&#8216;मिर्जापुर: द मूवी&#8217; का टीजर रिलीज होने के बाद से ही दर्शकों के बीच जबरदस्त उत्साह देखने को मिला है। सोशल मीडिया पर फिल्म से जुड़े हर नए अपडेट को शानदार रिस्पॉन्स मिल रहा है। अब इन नए कैरेक्टर पोस्टर्स ने फैंस की उम्मीदों को और बढ़ा दिया है। माना जा रहा है कि बड़े पर्दे पर &#8216;मिर्जापुर&#8217; का वही ट्रेडमार्क भौकाल, एक्शन, पावर गेम और दमदार डायलॉग्स पहले से कहीं बड़े स्तर पर देखने को मिलेंगे।
ये भी पढ़ें- Welcome To The Jungle Movie Review: हंसाने के साथ रुलाती भी है अक्षय कुमार-सुनील शेट्टी की ये फैमिली एंटरटेनर
4 सितंबर 2026 को सिनेमाघरों में होगी रिलीज
&#8216;मिर्जापुर: द मूवी&#8217; का निर्देशन गुरमीत सिंह ने किया है, जबकि इसकी कहानी और स्क्रीनप्ले पुनीत कृष्णा ने लिखा है। फिल्म को रितेश सिधवानी और फरहान अख्तर ने प्रोड्यूस किया है। वहीं कासिम जगमागिया और विशाल रामचंदानी इसके को-प्रोड्यूसर हैं। यह फिल्म 4 सितंबर 2026 को हिंदी और तेलुगु भाषा में दुनियाभर के सिनेमाघरों में रिलीज होगी।

title: Dinhata | শিশু মঙ্গল সমিতি জালিয়াতি! মালদা থেকে গ্রেপ্তার বিশু ধর, পাঠানো হলো পুলিশি হেপাজতে
description:
দিনহাটা: শিশু মঙ্গল সমিতি দুর্নীতি কাণ্ডে ধৃত বিশু ধরকে (Bishu Dhar) শুক্রবার আদালতে (Court) তোলা হলে বিচারক তাকে সাতদিনের পুলিশি হেপাজতের নির্দেশ দিয়েছেন। বুধবার মালদার ইংরেজবাজার থানার পুলিশ (Police) তার এক আত্মীয়ের বাড়ি থেকে বিশু ধরকে গ্রেপ্তার করেছিল। এরপর বৃহস্পতিবার রাতেই তাকে দিনঘাটায় (Dinhata) নিয়ে আসে পুলিশ। তদন্তকারীদের দাবি, ধৃতকে জেরা করে এই দুর্নীতি চক্রের […]
The post Dinhata | শিশু মঙ্গল সমিতি জালিয়াতি! মালদা থেকে গ্রেপ্তার বিশু ধর, পাঠানো হলো পুলিশি হেপাজতে appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.
content:
দিনহাটা: শিশু মঙ্গল সমিতি দুর্নীতি কাণ্ডে ধৃত বিশু ধরকে (Bishu Dhar) শুক্রবার আদালতে (Court) তোলা হলে বিচারক তাকে সাতদিনের পুলিশি হেপাজতের নির্দেশ দিয়েছেন। বুধবার মালদার ইংরেজবাজার থানার পুলিশ (Police) তার এক আত্মীয়ের বাড়ি থেকে বিশু ধরকে গ্রেপ্তার করেছিল। এরপর বৃহস্পতিবার রাতেই তাকে দিনঘাটায় (Dinhata) নিয়ে আসে পুলিশ। তদন্তকারীদের দাবি, ধৃতকে জেরা করে এই দুর্নীতি চক্রের মূল পান্ডা ও আর্থিক লেনদেনের আরও গভীরে পৌঁছানোর চেষ্টা করা হবে। সরকারি প্রকল্পের আড়ালে আর্থিক প্রতারণার এই ঘটনায় বিশু ধরের গ্রেপ্তারের পর থেকে এলাকায় চাঞ্চল্য ছড়িয়েছে। পুলিশি হেপাজতের নির্দেশ পাওয়ার পর ধৃতকে নিয়ে তদন্ত প্রক্রিয়া আরও জোরদার করা হয়েছে।
The post Dinhata | শিশু মঙ্গল সমিতি জালিয়াতি! মালদা থেকে গ্রেপ্তার বিশু ধর, পাঠানো হলো পুলিশি হেপাজতে appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.

title: ED Exposes 'Unique' Money Laundering Network In Karnataka Excise Department
description: The Enforcement Directorate has alleged that Karnataka's Excise Department operated like an organised bribery syndicate, uncovering what it calls a unique money laundering network. During raids in Bengaluru, Mysuru and Belagavi, the ED claims to have seized cash and jewellery worth over ₹13 crore from senior excise official YD Manjunath, who is related to Karnataka PWD Minister Satish Jarkiholi. The agency also alleges that excise officials obtained liquor licences in the names of family members and close associates, using them to run illegal liquor businesses and launder proceeds. The investigation is ongoing as the ED probes the alleged corruption network.
