title: सबूत हैं तो SIT के सामने पेश करें, आस्था से खिलवाड़ न करें, CM योगी का विपक्ष पर पलटवार
description:
Ram Mandir donation scam: उत्तर प्रदेश के मुख्यमंत्री योगी आदित्यनाथ ने राम मंदिर चढ़ावा मामले को लेकर विपक्ष के आरोपों पर शुक्रवार को तीखा पलटवार किया। उन्होंने कहा कि सरकार ने पहले दिन ही स्पष्ट कर दिया था कि मामले में “दूध का दूध और पानी का पानी” किया जाएगा। एसआईटी की प्रारंभिक रिपोर्ट मिलते.
The post सबूत हैं तो SIT के सामने पेश करें, आस्था से खिलवाड़ न करें, CM योगी का विपक्ष पर पलटवार appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
Ram Mandir donation scam: उत्तर प्रदेश के मुख्यमंत्री योगी आदित्यनाथ ने राम मंदिर चढ़ावा मामले को लेकर विपक्ष के आरोपों पर शुक्रवार को तीखा पलटवार किया। उन्होंने कहा कि सरकार ने पहले दिन ही स्पष्ट कर दिया था कि मामले में “दूध का दूध और पानी का पानी” किया जाएगा। एसआईटी की प्रारंभिक रिपोर्ट मिलते ही कार्रवाई शुरू कर दी गई है।
उन्होंने विपक्ष से अपील की कि रामभक्तों की आस्था के साथ खिलवाड़ न करें और यदि किसी के पास कोई प्रमाण है तो उसे एसआईटी के समक्ष प्रस्तुत करे। देवरिया में 456 करोड़ रुपये से अधिक की विकास परियोजनाओं के लोकार्पण और शिलान्यास कार्यक्रम को संबोधित करते हुए मुख्यमंत्री ने कहा कि उन्होंने 19 जून को अयोध्या दौरे के दौरान भी स्पष्ट किया था कि जांच पूरी होने के बाद दोषियों के खिलाफ कार्रवाई की जाएगी। अब एसआईटी की प्रारंभिक रिपोर्ट के आधार पर पहली एफआईआर दर्ज हो चुकी है और कानूनी प्रक्रिया शुरू हो गई है।
ये भी पढ़ें- Ram Mandir donation theft: कौन है FIR में नामजद 8 आरोपी, क्या थी उनकी भूमिका?
 
नहीं बख्शे जाएंगे दोषी 
मुख्यमंत्री ने कहा कि अयोध्या करोड़ों लोगों की आस्था का केंद्र है। इस पवित्र नगरी पर बेबुनियाद आक्षेप लगाने से बचना चाहिए। भगवान श्रीराम की मर्यादा का पालन करना सीखिए। सरकार किसी भी दोषी को बख्शने वाली नहीं है, लेकिन बिना तथ्यों के आरोप लगाकर जनभावनाओं को आहत करना भी उचित नहीं है।
विरोधियों पर कसा तंज 
उन्होंने कहा कि यदि किसी के पास इस मामले से जुड़े ठोस तथ्य या साक्ष्य हैं तो उन्हें सार्वजनिक बयानबाजी के बजाय एसआईटी को उपलब्ध कराना चाहिए। उन्होंने दोहराया कि रामभक्तों की आस्था की अग्निपरीक्षा नहीं ली जानी चाहिए और इस मुद्दे पर अनावश्यक राजनीति से बचना चाहिए। मुख्यमंत्री ने इस दौरान समाजवादी पार्टी और कांग्रेस पर भी निशाना साधा। उन्होंने कहा कि आज जो लोग अयोध्या और भगवान राम के नाम पर सवाल उठा रहे हैं, वही लोग कभी भगवान राम के अस्तित्व को नकारते थे और राम जन्मभूमि पर मंदिर निर्माण का विरोध करते रहे।
उन्होंने आरोप लगाया कि कुछ लोग “जय श्रीराम” के उद्घोष पर कार्रवाई करते थे, रामनवमी और अन्य धार्मिक आयोजनों में व्यवधान पैदा करते थे, लेकिन अब वही आस्था की बात कर रहे हैं।
विकास की नई पहचान बनी दिल्ली 
बिना नाम लिए मुख्यमंत्री ने दिल्ली के पूर्व मुख्यमंत्री अरविंद केजरीवाल पर भी हमला बोला। उन्होंने कहा, “दिल्ली से आज एक सज्जन अयोध्या आए हैं। दिल्ली की जनता ने उन्हें वर्षों तक अवसर दिया, लेकिन उन्होंने राजधानी को भ्रष्टाचार के अलावा कुछ नहीं दिया। यदि उन्होंने दिल्ली के साथ वैसा ही न्याय किया होता जैसा डबल इंजन की भाजपा सरकार ने अयोध्या के साथ किया है, तो दिल्ली भी आज अयोध्या धाम की तरह विकास की नई पहचान बन चुकी होती।”
सख्त कार्रवाई की चेतावनी 
मुख्यमंत्री ने कहा कि राज्य सरकार की मंशा पूरी तरह स्पष्ट है और जांच निष्पक्ष तरीके से आगे बढ़ रही है। उन्होंने भरोसा दिलाया कि जांच में जो भी दोषी पाया जाएगा, उसके खिलाफ कानून के अनुसार सख्त कार्रवाई की जाएगी।
The post सबूत हैं तो SIT के सामने पेश करें, आस्था से खिलवाड़ न करें, CM योगी का विपक्ष पर पलटवार appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: Ram Mandir Donation Case: राम मंदिराच्या दान चोरी प्रकरणी मोठी घडामोड; चंपत राय, अनिल मिश्रांचा तडकाफडकी राजीनामा
description: नवी दिल्ली वृत्तसंस्था | New Delhiअयोध्या येथील भव्य राम मंदिराच्या(AyodhyaRamMandir) दान चोरी प्रकरणाला आता अत्यंत नाट्यमय आणि मोठे वळण मिळाले आहे. राम मंदिर ट्रस्टमधील दोन सर्वात प्रभावी आणि मुख्य पदाधिकाऱ्यांनी आपल्या पदाचा राजीनामा दिल्याचा खळबळजनक वृत्त समोर आले आहे. राम जन्मभूमी ट्रस्टचे सदस्य, चंपत राय(ChampatRai) आणि अनिल मिश्रा(AnilMishra) यांनी राजीनामा(Resign) दिला आहे. घोटाळ्याची चौकशी करण्यासाठी […]
content:
नवी दिल्ली वृत्तसंस्था | New Delhiअयोध्या येथील भव्य राम मंदिराच्या(AyodhyaRamMandir) दान चोरी प्रकरणाला आता अत्यंत नाट्यमय आणि मोठे वळण मिळाले आहे. राम मंदिर ट्रस्टमधील दोन सर्वात प्रभावी आणि मुख्य पदाधिकाऱ्यांनी आपल्या पदाचा राजीनामा दिल्याचा खळबळजनक वृत्त समोर आले आहे. राम जन्मभूमी ट्रस्टचे सदस्य, चंपत राय(ChampatRai) आणि अनिल मिश्रा(AnilMishra) यांनी राजीनामा(Resign) दिला आहे. घोटाळ्याची चौकशी करण्यासाठी नेमलेल्या एसआयटीच्या प्राथमिक अहवालातील कडक शिफारशींनंतर हा महत्त्वपूर्ण निर्णय घेण्यात आला आहे.



अयोध्या येथील राम मंदिरातील चोरीच्या पार्श्वभूमीवर, ट्रस्टचे सदस्य चंपत राय आणि अनिल मिश्रा यांनी नैतिक कारणास्तव राजीनामा दिला आहे. चंपत राय हे राम जन्मभूमी तीर्थ क्षेत्र ट्रस्टचे सरचिटणीस होते आणि अनिल मिश्रा हे देखील ट्रस्टचे सदस्य होते. विरोधी पक्षाने या प्रकरणात सातत्याने चंपत राय यांचे नाव उपस्थित करून त्यांच्या राजीनाम्याची मागणी केली होती. मात्र आता चंपत राय आणि अनिल मिश्रा या दोघांनीही महंत नृत्य गोपाल दास यांच्याकडे आपले राजीनामे सादर केले आहेत.



चंपत राय आणि अनिल मिश्रा यांनी तडकाफडकी राजीनामा का दिला, याचे अधिकृत कारण अद्याप ट्रस्टकडून स्पष्ट करण्यात आलेले नाही. मात्र, राष्ट्रीय स्वयंसेवक संघ आणि विश्व हिंदू परिषद यांच्याकडून वाढलेल्या प्रचंड दबावामुळेच चंपत राय यांना राजीनामा द्यावा लागल्याची जोरदार चर्चा राजकीय वर्तुळात आहे.



विशेष म्हणजे, या दान चोरी प्रकरणाची चौकशी व्यापक व्हावी, अशी मागणी स्वतः विश्व हिंदू परिषदेचे अध्यक्ष आलोक कुमार यांनी केली होती. “चंपत राय, अनिल मिश्रा आणि गोपाल राव यांचीही या प्रकरणात सखोल चौकशी व्हावी, कोणालाही चौकशीतून वगळले जाऊ नये,” अशी आक्रमक भूमिका आलोक कुमार यांनी घेतली होती. दुसरीकडे, विरोधकही सातत्याने चंपत राय यांच्यावर कारवाई का होत नाही? आणि त्यांचा राजीनामा का घेतला जात नाही? असा सवाल करत राम मंदिर ट्रस्टला घेरण्याचा प्रयत्न करत होते.



Nashik Police News: चित्रपटात ‘धुरंधर’ चालतो, नाशिकमध्ये फक्त कायदा; टवाळखोरांना पोलिसांचा अनोख्या स्टाइलने दणका



आठ जणांवर गुन्हे दाखलश्री राम जन्मभूमी तीर्थ क्षेत्र ट्रस्टचे विश्वस्त कृष्ण मोहन यांच्या तक्रारीवरून राम जन्मभूमी पोलीस ठाण्यात आठ जणांविरुद्ध गुन्हा दाखल करण्यात आला आहे. एफआयआरमध्ये राम शंकर यादव उर्फ ​​टिनू, अनुकल्प मिश्रा, लवकुश मिश्रा, करुणेश पांडे, अविनाश शुक्ला, मनीष यादव, राम शंकर मिश्रा आणि सुभाष चंद्र श्रीवास्तव यांची नावे आहेत. त्यांच्याविरुद्ध अपहार, फसवणूक आणि गुन्हेगारी कट रचण्याशी संबंधित कलमांखाली गुन्हा दाखल करण्यात आला आहे.



या सर्व आठही आरोपींना पोलिसांनी आधीच अटक केली असून त्यांची कसून चौकशी सुरू आहे. या आरोपींच्या चौकशीत कोणती धक्कादायक माहिती समोर आली आणि त्यामुळेच तर चंपत राय यांना राजीनामा द्यावा लागला नाही ना? या आता चर्चांना उधाण आले आहे. या राजीनाम्यामागचे खरे कारण लवकरच अधिकृतपणे समोर येण्याची शक्यता आहे.



काय आहे प्रकरण?अयोध्येतील राम मंदिरातील दान केलेल्या वस्तूंची चोरी होत असल्याची टीका समाजवादी पक्ष आणि आम आदमी पार्टीने केला होता. यानंतर, उत्तर प्रदेश सरकारने एसआयटी स्थापन केली. त्यांच्या तपासादरम्यान अशी प्राथमिक माहिती मिळाली की, रोकड, सोन्या-चांदीचे दागिने असा तब्बल 3,500 कोटी रुपयांच्या मुद्देमालाची नोंद नसल्याचे धक्कदायक बाब समोर आली. श्री राम मंदिरातून दान केलेल्या वस्तूंची कथित चोरी प्रकरणी एसआयटीच्या प्राथमिक अहवालाने व्यवस्थेवर प्रश्नचिन्ह निर्माण केले. या अहवालात घटनास्थळावरील परिस्थिती, 150 हून अधिक लोकांची चौकशी, सीसीटीव्ही फुटेज आणि सध्याची व्यवस्था यांचा समावेश आहे. प्रत्येकाच्या भूमिकेचा उल्लेख आहे. पण, कोणालाही थेट जबाबदार धरण्यात आलेले नाही. सविस्तर अहवालातून प्रत्येक व्यक्तीची जबाबदारी निश्चित होऊ शकते.

title: Serena Williams to face 20-year-old Maya Joint in Wimbledon 2026 opening round
description: The seven-time Wimbledon singles champion, who is 44, accepted a wild-card entry to the grass-court Grand Slam, where she’ll also compete in doubles with her older sister Venus, who turned 46 last week.

title: బాహుబలి 3 సినిమా పై క్లారిటీ ఇచ్చిన ప్రభాస్?
description: Baahubali 3 Movie Update: నెట్‌ఫ్లిక్స్ లో విడుదలైన బాహుబలి ది టార్చ్ బేరర్ డాక్యుమెంటరీ క్లిప్ ఇప్పుడు సోషల్ మీడియాలో ప్రకంపనలు సృష్టిస్తోంది. ఈ వీడియోలో...
content:
Baahubali 3 Movie Update: నెట్‌ఫ్లిక్స్ లో విడుదలైన బాహుబలి ది టార్చ్ బేరర్ డాక్యుమెంటరీ క్లిప్ ఇప్పుడు సోషల్ మీడియాలో ప్రకంపనలు సృష్టిస్తోంది. ఈ వీడియోలో బాహుబలి 3 సినిమా వస్తుందనే సంకేతాలను ప్రభాస్, రానా దగ్గుబాటి, అనుష్క శెట్టి పరోక్షంగా ఇచ్చారు. రానా మాట్లాడుతూ రాజమౌళి ప్రస్తుతం ఇక్కడ లేరు కాబట్టి అసలు విషయం చెబుతున్నానని, ప్రపంచం సిద్ధంగా లేకపోయినా బాహుబలి మాత్రం ఉంటుందని చెప్పడం సంచలనంగా మారింది. వెంటనే ప్రభాస్ నవ్వుతూ మూడు వేళ్లను చూపించడం ఈ ఊహాగానాలకు మరింత బలం చేకూర్చింది. అక్కడ ఉన్న నటులంతా నవ్వుతూ ఈ విషయాన్ని ధృవీకరించినట్లుగా కనిపించడంతో అభిమానులు పండుగ చేసుకుంటున్నారు. ఈ వీడియో చూస్తుంటే ఫ్రాంచైజీలో మూడో భాగం రావడం ఖాయమనే నమ్మకం అందరిలో మొదలైంది.



Read also: Nandini Reddy interview: సమంత ప్రెగ్నెన్సీపై దర్శకురాలు నందిని రెడ్డి ఆసక్తికర వ్యాఖ్యలు



Prabhas hinting at Baahubali 3 movie



బాహుబలి ఫ్రాంచైజీకి కొనసాగుతున్న క్రేజ్



బాహుబలి సిరీస్ 2015లో మొదలై ప్రపంచవ్యాప్త గుర్తింపు పొందింది. ఎస్ ఎస్ రాజమౌళి దర్శకత్వంలో వచ్చిన ఈ భారీ ఫాంటసీ కథ తెలుగు సినిమా స్థాయిని పెంచింది. ప్రభాస్ ద్విపాత్రాభినయం, రానా విలనిజం ప్రేక్షకులను కట్టిపడేశాయి. 2017లో వచ్చిన బాహుబలి 2 దాదాపు 1788 కోట్ల వసూళ్లతో రికార్డు సృష్టించింది. ఆ తర్వాత బాహుబలి ది ఎపిక్ పేరుతో రెండు భాగాలు మళ్ళీ విడుదలయ్యాయి. బాహుబలి ది లాస్ట్ లెజెండ్స్ యానిమేషన్ సిరీస్ ఇప్పటికే ప్రైమ్ వీడియోలో అందుబాటులో ఉంది. ఇప్పుడు బాహుబలి ది ఎటర్నల్ వార్ పేరుతో మరో CGI యానిమేషన్ ప్రాజెక్ట్ సిద్ధమవుతోంది. ఈ క్రమంలోనే మూడో భాగం గురించి వస్తున్న వార్తలు అభిమానులను మరింత ఉత్కంఠకు గురిచేస్తున్నాయి.



Baahubali 3 Movie Update:వైరల్ వీడియో పై నెటిజన్ల రియాక్షన్



ఈ డాక్యుమెంటరీ క్లిప్ చూసిన వారు సోషల్ మీడియాలో పోస్టుల వర్షం కురిపిస్తున్నారు. స్వయంగా ప్రభాస్ నుండి వచ్చిన ఈ హింట్ సినిమా కన్ఫర్మ్ అయినట్లేనని ఫ్యాన్స్ భావిస్తున్నారు. ఈ అద్భుతమైన గాథ తిరిగి రాబోతుందని, బాహుబలి 3 కోసం ఎదురుచూడటం మొదలైందని నెటిజన్లు కామెంట్స్ చేస్తున్నారు. రాజమౌళి మళ్ళీ ఏ సంచలనం సృష్టిస్తారోనని అంతా ఆసక్తిగా ఉన్నారు. ఈ డాక్యుమెంటరీలో రాజమౌళి విజన్, నటుల శ్రమ, తెర వెనుక విశేషాలను అద్భుతంగా చూపించారు. నెట్‌ఫ్లిక్స్‌లో తెలుగు, హిందీ, తమిళం, మలయాళ భాషల్లో ఈ డాక్యుమెంటరీ ప్రసారమవుతోంది. దీనితో పాటు యానిమేషన్ ప్రాజెక్టులు కూడా ఈ ఫ్రాంచైజీ ప్రపంచాన్ని మరింత విస్తరిస్తున్నాయి. భారీ అంచనాల మధ్య బాహుబలి 3 ప్రకటన కోసం ప్రపంచం మొత్తం వేచి చూస్తోంది.

title: 'Ulta chor kotwal ko daante’: CM Omar hits back at PDP over backdoor appointments allegation
description:
Srinagar, June 26: Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister Omar Abdullah on Friday strongly rejected allegations of backdoor appointments against his government, describing the accusations as a case of "ulta chor kotwal ko daante (the thief scolding the police chief)."
Accusing the former PDP-BJP coalition government of carrying out illegal recruitments themselves, the Chief Minister threw an open challenge to his critics to produce evidence supporting their allegations.
Interacting with media after taking part in Ashura commemorations in Srinagar, Abdullah said those making the allegations had themselves presided over backdoor appointments.
"Let them make an allegation with evidence. Give me the name of a single candidate who got a backdoor appointment under our government, and we are ready to explain," he said.
The CM said he was prepared to answer any allegation backed by proof.
Omar dismissed the accusations as "baseless" and said his government would soon present its detailed response.
"There is a Hindi saying: 'Ulta chor kotwal ko daante' (the thief turns around and scolds the police chief). Those who made the largest number of illegal and backdoor appointments are now making these allegations," he said.
Referring to the Mehbooba Mufti-led Jammu and Kashmir Peoples Democratic Party, Abdullah alleged that the son of her maternal uncle, Sartaj Madani, had secured a backdoor appointment before being removed following court directions.Earlier this week, Mehbooba had alleged that 25000 backdoor appointments have been made by the incumbent National Conference government.

title: Tom Holland & Zendaya Charm Fans During 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' London Promotions | N18G
description: Tom Holland, Zendaya and Jacob Batalon turned up the excitement in London as they kicked off the promotional tour for 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day'. Despite soaring temperatures, the trio happily posed for photos, signed autographs and took selfies with hundreds of fans at Trafalgar Square. The upcoming Marvel blockbuster, directed by Destin Daniel Cretton, marks Tom Holland's fourth solo outing as Spider-Man and follows the events of 'Spider-Man: No Way Home'. Watch this video for all the highlights from the star-studded photocall.

title: Off Roading SUV: रेगिस्तान में घूमने के लिए Thar, Jimny या Gurkha? जानें कौन-सी SUV है सबसे दमदार
description:
Off Roading SUV: अगर आपको ऑफ-रोडिंग का शौक है और रेगिस्तान या कठिन रास्तों पर ड्राइविंग करना पसंद है, तो सही SUV चुनना बहुत जरूरी है। भारत में इस सेगमेंट में महिंद्रा थार, मारुति जिम्नी और फोर्स गुरखा सबसे ज्यादा पसंद की जाने वाली 4×4 गाड़ियां हैं। लेकिन कीमत, इंजन और ऑफ-रोड क्षमता के मामले.
The post Off Roading SUV: रेगिस्तान में घूमने के लिए Thar, Jimny या Gurkha? जानें कौन-सी SUV है सबसे दमदार appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
Off Roading SUV: अगर आपको ऑफ-रोडिंग का शौक है और रेगिस्तान या कठिन रास्तों पर ड्राइविंग करना पसंद है, तो सही SUV चुनना बहुत जरूरी है। भारत में इस सेगमेंट में महिंद्रा थार, मारुति जिम्नी और फोर्स गुरखा सबसे ज्यादा पसंद की जाने वाली 4×4 गाड़ियां हैं। लेकिन कीमत, इंजन और ऑफ-रोड क्षमता के मामले में तीनों एक-दूसरे से अलग हैं।
सबसे पहले जानें कीमत
अगर बजट की बात करें तो महिंद्रा थार सबसे किफायती विकल्पों में से एक है। बता दें कि इसकी शुरुआती कीमत करीब 11.25 लाख रुपये है। मारुति जिम्नी का बेस मॉडल लगभग 12.75 लाख रुपये से शुरू होता है। वहीं फोर्स गुरखा की शुरुआती कीमत 15 लाख रुपये से ज्यादा है, जिससे यह तीनों में सबसे महंगी SUV बन जाती है।
ये भी पढ़ें:

चंडीगढ़ के स्क्रैप मार्केट में भीषण आग, कई दुकानें और 20 वाहन जलकर खाक

इंजन और ताकत
महिंद्रा थार में 1.5 लीटर डीजल इंजन मिलता है, जो अच्छी पावर और दमदार टॉर्क देता है। यह खराब और ऊबड़-खाबड़ रास्तों पर बेहतर प्रदर्शन करती है। मारुति जिम्नी में 1.5 लीटर पेट्रोल इंजन दिया गया है। यह शहर, हाईवे और हल्की ऑफ-रोडिंग के लिए अच्छा विकल्प माना जाता है। फोर्स गुरखा में 2.6 लीटर का बड़ा इंजन मिलता है, जिसे खास तौर पर मुश्किल रास्तों और हार्डकोर ऑफ-रोडिंग के लिए तैयार किया गया है।
ऑफ-रोडिंग में कौन आगे?
महिंद्रा थार को लंबे समय से ऑफ-रोडिंग की मजबूत SUV माना जाता है। इसका ऊंचा ग्राउंड क्लीयरेंस और 4×4 सिस्टम इसे रेत, कीचड़ और पत्थरीले रास्तों पर शानदार बनाता है। फोर्स गुरखा में डिफरेंशियल लॉक, 4×4 हाई-लो रेंज और स्नॉर्कल जैसे फीचर्स मिलते हैं। यही वजह है कि बेहद कठिन रास्तों पर यह कई बार दूसरी SUVs से बेहतर साबित होती है। वहीं मारुति जिम्नी हल्की और कॉम्पैक्ट SUV है। इसका छोटा आकार इसे संकरी सड़कों और टेढ़े-मेढ़े रास्तों पर आसानी से चलने में मदद करता है।
ये भी पढ़ें:

पत्नी के साथ जिम में वर्कआउट करते 23 वर्षीय युवक की मौत, 5 महीने पहले ही हुई थी शादी

फीचर्स में कौन बेहतर?
अगर फीचर्स की बात करें तो जिम्नी सबसे आगे नजर आती है। इसमें बड़ा टचस्क्रीन, ऑटोमैटिक क्लाइमेट कंट्रोल, क्रूज कंट्रोल और 6 एयरबैग जैसे फीचर्स मिलते हैं। चार दरवाजों की वजह से यह परिवार के साथ यात्रा के लिए भी सुविधाजनक है।
महिंद्रा थार हार्ड टॉप और कन्वर्टिबल रूफ जैसे विकल्पों के साथ आती है, लेकिन बेस मॉडल में फीचर्स थोड़े कम मिलते हैं। वहीं फोर्स गुरखा का इंटीरियर साधारण है, क्योंकि इसका मुख्य फोकस मजबूत ऑफ-रोड प्रदर्शन पर रखा गया है।
कौन-सी SUV चुनें?
अगर आपका मकसद सिर्फ कठिन रास्तों और रेगिस्तान में बेहतरीन ऑफ-रोडिंग करना है, तो फोर्स गुरखा और महिंद्रा थार मजबूत विकल्प हैं। वहीं अगर आप रोजमर्रा के इस्तेमाल के साथ कभी-कभी एडवेंचर ट्रिप पर जाना चाहते हैं, तो मारुति जिम्नी बेहतर और ज्यादा प्रैक्टिकल विकल्प साबित हो सकती है।
The post Off Roading SUV: रेगिस्तान में घूमने के लिए Thar, Jimny या Gurkha? जानें कौन-सी SUV है सबसे दमदार appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: ड्रग्स तस्करों पर सख्ती, नशे के शिकार लोगों के लिए सहानुभूति : अमित शाह
description:
नई दिल्ली: अंतरराष्ट्रीय मादक पदार्थ दुरुपयोग और अवैध तस्करी विरोधी दिवस पर केंद्रीय गृह एवं सहकारिता मंत्री अमित शाह ने नई दिल्ली में नारकोटिक्स कंट्रोल (NCORD) की 10वीं शीर्ष स्तरीय बैठक की अध्यक्षता की। इस दौरान उन्होंने देश को नशे के खतरे से बचाने के लिए तैयार किए गए ‘विजन डॉक्यूमेंट ऑन नारकोटिक्स कंट्रोल’ का.
The post ड्रग्स तस्करों पर सख्ती, नशे के शिकार लोगों के लिए सहानुभूति : अमित शाह appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
नई दिल्ली: अंतरराष्ट्रीय मादक पदार्थ दुरुपयोग और अवैध तस्करी विरोधी दिवस पर केंद्रीय गृह एवं सहकारिता मंत्री अमित शाह ने नई दिल्ली में नारकोटिक्स कंट्रोल (NCORD) की 10वीं शीर्ष स्तरीय बैठक की अध्यक्षता की।
इस दौरान उन्होंने देश को नशे के खतरे से बचाने के लिए तैयार किए गए ‘विजन डॉक्यूमेंट ऑन नारकोटिक्स कंट्रोल’ का भी शुभारंभ किया। संबोधन में अमित शाह ने कहा कि देश आज नशे के खिलाफ लड़ाई के बेहद निर्णायक मोड़ पर खड़ा है और आने वाले तीन साल बेहद अहम होंगे। अमित शाह ने कहा कि 26 जून भारत के लिए बेहद महत्वपूर्ण दिन है। एक ओर देश नशे के खिलाफ प्रभावी रोडमैप तैयार कर रहा है, वहीं आज महान साहित्यकार बंकिम चंद्र चट्टोपाध्याय की जयंती भी है।
‘बंकिम बाबू’ ने गुलामी के दौर में देश के आत्मविश्वास को जगाने का काम किया और ‘वंदे मातरम’ जैसी अमर रचना दी। उन्होंने कहा, “‘वंदे मातरम्’ केवल एक नारा या गीत नहीं है। यह भारत की सांस्कृतिक चेतना, राष्ट्रभक्ति और देश के पुनर्निर्माण का मंत्र है। आजादी की लड़ाई में अंग्रेजों के खिलाफ संघर्ष का सबसे बड़ा उद्घोष भी ‘वंदे मातरम’ ही था। इतिहास गवाह है कि देश के अनेक स्वतंत्रता सेनानी फांसी के फंदे पर चढ़ते समय भी अपने अंतिम शब्द के रूप में ‘वंदे मातरम’ का ही उच्चारण करते थे।”

ਜਲੰਧਰ ਕਰਾਇਮ ਬ੍ਰਾਂਚ ਦੀ ਵੱਡੀ ਕਾਰਵਾਈ, 500 ਗ੍ਰਾਮ ਹੈਰੋਇਨ ਤੇ 1 ਕਿਲੋ ਅਫੀਮ ਸਮੇਤ 2 ਨੌਜਵਾਨ ਕਾਬੂ

गृह मंत्री ने कहा कि मादक पदार्थों की समस्या केवल कानून-व्यवस्था का विषय नहीं, बल्कि देश के भविष्य से जुड़ा गंभीर मुद्दा है। उन्होंने कहा कि देश के अगले 100 वर्षों के भविष्य को सुरक्षित रखने के लिए सभी सरकारों, विभागों, संतों, युवाओं और मातृशक्ति को एक मंच पर आकर संयुक्त रूप से काम करना होगा। उन्होंने कहा कि नशे के खिलाफ इस लड़ाई में समाज के हर वर्ग की भागीदारी बेहद जरूरी है। अमित शाह ने सभी राज्यों के मुख्य सचिवों और पुलिस महानिदेशकों से अपील की कि राष्ट्रीय नशीले पदार्थ समन्वय पोर्टल (एनसीओआरडी) की बैठकों को केवल औपचारिकता तक सीमित न रखा जाए, बल्कि उन्हें पूरी तरह परिणाम-उन्मुख बनाया जाए। उन्होंने कहा कि बैठकों में लिए गए फैसलों का प्रभावी क्रियान्वयन हो, उनकी नियमित समीक्षा हो और कमियों का गंभीर विश्लेषण किया जाए, तभी वास्तविक सफलता मिलेगी। उन्होंने रियल-टाइम सूचना साझा करने पर भी विशेष जोर दिया।
अमित शाह ने बताया कि नारकोटिक्स कंट्रोल ब्यूरो (एनसीबी) ने इसके लिए कई डिजिटल पोर्टल विकसित किए हैं। उन्होंने राज्यों से आग्रह किया कि सभी ड्रग्स से जुड़े मामलों का विवरण समय पर इन पोर्टल्स पर अपलोड किया जाए, ताकि केंद्र सरकार लगातार निगरानी कर आवश्यक सुझाव और फीडबैक दे सके। गृह मंत्री ने कहा कि आज का नारकोटिक्स नेटवर्क लगातार विकसित हो रहा है। ड्रग्स तस्कर नई तकनीकों का इस्तेमाल कर रहे हैं, जिससे उनके खिलाफ कार्रवाई और चुनौतीपूर्ण हो गई है। इसलिए इस पूरे नेटवर्क को तोड़ने के लिए एक समग्र और आधुनिक रणनीति अपनानी होगी। उन्होंने साफ कहा कि ड्रग्स के अवैध कारोबार में शामिल अपराधियों के खिलाफ सरकार की नीति पूरी तरह बेहद सख्त होनी चाहिए। वहीं, जो लोग नशे के शिकार हैं, उनके प्रति सहानुभूति अपनाते हुए इलाज, पुनर्वास और समाज की मुख्यधारा में वापस लाने पर जोर देना चाहिए। अमित शाह ने पिछले वर्षों में नशे के खिलाफ हुई कार्रवाई के आंकड़े भी साझा किए।
उन्होंने बताया कि वर्ष 2004 से 2014 के बीच देश में 26 लाख किलोग्राम सिंथेटिक ड्रग्स जब्त किए गए थे। जबकि 2014 से 2026 के बीच यह आंकड़ा बढ़कर 1 करोड़ 18 लाख किलोग्राम तक पहुंच गया है। उन्होंने कहा कि यह दिखाता है कि सरकार का अभियान लगातार प्रभावी और सफल दिशा में आगे बढ़ रहा है। उन्होंने यह भी बताया कि 2004 से 2014 के दौरान जब्त किए गए ड्रग्स की कीमत करीब 40 हजार करोड़ रुपए थी, जबकि 2014 से 2026 के बीच जब्त किए गए मादक पदार्थों का मूल्य बढ़कर लगभग 1 लाख 84 हजार करोड़ रुपए हो गया।

पत्नी के साथ जिम में वर्कआउट करते 23 वर्षीय युवक की मौत, 5 महीने पहले ही हुई थी शादी

The post ड्रग्स तस्करों पर सख्ती, नशे के शिकार लोगों के लिए सहानुभूति : अमित शाह appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: ନିଶାମୁକ୍ତ ସମାଜ ଗଠନ ପାଇଁ ସାମୂହିକ ସଂକଳ୍ପ: ସାମିଲ ହେଲେ…
description:

The post ନିଶାମୁକ୍ତ ସମାଜ ଗଠନ ପାଇଁ ସାମୂହିକ ସଂକଳ୍ପ: ସାମିଲ ହେଲେ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଛତ୍ରପୁର, ୨୬।୬ (ଦିଲ୍ଲୀପ ସାମଲ): ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ନିଶା ନିବାରଣ ଓ ଅବୈଧ ତସକରି ବିରୋଧ ଦିବସ-୨୦୨୬ ଅବସରରେ ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଗିଲାରେ ଗତ ୧୭ ଜୁନରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଥିବା ୧୦ ଦିନବ୍ୟାପୀ ନିଶାମୁକ୍ତ ଭାରତ ଅଭିଯାନ ଛତ୍ରପୁରଠାରେ ବ୍ୟାପକ ଜନସହଭାଗିତା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଉଯାପିତ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ଜିଲା ସାମାଜିକ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ବିଭାଗ ଓ ଜିଲା ଅବକାରୀ ବିଭାଗର ମିଳିତ ଆନୁକୂଳ୍ୟରେ ଆୟୋଜିତ ଏହି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମ ନିଶା ସେବନର କୁପ୍ରଭାବ ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ଜନସାଧାରଣଙ୍କୁ ସଚେତନ କରିବା ସହ ନିଶାମୁକ୍ତ ସମାଜ ଗଠନର ସଂକଳ୍ପକୁ ଆହୁରି ଦୃଢ଼ କରିଥିଲା।
ଏହି ଅବସରରେ ଆଜି ସକାଳେ ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲ୍ଲାପାଳଙ୍କ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାଳୟ ପରିସରରୁ ଏକ ସଚେତନତା ଶୋଭାଯାତ୍ରା ବାହାରିଥିଲା। ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ଜିଲାପାଳ ସଚ୍ଚିଦାନନ୍ଦ ନାୟକ ଏବଂ ସୁନୀଲ କୁମାର କେରକେଟା ମିଳିତ ଭାବେ ପତାକା ଦେଖାଇ ଶୋଭାଯାତ୍ରାର ଶୁଭାରମ୍ଭ କରିଥିଲେ। ନିଶାମୁକ୍ତି ସମ୍ପର୍କିତ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ସଚେତନତାମୂଳକ ସ୍ଲୋଗାନ ଓ ବ୍ୟାନର ଧରି ଅଂଶଗ୍ରହଣକାରୀମାନେ ଛତ୍ରପୁର ସହର ପରିକ୍ରମା କରିଥିଲେ।
ଶୋଭାଯାତ୍ରା ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଅନସ୍ଲୋ ସରକାରୀ ଉଚ୍ଚ ବିଦ୍ୟାଳୟ ପଡ଼ିଆରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିବା ପରେ ସେଠାରେ ଏକ ସମୂହ ଶପଥପାଠ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା । ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ସମସ୍ତେ ନିଶାମୁକ୍ତ ଜୀବନଶୈଳୀ ଅବଲମ୍ବନ କରିବା ଓ ସମାଜରୁ ନିଶା ଦୂର କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଶପଥ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଥିଲେ।
ଜିଲାବ୍ୟାପୀ ପାଳିତ ଏହି ଅଭିଯାନ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ସ୍କୁଲ, କଲେଜ ଓ ବ୍ଲକ ସ୍ତରରେ ଚିତ୍ରାଙ୍କନ, ପ୍ରବନ୍ଧ, ବକ୍ତୃତା ପ୍ରତିଯୋଗିତା, ଶପଥ ଗ୍ରହଣ ଓ ସଚେତନତା ଶୋଭାଯାତ୍ରା ଭଳି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମ ଆୟୋଜିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଏଥିରେ ଛାତ୍ରୀଛାତ୍ର, ସ୍ବେଚ୍ଛାସେବୀ, ନିଶାମୁକ୍ତ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିବିଶେଷ ଓ ଜନସାଧାରଣଙ୍କ ସକ୍ରିୟ ଅଂଶଗ୍ରହଣ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ନିଶା ସେବନ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହେଉଥିବା ସାମାଜିକ, ଆର୍ଥିକ ଓ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟଗତ କ୍ଷତି ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ସଚେତନ କରାଯିବା ସହ ଯୁବପିଢ଼ିଙ୍କୁ ନିଶାଠାରୁ ଦୂରେଇ ରହିବା ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରେରିତ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା।
ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲାର ଛତ୍ରପୁର, ଖଲ୍ଲିକୋଟ ଏବଂ କନିସିଠାରେ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟରତ ତିନୋଟି ସମନୱିତ ନିଶାମୁକ୍ତି ଓ ପୁନର୍ବାସ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଏହି ଅଭିଯାନର ବିଭିନ୍ନ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମ ସଫଳତାର ସହ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକାରୀ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା।
କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମରେ ଜିଲ୍ଲା ଅବକାରୀ ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ ଅମରେନ୍ଦ୍ର କୁମାର ଜେନା, ନିଶାମୁକ୍ତ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିବିଶେଷ, ସ୍କୁଲ ଓ କଲେଜ ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀ ଏବଂ ସ୍ବେଚ୍ଛାସେବୀମାନେ ଅଂଶଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଥିଲେ। ଜିଲା ସାମାଜିକ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଅଧିକାରୀ କୃଷ୍ଣ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ବେହେରା ସମସ୍ତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମର ସଂଯୋଜନା ଓ ପରିଚାଳନା କରିଥିଲେ। ଏଥିରେ ଛତ୍ରପୁର ଓ ବ୍ରହ୍ମପୁର ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ସାମାଜିକ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଅଧିକାରୀ, ସମସ୍ତ ବ୍ଲକସ୍ତରୀୟ ସାମାଜିକ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଅଧିକାରୀ ଏବଂ ବିଭାଗୀୟ କର୍ମଚାରୀମାନେ ସହଯୋଗ କରିଥିଲେ।

Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily
 

The post ନିଶାମୁକ୍ତ ସମାଜ ଗଠନ ପାଇଁ ସାମୂହିକ ସଂକଳ୍ପ: ସାମିଲ ହେଲେ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Banks at ‘interesting juncture’; Kotak sees room for re-rating led by funding and yield shifts; HDFC, ICICI Bank top picks
description: Kotak said actions by key lenders, particularly public sector banks, are already shaping the operating environment. It noted that steps taken to push loan yields higher could provide a tailwind across the system, allowing other banks to operate with greater flexibility.
content: India’s banking sector is entering a phase where the next leg of gains could be driven less by credit growth and more by improvements in margins and funding costs, according to a recent note by Kotak Institutional Equities, which remains constructive on the space. The brokerage described the current backdrop as an “interesting juncture in the cycle,” arguing that a combination of better yield discipline among public sector banks and improved access to cheaper foreign currency funding could act as the main triggers for re-rating.Kotak said actions by key lenders, particularly public sector banks, are already shaping the operating environment. It noted that steps taken to push loan yields higher could provide a tailwind across the system, allowing other banks to operate with greater flexibility.At the same time, lenders’ ability to mobilise FCNR (foreign currency non-resident) deposits and other overseas borrowings is expected to ease pressure on funding costs. This, in turn, could improve net interest margins and support profitability. However, the brokerage flagged that the benefits may not be uniform, as banks’ decisions to prioritise growth could offset some of the gains from lower funding costs.Kotak struck a cautious note on the demand side, suggesting that underlying credit growth may not be as strong as headline numbers indicate. It pointed out that recent RBI data suggests part of the growth is being driven by credit substitution from bond markets rather than fresh demand, implying that the expansion in bank lending may be overstated.The brokerage added that strong foreign inflows into the financial system could actually reduce deposit pressures, lowering the cost of funds but not necessarily translating into faster loan growth. On the asset quality front, Kotak remains largely comfortable, with expectations that both public and private sector banks will report lower slippages through FY2027.Retail portfolios, in particular, are seen as entering this cycle from a much stronger position compared to previous periods. Improved underwriting standards since FY2024 and the gradual seasoning of weak loan cohorts are expected to support stability. The brokerage believes unsecured lending, which had seen stress earlier, should witness the sharpest improvement in the coming quarters.For MSMEs, risks remain but appear manageable. Kotak said the segment could face pressure in the event of a prolonged slowdown, though government-backed schemes such as ECLGS and CGTMSE continue to provide a cushion. Corporate balance sheets, meanwhile, remain healthy. Banks are seen as comfortable supporting large borrowers, even as some sectors face near-term uncertainties.Despite the recent rally in banking stocks, Kotak believes valuations are still reasonable. It noted that most banks continue to trade below its assessed fair values, leaving room for both multiple expansion and earnings growth. The brokerage expects the sector to deliver steady earnings compounding alongside a potential valuation re-rating, supported by stable asset quality and a favourable funding environment.In terms of stock preferences, Kotak continues to favour frontline private sector banks, citing stronger franchises and better execution capabilities. Among these, HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank remain its top picks, with the brokerage suggesting that Axis Bank will need to show stronger performance to justify any valuation premium over peers. Within the public sector space, State Bank of India (SBI) is the preferred exposure, given its size, balance sheet strength and ability to benefit from improving sector dynamics.(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only, and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money related decisions.)

Kangana Ranaut reacts to Pune's Ketan Agarwal death case: 'Parents can't be blamed'
description: A Pune man's death, initially ruled an accident, is now a murder investigation. His fiancée and her alleged partner are accused of his killing. Amidst public discussion, Kangana Ranaut commented on parental responsibility, highlighting the significant impact of social media, AI, and peer groups on individuals' choices, suggesting families shouldn't be solely blamed for their children's actions.

title: ଆଜି ପ୍ରଥମ ଟି୨୦: ଭାରତ-ଆୟର୍ଲାଣ୍ଡ ମୁକାବିଲା
description:
ବେଲଫାଷ୍ଟ,୨୬ା୬: ଭାରତ ଏବଂ ଆୟର୍ଲାଣ୍ଡ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଗୁରୁବାର ଦୁଇ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ଟି୨୦ ସିରିଜ୍‌ର ପ୍ରଥମ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ଖେଳାଯିବ। ଏହି ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ସହିତ ଶ୍ରେୟସ ଆୟାର ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ସ୍ତରରେ ତାଙ୍କର ନେତୃତ୍ୱ ଅଭିଯାନ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିବେ। ଟିନ୍‌ଏଜ୍‌ ବ୍ୟାଟିଂ ସେନସେଶନରେ ବୈଭବ ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀଙ୍କୁ କେଉଁ ଭଳି ପ୍ଲେଇଂ ଇଲେଭେନରେ ସାମିଲ କରାଯାଇପାରିବ, ତାହା ଟିମ୍‌ ମ୍ୟାନେଜମେଣ୍ଟ ପାଇଁ ବଡ଼ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପାଲଟିଛି। ନିକଟରେ ଶ୍ରୀଲଙ୍କା ବିପକ୍ଷ ତ୍ରି-ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରୀୟ ଦିନିକିଆ ସିରିଜ୍‌ ଫାଇନାଲରେ ୨୯ ବଲରେ ୯୪ ରନର […]
The post ଆଜି ପ୍ରଥମ ଟି୨୦: ଭାରତ-ଆୟର୍ଲାଣ୍ଡ ମୁକାବିଲା appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ବେଲଫାଷ୍ଟ,୨୬ା୬: ଭାରତ ଏବଂ ଆୟର୍ଲାଣ୍ଡ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଗୁରୁବାର ଦୁଇ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ଟି୨୦ ସିରିଜ୍‌ର ପ୍ରଥମ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ଖେଳାଯିବ। ଏହି ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ସହିତ ଶ୍ରେୟସ ଆୟାର ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ସ୍ତରରେ ତାଙ୍କର ନେତୃତ୍ୱ ଅଭିଯାନ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିବେ। ଟିନ୍‌ଏଜ୍‌ ବ୍ୟାଟିଂ ସେନସେଶନରେ ବୈଭବ ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀଙ୍କୁ କେଉଁ ଭଳି ପ୍ଲେଇଂ ଇଲେଭେନରେ ସାମିଲ କରାଯାଇପାରିବ, ତାହା ଟିମ୍‌ ମ୍ୟାନେଜମେଣ୍ଟ ପାଇଁ ବଡ଼ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପାଲଟିଛି।
ନିକଟରେ ଶ୍ରୀଲଙ୍କା ବିପକ୍ଷ ତ୍ରି-ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରୀୟ ଦିନିକିଆ ସିରିଜ୍‌ ଫାଇନାଲରେ ୨୯ ବଲରେ ୯୪ ରନର ବିସ୍ଫୋରକ ଇନିଂସ ଖେଳିବା ପରେ ଏହି ୧୫ ବର୍ଷୀୟ ବ୍ୟାଟରଙ୍କ ପଦାର୍ପଣ ସମ୍ଭାବନା ଖୁବ୍‌ ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇଛି। କ୍ରିକେଟର ଛୋଟ ଫର୍ମାଟରେ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ଭାରତର ଟପ୍‌ ୩ ବ୍ୟାଟର ହେଲେ ସଞ୍ଜୁ ସାମସନ, ଅଭିଷେକ ଶର୍ମା ଓ ଇଶାନ କିଶନ। ନିକଟ ଅତୀତରେ ସେମାନେ କରିଥିବା ପ୍ରଦର୍ଶନକୁ ଅଣଦେଖା କରାଯାଇପାରିବ ନାହିଁ। ଏହି ୩ ବ୍ୟାଟର ଗତ ମାର୍ଚ୍ଚରେ ନ୍ୟୁଜିଲାଣ୍ଡ ବିପକ୍ଷ ଟି୨୦ ବିଶ୍ୱକପ୍‌ ଫାଇନାଲରେ ଅର୍ଦ୍ଧଶତକୀୟ ପାଳି ଖେଳିଥିଲେ। ଏହାସତ୍ତ୍ୱେ ଯଦି ମ୍ୟାନେଜମେଣ୍ଟ ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟବଂଶୀଙ୍କୁ ଓପନର ଭଳି ଖେଳାଇବାକୁ ଚାହେଁ, ତେବେ ସାମସନ କିମ୍ବା ଅଭିଷେକଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ବାଦ୍‌ ଦେବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିବ।
ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷେ ସାମସନଙ୍କୁ ମିଡିଲ ଅର୍ଡରରେ ଖେଳାଇବାର ବିକଳ୍ପ ରହିଛି। କାରଣ ସେ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ନଂ.୪ ଓ ୬ ପୋଜିଶନରେ ଖେଳିଛନ୍ତି। କିନ୍ତୁ ନଂ.୪ରେ ଅଧିନାୟକ ଶ୍ରେୟସ ଓ ନଂ.୫ରେ ଉପ ଅଧିନାୟକ ତିଲକ ବର୍ମା ଖେଳିବେ। ଏଣୁ କେବଳ ନଂ.୬ ପୋଜିଶନ ଉପଲବ୍ଧ ରହୁଛି। ହେଲେ ପାରମ୍ପରିକ ଭାବେ ଏହି ପୋଜିଶନରେ ଜଣେ ଅଲରାଉଣ୍ଡର ଖେଳନ୍ତି। ଦଳରେ ଶିବମ ଦୁବେ, ଓ୍ବାଶିଂଟନ ସୁନ୍ଦର, ଅକ୍ଷର ପଟେଲ ଓ ନବାଗତ ସୂର୍ଯ୍ୟାଂଶ ଶେଡ୍‌ଗେଙ୍କ ଭଳି ଅଲରାଉଣ୍ଡର ରହିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହାବାଦ୍‌ ସାମସନ ଷଷ୍ଠ କ୍ରମରେ ଖେଳିଲେ, ଭାରତକୁ ୫ ବୋଲରଙ୍କ ସହ ଖେଳିବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିବ। ଯଶପ୍ରୀତ ବୁମରା, ମହମ୍ମଦ ସିରାଜ ଓ ବରୁଣ ଚକ୍ରବର୍ତ୍ତୀଙ୍କ ଅନୁପସ୍ଥିତିରେ ବୋଲିଂ ବିଭାଗ ଦୁର୍ବଳ ଜଣାପଡ଼ୁଥିବା ବେଳେ ମ୍ୟାନେଜମେଣ୍ଟ ରିସ୍କ ନେବ ନାହିଁ।
The post ଆଜି ପ୍ରଥମ ଟି୨୦: ଭାରତ-ଆୟର୍ଲାଣ୍ଡ ମୁକାବିଲା appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: ‘Spinning stories’: Police say Siya Goyal’s statements contradict mobile chats in Pune murder case
తెలంగాణ నూతన సీఎస్‌గా సంజయ్‌ జాజు నియామకం.. ఉత్తర్వులు జారీ చేసిన ప్రభుత్వం!
description: CS Sanjay Jaju: తెలంగాణ రాష్ట్ర నూతన ప్రభుత్వ ప్రధాన కార్యదర్శి (Chief Secretary – CS) గా సీనియర్ ఐఏఎస్ అధికారి సంజయ్‌ జాజు నియామకమయ్యారు....
content:
CS Sanjay Jaju: తెలంగాణ రాష్ట్ర నూతన ప్రభుత్వ ప్రధాన కార్యదర్శి (Chief Secretary – CS) గా సీనియర్ ఐఏఎస్ అధికారి సంజయ్‌ జాజు  నియామకమయ్యారు. ప్రస్తుత సీఎస్ కే. రామకృష్ణారావు (K. Ramakrishna Rao) ఈ నెల (జూన్) 30వ తేదీన పదవీ విరమణ చేయనుండటంతో, ఆయన స్థానంలో సంజయ్ జాజును నియమిస్తూ రాష్ట్ర ప్రభుత్వం శుక్రవారం (జూన్ 26) అధికారిక ఉత్తర్వులు జారీ చేసింది.



Read also:Beedi workers children scholarship 2026: బీడీ కార్మికుల పిల్లలకు కేంద్ర స్కాలర్‌షిప్స్.. ఇలా అప్లై చేసుకోండి



CS Sanjay Jaju: కేంద్ర సర్వీసుల నుంచి రిలీవ్







తెలంగాణ కేడర్‌కు చెందిన 1992 బ్యాచ్ ఐఏఎస్ అధికారి అయిన సంజయ్ జాజు, గత కొంతకాలంగా కేంద్ర సర్వీసుల్లో కీలక బాధ్యతల్లో కొనసాగారు. రాష్ట్రంలో అత్యున్నత పరిపాలనా బాధ్యతలు చేపట్టేందుకు వీలుగా మూడు రోజుల కిందటే ఆయన కేంద్ర సర్వీసుల డెప్యుటేషన్ నుంచి రిలీవ్ అయ్యి రాష్ట్ర కేడర్‌కు తిరిగొచ్చారు. తాజాగా ప్రభుత్వం ఆయనకే సీఎస్ పగ్గాలు అప్పగిస్తూ నిర్ణయం తీసుకుంది.

title: Operation Sindoor: ‘ଅପରେସନ୍ ସିନ୍ଦୂର’ରେ ସହିଦ ହୋଇଥିବା ୬ ଭାରତୀୟ ସେନା ଯବାନଙ୍କ ନାମ ସରକାରୀ ଭାବେ ପ୍ରକାଶିତ
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ: ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ଓ ପିଓକେ (ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ଅଧିକୃତ କାଶ୍ମୀର)ରେ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ଭିତ୍ତିଭୂମିକୁ ଧ୍ୱଂସ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଗତ ବର୍ଷ ମେ’ ମାସରେ ଭାରତୀୟ ସେନା ପକ୍ଷରୁ କରାଯାଇଥିବା ସୀମାପାର ସାମରିକ ଅଭିଯାନ ‘ଅପରେସନ୍ ସିନ୍ଦୂର’କୁ ନେଇ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ସରକାର ଏକ ବଡ଼ ତଥ୍ୟ ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆଣିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ଅପରେସନ୍ ସମୟରେ ବୀରତ୍ୱର ସହ ଲଢ଼ି ଶହୀଦ ହୋଇଥିବା ୬ ଜଣ ଭାରତୀୟ ସେନା ଯବାନଙ୍କ ନାମ ସରକାର ପ୍ରଥମ ଥର ପାଇଁ ଆନୁଷ୍ଠାନିକ ଭାବେ ସର୍ବସାଧାରଣରେ ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ବୀର ସହିଦମାନଙ୍କ ନାମ ଜାତୀୟ ଯୁଦ୍ଧ ସ୍ମାରକୀର ୱେବସାଇଟର ''ରୋଲ୍ ଅଫ୍ ଅନର୍'' ବିଭାଗରେ ପ୍ରକାଶିତ ହେବା ସହ ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀସ୍ଥିତ ଯୁଦ୍ଧ ସ୍ମାରକୀର ପ୍ରାଚୀରରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଖୋଦିତ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଏହି ସାମରିକ ଅଭିଯାନରେ ଭାରତୀୟ ସଶସ୍ତ୍ର ବାହିନୀର ଯବାନ ସହିଦ ହୋଇଥିବା ନେଇ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଏହା ହେଉଛି ପ୍ରଥମ ଆନୁଷ୍ଠାନିକ ତଥା ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ସ୍ୱୀକୃତି।
‘ୱାଲ୍ ୩ଡି’ରେ ନାମଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ସ୍ଥାନ
ଦେଶ ମାତୃକାର ସେବା ପାଇଁ ସର୍ବୋଚ୍ଚ ବଳିଦାନ ଦେଇଥିବା ଏହି ବୀର ସହିଦମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ହେଡକ୍ୱାର୍ଟର୍ସ ୧୦ ଇନଫାଣ୍ଟ୍ରି ବ୍ରିଗେଡର ସୁବେଦାର ମେଜର ପବନ କୁମାର, ୪ ଜମ୍ମୁ ଏବଂ କାଶ୍ମୀର ଲାଇଟ୍ ଇନଫାଣ୍ଟ୍ରିର ରାଇଫଲମ୍ୟାନ୍ ସୁନୀଲ କୁମାର (ବୀର ଚକ୍ର), ୫ ଫିଲ୍ଡ ରେଜିମେଣ୍ଟର ଲାନ୍ସ ନାୟକ ଦିନେଶ କୁମାର, ୮୫୧ ଲାଇଟ୍ ରେଜିମେଣ୍ଟର ଆଭିଏସନ୍ ଟେକ୍ନିସିଆନ୍ ମୁଡ୍ ମୁରଲୀନାୟକ, ୨୩୭ ଫିଲ୍ଡ ୱାର୍କସପ୍ କମ୍ପାନୀର ହାଭିଲଦାର ସୁନୀଲ କୁମାର ସିଂ ଏବଂ ୩୯ ୱିଙ୍ଗର ସର୍ଜେଣ୍ଟ ସୁରେନ୍ଦ୍ର କୁମାର (ବାୟୁ ସେନା ପଦକ) ସାମିଲ ଅଛନ୍ତି। ଦେଶ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରାଣବଳି ଦେଇଥିବା ସାମରିକ କର୍ମଚାରୀଙ୍କ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟରେ ଉତ୍ସର୍ଗୀକୃତ ସ୍ମାରକୀର ୨୦୨୫ ବିଭାଗର ‘ୱାଲ୍ ୩ଡି’ରେ ଏହି ନାମଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ସ୍ଥାନ ଦିଆଯାଇଛି।
Indian Citizenship: ଭାରତୀୟ ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ଫେରିପାଇଲେ ୯୪ ବର୍ଷୀୟା ବୃଦ୍ଧା: ଆମେରିକା ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ତ୍ୟାଗ କରି ଗାଁକୁ ଫେରିଲେ
ପ୍ରକାଶିତ ଏହି ତାଲିକାରୁ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ଜଣାପଡ଼ୁଛି ଯେ ‘ଅପରେସନ୍ ସିନ୍ଦୂର’ରେ ସ୍ଥଳସେନା ଓ ଭାରତୀୟ ବାୟୁସେନା ଉଭୟ ବିଭାଗର ଯବାନମାନେ ସାମିଲ ଥିଲେ, ଯାହା ଏହି ସାମରିକ ଅଭିଯାନର ମିଳିତ ଏବଂ ସମନ୍ୱିତ ରଣନୀତିକୁ ଦର୍ଶାଉଛି। ସମ୍ମାନିତ ବୀରମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ରାଇଫଲମ୍ୟାନ୍ ସୁନୀଲ କୁମାରଙ୍କୁ ତାଙ୍କର ଅସାଧାରଣ ସାହସିକତା ପାଇଁ ''ବୀର ଚକ୍ର'' ଏବଂ ସର୍ଜେଣ୍ଟ ସୁରେନ୍ଦ୍ର କୁମାରଙ୍କୁ ''ବାୟୁ ସେନା ପଦକ''ରେ ସମ୍ମାନିତ କରାଯାଇଛି, ଯାହା ଏହି ଆତଙ୍କବାଦବାଦ ବିରୋଧୀ ଅପରେସନରେ ସେମାନଙ୍କର ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଭୂମିକାକୁ ପ୍ରମାଣିତ କରୁଛି। ଇଣ୍ଡିଆ ଗେଟ୍ ନିକଟରେ ୨୦୧୯ ମସିହାରେ ଉଦଘାଟିତ ହୋଇଥିବା ଜାତୀୟ ଯୁଦ୍ଧ ସ୍ମାରକୀରେ ସ୍ୱାଧୀନତା ପରଠାରୁ ଦେଶର ବିଭିନ୍ନ ସାମରିକ ଅପରେସନ ଏବଂ ଯୁଦ୍ଧରେ ସହିଦ ହୋଇଥିବା ଯବାନମାନଙ୍କୁ ସ୍ମରଣ କରାଯାଇଥାଏ। ଏହି ୬ ଜଣ ବୀର ଯବାନଙ୍କ ନାମ ସ୍ଥାନ ପାଇବା ପରେ ‘ଅପରେସନ୍ ସିନ୍ଦୂର’କୁ ଏବେ ସରକାରୀ ଭାବେ ଏକ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ସାମରିକ ବିଜୟ ଗାଥା ରୂପେ ସ୍ମାରକୀରେ ସାମିଲ କରାଯାଇଛି।

title: West Bengal: ସୋମବାର ପଶ୍ଚିମବଙ୍ଗ ବିଧାନସଭାରେ ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ ହୋଇପାରେ ସମାନ ନାଗରିକ ସଂହିତା ବିଲ୍
description:
କୋଲକାତା: ପଶ୍ଚିମବଙ୍ଗର ଶୁଭେନ୍ଦୁ ଅଧିକାରୀଙ୍କ ନେତୃତ୍ୱାଧୀନ ବିଜେପି ସରକାର ଚଳିତ ବଜେଟ ଅଧିବେଶନରେ ସୋମବାର ବିଧାନସଭାରେ ସମାନ ନାଗରିକ ସଂହିତା (ୟୁସିସି) ବିଲ୍ ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ କରିବାକୁ ଯାଉଥିବା ‘ଇଣ୍ଡିଆ ଟୁଡେ’ ସୂତ୍ରରୁ ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି। ରାଜ୍ୟରେ ବିଜେପି କ୍ଷମତାକୁ ଆସିବା ପରେ ୟୁସିସି ଲାଗୁ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଦେଇଥିବା ଛଅ ମାସର ସମୟସୀମାର ବହୁ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଏହି ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ନିଆଯାଉଛି।
‘ସଂକଳ୍ପ ପତ୍ର’ ପ୍ରକାଶ
ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବିତ ୟୁସିସି ବିଲ୍‌କୁ ରାଜ୍ୟର ପ୍ରଥମ ବିଜେପି ସରକାରଙ୍କ ସବୁଠାରୁ ଗୁରୁତ୍ବପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ନୀତିଗତ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଗୋଟିଏ ଭାବରେ ଦେଖାଯାଉଛି। ୨୦୨୬ ବିଧାନସଭା ନିର୍ବାଚନ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଦଳ ଏହାର ଇସ୍ତାହାରରେ ପ୍ରତିଶ୍ରୁତି ଦେଇଥିଲା ଯେ, ପଶ୍ଚିମବଙ୍ଗରେ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବାର ଛଅ ମାସ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ୟୁସିସି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକାରୀ କରିବ। କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଗୃହମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଅମିତ ଶାହ ଏପ୍ରିଲରେ ଦଳର ନିର୍ବାଚନ ଇସ୍ତାହାର ‘ସଂକଳ୍ପ ପତ୍ର’ ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିବା ସମୟରେ ଏହି ପ୍ରତିଶ୍ରୁତି ଉପରେ ଆଲୋକପାତ କରିଥିଲେ।
Indian Citizenship: ଭାରତୀୟ ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ଫେରିପାଇଲେ ୯୪ ବର୍ଷୀୟା ବୃଦ୍ଧା: ଆମେରିକା ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ତ୍ୟାଗ କରି ଗାଁକୁ ଫେରିଲେ
ଧର୍ମଭିତ୍ତିକ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଆଇନକୁ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ କରି ସମସ୍ତ ନାଗରିକଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ବିବାହ, ଛାଡପତ୍ର, ଉତ୍ତରାଧିକାର ଓ ପୋଷ୍ୟ ଗ୍ରହଣ ଭଳି ବିଷୟ ଉପରେ ସମାନ ଆଇନ ପାଇଁ ଏଥିରେ ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବ ଦେଉଛି। ବିଶେଷ ଭାବରେ ବହୁବିବାହ ଓ ତିନି ତଲାକ ଉପରେ ପ୍ରତିବନ୍ଧକ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଭୁକ୍ତ। ବିଜେପି ବର୍ଷ ବର୍ଷ ଧରି କହିଆସୁଛି ଯେ, ଜାତୀୟ ଏକତାକୁ ଅଧିକ ସୁଦୃଢ଼ କରିବା ଓ ଆଇନ ଆଗରେ ସମାନତା ପାଇଁ ୟୁସିସି ଜରୁରୀ।

title: Underweight Deliveries, Heavy Questions As Consumers Raise Red Flags
description: Deceiving to sell: Small weight discrepancies, missing product details, and recurring consumer complaints expose growing transparency gaps in quick commerce, raising questions about accountability and fair business practices.
content: Deceiving to sell: Convenience has quietly become an addiction. Why step out for everyday essentials when a quick commerce app can drop them at your door in minutes? But in the rush to make life easier, there is something we are not noticing — in the name of convenience, we may be buying health hazards too.That is exactly why Times Now Digital is running a consumer rights protection campaign, asking quick commerce platforms to be fair and transparent with their customers. One of the most hazardous and unethical practices we are flagging is the failure to clearly display the manufacturing and expiry dates of perishable products, among other lapses. Times Now Digital reached out to Zepto, Blinkit, Instamart, Flipkart Minutes, and Amazon to understand why manufacturing and expiry dates are not displayed on their platforms. None of them responded. On a basic consumer-safety question — what's the manufacturing date? When does it expire? So far, there has been no response to these basic consumer-safety questions. The campaign's core focus is transparency — and a big part of transparency comes down to a simple test: what you ordered versus what you get.We got in touch with some loyal customers of quick commerce platforms to find out whether they had run into transparency issues, recently or in the past, and whether those problems kept recurring. One regular user pointed to what they described as another major concern.In a recent incident under our investigation, the customer from the Delhi NCR area ordered vegetables from Zepto. When the order arrived, they grew curious because the carrots looked lighter than expected. On weighing them, they found the quantity was lower than what was listed on the platform: the carrots were supposed to weigh between 200 and 300 grams, but the package came in at just 196 grams.Although the discrepancy was not large, it was enough to raise concern. The customer then weighed the other vegetable packs in the order, and to their surprise, every one weighed less than the quantity listed on the platform.According to the customer, a pack of onions listed at between 900 grams and 1 kilogram weighed 859 grams. A pack of tomatoes listed at 500 grams weighed 460 grams, while a cucumber pack listed at between 500 and 600 grams weighed 490 grams.                          While the differences may appear small on a single order, the customer questioned whether consumers are consistently receiving the quantities they pay for and whether greater transparency is needed from quick commerce platforms.Issue Raised With The Zepto Support TeamWhen the issue was raised with the platform, and after several exchanges of messages and images, another problem came to light: the customer was unable to upload images directly to the platform due to an error. This too was flagged to the support executive, which ultimately led the customer to email the images to the Zepto support team.                          After a long discussion lasting about 25 minutes, the company offered a refund of Rs 45. The customer repeatedly questioned how a delivery in which the weight of the vegetables did not match the weight listed on the website could be settled with a refund alone. Not everybody is going to weigh their vegetables every day, the customer argued, and so such discrepancies may go unnoticed. The customer further pointed out that the issue was not limited to a single packet of vegetables.Despite these concerns, the support team maintained that it could only provide a refund and said the matter would be escalated to “higher authorities”.This is not the first time a quick commerce customer has faced such an issue. Several people have come forward on social media with similar complaints about the weight of fruits and vegetables on other platforms like Swiggy Instamart and Blinkit, among others.                        Similar Incidents Against Quick Comms Raised In PastPreviously, one customer shared his frustration with Blinkit on Reddit, alleging that he had received significantly less than the quantity he had paid for. He shared an image of a grape order and claimed the package weighed less than the amount listed on the platform, adding that he had encountered similar issues with Blinkit deliveries before. The user claimed that a 500 gm pack of grapes weighed just 395 grams, including the packaging.              In another incident, a Reddit user claimed that Swiggy Instamart had delivered underweight vegetables, sharing photos and screenshots of conversations with customer support. According to the user, several items in the order weighed less than the quantities listed on the platform: a cauliflower listed at 400–600 grams weighed just 145 grams, while a 250-gram capsicum pack weighed 170 grams and a 1-kg potato order weighed 965 grams.                          Pls check your Blinkit deliveries byu/Jusklickin inindiaGovernment Mandates For Quick Commerce PlatformsThe growing number of complaints about underweight fruit and vegetable deliveries raises serious questions about transparency and accountability in the quick commerce sector. While individual discrepancies may seem minor, but consumers argue that even small shortfalls can add up over time. And these concerns are not new.For at least the past two years, regulators such as the Central Consumer Protection Authority (CCPA) and the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) have urged e-commerce and quick commerce platforms to clearly display key consumer information, including expiry dates, accurate product weights and other essential details. Despite these directives, transparency-related issues continue to surface. The FSSAI recently said it had issued more than two dozen notices to e-commerce Food Business Operators (FBOs) in recent weeks.Yet many consumers still say they do not receive complete information, or the quantity they paid for, raising fresh questions about how effectively the rules are being enforced across the sector.A few grams of carrots. A Rs 45 refund. Easy enough to shrug off, until you multiply it across millions of orders, every single day. Convenience may be arriving at our doorstep in minutes, but the question worth weighing is this: how much are we quietly handing over in return?

title: Is passport just a travel document? Which paper proves you are Indian citizen | Explained
description: On 24th June 2026 MEA said that passport is just a travel document, it does not serve any guarantee of citizepship. Unlike countries such as the United States (which issues Certificates of Naturalization or Citizenship) or many European nations with robust civil registries, India does not issue a universal “Citizenship Certificate” .
content: On June 24 2026, the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) issued a clarification on Passport Seva Divas that sent ripples across social media and dinner tables alike: an Indian passport is primarily a travel document and should not be treated as standalone, conclusive proof of citizenship.For millions of Indians, this came as a shock. The passport emblazoned with the words “Republic of India,” issued only after rigorous verification, and accepted as proof of nationality by every country on the planet feels like the ultimate document of belonging. Yet, legally, the MEA is correct. This distinction reveals a deeper, often overlooked peculiarity of the Indian system: the world’s largest democracy has a clear law on who is a citizen but no universal document that conclusively proves it for the vast majority of its people.Citizenship as legal status, not piece of paperIndian citizenship is governed by Articles 5 to 11 of the Constitution and, more comprehensively, the Citizenship Act, 1955. It is acquired primarily through:Birth (with varying conditions depending on the date of birth)Descent (parentage)RegistrationNaturalisationIncorporation of territoryCrucially, the law defines citizenship as a status arising from facts when and where you were born, who your parents are, and whether they were citizens rather than possession of any single certificate.Unlike countries such as the United States (which issues Certificates of Naturalization or Citizenship) or many European nations with robust civil registries, India does not issue a universal “Citizenship Certificate” to people who are citizens by birth. Such certificates exist only for those who acquire citizenship later through registration or naturalisation under Sections 5 and 6 of the Act.For the overwhelming majority those born Indian citizenship is inferred from a web of supporting records.Also read: Passport citizenship proof or not? Govt clarifies stance on matter, cites Passports Act, Bombay HC 2013 decision - All details inside No single “magic document": Hierarchy of documents: Strong evidence vs. conclusive proofIn everyday life and international travel, the passport is one of the strongest pieces of evidence of Indian citizenship. It is issued only after the Passport Issuing Authority satisfies itself of the applicant’s citizenship. However, the Passports Act, 1967 (Section 20) allows the government to issue passports even to non-citizens in the public interest — for example, to certain stateless persons, Tibetan refugees, or Sri Lankan Tamils in special cases. Legally, therefore, possession of a passport does not irrevocably prove citizenship if the status is later challenged in court.Birth certificateOften treated as powerful evidence, especially for those born after universal registration improved. But even this has limits. For individuals born after July 1, 1987, the birth certificate alone is insufficient because citizenship depends on at least one parent (and after December 3, 2004, stricter conditions) being an Indian citizen. Courts have ruled that applicants must prove the parents’ citizenship status.Other common documentsAadhaar, Voter ID, PAN card, school certificates, land records, and ration cards are identity or residency documents. Successive governments and courts have consistently held that none of them are conclusive proof of citizenship. The Supreme Court has reiterated this in multiple contexts, including electoral roll revisions.What courts saidIndian courts have repeatedly emphasised that the burden of proving citizenship lies on the individual claiming it. In the landmark 2005 Sarbananda Sonowal case, the Supreme Court placed this responsibility squarely on the claimant. In a 2013 Bombay High Court ruling, even passports, Aadhaar cards, and birth certificates were deemed inadequate without proof of parental citizenship for post-1987 births.timesofindia.indiatimes.comDuring recent hearings on Bihar’s electoral roll revision, the Supreme Court noted that while passports and birth certificates carry higher evidentiary value than other documents, they are still not absolute in citizenship disputes.The NRC Chapter: India’s unfinished search for citizenship documentThe closest India came to solving this was the National Register of Citizens (NRC). Envisaged under the Citizenship Rules, 2003, the NRC aimed to create a national database of citizens and potentially issue linked identity cards. It was implemented only in Assam (2015–2019), where nearly 19 lakh people were excluded due to documentary gaps, spelling errors, and missing legacy records dating back to March 24, 1971.The exercise highlighted a painful reality: India’s civil registration system remains uneven. Millions of older citizens rely on inconsistent paperwork. Universal birth registration is relatively recent, and archival records are often incomplete.Why the debate persistsThe MEA clarification was not a new policy but a restatement of a long-standing legal position. Yet it struck a nerve because it exposed the gap between practical reality and legal precision. For daily life opening bank accounts, voting, travelling, or getting government services a passport, Aadhaar, or Voter ID works perfectly well. But in formal citizenship adjudication (tribunals, courts, or potential nationwide verification), the state looks at the underlying facts and a combination of evidence.This system has strengths: it avoids creating a rigid, exclusionary single-document regime that could disenfranchise millions due to poor record-keeping. But it also creates anxiety, especially for vulnerable groups, migrants, and those with weak documentation.Former officials and experts argue the real solution lies in strengthening civil registration universal, accurate birth and death records, better digitisation, and reliable family linkage databases rather than chasing a single citizenship card.In the end, Indian citizenship is not granted by a document; it flows from the Constitution and statute. Documents merely help prove it. The passport row is a reminder that in the world’s biggest democracy, belonging is defined less by what you carry in your pocket and more by the story of your birth, bloodline, and life lived on Indian soil backed, of course, by the best paperwork you can muster.For most Indians, that combination has been, and will likely remain, more than enough. But in an era of heightened scrutiny over borders and identity, understanding these legal nuances has never been more valuable.

title: Fasted 13 hours instead of 8-12 for a blood sugar test: Does it matter?
Apple hikes MacBook, iPad prices by 20-42 pc
description:
New Delhi, Jun 26: Apple has increased the starting prices of MacBook and iPad models by 20-42 per cent compared to their launch prices across the globe, including India, mainly due to higher memory chip costs.
The new price list on Apple India's website shows that the company has increased the price of the MacBook Pro built on the M5 series chip by about 20 per cent.
The price of the 14-inch MacBook Pro with the M5 Pro chip has been increased to Rs 2,99,900 apiece from the launch price of Rs 2,49,900 a unit.
There has been a sharp rise in the price of the iPad Air. The basic model in the 13-inch iPad Air has been increased by 41.22 per cent to Rs 1,19,900 apiece from Rs 84,900 a unit.
Counterpoint Research Co-founder and VP for Research, Neil Shah, said Apple's price hikes for the MacBook Neo, MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, iPad Air, and iPad Pro Wi-Fi follow the biggest change in the cost structure of the consumer and enterprise PC and tablet market, being shaped by the rising semiconductor chip pricing from memory to processors.
Apple, in a statement, said that the consumer electronics industry is facing an unprecedented challenge.
"The rapid expansion of AI data centres has created an extraordinary surge in demand for memory and storage. We have never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly.
"We have shielded our customers from these increases so far, but we have now reached a point where we need to begin raising prices on a number of products, including today's increases for iPad and Mac. We know this is not welcome news, and we are working tirelessly to find solutions," the statement said.
Price increases for consumer electronics are already widespread across the industry, with many products rising by 40 per cent or more.
Memory companies have been allocating an increasing share of their production to AI data centres, leaving the consumer electronics segment with constrained availability and rising costs.
Memory suppliers are reporting margins at historic highs.
Memory chip leader Micron reported 86 per cent gross margins, up from 15 per cent in just the past year.
"Apple, long regarded as the industry's benchmark for supply chain resilience, has begun passing higher component costs on to consumers. That is a strong signal that pricing pressures have reached a level that even the most sophisticated absorption strategies cannot fully offset," CyberMedia Research, VP - Industry Research Group, Prabhu Ram said.
Shah said Apple held the price increase for at least two quarters, protecting its user base from any price inflation, but it has reached a point beyond which Apple could absorb the cost increase.
"The unprecedented AI infrastructure growth has changed the semiconductor supply chain, driving insatiable demand for DRAM, NAND and Compute chips, not matching up to the capacity to produce and supply to other markets as AI infrastructure is prioritised. We believe the situation is not going to be better at least for the next two years," he said.
Shah said that the timing of the price increase is not ideal as Apple looks to push its revamped on-device Apple Intelligence later this year across devices demanding considerable memory and compute capabilities uplift.
"This could likely affect overall demand for Apple products in the coming months. However, this could also be a positive for Apple, especially for customers who are due for an update and want to buy a new Mac or iPad and can't delay the purchase, they will not compromise by paying extra for a lower configuration, instead buy a more premium version of Apple's portfolio. So, the market could shift towards the premium market as users look to get maximum value for the dollar spent," Shah said.

title: चंडीगढ़ के स्क्रैप मार्केट में भीषण आग, कई दुकानें और 20 वाहन जलकर खाक
description:
डड्डूमाजरा के टोगा रोड स्थित स्क्रैप मार्केट में मंगलवार को अचानक भीषण आग लग गई, जिससे इलाके में अफरा-तफरी मच गई।
The post चंडीगढ़ के स्क्रैप मार्केट में भीषण आग, कई दुकानें और 20 वाहन जलकर खाक appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
चंडीगढ़: डड्डूमाजरा के टोगा रोड स्थित स्क्रैप मार्केट में मंगलवार को अचानक भीषण आग लग गई, जिससे इलाके में अफरा-तफरी मच गई। आग ने देखते ही देखते विकराल रूप ले लिया और कई दुकानों को अपनी चपेट में ले लिया।
स्थानीय जानकारी के अनुसार, घटना स्थल पर खड़े करीब 20 वाहन भी आग की चपेट में आ गए और पूरी तरह जलकर खाक हो गए। स्क्रैप मार्केट में मौजूद पुराने वाहन और उनके स्पेयर पार्ट्स बड़ी मात्रा में रखे हुए थे, जो आग लगने के बाद तेजी से जल उठे।
Chandigarh’s scrap market fire
मौके पर पहुंची फायर ब्रिगेड की कई गाड़ियां
आग की सूचना मिलते ही फायर ब्रिगेड की कई गाड़ियां मौके पर पहुंचीं और घंटों की कड़ी मशक्कत के बाद आग पर काबू पाया गया। हालांकि तब तक दुकानों और वाहनों को भारी नुकसान हो चुका था। फिलहाल प्रशासन द्वारा आग लगने के कारणों की जांच की जा रही है। प्रारंभिक तौर पर शॉर्ट सर्किट या अन्य कारणों की संभावना जताई जा रही है, लेकिन आधिकारिक पुष्टि जांच के बाद ही होगी।
ये भी पढ़ें…

जिम में वर्कआउट करते 23 वर्षीय युवक की मौत, जानें एक्सरसाइज करते समय क्यों बिगड़ती है तबीयत?

The post चंडीगढ़ के स्क्रैप मार्केट में भीषण आग, कई दुकानें और 20 वाहन जलकर खाक appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

ऑपरेशन सिंदूर में 6 जवान हुए थे शहीद, सरकार ने सार्वजनिक किए बहादुर जवानों के नाम
description:
Six soldiers were martyred in Operation Sindoor: केंद्र सरकार ने पहली बार ‘ऑपरेशन सिंदूर’ के दौरान देश के लिए शहीद हुए छह बहादुर सैनिकों के नाम आधिकारिक रूप से सार्वजनिक किए हैं। इन सभी जवानों के नाम नेशनल वॉर मेमोरियल की वेबसाइट पर मौजूद ‘रोल ऑफ ऑनर’ सूची में जोड़े गए हैं। यह सूची उन.
The post ऑपरेशन सिंदूर में 6 जवान हुए थे शहीद, सरकार ने सार्वजनिक किए बहादुर जवानों के नाम appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
Six soldiers were martyred in Operation Sindoor: केंद्र सरकार ने पहली बार ‘ऑपरेशन सिंदूर’ के दौरान देश के लिए शहीद हुए छह बहादुर सैनिकों के नाम आधिकारिक रूप से सार्वजनिक किए हैं। इन सभी जवानों के नाम नेशनल वॉर मेमोरियल की वेबसाइट पर मौजूद ‘रोल ऑफ ऑनर’ सूची में जोड़े गए हैं। यह सूची उन सैनिकों को समर्पित है, जिन्होंने देश की रक्षा करते हुए अपने प्राणों की आहुति दी।
ऑपरेशन सिंदूर में शहीद होने वाले छह वीर जवानों के सूबेदार मेजर पवन कुमार, रायफलमैन सुनील कुमार, लांस नायक दिनेश कुमार, एवी मूद मुरलीनायक, हवलदार सुनील कुमार सिंह और सुरेंद्र कुमार का नाम शामिल है। नेशनल वॉर मेमोरियल की वेबसाइट पर मौजूद ‘रोल ऑफ ऑनर’ सेक्शन में अब कुल 26,626 शहीदों के नाम दर्ज हैं। इस सूची में वर्ष 1947-48 के भारत-पाक युद्ध से लेकर ऑपरेशन सिंदूर तक देश के लिए सर्वोच्च बलिदान देने वाले सैनिकों के नाम शामिल हैं।
पहली बार मिली आधिकारिक पुष्टि
मई 2025 में भारत और पाकिस्तान के बीच चार दिनों तक चले सैन्य संघर्ष के दौरान कुछ भारतीय जवानों के शहीद होने की खबरें सामने आई थीं। हालांकि, उस समय सरकार ने किसी भी जवान की पहचान सार्वजनिक नहीं की थी। अब नेशनल वॉर मेमोरियल की वेबसाइट पर इन नामों के शामिल होने के बाद पहली बार आधिकारिक रूप से पुष्टि हुई है कि ऑपरेशन सिंदूर में छह सैनिकों ने देश के लिए सर्वोच्च बलिदान दिया।
पहलगाम आतंकी हमले के बाद शुरू हुआ था ऑपरेशन
‘ऑपरेशन सिंदूर’ की शुरुआत 7 मई 2025 को की गई थी। यह कार्रवाई 22 अप्रैल 2025 को जम्मू-कश्मीर के पहलगाम में हुए आतंकी हमले के जवाब में की गई थी। इस हमले में 26 निर्दोष लोगों, जिनमें अधिकांश पर्यटक थे, की मौत हो गई थी। हमले के जवाब में भारतीय सशस्त्र बलों ने पाकिस्तान और पाकिस्तान के कब्जे वाले कश्मीर (पीओके) में स्थित आतंकियों के 9 ठिकानों पर सटीक सैन्य कार्रवाई की थी। इस दौरान जैश-ए-मोहम्मद और लश्कर-ए-तैयबा जैसे आतंकी संगठनों के ठिकानों और उनके बुनियादी ढांचे को निशाना बनाया गया।
भारत और पाकिस्तान के बीच यह सैन्य संघर्ष लगभग चार दिनों तक चला। इसके बाद पाकिस्तान की पहल पर दोनों देशों ने 10 मई 2025 को सैन्य कार्रवाई रोकने पर सहमति जताई थी। अब नेशनल वॉर मेमोरियल की ‘रोल ऑफ ऑनर’ सूची में इन छह वीर जवानों के नाम शामिल होने के साथ ही ऑपरेशन सिंदूर में उनकी शहादत को आधिकारिक सम्मान दिया गया है।
The post ऑपरेशन सिंदूर में 6 जवान हुए थे शहीद, सरकार ने सार्वजनिक किए बहादुर जवानों के नाम appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: Kasabian delay new album ‘Act III’ release and share G-Funk-inspired new single ‘Superpowers’ with Stephen Graham-starring trailer
description:
"We’ve had the album back on the operating table for a few final adjustments. We couldn’t send it out into the world without getting everything just right"
The post Kasabian delay new album ‘Act III’ release and share G-Funk-inspired new single ‘Superpowers’ with Stephen Graham-starring trailer appeared first on NME.
content:
Kasabian have delayed their new album ‘Act III’ and shared G-Funk-inspired new single ‘Superpowers’ – check it out below.

READ MORE: Serge Pizzorno on being fuelled by “imposter syndrome” and why new album ‘Act III’ is “all that’s great about Kasabian”

Their ninth studio LP was set to land on Friday July 17 but the band have now announced to their fans that it has been pushed back until September 4.
They wrote: “We’ve had the album back on the operating table for a few final adjustments. We couldn’t send it out into the world without getting everything just right, albums are forever! Trust us, it’ll be worth the wait.”
The band have also shared the latest taster from the record, ‘Superpowers’ which you can listen to below. Adolescence star Stephen Graham can also be seen reciting the lyrics from the song with Serge Pizzorno in a separate video, which you can also view below.



  










View this post on Instagram


























  










View this post on Instagram

























Speaking about working with Graham, Pizzorno said: “Audition tapes have always fascinated me. There’s something incredible about seeing a performance in its rawest form a behind the scenes glimpse into the craft of acting. I wanted to bring that feeling to life by turning the song’s lyrics into a script and presenting it as an audition tape.
“Getting to work with @stephengraham1973 one of Britain’s greatest actors, was a true honour. Watching him take the songs into a completely new space brought a whole new depth and meaning to the lyrics.”
Of the new track he added: “I remember hearing ‘Doggy Style’ by Snoop (Dogg) in my mate’s XR2, one of those tracks that makes you go ‘what?’ because you’ve never heard anything quite like it.
“When we recorded ‘Superpowers’ it was the first time I really felt like the sound that I could hear in my head, was what came out of the speakers.”
Kasabian CREDIT: Neil Bedford
Elsewhere, Pizzorno recently told NME the new album is “is all that’s great about Kasabian. It’s got Kasabian DNA running through it. It’s all the things that we’ve done in the past.”
Speaking about the track ‘Nothing Better Than This’, he added: “I just wanted to make something with that gnarly bass and you’d instantly know in four seconds, ‘That sounds like Kasabian’. I saw this meme of four upside-down bats that looked like goths dancing in a club. I wanted to make a song that they could dance to, so it’s got a weird goth edge to it.”
Meanwhile, Kasabian are due to play their biggest London headline show to date to 45,000 fans at Finsbury Park on July 4, and will also be the first ever Thursday night headliner at Leeds Festival this August.

They will also peform at Boardmasters, TRNSMT, Victorious Festival, Mad Cool, and more. Visit here for tickets and more information.
The post Kasabian delay new album ‘Act III’ release and share G-Funk-inspired new single ‘Superpowers’ with Stephen Graham-starring trailer appeared first on NME.

title: 'Cocktail 2' BO Day 8 [LIVE]: Eyes Rs 75 crore as 'Welcome to the Jungle' arrives
description: Homi Adajania's 'Cocktail 2', starring Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna, has closed out its first full week with a domestic net of Rs. 70.50 crore after a steady run of weekday declines: Rs. 6.75 crore on Day 5, Rs. 5.25 crore on Day 6, and Rs. 4.25 crore on Day 7. As the film enters into Day 8 the domestic net now stands at Rs. 71.39 crore, with the worldwide gross crossing Rs. 109.07 crore. The timing is significant as Akshay Kumar led multi-starrer comic caper, 'Welcome to the Jungle' has officially released today, June 26, with early reports suggesting a decent opening occupancy signalling the screen war between the two films is only just beginning.

The post ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଉଦ୍ୟମ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ରାଜନଗର,୨୬ା୬(ଭାସ୍କର ରାଉତରାୟ): ସମଗ୍ର ରାଜ୍ୟରେ କେଉଁଠି କେଉଁଠି ବେଆଇନ ବାଲି ଚାଲାଣକୁ ନେଇ ପୋଲିସ ପ୍ରଶାସନଙ୍କ ସହିତ ମାଫିଆଙ୍କର ମୁକାବିଲା ଏପରକି ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଭଳି ଅନେକ ଘଟଣା ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସୁଛି। ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ରାଜନଗର ଭଳି ଶାନ୍ତିପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଜାଗାରେ ବାଲି ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌କୁ ରାଜନଗର ହଂସୁଆ ପୋଲ ଉପରୁ ଅଟକାଇବା ସମୟରେ ରାଜନଗର ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ ଆକ୍ରମଣର ଉଦ୍ୟମ ଘଟଣା ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଆଲୋଡ଼ନ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଛି। ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାର ଆଶିଷ କୁମାର ଜେନା ରାଜନଗର ପୋଲିସ ଥାନାରେ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରିଛନ୍ତି।
ସୂଚନା ମୁତାବକ,  ଆଜି ସକାଳେ ଏକ ବାଲି ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ରକ ରାଜନଗର ହଂସୁଆ ସେତୁ ଉପରେ ଯାଉଥିବା ବେଳେ କୌଣସି ସୂତ୍ରରୁ ଖବର ପାଇ ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାର ଜେନା ଖବର ପାଇ ଉକ୍ତ ଟ୍ରକକୁ ଅଟକାଇଥିଲେ। କିନ୍ତୁ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌ଟି ରାଜନଗର ଗୁପ୍ତି ରାସ୍ତାରେ ଦ୍ରୁତଗତି ଯାଇ କାଠୁଆଗଣ୍ଡ ଗାଁ ରାସ୍ତାକୁ ଚାଲି ଯାଇଥିଲେ। ପାଖାପାଖି ରାଜନଗରରୁ ୧୨ କିଲୋମିଟର ଦୂରକୁ ଚାଲିଯାଇଥିଲା। ଏହି ଟ୍ରକ୍‌କୁ ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାର ପିଛା କରି କାଠୁଆଗଣ୍ଡ ଛକ ନିକଟରେ ଅଟକାଇଥିଲେ। ସେଠାରେ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌ରେ ଥିବା ଡ୍ରାଇଭର ଓ ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଉଦ୍ୟମ କରିଥିଲେ। ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାର ଜେନା ରାଜନଗର ପୋଲିସକୁ ଜଣାଇଥିଲେ। ପୋଲିସ ସେଠାରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିବା ପରେ ଡ୍ରାଇଭର ଫେରାର ହୋଇଯାଇଥିଲା। ପୋଲିସ ବାଲି ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ରକକୁ ଜବତ କରି ରାଜନଗର ଥାନାକୁ ଆଣିଥିଲେ। ପୋଲିସ ଜବତ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌ ଟିକେ କେଉଁ ଅଞ୍ଚଳର ? କେଉଁଠାକୁ ବାଲି ଯାଉଥିଲା ଏନେଇ ତଦନ୍ତ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଉଦ୍ୟମ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Investor Home Solutions Recognized as ‘Iconic Real Estate Consultant of the Year’ by ET Now Realty Awards 2026
description: The recognition as “Iconic Real Estate Consultant of the Year” reinforces Investor Home Solutions’ position as a leading real estate consultancy and highlights its contribution to the growth and transformation of India’s real estate sector.
content: Investor Home Solutions (IHS), a leading real estate consulting and advisory firm, has been honoured with the prestigious “Iconic Real Estate Consultant of the Year” award at the ET Now Realty Conclave & Awards 2026, held on Saturday at Taj Palace, New Delhi. The event is one of India’s most respected platforms recognizing excellence and innovation in the real estate industry. The award was received by Kanwar Pal Singh, Founder & CEO of Investor Home Solutions, whose visionary leadership, commitment to client success, and contribution to the real estate sector have helped establish the company as a trusted name among homebuyers and investors across India. The ET Now Realty Conclave & Awards brings together some of the most influential leaders, developers, consultants, investors, and policymakers from the real estate ecosystem. Receiving this recognition among the industry’s leading organizations is a significant milestone for Investor Home Solutions and reflects the company’s growing impact in the market. Speaking on the occasion, Kanwar Pal Singh, Founder & CEO, Investor Home Solutions, expressed his gratitude and said: “This award is not just a personal achievement but a recognition of the hard work, dedication, and passion of the entire Investor Home Solutions team. We are grateful to our clients, partners, and stakeholders who have trusted us throughout our journey. Our mission has always been to provide transparent, reliable, and result-oriented real estate solutions, and this recognition motivates us to continue raising industry standards.” Founded with a vision to simplify real estate investments and empower buyers with accurate market insights, Investor Home Solutions has emerged as a preferred real estate advisory partner for individuals, families, and investors seeking long-term value creation through property investments. The company has consistently focused on understanding customer needs and delivering personalized solutions that align with their financial goals and lifestyle aspirations. Over the years, Investor Home Solutions has built a strong reputation for its professional approach, market knowledge, ethical business practices, and customer-first philosophy. Through its dedicated team of real estate professionals, the company has successfully guided thousands of clients in making informed investment decisions across residential and commercial real estate segments. Under the leadership of Kanwar Pal Singh, Investor Home Solutions has witnessed remarkable growth and has expanded its presence across key real estate markets. The company’s success is driven by its ability to identify emerging opportunities, provide strategic investment guidance, and maintain a strong commitment to transparency and customer satisfaction. Investor Home Solutions believes that real estate is not just about buying and selling properties—it is about helping people build wealth, secure their future, and achieve their dreams. This philosophy has enabled the company to create long-term relationships with clients and earn their trust in an increasingly competitive marketplace. The recognition as “Iconic Real Estate Consultant of the Year” reinforces Investor Home Solutions’ position as a leading real estate consultancy and highlights its contribution to the growth and transformation of India’s real estate sector. As the industry continues to evolve, the company remains committed to leveraging technology, market intelligence, and customer-centric solutions to create exceptional value for its clients. With a clear vision for the future, Investor Home Solutions aims to further strengthen its market presence, expand its service offerings, and continue helping investors and homebuyers make smarter real estate decisions. About Investor Home Solutions (IHS) Investor Home Solutions (IHS) is a dynamic real estate consulting and advisory firm specializing in residential and commercial property solutions. The company offers end-to-end real estate services, including investment advisory, project marketing, property consulting, market research, and customer support. Led by Founder & CEO Kanwar Pal Singh, IHS is committed to delivering transparency, professionalism, and value-driven solutions that help clients achieve their real estate and investment objectives.(No ET Now Journalists are involved in creation of this article.)

title: BOOTES Recognised as "Emerging Leader in Net-Zero Real Estate" at Times Now Real Estate & Infrastructure Summit
description: Over the years, BOOTES has established itself as a pioneer in sustainable engineering andconstruction through the successful execution of several landmark projects.
content: BOOTES, India's first Net-Zero Engineering Company, has been recognised as the"Emerging Leader in Net-Zero Real Estate" at the Times Now Real Estate & InfrastructureSummit, reaffirming its commitment to building future-ready developments that combinesustainability, engineering excellence, and long-term value creation.The recognition comes at a time when the real estate sector is witnessing a fundamental shift.As urbanisation accelerates and climate concerns intensify, sustainability is no longer a nicheconsideration, it is becoming a critical requirement for the future of residential, commercial, andpublic infrastructure development.According to the International Energy Agency (IEA), buildings account for nearly 30% of globalenergy consumption and a significant share of carbon emissions. As governments, businesses,and citizens move towards net-zero goals, the role of real estate in shaping a sustainable futurehas never been more important.Speaking on the recognition, Deepak Rai, Managing Director, BOOTES, said: "The future ofreal estate will be defined by performance, responsibility, and long-term impact. Net-zerodevelopment is no longer a concept for tomorrow—it is a necessity for today. This recognitionreinforces our belief that sustainability and economic growth can, and must, go hand in hand. AtBOOTES, we remain committed to creating infrastructure and living environments that areefficient, resilient, and future-ready."Over the years, BOOTES has established itself as a pioneer in sustainable engineering andconstruction through the successful execution of several landmark projects. The company hasdelivered the world's first Net-Zero Library, the world's first Net-Zero Museum, and theworld's first Net-Zero Capable Cold Storage, demonstrating its ability to translate ambitioussustainability goals into operational reality.BOOTES has also achieved recognition for delivering projects that meet some of the higheststandards of building efficiency, including receiving Asia's highest building efficiencycertification from IFC, World Bank, reinforcing its position as a leader in sustainableinfrastructure development.Building on its engineering and sustainability legacy, BOOTES has expanded its footprint in theresidential real estate sector through BOOTES Aspire Leisure Valley in Greater Noida West,BOOTES Aspire Silicon City in Noida, and BOOTES Heights in Alwar, while also preparingfor future developments in Aligarh, Vrindavan and Bengaluru.In Noida and Greater Noida, BOOTES is introducing its philosophy of Health-First Living- aresponse to the growing need for healthier urban environments. Through innovations such asNordic fresh air technology, intelligent ventilation systems, and homes engineered to achieveindoor AQI levels below 50, the company aims to redefine how quality of life is experiencedwithin residential communities.As India advances towards its net-zero ambitions and sustainable urban development goals,BOOTES continues to champion a model where engineering, sustainability, and humanwell-being work together to create the next generation of real estate.The Times Now recognition marks another milestone in BOOTES' journey to redefine howbuildings are designed, constructed, and experienced, creating developments that are not onlybuilt for today, but engineered for the future(No ET Now Journalists are involved in creation of this article.)

title: Amazon’s $48 billion India AI bet: Can it turn the country into an innovation hub? | ET NOW EXCLUSIVE
description: Amazon's $48 billion AI investment in India has sparked debate over whether the country will emerge as an AI innovation hub or remain a consumer market, with experts discussing jobs, startups and data sovereignty.
content: Amazon’s announcement of a $48 billion investment in India has sparked a larger conversation about the country’s future in artificial intelligence (AI). While the investment reflects growing confidence in India’s technology ecosystem, experts remain divided on a key question: Will India emerge as a global AI innovator or continue to be a vast market for foreign AI products?In a discussion featuring cybersecurity expert Amit Dubey, Mozilla Foundation Fellow Jeebo Elias, and AI scientist Dr. Utpal Chakraborty, the focus remained on employment, AI infrastructure, startups, data sovereignty and whether such investments can genuinely strengthen India's AI capabilities.   https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GHHBVYk9f4IA vote of confidence in India's AI talentAccording to Amit Dubey, Amazon’s investment signals that global technology companies are beginning to see India as more than just a consumer market.For years, India has largely relied on AI tools and large language models developed overseas. While Indian users and businesses have actively adopted these technologies, most of the value creation has remained outside the country.Dubey believes the latest investment reflects confidence in India's engineering talent and entrepreneurial ecosystem. He said it could create fresh opportunities for startups, developers and young professionals to participate in building AI products rather than merely using them.Infrastructure alone won't determine successJeebo Elias offered a more measured perspective, arguing that large investments should be evaluated beyond their headline figures.He pointed out that India has also committed to purchasing significant amounts of technology from the United States over the coming years, making it important to assess the overall balance of benefits.According to him, three factors continue to attract global AI companies to India:A massive and growing digital marketA highly skilled technology workforceStrong long-term growth potentialHowever, Elias questioned whether these investments are primarily aimed at building India's AI capabilities or simply expanding infrastructure that supports global companies' operations.Do data centres create enough jobs?One of the major concerns raised during the discussion was the employment potential of AI infrastructure projects.Elias noted that although data centres require workers during construction, permanent employment generated after operations begin remains relatively limited. He argued that large AI data centres employ only a small number of people once they become operational.He also highlighted that many states offer incentives such as subsidised land, electricity and tax benefits to attract these projects. While such incentives encourage investment, he believes policymakers should carefully assess whether the long-term economic returns justify these concessions.The bigger question: Will India build its own AI?For Elias, the real challenge is not attracting foreign investment but ensuring India develops its own AI ecosystem.He stressed that future leadership in AI will depend on who controls the underlying technology, infrastructure and platforms rather than simply who uses AI applications.Despite ongoing efforts to develop indigenous AI models, many Indian developers and businesses continue to depend heavily on global AI platforms. He believes future investments should help Indian researchers, entrepreneurs and students build competitive domestic AI models instead of increasing dependence on foreign technologies.Stronger data infrastructure could benefit IndiaAmit Dubey sees another significant advantage emerging from increased investments in AI infrastructure.He observed that for years, a large portion of India's data has been stored outside the country due to limited domestic infrastructure. Expanding local data centres could improve compliance with data protection regulations while allowing sensitive data to remain within India's borders.He added that India possesses one of the world's richest datasets across sectors such as healthcare, logistics and finance. If supported by domestic AI infrastructure, this data could become a major strength in developing home-grown AI solutions.State governments have an important roleDubey also believes state governments can play a much larger role in nurturing India's AI ecosystem.He suggested creating AI-focused technology zones, offering tax incentives, providing startups with access to GPUs, affordable computing infrastructure and subsidised data centres. Since developing advanced AI models requires enormous computing resources, reducing these costs could help more Indian startups compete globally.According to him, infrastructure investment is only the first step. Long-term success will depend on building an ecosystem that encourages innovation and commercialisation of AI technologies developed within India.Global companies and startups can grow togetherAI scientist Dr. Utpal Chakraborty presented a balanced outlook, saying the arrival of global technology companies should not be viewed as a threat to Indian startups.He explained that the AI ecosystem requires multiple layers, from foundational large language models to specialised small language models, AI agents and industry-specific applications. In such an ecosystem, multinational firms and startups can complement each other rather than compete directly.Chakraborty also pointed to the growing funding activity in India's startup ecosystem, noting that promising AI companies continue to attract investments and acquisitions. In his view, the increasing presence of global technology firms could accelerate the overall development of India's AI industry.

title: Agra | নালার ভেতরে কেক কেটে জন্মদিনের উৎসব! ‘স্মার্ট সিটি’ আগ্রার বেহাল দশা নিয়ে অভিনব প্রতিবাদ কাউন্সিলরের
description:
উত্তরবঙ্গ সংবাদ অনলাইন ডেস্ক: তাজমহলের শহর আগ্রা (Agra), যাকে ‘স্মার্ট সিটি’ হিসেবে পরিচিতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। সেই শহরেরই এক জনপ্রতিনিধিকে দেখা গেল নালার দুর্গন্ধযুক্ত জলের মধ্যে দাঁড়িয়ে জন্মদিন পালন করতে। শুনতে অবাক লাগলেও, নিকাশি ব্যবস্থার চরম দুর্দশার বিরুদ্ধে এমনই অভিনব প্রতিবাদ জানালেন আগ্রার বিজেপি কাউন্সিলর কিষাণ নায়েক (Kishan Nayak)। ঘটনাটি ঘটেছে আগ্রার নাগলা ধানি, নিউ বিজয় […]
The post Agra | নালার ভেতরে কেক কেটে জন্মদিনের উৎসব! ‘স্মার্ট সিটি’ আগ্রার বেহাল দশা নিয়ে অভিনব প্রতিবাদ কাউন্সিলরের appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.
content:
উত্তরবঙ্গ সংবাদ অনলাইন ডেস্ক: তাজমহলের শহর আগ্রা (Agra), যাকে ‘স্মার্ট সিটি’ হিসেবে পরিচিতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। সেই শহরেরই এক জনপ্রতিনিধিকে দেখা গেল নালার দুর্গন্ধযুক্ত জলের মধ্যে দাঁড়িয়ে জন্মদিন পালন করতে। শুনতে অবাক লাগলেও, নিকাশি ব্যবস্থার চরম দুর্দশার বিরুদ্ধে এমনই অভিনব প্রতিবাদ জানালেন আগ্রার বিজেপি কাউন্সিলর কিষাণ নায়েক (Kishan Nayak)।
ঘটনাটি ঘটেছে আগ্রার নাগলা ধানি, নিউ বিজয় নগর কলোনিতে। ভাইরাল হওয়া ভিডিওতে দেখা গেছে, নোংরা নালার জল জমে থাকা এক জায়গায় একটি গোল টেবিল রাখা হয়েছে। তার ওপর সাদা টেবিলক্লথ বিছিয়ে রাখা হয়েছে জন্মদিনের কেক। দুর্গন্ধযুক্ত নালার জলেই দাঁড়িয়ে কাউন্সিলর কিষাণ নায়েক তাঁর জন্মদিন পালন করছেন, যা একাধারে উৎসব এবং অন্যদিকে প্রশাসনের বিরুদ্ধে এক জোরালো প্রতিবাদের ভাষা।
কাউন্সিলরের অভিযোগ, স্থানীয় নিকাশি নালার পরিষ্কারের জন্য তিনি পুরসভার কাছে ১২ বার লিখিত আবেদন জানিয়েছেন। বর্ষা আসার আগেই শহরের সমস্ত নর্দমা পরিষ্কার করার প্রতিশ্রুতি দিয়েছিল মিউনিসিপ্যাল কর্পোরেশন। কিন্তু বারবার অভিযোগ করার পরেও তাঁর নিজের ওয়ার্ডের এই নালাটি পরিষ্কার করার কোনো উদ্যোগ নেওয়া হয়নি। একপ্রকার নিরুপায় হয়েই স্থানীয়দের নিয়ে তিনি এই প্রতীকী প্রতিবাদের পথ বেছে নেন।
জন্মদিনের অনুষ্ঠানে উপস্থিত জনতা নালার ভেতরেই কাউন্সিলরকে গাঁদা ফুলের মালা পরিয়ে এবং মাথায় গোলাপি পাগড়ি পরিয়ে সংবর্ধনা জানান। সেই সঙ্গে “পার্ষদজি জিন্দাবাদ” এবং “পার্ষদজি সংঘর্ষ করো, হাম তুমহারে সাথ হ্যায়” স্লোগানে এলাকা মুখরিত হয়ে ওঠে। কোথাও কোথাও “জয় ভীম” স্লোগানও শোনা গেছে। কেক কাটার সময় উপস্থিত মানুষজন হাততালি দিয়ে তাঁকে সমর্থন জানান।
সোশ্যাল মিডিয়ায় এই ঘটনার ভিডিও ছড়িয়ে পড়তেই তা নিয়ে তীব্র চাঞ্চল্য তৈরি হয়েছে। পর্যটকদের কাছে আকর্ষণীয় এই স্মার্ট সিটির (Smart City) নিকাশি ব্যবস্থার এই বেহাল দশা এবং এক কাউন্সিলরের এই অদ্ভুত প্রতিবাদের ছবি এখন আলোচনার কেন্দ্রবিন্দুতে।
The post Agra | নালার ভেতরে কেক কেটে জন্মদিনের উৎসব! ‘স্মার্ট সিটি’ আগ্রার বেহাল দশা নিয়ে অভিনব প্রতিবাদ কাউন্সিলরের appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.
