title: সাৱধান ! ডেংগু ভাইৰাছক ৰোধিবলৈ নাই কোনো ঔষধ
description:
ডিজিটেল ডেস্ক: বাৰিষা মানেই সেউজীয়া প্ৰকৃতি, শীতল বতাহ আৰু বৰষুণৰ আনন্দ। এই সকলোবোৰৰ লগতে বাৰিষাই কঢ়িয়াই ডেংগুৰ বিপদ। হয়, প্ৰতি বছৰে বাৰিষা আৰু ইয়াৰ পিছৰ সময়ছোৱাত সমগ্ৰ ভাৰতত ডেংগুৰ সংক্রমণ উদ্বেগজনকভাৱে বৃদ্ধি পায়। বিশ্ব স্বাস্থ্য সংস্থাৰ তথ্য অনুসৰি, বিগত দুটা দশকত বিশ্বজুৰি ডেংগুৰ ৰোগীৰ সংখ্যা বহুগুণে বৃদ্ধি পাইছে আৰু ভাৰত এই ৰোগত সৰ্বাধিক আক্ৰান্ত দেশসমূহৰ ভিতৰত অন্যতম। ডেংগুৰ বাবে এতিয়াও কোনো নিৰ্দিষ্ট এন্টিভাইৰেল চিকিৎসা উপলব্ধ নহয়। সেয়েহে এই ৰোগৰ পৰা সুৰক্ষিত থাকিবলৈ প্ৰতিৰোধ, আগতীয়াকৈ লক্ষণ চিনাক্তকৰণ আৰু সময়মতে উপযুক্ত চিকিৎসা গ্ৰহণ কৰাটোৱেই আটাইতকৈ ফলপ্ৰসূ উপায়।

গ্ৰীষ্মৰ দিনকেইটাত মহবোৰৰ অতি দ্ৰুতগতিত বংশ বৃদ্ধি হয় আৰু মানুহক সংক্ৰমিত কৰে। আমি সকলোয়ে জ্ঞাত যে, এডিছ মহৰ কামোৰৰ ফলত ডেংগু জ্বৰ হয়। ই হৈছে এক ফ্লু-সদৃশ ৰোগ, যি ডেংগু ভাইৰাছৰ ফলত হয়। ৰাজীৱ গান্ধী জৈৱ প্ৰযুক্তি কেন্দ্ৰত কৰা এক অধ্যয়নত এইটোও প্ৰকাশ পাইছে যে তাপমাত্ৰা বৃদ্ধি হোৱাৰ লগে লগে ডেংগুৰ আশংকা বৃদ্ধি হয়। আজি ডেংগুৰ লক্ষণ তথা প্ৰতিৰোধৰ উপায়ৰ বিষয়ে জানো আহক-
ডেংগুৰ লক্ষণ
ডেংগুৰ প্ৰধান লক্ষণ হৈছে জ্বৰ। কিন্তু এই জ্বৰ কিশোৰ তথা শিশুৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত সহজে চিনাক্ত কৰিব নোৱাৰি। ডেংগুত ১০৪ ফাৰেনহাইট ডিগ্ৰীৰ জ্বৰ হয়। ইয়াৰ বাহিৰেও আন লক্ষণকেইটা হৈছে- 
-মূৰৰ বিষ।
- পেশী, হাড় আৰু গাঁঠিৰ বিষ।
-অসুস্থ অনুভৱ কৰা।
- বমি।
- চকুৰ পিছফালে বিষ।
- গ্ৰন্থি ফুলা।
- ছালত ৰঙা দাগ।
ডেংগুৰ কাৰণ
ডেংগু-পীড়িত এলেকাত বাস কৰা
যদি আপুনি এনে এলেকাত বাস কৰে য'ত এডিছ মহৰ প্ৰাদুৰ্ভাৱ অধিক, তেতিয়া আপোনাৰ ডেংগু সংক্ৰমিত হোৱাৰ সম্ভাৱনা যথেষ্ট বৃদ্ধি হয়।
পূৰ্বৰ সংক্ৰমণ
আগতে ডেংগু হোৱা লোকসকল ভাইৰেল সংক্ৰমণৰ পৰা মুক্ত নহয়। এনে পৰিস্থিতিত তেওঁলোকৰ দ্বিতীয়বাৰৰ বাবে ডেংগুত আক্ৰান্ত হোৱাৰ সম্ভাৱনা অধিক বৃদ্ধি হয়।
দুৰ্বল ৰোগ প্ৰতিৰোধ ক্ষমতা
যিসকল লোকৰ ৰোগ প্ৰতিৰোধ ক্ষমতা দুৰ্বল, তেওঁলোকৰ ডেংগু হোৱাৰ সম্ভাৱনা অধিক।বৃদ্ধ লোকসকলৰ এই ৰোগ হোৱাৰ সম্ভাৱনা অধিক হয়।আনহাতে, ডায়েবেটিচ, হাঁওফাঁওৰ ৰোগ আৰু হৃদযন্ত্ৰ সম্পৰ্কীয় ৰোগৰ আশংকা বৃদ্ধি হয়।
প্লেটলেটৰ সংখ্যা কম
যেতিয়া ভুক্তভোগীৰ তেজত প্লেটলেটৰ সংখ্যা হ্ৰাস হ'বলৈ আৰম্ভ কৰে, তেতিয়া ডেংগুৰ আশংকা বৃদ্ধি হয়। 
কিদৰে প্ৰতিৰোধ কৰিব ডেংগু ?
মহৰ প্ৰজনন ক্ষেত্ৰ নিষিদ্ধ কৰা
ডেংগুৰ প্ৰাথমিক উৎস হৈছে এডিছ মহ। যিয়ে স্থিৰ পানীত প্ৰজনন কৰে। আপোনাৰ ঘৰত মহৰ প্ৰজননৰ আশংকা হ্ৰাস কৰিবলৈ পানী ভৰ্তি ঠাইবোৰ তৎক্ষণাৎ পৰিস্কাৰ কৰক।নিয়মিয়াকৈ নলা আৰু পানী নিষ্কাশন পাইপো চাফা কৰি থাকিব।
কীটনাশক ব্যৱহাৰ কৰিব
ছালত মহ নিবাৰণকাৰী প্ৰয়োগ কৰি মহৰ কামোৰাৰ সম্ভাৱনা যথেষ্ট হ্ৰাস কৰিব পাৰে। যদি আপোনাৰ এলেকা বা ঘৰত অধিক মহ আছে, তেনেহ'লে মহ প্ৰতিৰোধক ব্যৱহাৰ কৰিব। মনত ৰাখিব যে সেইবোৰত যাতে ডিইইটি, পিকাৰিডিন, চাইট্ৰোনেলা আৰু নেমু ইউকেলিপ্টাছ তেল অন্তৰ্ভুক্ত থাকে।
দীঘল হাতৰ কাপোৰ পিন্ধিব
সদায়েই ঘৰৰ কলোয়ে দীঘল হাতৰ চাৰ্ট, দীঘল পেণ্ট পৰিধান কৰিব। পাতল ৰঙৰ কাপোৰেও মহক আপোনাৰ পৰা আঁতৰাই ৰাখে।সেয়েহে, পৰাপক্ষত পাতল ৰঙৰ কাপোৰ পিন্ধিব।
খিৰিকী-দুৱাৰ বন্ধ ৰাখিব
ঘৰত মহ প্ৰৱেশ কৰা প্ৰতিহত কৰিবলৈ খিৰিকী আৰু দুৱাৰ বন্ধ ৰখাৰ লগতে শোওতে আঠুৱা ব্যৱহাৰ কৰিব। ই মহৰ পৰা সুৰক্ষা লাভ কৰাৰ সৰ্বশ্ৰেষ্ঠ উপায়। আনহাতে, ঘৰৰ ভিতৰত শীতল পৰিৱেশ বজাই ৰাখিবলৈ ফেন বা এয়াৰ কণ্ডিচনিং ব্যৱহাৰ কৰিব কিয়নো ঠাণ্ডা বতৰত মহৰ কাৰ্যকলাপ হ্ৰাস হয়। 
অত্যাধিক বাহিৰলৈ যোৱা পৰিহাৰ কৰিব
সন্ধিয়া মহ আটাইতকৈ সক্ৰিয় হয়, সেয়েহে এনে সময়ত পানী ভৰ্তি হোৱা ঠাইলৈ নাযাব।যদি বাহিৰলৈ যোৱাৰ বিশেষ প্ৰয়োজন হয়, সম্পূৰ্ণ হাতৰ কাপোৰ পিন্ধিব আৰু মহ প্ৰতিৰোধক প্ৰয়োগ কৰিব।

title: ‘The Odyssey’ won’t hold social media influencer screenings, heading straight to critics
description:
Recent blockbusters have shown films to influencers first to generate word of mouth
The post ‘The Odyssey’ won’t hold social media influencer screenings, heading straight to critics appeared first on NME.
content:
Christopher Nolan’s The Odyssey will be avoiding social media influencer screenings, instead going straight to critics, according to a new report.

READ MORE: ‘The Odyssey’ could be Christoper Nolan’s biggest blockbuster yet

The Oscar winner’s follow-up to Oppenheimer is one of the most anticipated films of the year, and stars Matt Damon in an adaptation of Homer’s epic poem about the leader of an army’s journey home from war. Co-starring Robert Pattinson, Anne Hathaway, and Tom Holland among others, it wowed audiences with its first footage reveal earlier this year.
Now, The Hollywood Reporter is sharing that the film will avoid the now-customary influencer screenings that come before the film is shown to critics. Typically, online influencers are shown the film at the premiere or an early screening, then allowed to post short reactions on social media, which are usually more enthusiastic and less intricate than critics’ reviews. However, the practice has been met with growing scepticism by audiences, given some overly generous reactions to movies that were ultimately poorly received by critics and the public.

It also reflects the traditional release process preferred by Nolan, who is a champion of the theatrical experience and insists on extended cinema runs for his movies, as well the option for them to be shown on film rather than digital projectors. The Odyssey is in cinemas from July 17.
Recently, cast member Lupita Nyong’o responded to racist backlash about her being cast as Helen Of Troy in the blockbuster epic. “I’m very supportive of Chris’s intention with it and with the version of this story that he is telling,” she told Elle. “Our cast is representative of the world. I’m not spending my time thinking of a defence. The criticism will exist whether I engage with it or not.”
Elsewhere, the film unveiled its tie-in popcorn bucket, which is shaped like the mythical trojan horse from the story.
The post ‘The Odyssey’ won’t hold social media influencer screenings, heading straight to critics appeared first on NME.

title: ‘Grand Theft Auto 6’ physical release delayed by “months”
description:
You’ll be able to buy a code in a box at launch
The post ‘Grand Theft Auto 6’ physical release delayed by “months” appeared first on NME.
content:
Grand Theft Auto 6 is getting a proper physical release, but you’ll be waiting for “months” to get your hands on it.

READ MORE: The best games to play while you wait for ‘Grand Theft Auto 6’

Earlier this week, pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto 6 finally went live with fans able to buy one of two different editions of the long-awaited game. The standard version of Grand Theft Auto 6 will set you back £69.99 while the Ultimate edition is priced at £89.99.
Retailers are also offering a physical edition of Grand Theft Auto 6 but publishers Take-Two Interactive have confirmed that at launch, this will just be a download code in a box.
One fan emailed Rockstar about this, and was told that Grand Theft Auto 6 will be released as a physical disc at a later date. “Thank you for contacting Rockstar Support. Please note that the current pre-order is indeed just for a digital-only update. You will be able to acquire a physical copy during the following months,” they wrote (via Vice).

Rockstar Support confirmed that GTA 6 physical disc copies will be available in the months following launch.
“You will be able to acquire a physical copy during the following months.”
The current physical pre-orders are for the digital code-in-box version. pic.twitter.com/wdk1dAmXJZ
— GTA 6 Info (@GTASixInfo) June 25, 2026

Earlier this year it was reported that Rockstar would be delaying the physical release of GTA 6 to combat leaks. However Take-Two boss Strauss Zelnick said it wasn’t “the plan” to delay the physical release of Grand Theft Auto 6. However in April, a group of hackers blackmailed the game studio after acquiring a “limited amount” of staff data and last month, a YouTuber was questioned by police after they were caught snooping around Rockstar’s HQ in Edinburgh.
According to insiders, the physical version of Grand Theft Auto 6 could release a few weeks after the game’s launch on November 19 but others are saying it’ll come in early 2027. There’s still no news on a PC release for the game either. 
Several retailers have said they’re going to boycott the launch of GTA 6 over the lack of physical disc. “When we started Loot Box Gaming, it was out of a love for our favourite form of media, gaming, as well as the preservation of said media,” wrote one store on X. “If a product can’t honour the people who pay their hard earned money to purchase it, then we have no business trying to sell it to our customers whom we value above anything else.”
Fans are also frustrated that Rockstar Games is making several in-game stores and cosmetics exclusive to players who buy the more expensive Ultimate edition. 
In other news, Olivia Rodrigo has brought third album ‘You Seem Pretty Sad For A Girl In Love’ to Fortnite. “I’ve always loved how Fortnite brings people together in a really specific way,” Rodrigo said in a statement. “It’s exciting to have my music brought into this world and to have players embrace different looks from my albums.”
The post ‘Grand Theft Auto 6’ physical release delayed by “months” appeared first on NME.

title: ୩୦ ବର୍ଷ ସଂଘ ପରେ ୬୩ ପରିବାରକୁ ମିଳିଲା ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ଜମି ପଟ୍ଟା

The post ୩୦ ବର୍ଷ ସଂଘ ପରେ ୬୩ ପରିବାରକୁ ମିଳିଲା ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ଜମି ପଟ୍ଟା appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁର,୨୬ା୬(ଦୁର୍ଗା କୀର୍ତ୍ତି): କଳାହାଣ୍ଡି ଜିଲା ଥୁଆମୂଳ ରାମପୁର ବ୍ଲକ କର୍ଲାପାଟ ପଞ୍ଚାୟତର ଅଣ-ସର୍ଭେ ଗ୍ରାମ ସେମେଲପଦରର ୬୩ଟି ବନବାସୀ ପରିବାରକୁ ବହୁ ପ୍ରତୀକ୍ଷିତ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ଜମି ପଟ୍ଟା ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଜିଲା ପରିଷଦ ସମ୍ମିଳନୀ କକ୍ଷରେ ଆୟୋଜିତ ଏକ ସ୍ବତନ୍ତ୍ର ସଭାରେ ରାଜ୍ୟ ରାଜସ୍ବ ଓ ବିପର୍ଯ୍ୟୟ ପରିଚାଳନା ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ସୁରେଶ ପୂଜାରୀ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଅତିଥି ଭାବେ ଯୋଗଦେଇ ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀଙ୍କୁ ଏହି ଅଧିକାର ପତ୍ର ବଣ୍ଟନ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ଅବସରରେ ଜୁନାଗଡ଼ ବିଧାୟକ କ୍ୟାପଟେନ ଦିବ୍ୟଶଙ୍କର ମିଶ୍ର, ଧର୍ମଗଡ଼ ବିଧାୟକ ସୁଧୀର ରଞ୍ଜନ ପାଟ୍ଟଯୋଷୀ, ଜିଲାପାଳ ପାଓ୍ବାର ସଚିନ, ଭବାନୀପାଟଣା ଉପଜିଲାପାଳ ପ୍ରଭାତ ପରିଡ଼ା, ଧର୍ମଗଡ ଉପଜିଲାପାଳ ପ୍ରେକ୍ଷା ଅଗ୍ରଓ୍ବାଲଙ୍କ ସମେତ ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ ବରିଷ୍ଠ ଅଧିକାରୀମାନେ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଥିଲେ। ସେମେଲପଦର ଗ୍ରାମର ୬୯ଟି ପରିବାର ନିଜ ଭିଟାମାଟିର ଆଇନଗତ ଅଧିକାର ପାଇଁ ଦୀର୍ଘ ୩୦ ବର୍ଷରୁ ଅଧିକ ସମୟ ହେବ ସଂଘର୍ଷ କରିଆସୁଥିଲେ। ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ଅଧିକାର ଆଇନ ୨୦୦୬ ଲାଗୁ ହେବା ପରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ପ୍ରଶାସନିକ ନାଲିଫିତା ତଳେ ଏହି ଦାବି ଚାପି ହୋଇ ରହିଥିଲା। ୧୯୯୫ ମସିହାରୁ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ସ୍ବେଚ୍ଛାସେବୀ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ‘ଅନ୍ତୋଦୟ’ ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀଙ୍କୁ ଆଇନଗତ ସହାୟତା ଓ ତାଲିମ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରି ଏହି ଲଢ଼େଇରେ ସହଯୋଗ କରିଆସୁଛି। ଶେଷରେ ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ବିଭାଗର ସମସ୍ତ କଟକଣା ପରେ ୬୩ଟି ପରିବାର ସମୁଦାୟ ୧୭୪.୬୨୩ ଏକର ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ଜମିର ମାଲିକାନା ପାଇଛନ୍ତି। ଗ୍ରାମସଭା ଦ୍ୱାରା ସମସ୍ତ ୬୯ଟି ପରିବାରର ଦାବି ଅନୁମୋଦିତ ହୋଇଥିଲେ ସୁଦ୍ଧା, ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ ପାରମ୍ପରିକ ବନବାସୀ ଶ୍ରେଣୀର ୬ଟି ‘ଲୋହରା’ ପରିବାରର ପଟ୍ଟା ଜିଲାସ୍ତରୀୟ କମିଟି ନିକଟରେ ଏବେ ବି ବିଚାରାଧୀନ ଅଛି।
ସେହିପରି ବୈଷୟିକ ତ୍ରୁଟି ଓ ପ୍ରଶାସନିକ ଅବହେଳା ଯୋଗୁ ଗ୍ରାମର ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀଗତ ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ଜମି ପଟ୍ଟା ମଧ୍ୟ ମିଳିପାରି ନାହିଁ ଏବଂ ଗ୍ରାମକୁ ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ‘ରାଜସ୍ବ ଗ୍ରାମ’ର ମାନ୍ୟତା ମିଳିନାହିଁ। ତେବେ ଏସମ୍ପର୍କରେ କିଛି ସଫଳତା ମିଳିଛି ସତ, କିନ୍ତୁ ପ୍ରଶାସନିକ ଅବହେଳା ଯୋଗୁ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀଗତ ଅଧିକାର, ବାକି ୬ ପରିବାରଙ୍କ ପଟ୍ଟା ଏବଂ ରାଜସ୍ବ ଗ୍ରାମ ମାନ୍ୟତା ମିଳିବା ବାକି ଅଛି। ତେଣୁ ଏହି ସଂଘର୍ଷ ଏବେ ଅଧା ସଫଳ ହୋଇଛି। ବୋଲି ଅନ୍ତୋଦୟ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠାନ
ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଦିଲୀପ କୁମାର ଦାସ ଗଣମାଧ୍ୟମ ଆଗରେ କ୍ଷୋଭର ସହ ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିଛନ୍ତି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ୩୦ ବର୍ଷ ସଂଘ ପରେ ୬୩ ପରିବାରକୁ ମିଳିଲା ଜଙ୍ଗଲ ଜମି ପଟ୍ଟା appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

Callum Design reinvents Jaguar XJ220 for new era
description:
Ian Callum's design consultancy is poised to reveal its take on the legendary supercar

The eponymous consultancy of acclaimed car designer Ian Callum has reinvented the Jaguar XJ220. 
The new take on the XJ220 has yet to be revealed in full, but a side-profile image published by Callum Design showcases a dramatically different styling direction compared with the original. 
It is notably sharper around its haunches and there is a greater slope at its rear end. 
However, several cues remain intact, including the egg-shaped side windows and air ducts along its flanks.
Callum Design described the reimagined XJ220 as a “concept” and a “design study”, emphasising that there are no concrete plans to build a road-going car. But it added that the project “shows what’s possible” when working with the company, suggesting that a client with enough cash to spend could commission their own car.
The reworked XJ220 is expected to be revealed in full in the coming months. October marks the 35th anniversary of the production XJ220’s unveiling at the Tokyo motor show and that could provide Callum Design a fitting opportunity to celebrate the supercar.
Ian Callum, who was director of design at Jaguar from 1999 to 2019, has in recent years put his own spin on several historic cars. These include the Wood and Pickett Mini and the Aston Martin Vanquish – the latter of which he also originally designed. His consultancy has also been responsible for building a road-legal version of the Jaguar C-X75 concept, the ill-fated successor to the XJ220 and a car originally created while he was Jaguar's design chief.

description: Samsung is rumoured to launch the Galaxy Ring 2 in early 2027
content: Apple is reportedly developing a smart ring, dubbed "iRing." The leak is brief and does not include features of the launch timeline for this product. The new model is likely to rival the popular Oura Ring series and Samsung Galaxy Ring. Samsung launched its first smart ring, the Galaxy Ring, in 2024. It costs Rs. 38,999 and is available in nine sizes. Apple's smart ring is expected to offer many health and fitness tracking features.

title: Mutual Fund Returns in 10 Years: Top Small cap, mid cap & large cap - Check which category gave highest returns in long term
description: Mutual Fund Returns in 10 Years: A long-term comparison of mutual fund categories shows how small cap, mid cap and large cap funds have performed over the last 10 years. The analysis highlights which category delivered the highest returns.
content: Mutual Fund Returns in 10 Years: Mid Cap funds invest in equity and equity-related instruments of Mid Cap companies. According to the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI), Mid Cap companies are those that are ranked between 101 and 250 in the list of companies according to market capitalisation. Small cap funds invest a major portion of their investible corpus into equity or equity-related instruments of small-cap companies. A Small Cap Fund is an open-ended equity mutual fund scheme that, in accordance with SEBI guidelines, invests a minimum of 65% of its total assets in equity and equity-related instruments of small cap companies. Also, SEBI defines small-cap companies as those that are ranked below the 250th rank in terms of market capitalisation.Large Cap Mutual Funds are equity funds that invest a bigger proportion of their total assets in companies with a large market capitalisation. According to SEBI, large cap companies fall in the top 100 of the list of companies according to market capitalisation.Read more: Mutual fund investment plan: Mid cap vs small cap mutual fund - Which fund category delivered better returns in 15 years? title: Apple Said to Skip M6 Pro, M6 Max Processors to Prioritise Development of AI-Focused M7 Chipsets
description: Apple's M5 Max and M5 Pro chips power the new MacBook Pro models
content: Apple is revamping its Apple Silicon strategy, according to a report citing people with knowledge of the matter. The company reportedly plans to skip the launch of the M6 Pro and M6 Max processors, which were expected to launch early next year. Instead, the iPhone maker is expected to unveil the rumoured M7 Pro and M7 Max chips. Apple’s high-end M7 series processors are said to debut in 2027. The Apple Silicon M7 Pro and M7 Max chips are claimed to offer more advanced computing and graphics power, which will enable on-device AI capabilities in the future, while allowing them to run more graphics-intensive tasks.

title: Renault 4 and 5 due extra power and range in 2027
description:
New ‘Gen 2 Evo’ motors made their debut with the Twingo but will be soon be rolled out in larger cars

The Renault 4 and 5 will be updated next year, bringing more efficient and more powerful motors.
The R5 arrived in 2024, and it was followed by the R4, its crossover twin, in early 2025. Both models are based on the AmpR Small platform and use Renault’s second-generation externally excited-synchronous (EESM) motors, which are available in two configurations. 
The R5 Urban Range pairs a 121bhp EESM with a 40kWh battery, while the Comfort Range gets a 148bhp motor and a 52kWh battery pack. In the UK, the larger R4 is only available with the Comfort Range set-up.
These powertrains enable the R5 to deliver a range of either 192 or 252 miles. The latter figure is reduced to 250 miles in the chunkier R4.

Renault is now ready to roll out updated ‘Gen 2 Evo’ motors for the two models, drawing on its learnings from developing third-generation drive units for the next Scenic and Megane that are due in 2028.
“We are still working on how to improve the efficiency and power [of the Gen 2 motors],” said Marianne Bataillon, Renault’s director of EV motor and battery development. “We are going to apply these [changes] at the end of 2026 or beginning of 2027.”
Bataillon highlighted the motor’s inverter and reducers as points of improvement that have netting greater efficiency and improved power outputs.
The new motors will help to keep the R4 and R5 on a par with newer rivals on technical terms. The incoming Volkswagen ID Polo outdoes the R5 in the range stakes, offering either 204 or 283 miles between charges, depending on which powertrain it is fitted with. The same is true of the new Skoda Epiq: it yields either 190 or 272 miles of range, with the higher figure beating the R4.
Renault’s new Gen 2 Evo motor made its debut in the Twingo, which arrives in the UK at the end of this year. In that car, however, its output is reduced to 80bhp, owing to its city-focused remit.

title: Deep-red Idaho just realized Trump’s immigration policy is lethal for its $20 billion dairy industry
description: A Boise State poll of 1,000 Idaho adults finds 85% support a legal working status pathway for long-term dairy workers — with Republican support at 79%
content:
Under the second Trump administration, the United States has seen mass deportations and a sharp escalation in immigration enforcement. The Department of Homeland Security says the crackdown pushed nearly 3 million people out of the country in Trump’s first year back in office.



For the first time since the 1960s, the number of immigrants living in the U.S. is declining; because most farmworkers are foreign born, those losses are already beginning to strain American farms.



We are social scientists who study immigrant communities in Idaho and the challenges farmworkers face. We also run an annual survey exploring public opinion on a range of policy issues, including immigration and economic conditions. Amid the government’s heated rhetoric, our data shows public opinion on immigration in one of the country’s reddest agricultural states is diverging from national politics and may even be at odds with federal policy.



Immigrant labor in agriculture



According to the Center for Migration Studies, 86% of farmworkers in the U.S. are foreign born, and 45% are undocumented. In 2025 the Trump administration suggested it would not target farms. Still, farmworkers across the country are scared to go to work.



Between March and July 2025, the agricultural workforce declined by 7%, with farms reporting labor shortages in states that voted for Trump, including Pennsylvania, and states that didn’t, including California. Meanwhile, immigration crackdowns are threatening this country’s food security.



National polling on the administration’s immigration policies tends to follow party lines, drawing Democrats’ disapproval and Republicans’ support, but recent polling suggests some softening among the latter. Pew Research Center reported that half of all respondents disapprove of the administration’s approach to immigration, and more than half say Trump is “doing too much” when it comes to deportation. Among Republicans the share is smaller – 20% – but rising.



Research suggests people think about immigration differently at the local level. To explore how public opinion on immigration varies in farm-dependent states, we looked at one of the most agriculture-reliant and Republican states in the country just as its farms face policy-driven labor shortfalls.



A worker carries a crate of freshly picked corn through the field. Immigrant workers make up a large share of the U.S. agricultural workforce. Hill Street Studios/DigitalVision via Getty Images



A closer look



Agribusiness is important for Idaho’s economy, accounting for 20% of its annual GDP, according to the Idaho State Department of Agriculture. Dairy is a cornerstone: The state is the fourth-largest milk producer in the U.S., according to the Idaho Dairymen’s Association. Ninety percent of Idaho dairy workers are foreign born.



Idaho is also a deeply red state: About 60% of voters are registered Republicans, and 67% voted for Trump in 2024. These numbers make Idaho a clear test of how national rhetoric and intensifying immigration enforcement track with public sentiment in places that have the most to lose.



Our 11th annual Idaho Public Policy Survey polled 1,000 adults in the fall of 2025. Because immigrants have lower crime rates than native-born Americans, we designed a question around long-term residents without a criminal record – specifically, dairy workers and their families who have lived in Idaho more than 10 years.



The results showed broad support for a pathway to legal working status for them: 85% of respondents were in favor, with 56% strongly supportive and 29% somewhat. Just 9% opposed. We expected immigration positions to tie directly to political affiliation, but results cut across party lines, with 79% of Republicans, 88% of independents and 95% of Democrats in favor.









We also asked participants whether increased presence from U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, or ICE, would help or harm Idaho’s agricultural economy. More than half – 53% – said it would harm the economy, 19% said it would help, 18% said there would be no impact, and 10% were unsure.



The pattern was sharpest where it would matter most: Residents of agriculture-dependent regions were more likely to say ICE presence would hurt the economy. Republicans were more likely than others to say it would help; even so, only 35% of Republicans responded that way, compared with 11% of independents and less than 3% of Democrats.









In agriculture-dependent Idaho, many residents say they recognize the role immigrants play in sustaining local rural economies, and research shows that recognition can shift attitudes about immigration, potentially increasing support for more inclusive policies.



According to our research, public opinion in Idaho is more nuanced than the right-left divide suggests. We believe findings here are likely to hold in other places similarly dependent on agriculture, as farmers from Wisconsin to Delaware speak up about their reliance on immigrant labor.



Lisa Meierotto, Associate Professor of Global Studies and Environmental Studies, Boise State University; Matthew May, Research Scholar, Boise State University, and Rebecca Som Castellano, Director of Human-Environment Systems and Professor of Sociology, Boise State University



This article is republished from The Conversation under a Creative Commons license. Read the original article.


This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟିରେ ବଡ଼ ହଲଚଲ: ମହାସଚିବଙ୍କ ସମେତ ୨ଜଣଙ୍କ ଇସ୍ତଫା
description:
ଲକ୍ଷ୍ନୌ,୨୬।୬: ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ଦାନ ଚୋରି ମାମଲାର SIT ତଦନ୍ତ ପରେ ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁ ହୋଇଛି। ଏହି ପରିପ୍ରେକ୍ଷୀରେ ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ତୀର୍ଥ କ୍ଷେତ୍ର ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟର ସାଧାରଣ ସମ୍ପାଦକ ଚମ୍ପତ ରାୟ ଏବଂ ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟି ଅନିଲ ମିଶ୍ର ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଇସ୍ତଫା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଦାନ ଚୋରି ଅଭିଯୋଗ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଚମ୍ପତ ଅନିଲ ଉଭୟଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ଇସ୍ତଫା ଦେବାକୁ ଚାପ ପଡ଼ିଥିବା ସୂଚନା ମିଳୁଛି। ତେଣୁ ଉଭୟ ନୈତିକତା ଦୃଷ୍ଟିରୁ ଇସ୍ତଫା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ଦାନ ଚୋରି ମାମଲାରେ […]
The post ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟିରେ ବଡ଼ ହଲଚଲ: ମହାସଚିବଙ୍କ ସମେତ ୨ଜଣଙ୍କ ଇସ୍ତଫା appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଲକ୍ଷ୍ନୌ,୨୬।୬: ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ଦାନ ଚୋରି ମାମଲାର SIT ତଦନ୍ତ ପରେ ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁ ହୋଇଛି। ଏହି ପରିପ୍ରେକ୍ଷୀରେ ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ତୀର୍ଥ କ୍ଷେତ୍ର ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟର ସାଧାରଣ ସମ୍ପାଦକ ଚମ୍ପତ ରାୟ ଏବଂ ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟି ଅନିଲ ମିଶ୍ର ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଇସ୍ତଫା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଦାନ ଚୋରି ଅଭିଯୋଗ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଚମ୍ପତ ଅନିଲ ଉଭୟଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ଇସ୍ତଫା ଦେବାକୁ ଚାପ ପଡ଼ିଥିବା ସୂଚନା ମିଳୁଛି। ତେଣୁ ଉଭୟ ନୈତିକତା ଦୃଷ୍ଟିରୁ ଇସ୍ତଫା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି।
ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ଦାନ ଚୋରି ମାମଲାରେ SIT ରିପୋର୍ଟ ପରେ, ୮ଜଣଙ୍କ ନାଁରେ ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁ ହୋଇଛି। ପୋଲିସ ଅଟକ ରଖିବା ପରେ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରିଥିବା ସୂଚନା ମିଳିଛି। ଏପରକି ସମସ୍ତ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ଅପରାହ୍ନରେ କୋର୍ଟରେ ହାଜର କରାଯିବ। ହେଲେ ଆଜି ମହରମ ଯୋଗୁ କୋର୍ଟ ଛୁଟି ଥିବା ବେଳେ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତମାନଙ୍କୁ ମାଜିଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଟ୍‌ଙ୍କ ସମ୍ମୁଖରେ ହାଜର କରାଯିବ।
ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷେ ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ଦାନ ଚୋରି ମାମଲାରେ ଏଫଆଇଆର ପରେ, ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଯୋଗୀ ଆଦିତ୍ୟନାଥ ଏକ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ବୟାନ ଜାରି କରିଛନ୍ତି। ସେ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଉପରେ ସରକାର ତୁରନ୍ତ ଏକ ସ୍ବତନ୍ତ୍ର ତଦନ୍ତ ଦଳ(ଏସଆଇଟି) ଗଠନ କରିବାକୁ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଏସଆଇଟି ତଦନ୍ତ କରି ଏହାର ରିପୋର୍ଟ ଦାଖଲ କରିଛି, ଏବଂ ତୁରନ୍ତ ମାମଲା ପଞ୍ଜିକୃତ ହୋଇଛି। ଯେଉଁମାନେ ଜନସାଧାରଣଙ୍କ ବିଶ୍ୱାସ ସହିତ ହେରଫେର କରନ୍ତି ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ଛଡ଼ାଯିବ ନାହିଁ। ଅଯୋଧ୍ୟା ହିନ୍ଦୁ ବିଶ୍ୱାସର ପ୍ରତୀକ। ବିଶ୍ୱାସ ସହିତ ହେରଫେର ଗ୍ରହଣୀୟ ନୁହେଁ ବୋଲି ଯୋଗୀ କହିଛନ୍ତି।
The post ରାମ ମନ୍ଦିର ଟ୍ରଷ୍ଟିରେ ବଡ଼ ହଲଚଲ: ମହାସଚିବଙ୍କ ସମେତ ୨ଜଣଙ୍କ ଇସ୍ତଫା appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Here’s Brandon Flowers’ wistful new solo single ‘Plans’
description:
His upcoming third solo album, ‘Thrasher’, was recorded in Nashville 
The post Here’s Brandon Flowers’ wistful new solo single ‘Plans’ appeared first on NME.
content:
Brandon Flowers has returned with a new solo single, ‘Plans’ – listen below.

Read More: Brandon Flowers talks new solo and Killers music – and the power of Springsteen and Oasis
The twangy, wistful song will appear on the Killers frontman’s third solo album, ‘Thrasher’, which is released on August 21 via Island.
‘Thrasher’ marks Flowers’ first solo full-length effort in over a decade,  following 2015’s ‘The Desired Effect’ and his 2010 debut ‘Flamingo’.
Arriving today (Friday June 26), first track ‘Plans’ sees the singer lean heavily into an Americana, old school country-tinged sound – far from the synth-pop sonics of his previous LP.
Some fans are comparing the track to the slow-burning, contemplative latest Killers album, 2021’s ‘Pressure Machine’.
“So hold me in your arms / I think I’m going under / Take your time with my heart / It’s been rattled by the thunder,” he sings over acoustic guitar, pedal steel and some rich female backing vocals, making way for lush strings.

Reflecting on some ill-fated dreams, Flowers adds: “Of the all you got engine / Always bound for the big show / Drowning out the plans I drew up years ago.”
Recorded in Nashville, ‘Thrasher’ was made with Flowers’ longtime producers Shawn Everett and Jonathan Rado, as well as guitarist David Rawlings, pedal steel player Bruce Bouton, and 85-year-old Charlie McCoy (the harmonica player who featured on all four of Bob Dylan’s Nashville records).
The upcoming collection focuses on Flowers’ early years, spending his childhood in the small town of Nephi, Utah. He looks back on how his father would drive him around the countryside listening to Johnny Cash and Waylon Jennings on the record.
‘Thrasher’ is said to find the vocalist at his most personal and vulnerable, delving into a chapter of his life that he’s rarely written about before, and reminiscing about these formative years.

  










View this post on Instagram


























“As I’ve gotten older, I’ve found my way back to my father’s music – ‘Country-Western’ (as he called it) – and discovered that the stories I carry really feel most at home in the skin of this beautiful American tradition,” Flowers explained.
He’ll showcase ‘Thrasher’ on a UK, Ireland and North American solo tour later this year. The trek includes a show at the historic Royal Albert Hall in London in October. Tickets for the UK and Ireland dates go on general sale on at 10am BST next Friday (July 3) – you’ll be able to buy yours here.
Speaking to NME last year, the singer discussed plans for two new solo albums, describing the first as more of a “step backwards” from ‘The Desired Effect’.

“It’s more in the ‘Flamingo’ direction,” he told us. “I made two South West records, if you want to know the truth. One is a romantic South West record, and the other is a narrative South West record which picks up where ‘Pressure Machine’ left off.

“I’m thrilled about both of them, and they’ll both come out before the next Killers record – but I’m thrilled about the next Killers record.”
As for future material from The Killers, Flowers said it was “a little too early to say” what the band’s next batch of songs would sound like. However, he revealed that they wouldn’t be returning to the slick, synth-y style of standalone singles ‘Boy’ and ‘Your Side Of Town’ (both produced by Stuart Price).
“We will not put it out unless it is the best,” he told NME. “We’ve already discussed it. It’s gotta be so good or it’s not worth it.” He then confirmed that the new music would feature “all four members”, after they reunited for the 2024 song ‘Bright Lights’.

The post Here’s Brandon Flowers’ wistful new solo single ‘Plans’ appeared first on NME.

title: দালালক ধন দি ঘৰত বহি থাকিলে এতিয়াৰে পৰা নাপাব ড্ৰাইভিং লাইচেঞ্চ....
description:
এখন ড্ৰাইভিং লাইচেঞ্চৰ বাবে কেতিয়াবা এগৰাকী লোকে বাটকুৰি বাই বহুদিন পৰিবহন বিভাগৰ কাৰ্যালয়লৈ অহাৰ বিপৰীতে এচামে বক্ৰপথেৰে এদিনতেই সম্পাদন কৰে লাইচেঞ্চৰ সকলো যাৱতীয় কাম। কেতিয়াবা এনে ঘটনাও হয় যে, ড্ৰাইভিং লাইচেঞ্চৰ গৰাকীয়ে কাৰ্যালয়লৈ নহাকৈও তেওঁৰ নামত ইচ্ছ্যু হৈ যায় অনুজ্ঞা পত্ৰ। 
এনে বহু বাতৰি প্ৰায়ে হয়তো আপুনিও পায়। সাধাৰণ ৰাইজৰ বিপৰীতে এচাম অসাধু চক্ৰই এই ব্যৱস্থাটোত মেলা দুৰ্নীতিৰ এই জালখনক লৈ সাধাৰণ জনতাৰ মাজত লাহে লাহে তীব্ৰ অসন্তুষ্টি বৃদ্ধি পাইছিল। বিষয়টোৰ গুৰুত্বতা আৰু বৃদ্ধি পোৱা দুৰ্নীতিক লৈয়ে এই ব্যৱস্থাটোৰ সলনি কৰাৰ যোজা চলাইছে অসম চৰকাৰে।
অসম চৰকাৰৰ পৰিবহন মন্ত্ৰী চৰণ বড়োৱে ২৬জুন, ২০২৬ত ৰাজ্যৰ পৰিবহন ব্যৱস্থা আৰু ড্ৰাইভিং লাইচেঞ্চৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত আনিবলগীয়া পৰিৱৰ্তনৰ কথা ঘোষণা কৰে। মন্ত্ৰীগৰাকীয়ে লগতে এই কথাও স্বীকাৰ কৰে যে, শেহতীয়াকৈ পৰিবহন ক্ষেত্ৰত তথা ড্ৰাইভিং লাইচেঞ্চ প্ৰদানৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত সৃষ্টি হোৱা ভিন্ন অনিয়মৰ বাবেই এনে সিদ্ধান্ত গ্ৰহণ কৰিছে বিভাগে।
এতিয়া মূল কথাটো হৈছে, কি কি ক্ষেত্ৰত পৰিৱৰ্তন আনিব বিচাৰিছে অসম চৰকাৰৰ পৰিবহন বিভাগে?  পৰিবহন মন্ত্ৰী চৰণ বড়োৱে ঘোষণা কৰা অনুসৰি, এতিয়াৰে পৰা যিগৰাকী প্ৰাৰ্থীয়ে ড্ৰাইভিং লাইচেঞ্চৰ বাবে আবেদন কৰে, তেওঁৰ ড্ৰাইভিং টেষ্ট বাধ্যতামূলক। ইয়াৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত কঠোৰভাৱে সকলোকে নিয়ম পালন কৰিবলৈ নিৰ্দেশ প্ৰদান মন্ত্ৰী বড়োৰ।
ইয়াৰ লগতে আবেদন কৰা প্ৰাৰ্থীগৰাকী যিখন জিলাৰ নিৱাসী, সেই জিলাখনতহে আবেদন কৰিব পাৰিব লাইচেঞ্চৰ বাবে। এতিয়াৰে পৰা অন্য এখন জিলাত গৈ এগৰাকী প্ৰাৰ্থীয়ে কৰিব নোৱাৰিব কৰিব নোৱাৰিব আবেদন। পৰিবহন মন্ত্ৰীগৰাকীয়ে অতি শীঘ্ৰেই ই ৰিক্সাৰ বাবেও নতুন নিয়ম প্ৰৱৰ্তন কৰাৰ কথা ঘোষণা কৰে। 
এইখিনিতে উল্লেখ কৰা প্ৰয়োজন যে, লাইচেঞ্চৰ বাবে আবেদন কৰোতে এগৰাকী প্ৰাৰ্থীয়ে দুটা স্তৰ অতিক্ৰম কৰিব লাগে।
ইয়াৰে প্ৰথম স্তৰত প্ৰাৰ্থীগৰাকীক প্ৰদান কৰা হয়-  লাৰ্নাৰ লাইচেঞ্চ (Learner's Licence - LL)। 


অনলাইন আবেদন আৰু পৰীক্ষা: 'সাৰথি' (Sarathi) প'ৰ্টেলৰ জৰিয়তে আবেদন কৰি ঘৰতে বহি বা RTO অফিচত কম্পিউটাৰত এক 'যাতায়ত নিয়ম'ৰ (Traffic Rules) পৰীক্ষা দিব লাগে।


বৈধতা: লাৰ্নাৰ লাইচেঞ্চৰ ম্যাদ ৬ মাহ থাকে।


নিয়ম: লাৰ্নাৰ লাইচেঞ্চ থকা অৱস্থাত বাহন চলালে বাহনৰ সন্মুখত আৰু পিছফালে ৰঙা ৰঙৰ 'L' আখৰটো লিখি ৰাখিব লাগিব। লগতে, বাহনখনত এজন স্থায়ী লাইচেঞ্চ থকা ব্যক্তি বহি থকাটো বাধ্যতামূলক।


লাইচেঞ্চ প্ৰদানৰ দ্বিতীয় স্তৰ: স্থায়ী ড্ৰাইভিং লাইচেঞ্চ (Permanent DL)


লাৰ্নাৰ লাইচেঞ্চ লাভ কৰাৰ ৩০ দিনৰ পিছৰ পৰা ১৮০ দিনৰ ভিতৰত স্থায়ী লাইচেঞ্চৰ বাবে আবেদন কৰিব পাৰি।


ড্ৰাইভিং টেষ্ট- RTO অফিচ বা নিৰ্ধাৰিত ট্ৰেকত নিজৰ বাহন লৈ গৈ ড্ৰাইভিং টেষ্ট পাছ কৰিব লাগিব। তাত বিফল হ’লে ৭ দিনৰ পিছত পুনৰ পৰীক্ষা দিব পাৰি।


এইদৰে  কেইবাতৰপীয়া নিয়মৰ মাজেৰে এগৰাকী লোকক ড্ৰাইভিং লাইচেঞ্চ প্ৰদান কৰা হয় যদিও অসমত প্ৰায়বোৰ পৰিবহন বিভাগৰ কাৰ্যালয়ত এই নিয়ম মানি চলা নহয়। শেহতীয়াকৈ পৰিবহন মন্ত্ৰীৰ এই কঠোৰ সিদ্ধান্তই কিদৰে এই ব্যৱস্থাটোৰ পৰিৱৰ্তন সাধন কৰে, সেয়া সময়তহে দেখা যাব।

title: Bitcoin Trades Below $61,000 as Crypto Investors Grapple With Inflation Worries
description: Bitcoin rebounds after a sharp selloff as crypto markets face renewed volatility
content: Bitcoin traded near $60,400 on Friday after hotter-than-expected US inflation data triggered a sharp selloff across crypto markets. Analysts said nearly $600 million in liquidations, continued institutional caution, and a $10 billion options expiry have heightened near-term volatility, although the slowdown in Bitcoin ETF outflows suggests selling pressure may be easing.

title: US LLC vs Indian Company: What Founders Get Wrong
description: A US LLC and an Indian private limited company solve different problems. Confusing the two is one of the costliest mistakes a founder can make early.
content: Ask a room of Indian founders why they set up a company in Delaware, and most give a version of the same answer: it was easier. Easier to raise, easier to get paid, easier than dealing in India. Very few can tell you what it cost them - or whether they needed a US company at all. The choice between a US LLC and an Indian company gets made fast, often in a single afternoon, usually before anyone understands what each one actually does. India doesn’t have an LLC. That confuses people from the start. The limited liability company is an American invention. India never adopted it. The nearest local cousin is the LLP, the limited liability partnership, and the workhorse for anyone building something fundable is the private limited company. So “US LLC versus Indian company” is not a like-for-like swap. It is a choice between registering a business in a foreign country and registering one at home, with everything - tax, banking, who is allowed to invest - flowing from that one decision. Founders rarely frame it that way. They ask which is cheaper to set up. Wrong question. The cost of forming either is the smallest number in the entire equation. Why so many leave The pulls are real. A US entity opens doors that an Indian freelancer or small company keeps finding shut. Stripe, the payment processor much of the internet runs on, is currently invite-only in India and onboards only registered businesses, not individuals. Some overseas clients simply prefer paying a US vendor. Foreign investors, when they show up, tend to want a structure they recognise, and a cleaner cap table than an Indian proprietorship can offer. Setting up the US company is also inexpensive and fully remote. An Indian citizen can own one outright with no visa, no US visit, and no Social Security number. According to LLCBuddy, which tracks LLC formation requirements and costs across all of the US, state filing fees currently run from about $35 to $500. Add a registered agent and an EIN, and many founders are operating for a few hundred dollars. Steve Goldstein, who runs LLCBuddy and has spent years documenting how these rules and costs shift from one state to the next, is the person behind its state-by-state figures, which the site compiles from primary sources such as Secretary of State filings. That front door is the part almost everyone gets right. It is everything behind it that founders tend to skip. What a US LLC actually is - and isn’t A single-member US LLC is, by default, what current US tax rules treat as a disregarded entity. It pays no separate federal corporate tax of its own; the profit is instead reported and taxed on the owner’s return. That sounds like a tax win. For the right person, it can be. But a US LLC is a US business structure, not a flag you plant to escape Indian tax. If you live in India, you are generally an Indian tax resident, and India taxes residents on their worldwide income. The LLC does not change where you live. It does not make your earnings disappear from your Indian return. What it often adds is a second set of books in a second country. The annual upkeep is modest but real - a registered agent to keep, a state report to file in many states, the odd federal form - and it varies enough that two near-identical companies can pay very different sums over a decade depending only on where they registered, a pattern Steve Goldstein’s state-by-state data at LLCBuddy lays out plainly. None of this is a dealbreaker. It is not the zero-maintenance fairy tale the tutorials sell. The bill an Indian owner signs up for This is the part the afternoon-decision crowd misses. Once you, a resident Indian, own a foreign company, India’s rules apply to you in ways they did not before. Money you send abroad to fund or run that company falls under the Reserve Bank’s Liberalised Remittance Scheme, which currently caps outward remittance at $250,000 per person per financial year. Holding and investing in a foreign entity can trigger reporting under India’s overseas investment framework, where a single missed filing can currently carry a late fee that starts around ₹7,500 and climbs. And every year, a resident holding foreign assets is generally required to declare them on the tax return. Miss that, and a separate anti-black-money law attaches its own penalties. None of this makes a US company the wrong choice. It is just a bill worth understanding before you commit, not after. The case for staying home The Indian private limited company has quietly become a strong option, and the gap with offshore has narrowed. A domestic company can currently elect a concessional corporate tax rate of 22 per cent - roughly 25.17 per cent once surcharge and cess are added - which is competitive by any global measure. Newer, smaller companies currently sit at 25 per cent or below. The old dividend distribution tax is gone; dividends are now taxed in the shareholder’s hands. More to the point, this is where the money is. Indian venture capital is built to fund private limited companies, not LLCs - institutional investors generally avoid the pass-through structure altogether. If your plan involves raising from Indian funds, or listing in India, the Indian company is the structure those routes are built around. And for the very small, India is now unusually generous. Under the current new regime, individual income up to ₹12 lakh can attract no income tax. A solo professional can often skip the company entirely: presumptive taxation lets them book half of gross receipts as profit, without keeping detailed records, on up to ₹50 lakh in receipts - ₹75 lakh if nearly all of it is digital. Those are the current thresholds. For a one-person operation, that may beat the cost and paperwork of any company, foreign or domestic. So which one is actually yours? Strip away the noise and the decision comes down to three questions: where are your customers, where is your money coming from, and where do you pay tax. Want only to get paid in dollars? You may be overbuying. A foreign-currency receiving account, or a domestic company, moves the same money with far less to maintain. That changes when your clients are American firms that insist on a US vendor, or you need Stripe’s billing stack, or a US fundraise is on the horizon - there, the US LLC earns its keep. Raising from Indian investors, or planning to list in India? The Indian company is the structure those plans typically require. Which one fits depends on your situation. The questions do not. The mistake is not choosing the US LLC. The mistake is choosing it by default, to solve a problem - receiving a payment - that an Indian structure or a simple foreign-currency account would have solved without the second tax jurisdiction. The most expensive lesson The founders who got this wrong are now easy to find, because they are paying to undo it. In 2025, Razorpay completed a “reverse flip,” moving its parent company from the United States back to India ahead of a planned listing - and reportedly paid about ₹1,245 crore in tax to do it. PhonePe’s move from Singapore reportedly came with a tax bill close to $1 billion. These are large companies with armies of advisers, and the homecoming still cost them a fortune. You will not pay ₹1,245 crore. But you can pay the small version of the same bill - in fees, in filings, in a structure that never fit - for a company you chose before you understood why. Pick the country first. The rest follows from that.(No ET Now Journalists are involved in creation of this article.)

title: NCERT's New Class 9 Textbook Cites Manusmriti, Says Women's Status Later Declined

title: US interested in hosting 2038 World Cup - Giuliani
description: The United States could consider making a bid to host the men's 2038 World Cup, with Fifa considering expanding the tournament to 64 teams.

title: Adrian Dunbar confirms ‘Line of Duty 7’ filming was stopped
description: Filming for the highly anticipated 'Line of Duty 7' has been temporarily halted, actor Adrian Dunbar confirmed. The production pause was a direct consequence of recent riots in Belfast, which the star attributed to external influences and social media agitation. The upcoming season, penned by Jed Mercurio, will feature a six-episode run with returning stars Vicky McClure and Martin Compston. Production had commenced in March before the disruption.

title: Fire: ବଲାଙ୍ଗିର ସହରରେ ନିଆଁ ଲାଗି ଜଳିଗଲା କୋଟି କୋଟି ଟଙ୍କାର ସମ୍ପତ୍ତି
description:
ବଲାଙ୍ଗିର: ନିଆଁ ଲାଗି ଜଳିଗଲା କୋଟି କୋଟି ଟଙ୍କାର ସମ୍ପତ୍ତି । ବଲାଙ୍ଗିର ସହରର ଗାନ୍ଧୀନଗର ପଡ଼ା ଫିସେରୀ ଅଫିସ ସମ୍ମୁଖରେ ଥିବା ଜଳରାମ ମାର୍କେଟ କମ୍ପ୍ଲେକ୍ସରେ ନିଆଁ ଲାଗି ପାଖାପାଖି ୮ ଗୋଟି ଦୋକାନର କୋଟି କୋଟି ଟଙ୍କାର ସମ୍ପତ୍ତି ଜଳି ପୋଡ଼ି ଛାରଖାର ହୋଇଯାଇଥିବା ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳିଛି । ମାର୍କେଟ କମ୍ପ୍ଲେକ୍ସରେ ଥିବା ଇଭି ସର୍ଭିସ ସେଣ୍ଟର, ହିରୋ ସ୍ପେୟାର ପାର୍ଟସ୍‌, ଫର୍ଣ୍ଣିଚର୍, ଔଷଧ ଦୋକାନ, ମିଠା ଦୋକାନ, ଟୁ ହ୍ୱିଲର ସର୍ଭିସ ସେଣ୍ଟର ଭଳି ଦୋକାନ ଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଥିଲା । ହଠାତ୍ ଭୋର୍‌ରୁ ମାର୍କେଟ କମ୍ପ୍ଲେକ୍ସ ମାଲିକ ଧୂଆଁ ବାହାରୁଥିବା ଦେଖି ଦୋକାନ ମାଲିକ ମାନଙ୍କ ସହ ଦମକଳ ବାହିନୀକୁ ଖବର ଦେଇଥିଲେ ।
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ: Indian Citizenship: ଭାରତୀୟ ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ଫେରିପାଇଲେ ୯୪ ବର୍ଷୀୟା ବୃଦ୍ଧା: ଆମେରିକା ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ତ୍ୟାଗ କରି ଗାଁକୁ ଫେରିଲେ
ସଙ୍ଗେ ସଙ୍ଗେ ଦମକଳ ବାହିନୀ ଘଟଣା ସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ନିଆଁକୁ ଆୟତ୍ତ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରୟାସ କରିଥିଲା । ନିଆଁ ଏତେ ଜୋର ଲାଗିଥିଲା ଯେ ଇଭି ସର୍ଭିସ ସେଣ୍ଟରରେ ଯେତେ ସବୁ ଗାଡ଼ି ଥିଲା ଓ ସ୍ପେୟାର ପାର୍ଟସ୍‌ ସେଣ୍ଟର ଓ ଫର୍ଣ୍ଣିଚର୍ ଦୋକାନ ସାମଗ୍ରୀ ସବୁ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଜଳି ପଡ଼ି ଛାରଖାର ହୋଇଯାଇଥିବା ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳିଛି । ଅନ୍ୟ ଦୋକାନଗୁଡିକୁ ଅଳ୍ପ ନିଆଁ ଲାଗିଥିବା ବେଳେ ସର୍ଟସର୍କିଟ ଯୋଗୁଁ ହିଁ ନିଆଁ ଲାଗିଥିବା ଅନୁମାନ କରାଯାଉଛି । ତେବେ ୮ ଗୋଟି ଦୋକାନର ପାଖାପାଖି କୋଟି କୋଟି ଟଙ୍କାର ସମ୍ପତ୍ତି ନଷ୍ଟ ହୋଇଯାଇଥିବା ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳିଛି । ମାର୍କେଟ କମ୍ପ୍ଲେକ୍ସ ମାଲିକ କେମିତି ନିଆଁ ଲାଗିଲା ସେ ବିଷୟରେ ତଦନ୍ତ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଦାବି କରିଛନ୍ତି ।

title: CM Omar joins Ashura mourners in Zadibal, distributes refreshment
description:
Srinagar, Jun 26 : Chief Minister Omar Abdullah on Friday joined mourners at Zadibal on the occasion of Youm-e-Ashura and distributed water and milk at a stall set up by the National Conference.
As Per details available with news agency—Kashmir News Observer (KNO), CM Omar was accompanied by his Advisor Nasir Aslam Wani and MLA Zadibal Tanvir Sadiq.
The Chief Minister, interacted with mourners, volunteers and participated in the distribution of refreshments as part of the Ashura commemorations.
Thousands or mourners today gathered to observe Youm-e-Ashura, commemorating the martyrdom of Imam Hussain (AS) and his companions in the Battle of Karbala—(KNO)

title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Smashes All-Time Goal Record Even Before Knockouts
description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has set a new record for the highest number of goals scored in the tournament's history, achieving 177 goals by the end of a Group D match between the United States and Turkey.
content: The ongoing edition of the FIFA World Cup 2026 created history as it became the highest goal-scoring edition in the tournament's history, even before the group stage came to an end. The historic milestone came when defender Auston Trusty scored the 173rd goal of the tournament in the Group D match between co-hosts, the United States and Turkey.FIFA World Cup 2026 Shatters All-Time RecordWith the goal, the competition surpassed the previous mark of 172 goals, which was set throughout the whole 2022 FIFA World Cup in Qatar. The tournament total had risen to 177 goals by the end of Turkey's thrilling 3-2 triumph, highlighting the competition's aggressive flair.The accomplishment is all the more impressive because of how quickly it was accomplished. For the 2022 World Cup to reach 172 goals, it took all 64 games. However, the 2026 edition got past that number in just its 59th game, and there are still a few of the group-stage matches left until the knockout stages finally kick off. The expanded format has undoubtedly contributed to this feat. FIFA expanded the tournament from 32 to 48 teams, increasing the number of matches from 64 to 104.Gianni Infantino On This Record-Breaking FeatEven though there are more scoring possibilities due to the extra games, the average number of goals has remained high. Gianni Infantino, president of FIFA, commended this accomplishment as more evidence of the tournament's success."Surpassing the previous highest of 172 goals from Qatar shows the excitement and attacking talent that have already made the 2026 World Cup so unforgettable," Infantino wrote on Instagram.World Cup 2026 Also Breaks Attendance RecordIn addition to producing goals, the World Cup has attracted historically large crowds in the US, Canada, and Mexico. The 2026 FIFA World Cup has already drawn more than 3.6 million viewers, making it the most popular in history. The previous attendance record of 3.5 million, established at the 1994 World Cup in the United States, has been surpassed. Both the goal total and attendance numbers are anticipated to rise further before the tournament ends, with 45 games left and the knockout stage still to come.

title: Firing: ସରପଞ୍ଚଙ୍କ ସ୍ୱାମୀଙ୍କ ଉପରକୁ ଗୁଳିମାଡ
description:
କଟକ: କଟକ ଜିଲ୍ଲା ବଡ଼ମ୍ବା ମାଣିଆବନ୍ଧ ଥାନା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ କୁଆଁପାଳ ଛକରେ ଗୁଳିକାଣ୍ଡ । ମାଣିଆବନ୍ଧ ସନ୍ତରାବାଡ଼ି ସରପଞ୍ଚଙ୍କ ସ୍ୱାମୀ କାଳିଆ ଓରଫ ଶ୍ରୀକାନ୍ତ ଜେନା (୩୨) ତାଙ୍କ ପୁଅକୁ ନେଇ ସେଲୁନକୁ ଚୁଟି କାଟିବା ପାଇଁ ଯାଉଥିବା ବେଳେ ତାଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ଅତର୍କିତ ଭାବେ ଗୁଳିମାଡ଼ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଦୁଇଟି ବାଇକରେ ଆସିଥିବା ଚାରି ଜଣ ଦୁର୍ବୃତ୍ତ କାଳିଆଙ୍କ ଉପରକୁ ପ୍ରାୟ ୪ ରାଉଣ୍ଡ ଗୁଳି ଚଳାଇ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରୁ ଫେରାର ହୋଇଯାଇଥିଲେ। ଗୁଳି କାଳିଆଙ୍କ ଛାତି ଏବଂ ଗୋଡ଼ରେ ବାଜିଥିବା ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି।
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ: Indian Citizenship: ଭାରତୀୟ ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ଫେରିପାଇଲେ ୯୪ ବର୍ଷୀୟା ବୃଦ୍ଧା: ଆମେରିକା ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ତ୍ୟାଗ କରି ଗାଁକୁ ଫେରିଲେ
ଗୁରୁତର ଆହତ ଅବସ୍ଥାରେ କାଳିଆ ଜେନାଙ୍କୁ ପ୍ରଥମେ ମାଣିଆବନ୍ଧ ମେଡିକାଲରେ ଭର୍ତ୍ତି କରାଯାଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ସେଠାରେ ତାଙ୍କ ଅବସ୍ଥା ଗୁରୁତର ହେବାରୁ ତାଙ୍କୁ କଟକ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର କରାଯାଇଛି। ଘଟଣାର କାରଣ ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଅସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ରହିଥିବାବେଳେ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପୋଲିସ ପହଞ୍ଚି ତଦନ୍ତ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛି।ସୂଚନା ମୁତାବକ, କାଳିଆ ଜେନାଙ୍କ ନାମରେ ଥାନାରେ ଏକାଧିକ ମାମଲା ରହିଥିବା ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି। ତେବେ ଗୁଳିମାଡ଼ର ପ୍ରକୃତ କାରଣ କଣ ଏବଂ ଏଥିରେ କିଏ କିଏ ସମ୍ପୃକ୍ତ ଅଛନ୍ତି, ତାହା ପୋଲିସ ତଦନ୍ତ ପରେ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ହେବ।

title: Who is Khushbu Sundar? Inside her Rs 98 crore net worth, luxury home and cars as daughter Avantika marries Shravan Sreenivasan in Goa; Chiranjeevi, Nagarjuna, Trisha, Jackie Shroff attend
description: Khushbu Sundar's daughter Avantika married Shravan Sreenivasan in a star-studded Goa wedding attended by Chiranjeevi, Nagarjuna, Trisha and Jackie Shroff. Here's a look at the actor-politician's Rs 98 crore net worth, luxury home, cars and remarkable career.
content: Actor, producer, television personality and politician Khushbu Sundar has been making headlines once again, but this time, it is for a joyous family celebration. Her elder daughter, Avantika Sundar, married Shravan Sreenivasan in a lavish wedding ceremony in Goa, drawing some of the biggest names from the Tamil, Telugu and Hindi film industries. From Chiranjeevi and Nagarjuna to Trisha Krishnan, Anil Kapoor and Jackie Shroff, the guest list reflected the goodwill Khushbu and filmmaker-husband Sundar C have earned over decades in the entertainment industry. While videos from the wedding continue to go viral, many are also curious about the woman at the centre of it all. From beginning her journey as a child actor in Bollywood to becoming one of South India's most celebrated stars and later stepping into politics, Khushbu has reinvented herself several times. Over a career spanning more than four decades, she has built an impressive fortune, a luxurious lifestyle and an enduring legacy that extends far beyond cinema.     How much is Khushbu Sundar's net worth? Khushbu Sundar's net worth is widely estimated to be between Rs 50 crore and Rs 98 crore, according to HT. The higher estimates include the combined wealth and assets of Khushbu and her husband, filmmaker Sundar C. However, official declarations paint a more detailed picture. During the 2021 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, the BJP leader declared family assets worth around Rs 22.55 crore in her election affidavit. Her self-acquired immovable assets were valued at approximately Rs 17.99 crore, while husband Sundar C declared immovable assets worth about Rs 16.57 crore. Their movable assets stood at nearly Rs 4.55 crore and Rs 1.83 crore respectively. The affidavit also listed outstanding loans of Rs 3.45 crore for Khushbu and Rs 5.55 crore for Sundar C.The difference between public estimates and affidavit figures is largely because celebrity wealth calculations often include future earnings, production businesses, brand endorsements and appreciation in property values. What does Khushbu's luxurious lifestyle look like? Khushbu and Sundar C live in an elegant multi-storey residence in Chennai's upscale MRC Nagar locality. The home has often featured in family photographs shared on social media and is known for its spacious interiors, tasteful décor and modern design. The couple also owns a fleet of premium luxury cars, with reports frequently mentioning models from Audi and BMW. Their lifestyle reflects decades of success in films, television production and business ventures. Some of the highlights of her lifestyle include: A premium family residence in Chennai's MRC Nagar.Luxury cars from brands such as Audi and BMW.Income from acting, television, production and public appearances. How did Khushbu become one of South India's biggest stars? Born as Nakhat Khan on September 29, 1970, in Mumbai, Khushbu entered films as a child artiste. Her parents gave her the screen name Khushbu when she began acting, and the name stayed with her throughout her career. She first appeared in The Burning Train in 1980 before featuring in Hindi films such as Naseeb, Laawaris, Kaalia, Bemisal and Dard Ka Rishta. As an adult actor, she appeared in Meri Jung alongside Anil Kapoor before landing leading roles opposite Jackie Shroff in Jaanoo and Govinda in Tan-Badan. Her biggest career transformation came after moving to South Indian cinema. Introduced to Telugu films through Kaliyuga Pandavulu, she later made her Tamil debut with Dharmathin Thalaivan. Blockbusters including Varusham 16, Kizhakku Vaasal, Nadigan and especially Chinna Thambi turned her into one of Tamil cinema's biggest female stars. Did you know? Khushbu's popularity reached such extraordinary levels in Tamil Nadu during the 1990s that fans reportedly built a temple dedicated to her, a rare honour for a living actor. Over the years, she has appeared in more than 200 films across Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam and Hindi cinema. Her trophy cabinet includes three Tamil Nadu State Film Awards, two Cinema Express Awards, the Kalaimamani Award and a Kerala State Film Award. When did Khushbu marry Sundar C? Khushbu met filmmaker Sundar C while working on his directorial debut Murai Maman in 1995. Their professional association soon turned into a personal relationship, and the two eventually married. The couple has two daughters, Avantika and Anandita, both of whom have largely stayed away from the limelight compared to their famous parents. How did Khushbu enter politics? Khushbu's political journey has been as eventful as her film career. She has been associated with three major political parties over the years: Joined the DMK in 2010 before leaving in 2014.Entered the Congress later in 2014 and served as the party's national spokesperson.Joined the Bharatiya Janata Party in October 2020 and currently serves as a National Executive Committee member.She contested the 2021 Tamil Nadu Assembly election from Chennai's Thousand Lights constituency but was defeated.    Why is daughter Avantika's wedding grabbing attention? Avantika Sundar and Shravan Sreenivasan exchanged vows in a grand wedding ceremony at a luxury resort in Goa. The celebrations became one of the biggest celebrity gatherings of the year, bringing together leading stars from multiple film industries. Among those spotted at the wedding were Chiranjeevi, Nagarjuna, Venkatesh, Trisha Krishnan, Anil Kapoor and Jackie Shroff. Guests largely followed a beige and gold colour palette, while videos of the celebrations quickly spread across social media. Earlier this month, Khushbu had personally invited Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay to the wedding and shared photographs from the meeting. She had also travelled to New Delhi with Sundar C to invite Prime Minister Narendra Modi, thanking him publicly for blessing the couple. With a career spanning more than 40 years, a successful transition into politics, multiple businesses and one of South India's most recognisable public profiles, Khushbu Sundar remains much more than a film star. And as her daughter begins a new chapter, the actor-politician has once again found herself at the centre of a celebration that brought together some of Indian cinema's biggest names under one roof.

title: Global relief surge reaches Venezuela as death toll hits 235 following catastrophic quakes
description:
Venezuela, June 26 : The death toll in Venezuela following the deadly double earthquakes has risen to 235, while 4,300 people have been injured, health minister Carlos Alvarado said on Thursday evening (local time).
The minister, in an interview with the state television, said that while the injuries include mostly minor cases, many of the serious cases require "surgical intervention." He added that while some of the fatalities were declared "upon arrival" at the hospitals, others showed no "vital signs" of life previously, CNN reported.
"As of 7:00 PM today, we have already attended to more than 4,300 injured people, some minor, most minor, but there are also moderate and serious cases. Many of them have required surgical interventions, and unfortunately, we have received around 235 patients who arrived without vital signs or who died upon arrival at our health facilities," the minister said in the interview, according to CNN.
Meanwhile, humanitarian efforts are underway in Venezuela as hundreds of citizens have volunteered to deliver water, food, medicines, and supplies to the affected communities in Caraballeda and Vargas.
In a post on X, Maria Corina Machado's political party Vente Venezuela stated that as a part of a solidarity response, these volunteers are also collecting water, non-perishable food, medical supplies, clothing, and essential items.
"24 hours have passed since the earthquakes and, in Vargas state, the solidarity of the Venezuelan people is once again breaking through amid the tragedy. Hundreds of motorbike riders have organized to deliver water, food, medicines, and supplies to the affected communities. They are citizens who, without expecting anything in return, have decided to become a bridge of hope for those who need it most today," the post read.
Additionally, the US has assigned its military forces to support the relief efforts in Venezuela. Acting at the direction of the US Department of State, the Southern Command has deployed "C-17 Globemaster and C-130 Hercules transport aircraft" for a major humanitarian airlift operation.
The deployment is designed to provide immediate, high-capacity support to areas hardest hit by the magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 tremors, which have caused widespread structural collapse, significant casualties, and critical infrastructure damage across the nation.
"Delivering relief when every second counts: #SOUTHCOM has directed C-17 Globemaster and C-130 Hercules transport aircraft to support Venezuela earthquake relief efforts and help save lives. The C-17 provides massive payload capacity capable of delivering aid, equipment and response teams into disaster zones. The C-130 Hercules is the U.S. military's tactical workhorse with a long history of providing critical airlift support in crises to help communities get immediate help. SOUTHCOM is surging available assigned U.S. military forces in our region to support @StateDept-led U.S. government relief operations in Venezuela, following the devastating earthquakes that struck the nation June 24, 2026," the SOUTHCOM wrote in a post on X.
Earlier, UN Secretary General Antonio Gutteres, extending condolences over the loss of life, stated that the United Nations has mobilised efforts to provide emergency relief.
"I am deeply saddened by the loss of life & widespread destruction caused by the devastating earthquakes that struck Venezuela. The UN system is mobilizing assistance & working closely with the Government & our partners to support the response & the people of Venezuela. I extend my sincere condolences to the families of the victims & wish a speedy recovery to those injured," he wrote on X.
Subsequently, in a significant show of global solidarity, France and Switzerland have also moved quickly to deploy highly specialised Urban Search and Rescue (USAR) units to the disaster zone.
France, acting at the request of President Emmanuel Macron, has dispatched a detachment from the 4th and 7th Regiments of Civil Security Training and Intervention. This elite unit, which includes medical teams, search dogs, and experts in collapsed structure extraction, arrived fully equipped to operate in degraded environments.
Their mission, coordinated through the European Union's Civil Protection Mechanism, leverages years of experience from similar international deployments, such as the 2023 earthquake response in Turkey.
"France has several USAR teams classified by the United Nations, recognized for their high level of expertise. In complete autonomy, they are capable of being deployed within a few hours with all their operational resources in order to intervene in the most degraded environments. This mission bears witness to France's commitment to international solidarity. It is being carried out in coordination with our partners and fits within the framework of the European Union's Civil Protection Mechanism, which allows for the pooling of the operational capacities of several European states," the French Directorate General of Civil Security and Crisis Management wrote on X.
Simultaneously, the "Swiss Rescue Chain" has departed from Zurich for Caracas. This mission brings 80 specialists, eight search dogs, and 18 tons of specialised rescue equipment to the front lines.
"Following the international call for assistance issued by the Venezuelan authorities, the #Swiss Rescue Chain has departed from Zurich for Caracas.The mission mobilizes 80 specialists, 8 search dogs, and 18 tons of equipment. Upon arrival, the teams will coordinate with local authorities to search for, clear, and rescue #earthquake victims buried under the rubble," the Swiss Ministry of Foreign Affairs wrote on X.
This comes after two earthquakes struck Venezuela in quick succession on Wednesday, causing catastrophic damage to cities from La Guaira to the capital Caracas. (ANI)

title: Weather tracker: Heatwave expected to bring Germany and Poland to 40C
description: Austrian Grand Prix declares heat hazard as dramatic rise in temperatures forecast in central and northern EuropeTemperatures are forecast to rise dramatically in parts of central and northern Europe this weekend as the intense heatwave continues. In Germany and Poland, highs up to or exceeding 40C (104F) are expected on both Saturday and Sunday, days after swathes of France experienced similar extreme temperatures. The Austrian Grand Prix, taking place this weekend in Spielberg, has declared a heat hazard, the first race to do so this season. Temperatures are expected to rise into the low 30s celsius during the race, almost 10C warmer than usual for the venue.Across Europe, the intense heat has led to severe thunderstorms. In the Sverdlovsk region of central Russia, a strong tornado was reported on the evening of 22 June. Rated a 3 out of 5 on the international Fujita scale, the twister injured 16 people and destroyed or damaged about 100 homes and businesses in the town of Kushva. Emergency services have been working on restoring power to the town. Tornadoes are not unheard of in Russia but are rare. Forecasters say they may become more common in future as the climate breaks down. Storm warnings remained in effect in the southern part of the country on Friday. Continue reading...

title: Congress: ବିଜେପି ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀଙ୍କ ଭବିଷ୍ୟତ ସହ ଖେଳୁଛି: କଂଗ୍ରେସ
description:
ରାୟଗଡା: ବିଜେପି ନେତୃତ୍ବାଧୀନ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ସରକାରଙ୍କ ନୂତନ ଶିକ୍ଷା ନୀତି ଏବଂ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ଆଭିମୁଖ୍ୟକୁ ନେଇ ରାୟଗଡା ଜିଲ୍ଲା କଂଗ୍ରେସ ତରଫରୁ ଡବଲ ଇଂଜିନ ସରକାରଙ୍କୁ କଡା ସମାଲୋଚନା କରାଯାଇଛି I ଜିଲ୍ଲା କଂଗ୍ରେସ ତରଫରୁ ଆୟୋଜିତ ସାମ୍ବାଦିକ ସମ୍ମିଳନୀରେ ଯୋଗଦେଇ  ପ୍ରଦେଶ ମହିଳା କଂଗ୍ରେସ କମିଟି ସଭାପତି ମିନାକ୍ଷୀ ବାହିନୀପତି ସରକାରଙ୍କ ଶିକ୍ଷା ନୀତିକୁ ନେଇ ତୀବ୍ର ନିନ୍ଦା କରି କହିଛନ୍ତି ଏହି ନୀତି ଦେଶର ଆଗାମୀ ଭବିଷ୍ୟତ କୁହା ଯାଉଥିବା ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀଙ୍କ ଭବିଷ୍ୟତ ସହ ଖେଳିବା ସହ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ଜୀବନକୁ ଅନ୍ଧକାର ମଧ୍ୟକୁ ଠେଲି ଦେଇଛି I ଶିକ୍ଷା ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ବିବେକଶୂନ୍ୟ ହୋଇ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ କରିବା ସହ ଅବାନ୍ତର ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ରଖୁଛନ୍ତି I
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ: SambalpurCollector: ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ କଡା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ଦେଲେ ଜିଲ୍ଲାପାଳ, ତୁରନ୍ତ ଖୋଲ ଘର ସିଲ୍
ନିଟ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ପତ୍ର ଲିକ ହେଲା ପରେ ବହୁ ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀ ଆତ୍ମହତ୍ୟା କରିଥିଲେ I ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ସମବେଦନା ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ଏଥିରେ ପ୍ରଭାବିତ ଲକ୍ଷ ଲକ୍ଷ ଛାତ୍ରଛାତ୍ରୀ ଏବଂ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ପରିବାର କେଉଁ ମାନସିକ ସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଅଛନ୍ତି ତାହା ବିଜେପି ସରକାର ବୁଝୁ ନାହିଁ ଏବଂ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ଭବିଷ୍ୟତକୁ ଧ୍ବଂସ କରିବାରେ ବିଜେପି ଲାଗିଛି ବୋଲି ପିସିସି ମହିଳା ସଭାନେତ୍ରୀ ଶ୍ରୀମତୀ ବାହିନୀପତି ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରିଛନ୍ତି I ପ୍ରଦେଶ ଅଳ୍ପ ସଂଖ୍ୟକ ବିଭାଗ ସଭାପତି ମହମ୍ମଦ ଜଇନୁଲ ହକ ଦାବି କରିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ବିଜେପି ସରକାର ନିଟ ପେପର ଲିକ ଘଟଣାର ତଦନ୍ତ ରିପୋର୍ଟ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ କରନ୍ତୁ I ବିଭିନ୍ନ ପରୀକ୍ଷାକୁ ବିଜେପି ସରକାର ବ୍ୟବସାୟରେ ପରିଣତ କରିଛି I ଏହି ଶିକ୍ଷା ଦୁର୍ନୀତି ଦେଶରେ ଯୋଜନାବଦ୍ଧ ଭାବେ ଚାଲିଛି ଏବଂ ଏଥିରେ ହଜାର ହଜାର କୋଟି ଟଙ୍କାର ଦୁର୍ନୀତି ହେଉଛି I
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ: India Helicopte: ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ପରେ ବି ଭାରତୀୟ ସେନାର ଚିତାଲ ହେଲିକପ୍ଟର ଉଡ଼ାଣ ଜାରି
ସବୁଠୁ ଆଶ୍ଚର୍ଯ୍ୟ କଥା ଶିକ୍ଷା ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ନୈତିକ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ମଧ୍ୟ ନେଉ ନାହାନ୍ତି କିମ୍ବା ନୈତିକତା ଦୃଷ୍ଟିରୁ ଇସ୍ତଫା ମଧ୍ୟ ଦେଉନାହାନ୍ତି I ଶିକ୍ଷା ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଧର୍ମେନ୍ଦ୍ର ପ୍ରଧାନ ତୁରନ୍ତ ଇସ୍ତଫା ପ୍ରଦାନ କରନ୍ତୁ ବୋଲି ସଂଖ୍ୟାଲଘୁ ସେଲର ରାଜ୍ୟ ସଭାପତି ଶ୍ରୀ ହକ ଦାବି କରିଥିଲେ I  ଏହି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମରେ କଂଗ୍ରେସର ବରିଷ୍ଠ ନେତା ଶଙ୍କର୍ଷଣ ମଙ୍ଗରାଜ, ଜିଲ୍ଲା ଛାତ୍ର କଂଗ୍ରେସ ସଭାପତି ନିଖିଲ ପଟନାୟକ, ଯୁବ ନେତା ହରିଶ ପଟନାୟକ, ଅସଲାମ ଖାନ, ମହିଳା କଂଗ୍ରେସ ରାଜ୍ୟ ସମ୍ପାଦିକା ନନ୍ଦୀ ଗୌରୀ ଓ ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ କର୍ମକର୍ତ୍ତା ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ରହିଥିଲେ I ଶିକ୍ଷା ନୀତି ଏବଂ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ଆଭିମୁଖ୍ୟରେ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ନ ହେଲେ କଂଗ୍ରେସ ରାଜରାସ୍ତାକୁ ଓହ୍ଲାଇବ ବୋଲି ଶ୍ରୀମତୀ ବାହିନୀପତି ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିଛନ୍ତି I

title: Rs 15000 crore loan! Aditya Birla Group paces up Shell-owned Sprng Energy bid - Report
description: Aditya Birla-Sprng Energy acquisition: India’s energy investment has grown at an average annual rate of 11 per cent over the past five years, supported by rapid expansion in renewable energy and transmission infrastructure to meet rising electricity demand and clean energy targets.
content: Aditya Birla-Sprng Energy acquisition: The Aditya Birla Group has stepped up its effort to acquire Shell Plc’s Indian renewable energy platform Sprng Energy. An Economic Times report, citing people familiar with the matter, said that the company has roped in State Bank of India and Axis Bank to lead a Rs 15,000 crore loan facility for the potential deal.India’s energy investment may touch record USD 170 billion in 2026This comes at a time when India’s energy investment is projected to touch a record USD 170 billion in 2026, driven by strong spending on solar power, grid infrastructure and oil refining. According to the International Energy Agency’s (IEA) World Energy Investment 2026 report, India’s energy investment has grown at an average annual rate of 11 per cent over the past five years, supported by rapid expansion in renewable energy and transmission infrastructure to meet rising electricity demand and clean energy targets."Energy investment in India has grown 11 per cent annually on average in the past five years and is set to reach USD 170 billion in 2026. Investment in solar PV grew annually by 25 per cent in this period, and oil refining by 23 per cent. Together, these two sectors contributed to one-fourth of India's energy investment growth," it said.According to the IEA, India achieved its Nationally Determined Contribution target of sourcing 50 per cent of installed power generation capacity from non-fossil fuel sources in 2025 — five years ahead of schedule — aided by a sharp rise in solar investments, which touched USD 20 billion.‘India, Iran explore opportunities to cooperate in energy sector’Iran and India discussed strengthening energy cooperation and trade during a meeting between their oil ministers on the sidelines of a BRICS energy ministers gathering in India, the Iranian oil ministry's news outlet Shana reported on Thursday.India's Oil Minister Hardeep Puri said on Thursday he explored opportunities for New Delhi and Tehran to cooperate in the energy sector during his meeting with Iran's Petroleum Minister Mohsen Paknejad in New Delhi.India remains committed to enhancing energy security via dialogue, partnership, and a mutually beneficial engagement, Puri said in a post on X.Last week, Iran and the United States signed an interim deal, after which Washington issued a temporary license for the export of Iranian energy products.90% of India's renewable energy portfolio faces high climate risk by 2030: ReportAround 90 per cent of India's renewable energy portfolio could face high or critical climate risks by 2030, highlighting the need for urgent resilience measures as the country rapidly expands its clean energy capacity, according to a report released by Zurich Kotak General Insurance and Zurich Resilience Solutions.The report assessed 871 renewable energy sites across the ten states with the highest renewable energy capacity. Together, these sites represent a planned capacity of around 267 GW.(With inputs from news agencies)

title: Nashik Police News: चित्रपटात ‘धुरंधर’ चालतो, नाशिकमध्ये फक्त कायदा; टवाळखोरांना पोलिसांचा अनोख्या स्टाइलने दणका
description: नाशिक | प्रतिनिधीस्वतःला गल्लीबोळातील ‘धुरंधर’ समजून रस्त्याच्या कडेला अड्डे जमवणारे, टवाळक्या करत दादागिरी मिरवणारे आणि रात्रीच्या अंधारात फूटपाथलाच ‘बार’ बनवणाऱ्या हौशा-नवशांची नाशिक पोलिसांनी चांगलीच जिरवली आहे. सोशल मीडिया पोस्टद्वारे नाशिक शहर पोलिसांनी टवाळखोरांना थेट आणि कडक शब्दांत इशारा दिला असून, हे नाशिक आहे, येथे रस्त्याच्या कडेला बसून मद्यपान चालणार नाही, असे ठणकावून सांगितले आहे. नाशिकचे […]
content:
नाशिक | प्रतिनिधीस्वतःला गल्लीबोळातील ‘धुरंधर’ समजून रस्त्याच्या कडेला अड्डे जमवणारे, टवाळक्या करत दादागिरी मिरवणारे आणि रात्रीच्या अंधारात फूटपाथलाच ‘बार’ बनवणाऱ्या हौशा-नवशांची नाशिक पोलिसांनी चांगलीच जिरवली आहे. सोशल मीडिया पोस्टद्वारे नाशिक शहर पोलिसांनी टवाळखोरांना थेट आणि कडक शब्दांत इशारा दिला असून, हे नाशिक आहे, येथे रस्त्याच्या कडेला बसून मद्यपान चालणार नाही, असे ठणकावून सांगितले आहे.



नाशिकचे पोलिस आयुक्त संदीप कर्णिक यांच्या आदेशाने पोलिस उपायुक्त मोनिका राऊत, किशोर काळे व किरणकुमार चव्हाण यांच्यासह सहायक आयुक्त संदीप मिटके हे पुन्हा बालेकिल्ला मोहिमेला बळ देत आहेत. त्यानुसार, मागील सहा महिन्यांत आतापर्यंत तब्बल ११ हजार ६८५ टवाळखोरांवर कारवाईचा बडगा उगारण्यात आला आहे. तर केवळ चालू महिन्यातील विशेष ‘कोंबिंग ऑपरेशन्स’मध्ये ४३८ टवाळखोरांना पोलिसांनी चांगलाच प्रसाद दिला आहे. पोलिसांच्या या धडक मोहिमेमुळे रात्रीच्या वेळी रस्त्यावर धिंगाणा घालणाऱ्यांचे धाबे दणाणले आहेत. हे नाशिक आहे. येथे फूटपाथ बार नाहीत. येथे अंधारात रस्त्याच्या कडेला बसून मद्यपान करणे हा कायद्याचा भंग आहे,’ असे आयुक्तालयाने स्पष्ट केले आहे.



…. आणि ‘धुरंधर’ पोलीस ठाण्यात एकत्रसोशल मीडियावर पोलीस ठाण्याचा एक व्हिडिओ शेअर करत पोलिसांनी टवाळखोरांची चांगलीच कोंडी केली आहे. जर तुम्हाला वाटत असेल की हे सगळं चालतं, तर या व्हिडिओमध्ये आपल्या जवळच्या पोलीस ठाण्यात एकत्र बसलेले ते लोकही पाहा, ज्यांना कधीकाळी अगदी असंच वाटत होतं, अशा उपरोधिक आणि कडक शब्दांत पोलिसांनी भाईगिरी करणाऱ्यांचे तोंड बंद केले आहे. चित्रपटात ‘धुरंधर’ चालत असला, तरी नाशिक शहरात फक्त आणि फक्त ‘कायदा’ चालतो, हे पोलिसांनी आपल्या कृतीतून दाखवून दिले आहे.



Nashik News: त्र्यंबकेश्वर पेड दर्शन घोटाळा प्रकरण, पुरुषोत्तम कडलगला अखेर अडीच महिन्यांनी जामीन मंजूर



नागरिकांकडून कौतुकThisIsNashik City आणि Kaydyacha Ballekilla या हॅशटॅगसह व्हायरल होत असलेल्या पोलिसांच्या या भूमिकेचे नाशिककरांनी स्वागत केले आहे. रस्त्यावरील टवाळक्या आणि मद्यपींच्या त्रासामुळे महिला व सामान्य नागरिकांना नाहक त्रास सहन करावा लागत होता. मात्र, पोलिसांच्या या ‘सिंघम’ स्टाईल कनेक्शनमुळे आता नाशिकचे रस्ते रात्रीच्या वेळी सुरक्षित होऊ लागले आहेत. टवाळखोरांना ताळ्यावर आणण्यासाठी पोलिसांची ही धडक मोहीम अशीच सुरू राहावी, अशी मागणी नागरिकांमधून होत आहे.

title: Emma Roberts to return for ‘Aquamarine’ TV series
description: Emma Roberts is set to reprise her role as Claire Brown in a new 'Aquamarine' TV series, nearly two decades after the original film's release. She will also serve as an executive producer on the project, which sees the original film's director, Elizabeth Allen Rosenbaum, returning. The reboot's plot centers on a teenage mermaid discovering the truth about her mother's disappearance and her own magical powers.

title: Operation Sindoor: Govt names six fallen Indian military personnel for the first time - Check names of the martyrs
description: Their names, representing five personnel from the Army and one from the Indian Air Force, have been published in the Roll of Honour on the National War Memorial website and will be engraved on its granite walls in New Delhi.
content: The government has officially disclosed the names of six Indian military personnel martyred during Operation Sindoor, a cross-border military campaign launched in May last year aimed at destroying terror infrastructure in Pakistan and Pakistan-occupied Kashmir (PoK).Their names, representing five personnel from the Army and one from the Indian Air Force, have been published in the Roll of Honour on the National War Memorial website and will be engraved on its granite walls in New Delhi, serving as the first formal public acknowledgement of fatalities among the Indian armed forcesduring the operation.Operation Sindoor Martyrs NameThe honored defence personnel include Subedar Major Pawan Kumar (Headquarters 10 Infantry Brigade), Rifleman Sunil Kumar (4 Jammu and Kashmir Light Infantry), Lance Naik Dinesh Kumar (5 Field Regiment), Agniveer Mood Muralinaik (851 Light Regiment), Havildar Sunil Kumar Singh (237 Field Workshop Company), and Sergeant Surendra Kumar (39 Wing, Indian Air Force). Rifleman Sunil Kumar was posthumously awarded with the Vir Chakra, India's third-highest battle gallantry award, while Sergeant Surendra Kumar was awarded the Vayu Sena Medal.On June 8, President Droupadi Murmu presented the Vir Chakra posthumously to Rifleman Sunil Kumar during the Defence Investiture Ceremony, where it was accepted by his parents, Sudesh Kumari and Yash Paul.Their names are now engraved on dedicated bricks within the Tyag Chakra (Circle of Sacrifice) at the National War Memorial, a structure comprising 16 concentric circular granite walls. Each brick commemorates the name, rank, and regiment of a fallen soldier who made the supreme sacrifice for the nation since Independence.Before this, the government had maintained official silence regarding the identities of the military personnel martyred during Operation Sindoor, despite widespread reports following the four-day conflict in May 2025. The inclusion of these names in the National War Memorial's Roll of Honour marks the first definitive confirmation of the service members who lost their lives in the operation.Operation Sindoor was launched in the early hours of May 7, 2025, weeks after the April 22 terror attack in Pahalgam, Jammu and Kashmir, in which 26 civilians, most of them tourists, were killed.

title: Did Ajay Devgn take a dig at SRK through 'Chauhaan' teaser?
description: Ajay Devgn's much-anticipated film 'Chauhaan' is stirring excitement on social media, thanks to a dialogue that suggests a link to Shah Rukh Khan's 'Pathaan'. The teaser, unveiled on June 25, portrays Devgn in a commanding role, proclaiming, "Pathaanon se kehna, Chauhaan aa raha hai." This has fueled a vibrant discussion, with fans split between seeing it as a clever reference or an iconic hero intro.

title: Indian Citizenship: ଭାରତୀୟ ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ଫେରିପାଇଲେ ୯୪ ବର୍ଷୀୟା ବୃଦ୍ଧା: ଆମେରିକା ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ତ୍ୟାଗ କରି ଗାଁକୁ ଫେରିଲେ
description:
ବାପଟଲା: ନିଜ ଜନ୍ମମାଟି ଓ ମାତୃଭୂମିର ଆକର୍ଷଣ ଆଗରେ ଆମେରିକାର ସମସ୍ତ ସୁଖ-ସୁବିଧା ଫିକା ପଡ଼ିଯାଇଛି। ଆନ୍ଧ୍ରପ୍ରଦେଶର ବାପଟଲା ଜିଲ୍ଲାର ଜଣେ ୯୪ ବର୍ଷୀୟା ବୃଦ୍ଧା ନିଜ ଜୀବନର ଶେଷ ସମୟ ଜନ୍ମମାଟିରେ ବିତାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଆମେରିକାର ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ତ୍ୟାଗ କରି ପୁଣିଥରେ ଆନୁଷ୍ଠାନିକ ଭାବେ ଭାରତୀୟ ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ବୃଦ୍ଧା ଜଣକ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ଚିନ୍ତାଗୁମ୍ପାଲା ଗ୍ରାମର କୋଣ୍ଡ୍ରାଗୁଣ୍ଟା ମହାଲକ୍ଷ୍ମମ୍ମା। ସ୍ୱାମୀଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ପରେ ସେ ନିଜ ପୁଅ ସହ ଆମେରିକା ଚାଲିଯାଇଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ସମୟରେ ସେଠାକାର ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ହାସଲ କରିଥିଲେ।
ମହାଲକ୍ଷ୍ମମ୍ମାଙ୍କୁ ଭାରତୀୟ ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ପ୍ରଦାନ
ତେବେ ବିଦେଶରେ ଦୀର୍ଘ ବର୍ଷ ବିତାଇବା ପରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ନିଜ ଜନ୍ମମାଟିର ସ୍ମୃତି ତାଙ୍କ ମନରୁ ଯାଇନଥିଲା। ସେ ନିଜ ଗାଁକୁ ଫେରିଆସିବା ପାଇଁ ଦୃଢ଼ ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ନେଇଥିଲେ। ଜୀବନର ଶେଷ ସମୟତକ ଭାରତରେ ବିତାଇବା ଏବଂ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ପରେ ନିଜ ନିଜ ଗ୍ରାମରେ ହିଁ ଅନ୍ତିମ ସଂସ୍କାର କରାଯିବା ତାଙ୍କର ଏକମାତ୍ର ଶେଷ ଇଚ୍ଛା ଥିଲା ଏବଂ ସେ ଭାରତୀୟ ନାଗରିକତ୍ଵ ଫେରିପାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଆବେଦନ ମଧ୍ୟ କରିଥିଲେ। ପ୍ରଶାସନ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ସମସ୍ତ ଆଇନଗତ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ଶୀଘ୍ର ସମ୍ପନ୍ନ କରାଯାଇ ମହାଲକ୍ଷ୍ମମ୍ମାଙ୍କୁ ଭାରତୀୟ ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯାଇଛି। ବୁଧବାର ଦିନ ବାପଟଲା ଜିଲ୍ଲାପାଳଙ୍କ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାଳୟରେ ଆୟୋଜିତ ଏକ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମରେ ଜିଲ୍ଲାପାଳ ତାଙ୍କୁ ଆନୁଗତ୍ୟର ଶପଥ ପାଠ କରାଇବା ସହ ଭାରତୀୟ ନାଗରିକତ୍ୱର ସମସ୍ତ ସରକାରୀ ଦଲିଲ୍ ହସ୍ତାନ୍ତର କରିଛନ୍ତି। ୯୪ ବର୍ଷ ବୟସରେ ଜନ୍ମମାଟି ପ୍ରତି ଏଭଳି ଭଲପାଇବା ଏବଂ ସ୍ୱଦେଶ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟାବର୍ତ୍ତନର ଏହି ଭାବପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଘଟଣା ଏବେ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଚର୍ଚ୍ଚାର ବିଷୟ ପାଲଟିଛି।

title: SambalpurCollector: ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ କଡା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ଦେଲେ ଜିଲ୍ଲାପାଳ, ତୁରନ୍ତ ଖୋଲ ଘର ସିଲ୍
description:
ସମ୍ବଲପୁର: ସମ୍ବଲପୁର ଜିଲ୍ଲା ଜମନକିରା ବ୍ଲକ ଗୌତମପାଲି ଗାଁର ଦିବ୍ୟାଙ୍ଗ ବୃଦ୍ଧ ଧନଞ୍ଜୟ ପ୍ରଧାନ (୭୭) କୌଣସି ଋଣ ନେଇ ନଥିଲେ ବି ତାଙ୍କ ଘରକୁ ସିଲ୍ କରିଦେଇଥିଲା ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କ। ଆଉ ଏନେଇ ଖବର ପ୍ରଚାରିତ ହେବା ପରେ ଏବେ ଆକ୍ସନ ମୁଡ଼୍କୁ ଆସିଯାଇଛନ୍ତି ସମ୍ବଲପୁର ଜିଲ୍ଲାପାଳ | ଜିଲ୍ଲାପାଳ ସିଦ୍ଧେଶ୍ୱର ବଳିରାମ ବୋନ୍ଦର ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ କଡା ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ଦେଇ ତୁରନ୍ତ ସିଲ ଖୋଲିବାକୁ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି | କେବଳ ଏତିକି ନୁହେଁ ସେ ଯାଞ୍ଚ ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କକୁ ତଥ୍ୟ ଦେବାକୁ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି | ବାସ୍ତବରେ ବିନା ଅପରାଧରେ ଧନଞ୍ଜୟ ତାଙ୍କ ୫୭ ବର୍ଷୀୟା ସ୍ତ୍ରୀ, ୩୫ ବର୍ଷୀୟା ବିଧବା ବୋହୂ ଏବଂ ୧୪, ୯ ବର୍ଷୀୟା ନାତୁଣୀଙ୍କ ସହିତ ଗୋଟିଏ କୋଠରିରେ ଅତି ଦୟନୀୟ ଅବସ୍ଥାରେ ରହୁଛନ୍ତି। ଧନଞ୍ଜୟଙ୍କ ବୋହୂ ସୀମା ପ୍ରଧାନଙ୍କ ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଗତ ୫ ତାରିଖରେ ଅଚାନକ ଜମନକିରା ତହସିଲ ଏବଂ ଡିସିବି ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କର ଏକ ଟିମ୍ ଆସି ତାଙ୍କ ଘରକୁ ସିଲ୍ କରିଦେଲା। ଋଣ ପରିଶୋଧ ହୋଇନଥିବାରୁ ଏଭଳି ଦଶା ଭୋଗିବା ପାଇଁ ସେମାନେ ବାଧ୍ୟ ବୋଲି କୁହାଗଲା। କିନ୍ତୁ ଧନଞ୍ଜୟ କୌଣସି ଋଣ ନେଇ ନଥିବାରୁ ଏହି ସ୍ଥିତିକୁ ନେଇ ସେମାନେ ହତବାକ୍ ହୋଇ ଯାଇଥିଲେ।
ଆହୁରି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ: Odisha Irrigation: କୋଦାଳ ଧରି ୨କିମି କେନାଲ ନିର୍ମାଣ କଲେ ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀ; ଚାଷଜମିରେ ହସିବ ଫସଲ
ସୀମା କହିଛନ୍ତି, ୫ ବର୍ଷ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ଦୂର ସମ୍ପର୍କୀୟ ପ୍ରସନ୍ନ ପ୍ରଧାନ ଡିସିବି ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କରୁ ୧୨ ଲକ୍ଷ ଟଙ୍କାର ଋଣ ଆଣିଥିଲେ। ଯାହା ପରିଶୋଧ ନ ହୋଇ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ପ୍ରାୟ ୨୭ ଲକ୍ଷ ହୋଇସାରିଛି। ପ୍ରସନ୍ନ ଯେଉଁ ପଟ୍ଟା ଦେଇ ଋଣ ଆଣିଥିଲେ ସେଥିରେ ପ୍ରସନ୍ନଙ୍କ ୧୧ ଡେସିମିଲ୍ ସହିତ ଧନଞ୍ଜୟଙ୍କ ୧୨ ଡେସିମିଲ୍ ଜମି ଥିଲା। କିନ୍ତୁ ଅନେକ ଦିନ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଧନଞ୍ଜୟ ନିଜ ୧୨ ଡେସିମିଲ୍‌ର ସ୍ବତନ୍ତ୍ର ପଟ୍ଟା କରିସାରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏଭଳି ସ୍ଥିତିରେ ତାଙ୍କ ଘର ସିଲ୍ କରାଯିବା ଅନ୍ୟାୟ ବୋଲି ଏହି ପରିବାର ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କ ଏବଂ ମାଜିଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଟ୍ ଦାୟିତ୍ବରେ ଥିବା ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ଦସ୍ତାବିଜ ଦେଖାଇ ବୁଝାଇଥିଲେ। ମାତ୍ର ଅନ୍‌ଲାଇନ୍‌ରେ ଧନଞ୍ଜୟଙ୍କ ସ୍ବତନ୍ତ୍ର ପଟ୍ଟା ଦର୍ଶାଉ ନଥିବାରୁ ସେମାନେ କିଛି କରିପାରିବେ ନାହିଁ ବୋଲି କହିଥିଲେ। ବୃଦ୍ଧ ଶ୍ବଶୁର, ଶାଶୁ ଏବଂ ଛୋଟ ପିଲାଙ୍କୁ ଧରି ସେ କୁଆଡ଼େ ଯିବେ ବୋଲି ପଚାରିଥିଲେ ସୀମା। ଫଳରେ ତାଙ୍କ ଘରର ଗୋଟିଏ ପରିତ୍ୟକ୍ତ ଛୋଟ କୋଠରିକୁ ମୁଣ୍ଡ ଗୁଞ୍ଜିବା ପାଇଁ ଛାଡ଼ି ଦେଇଥିଲେ।

title: Australia: ଆଗେଇଲା ଅଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଲିଆ: ପାରାଗୁଏର ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ଆଶା ଝୁଲିଲା
description:
ସାନ୍ତାକ୍ଲାରା: ଚଳିତ ବିଶ୍ବକପ୍‌ରେ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ପାରାଗୁଏ-ଅଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଲିଆ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ଗୋଲ୍‌ଶୂନ୍ୟରେ ଶେଷ ହୋଇଛି। ଫଳରେ ଉଭୟ ଦଳ ଗୋଟିଏ ଲେଖାଏଁ ପଏଣ୍ଟରେ ସନ୍ତୁଷ୍ଟ ରହିଛନ୍ତି। କିନ୍ତୁ ଏହି ଅମୀମାଂସିତ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ସହ ଅଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଲିଆ ରାଉଣ୍ଡ-୩୨ରେ ପ୍ରବେଶ କରିଛି। ଏହି ଦଳ ୩ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ରୁ ଗୋଟିଏ ଲେଖାଏଁ ବିଜୟ, ପରାଜୟ ଓ ଅମୀମାଂସିତରୁ ୪ ପଏଣ୍ଟ ପାଇ ଗୋଲ୍‌ ବ୍ୟବଧାନରେ ପାରାଗୁଏଠୁ ଆଗରେ ରହି ଦ୍ବିତୀୟ ସ୍ଥାନ ସହ ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରେ ପ୍ରବେଶ କରିଛି।
ଅଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଲିଆର ତୃତୀୟ ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ପ୍ରବେଶ
ଅଷ୍ଟ୍ରେଲିଆର ଏହା ତୃତୀୟ ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ପ୍ରବେଶ। ପୂର୍ବରୁ ୨୦୦୬ ଓ ୨୦୨୨ରେ ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଥିଲା। ହେଲେ ଉଭୟ ଥର ରାଉଣ୍ଡ-୧୬ରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେଇଥିଲା। ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷରେ ପାରାଗୁଏ ସମାନ ପଏଣ୍ଟ୍‌ ପାଇଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଗୋଲ୍‌ ବ୍ୟବଧାନରେ ପଛରେ ପଡ଼ି ତୃତୀୟ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ରହିବାରୁ ଏହାର ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ଅୖାଶା ଝୁଲି ରହିଛି। ଶ୍ରେଷ୍ଠ ତୃତୀୟ ଦଳ ଭାବେ ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ରେ ପ୍ରବେଶ ପାଇଁ ଏହି ଦଳ ଶେଷ ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଅପେକ୍ଷା କରିବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିବ।
World Cup: ରାଉଣ୍ଡ ୩୨କୁ ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍‌ସ, ଜାପାନ, ସ୍ବିଡେନ୍‌ର ଯୋଗ୍ୟତା

title: சென்னையில் போதைப்பொருள் ஒழிப்பு விழிப்புணர்வு மாரத்தான்: முதல்வர் விஜய் பங்கேற்பு
FIH Pro League: ଏଫ୍‌ଆଇଏଚ୍‌ ‌ପ୍ରୋ-ଲିଗ୍‌: ସୁଟ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ରେ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡଠୁ ହାରିଲା ଭାରତ
description:
ଲଣ୍ଡନ: ଚଳିତ ଏଫ୍‌ଆଇଏଚ୍‌ ପ୍ରୋ-ଲିଗ୍‌ର ଲଣ୍ଡନ ଲେଗ୍‌ରେ ପାକିସ୍ତାନକୁ ହରାଇ ଅଭିଯାନ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଥିବା ଭାରତ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଘରୋଇ ଦଳ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡଠୁ ହାରି ଯାଇଛି। କଡ଼ା ସଂଘର୍ଷପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଏହି ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ର ନିର୍ଦ୍ଧାରିତ ସମୟ ‌୨-୨ ଗୋଲ୍‌ରେ ଶେଷ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଫଳରେ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ସୁଟ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌କୁ ଯାଇଥିଲା। ଏଥିରେ ଭାରତ ୧-୪ରେ ପଛରେ ପଡ଼ି ପରାଜୟ ବରଣ କରି ୧ ପଏଣ୍ଟ୍‌ରେ ସନ୍ତୁଷ୍ଟ ରହିଛି।
ଭାରତ ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭିକ ଅଗ୍ରଣୀ ନେଇଥିଲା
ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ର ଦଶମ ମିନିଟ୍‌ରେ ଦିଲ୍‌ପ୍ରୀତ ସିଂହଙ୍କ ଫିଲ୍ଡ ଗୋଲ୍‌ରେ ଭାରତ ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭିକ ଅଗ୍ରଣୀ ନେଇଥିଲା। ଦ୍ବିତୀୟ କ୍ବାର୍ଟରରେ ଡେଭିଡ୍‌ ଗୁଡଫିଲ୍ଡ (୨୯ ମିନିଟ୍‌)ଙ୍କ ଗୋଲ୍‌ରେ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌କୁ ସମାନ ସ୍ତରକୁ ଆଣିଥିଲା। ତୃତୀୟ କ୍ବାର୍ଟର ଗୋଲ୍‌ଶୂନ୍ୟରେ ଶେଷ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ହେଲେ ଅନ୍ତିମ ତଥା ଚତୁର୍ଥ କ୍ବର୍ଟର ଶେଷ ୪ ମିନିଟ୍‌ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ରେ ରୋମାଞ୍ଚ ଭରିଥିଲା। ୫୬ତମ ମିନିଟ୍‌ରେ ଇଂଲଣ୍ଡକୁ ମିଳିଥିବା ପେନାଲ୍‌ଟି କର୍ଣ୍ଣରକୁ ନିକୋଲାସ ବନ୍‌ଦୁରାକ ଗୋଲ୍‌ରେ ପରିଣତ କରି ଘରୋଇ ଦଳକୁ ଆଗୁଆ କରିଥିଲେ। ହେଲେ ଏହାର ଦୁଇ ମିନିଟ୍‌ ପରେ ଦିଲପ୍ରୀତ ସିଂହ (୫୮ ମିନିଟ୍‌) ଫିଲ୍ଡ ଗୋଲ୍‌ ଦେଇ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଗତ ଯୁଗଳ ସଫଳତା ପାଇବା ସହ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌କୁ ସମାନସ୍ତରକୁ ଆଣିଥିଲେ। ସୁଟ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ରେ ଭାରତର କେବଳ ଅଧିନାୟକ ହର୍ମନପ୍ରୀତ ସିଂହ ଗୋଲ୍‌ କରିବାରେ ସଫଳ ହୋଇଥିଲେ।
World Cup: ରାଉଣ୍ଡ ୩୨କୁ ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍‌ସ, ଜାପାନ, ସ୍ବିଡେନ୍‌ର ଯୋଗ୍ୟତା

Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6, 8 Elite Gen 6 Pro Details Leak as Tipster Reveals Anticipated Rivals to MediaTek's Flagship Chips
description: Qualcomm unveiled the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 in September last year
content: Qualcomm’s next-generation flagship mobile processors could launch earlier than anticipated. According to a tipster, the US-based chipmaker is developing multiple Snapdragon 8-series processors based on both 2nm and 3nm manufacturing processes. They are tipped to be equipped with Qualcomm's next-generation Oryon CPU cores alongside updated Adreno GPUs and support for faster memory standards. The tipster also shed light on MediaTek's upcoming Dimensity 9600 Pro, claiming that it could rival Qualcomm's flagship silicon in GPU performance.
